Genesis6:15 Markkabiyaa hawaadan yaataade kees's'a; adussatetsaa heezzu s'eetu wad'aa, gomppaa ishatamu wad'aa, geesaa hattamu wad'aa ootsa;" 
Genesis9:18 Markkabiyaappe keseedda Nohe attuma naanay Seema, Kaamanne Yaafeeta; Kaame Kanaane aawuwaa." 
Exodus25:22 Markkatetsaa Taabootaa bolla k'umiyaa bolla de'iyaa laau kiruubetuwaappe gidduwaan taani neenana gakettaade Israa'eeliyaa asaw taani immiyaa azazuwaa ubbaa yaan new immana. 
Exodus27:21 Aaroonenne Aa naanay, s'omppii S'oossaa sintsaan k'ammeedda sa'ay wonttana gakkanaw poo'ana mala, Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon, Markkatetsaa Taabootaa sintsaan de'iyaa gaardduwaappe karenna eetsino. Hawe Israa'eeliyaa asaw med'inaw wotso woga gidiide de'o." 
Exodus32:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Muse tammu azazatuu unttunttun s'aafetti utteedda laau Markkatetsaa shuchchatuwaa bare kushiyaan oyk'k'iide, deriyaappe duge wod'd'eedda. He shuchchatuu laa""u bagganakka s'aafetteeddino." 
Numbers1:53 Shin S'oossaa hank'k'uu Israa'eeliyaa maabaraa bolla wod'd'enna mala, Leewatuu S'oossaa Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa yuushshuwaan barenttu dunkkaaniyaa dunkkaanino; Leewatuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan aawotino» yaageedda." 
Numbers7:89 Muse Med'inaa Godaana haasayanaw S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa geliyaa wode, Markkatetsaa Taabootaa bollan de'iyaa atto giyaa sa'aa k'um""uwaa bollan, laa""u kiruubetuwaappe gidduwaana Med'inaa Goday haasayiyaa kooshshaa siseedda; Ikka aanana haasayeedda." 
Numbers9:15 Dunkkaanii toletteedda gallassi shaarii Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa mayyeedda; omarssaappe doommiide, wonttana gakkanaw Dunkkaaniyaappe bollana de'iyaa shaarii tamaa malatee." 
Numbers10:11 Laaentsa laytsan laaentso aginaan laatamantsa gallassi, shaarii Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa bollappe denddeedda." 
Numbers17:4 Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon taani neenana gaketiyaa Markkatetsaa Taabootaa sintsan wotsa. 
Numbers17:7 Muse he s'amaa ubbaa Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon Med'inaa Godaa sintsan wotseedda. 
Numbers17:8 Wonttetsa gallassi Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddo Muse geleedda wode, Leewiyaa zare gidiyaa Aaroona s'am""ay aac'eeddawaa, gumbbeeddawaa, c'iisheeddawaanne c'iishiide lawuziyaa giyaa mitsaa ayfiyaa ayifeeddawaa be'eedda." 
Numbers18:2 Neeninne ne attuma naanay Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsan ootsiyaa wode, neenana gidiide maaddana mala, Leewiyaa zare gidiyaa ne dabbotuwaa aha." 
Numbers24:24 Markkabatuu Kitiima haruuruwaappe yaana; unttunttu Asooretuwaanne Ebeeratuwaa uk'k'unnana; Shin k'ay unttunttukka d'ayana» yaageedda. 
Joshua19:5 S'ik'ilaaga, Beeti-Markkaboota, Has'aari-Suusa," 
Joshua22:34 Roobeelanne Gaade zaratuu, «Ha yarshshuwaa sa'ay S'oossaa s'alaalay S'oossaa gidiyaawoo nu ubbaappe gidduwaan markka gidanawaa» yaageeddino; he yarshshuwaa sa'aa Markka suntseeddino." 
1Chronicles4:31 Beeti-Markkaboota, Hos'aari-Susiima, Beetibiiranne Shaa'irayma katamatuwaan de'eeddino. Daawite kaatetana gakkanaw hawanttu unttunttu katamatuwaa gidiide de'eeddino." 
Isaiah43:14 Med'inaa Goday, hinttena Woziyaawe, Israa'eeliyaa Geeshshay hawaadan yaagee; «Hintte diraw, Baabloone bolla olanchchatuwaa kiittaade Baabloonatuwaa unttunttu c'eek'k'etiyaa Markkabiyaanna betisana." 
Jeremiah32:25 Abeet Ubbaa Mooddiyaa Med'inaa Godaw, katamay Baabloonetoo imettanaw hanoodekka, neeni taana, ‹Markkatuwaa s'eesaade, shaluwaan ha gadiyaa shamma› yaagaadda» yaagaade woossaad." 
Ezekiel27:6 Markkabiyaa solddissanaw haatsaa guyye pushakkiyaa ne mook'etuwaa Baasaane etsaappe ootseeddino; ne wuyggiyaa K'op'iroosappe yeedda dumma s'iidaa sank'k'aan ootseeddino; he wuyggiyaa danggarssaa zaaliyaan alleek'k'etteedda. 
Ezekiel27:9 Markkabiyaa giddon zaedasaa shiddiyaawanttu Gebaalappe yeedda c'imatuwaanne eranchcha asatuwaa; abban biyaa markkabiyaa ubbaan de'iyaa oosanchchatuu ne gidon wod'a woy gujja giide palumetiide zaliino. 
Ezekiel27:28 Markkabiyaan biyaa asatuwaa waasuwaa kooshshay abbaa gas'aa gakkanaw sisettee. 
Ezekiel27:29 « ‹ «Markkabiyaa solddissiyaawanttunne laaggiyaawanttu ubbay barenttu markkabetuwaappe kesiide, abbaa gas'an ek'k'eeddino." 
Jonah1:6 Markkabiyaa kaappuu gemishaad biide, «Ayaw gem""ishaaddii? Dendda, ne s'oossaa woossa! Ooni erii, I bare lo""o ayfiyaan s'eelliide, nuuna ashshanaawenttone» yaageedda." 
Jonah1:7 Markkabiyaa laaggiyaawanttu ittuu ittoo hawaadan yaageeddino; «Haayite; ha iitabay nuuna O gaasuwaan gakeddenttone eranaw saamaa yeggoytte» yaageeddino. Saamaa yeggina, saamay Yoonaasa bollan wod'd'eedda." 
Matthew1:1 Hawe Daawita zariyaanne Abraahaame zare gideedda Yesuusi Kiristtoosa yeletaa odiyaa mas'aafaa. 
Matthew1:2 Abraahaame, Yisaak'a yeleedda; Yisaak'i, Yaak'ooba yeleedda; Yaak'oobi, Yihudaanne Aa ishatuwaa yeleedda." 
Matthew1:3 Yihuday Ti'imaarippe Paareesanne Zaraaha yeleedda; Paareese, Hes'iroona yeleedda; Hes'iroone, Raama yeleedda." 
Matthew1:4 Raame Aminaadaaba yeleedda; Aminaadaabe, Na'asoona yeleedda; Na'asoone, Selimoona yeleedda." 
Matthew1:5 Selimoone, Ra'aabo geetettiyaa mishirattippe Boo'eeza yeleedda; Boo'eezi, Uruuto geetettiyaa mishirattippe Iyyoobeedda yeleedda; Iyyoobeede, Issey yeleedda." 
Matthew1:6 Issey Kaatiyaa Daawita yeleedda. Kaatiyaa Daawite, Ooriyaa machchattippe Solomona yeleedda." 
Matthew1:7 Solomone, Robi'aama yeleedda; Robi'aame, Aabiyaa yeleedda; Abii, Asaafa yeleedda." 
Matthew1:8 Aasaafe, Yoosaafees'a yeleedda; Yoosaafees'e, Iyyooraama yeleedda; Iyyooraame, Ooziyaana yeleedda." 
Matthew1:9 Ooziyaane, Iyyoo'aataama yeleedda; Iyyoo'aataame, Akaaza yeleedda; Akaazi, Hizk'k'iyaasa yeleedda." 
Matthew1:10 Hizk'k'iyaase Minaasa yeleedda; Minaase, Amoos'a yeleedda; Amoos'e, Iyyoosiyaasa yeleedda." 
Matthew1:11 Israa'eeliyaa Asay omoddettiide, Baabloone gadiyaa beedda wode, Iyyoosiyaase Ikkoniyaananne Aa ishatuwaa yeleedda." 
Matthew1:12 Baabloone omooduwaappe guyyiyaan, Ikkoniyaananne Salaatiyaala yeleedda; Salaatiyaale, Zerubaabeela yeleedda." 
Matthew1:13 Zerubaabeeli, Abiyuuda yeleedda; Abiyuude, Eeliyaak'eema yeleedda; Eeliyaak'eemi, Azoora yeleedda." 
Matthew1:14 Azoore Saadook'a yeleedda; Saadook'e, Akiima yeleedda; Akiime Eliyuuda yeleedda." 
Matthew1:15 Eliyuude, Ali'aazara yeleedda; Ali'aazare, Maataana yeleedda; Maataane, Yaak'ooba yeleedda." 
Matthew1:16 Yaak'oobi, Kiristtoosa geetettiyaa Yesuusa yeleedda Mayraamo oochcheedda Yooseefa yeleedda." 
Matthew1:17 Simmi yeletay ubbay Abraahaamoppe Daawita gakkanaw tammanne oyddu yeletaa; Daawiteppe doommiide, Asay Baabloone gadiyaa omoddettiide beedda wodiyaa gakkanaw tammanne oyddu yeletaa; Asay Baabloone gadiyaa omoddettiide beedda wodiyaappe Kiristtoosi yeletteedda wodiyaa gakkanaw tammanne oyddu yeletaa." 
Matthew1:18 Yesuusi Kiristtoosa yeletay hawaa mala; Aa daaya Mayraama Yooseefoo ooshetta k'ashetta uttaaddu. He wode Yooseefonna gakettennaan de'aadde, Geeshsha Ayyaanan shahaaraaddu." 
Matthew1:19 Izo giigissi wotseedda Yooseefo s'illo asaa gideedda diraw, izo kawushshanaw koyyibeenna; iibaa k'onc'c'issennaan izo agganaw k'oppeedda." 
Matthew1:20 Shin I hewaa k'oppishin, Godaa kiitanchchay akumuwaan aanana gakettiide, «Daawite na'aa Yooseefoo, Mayraama Geeshsha Ayyaanan shahaareedda diraw izo akkanaw yayyoppa." 
Matthew1:21 Iza attuma na'aa yelanawunnu; neenikka, I asaa nagaraappe ashshiyaa diraw Aa suntsaa Yesuusa gaade s'eesanaassa» yaageedda." 
Matthew1:22 K'ay Goday nabiyaa baggana, «Wodoratta shahaaranawunnu; na'aakka yelanawunnu; Aa suntsaykka Ammaneela geetettanawaa» yaageeddawe polettana mala, hawe ubbay haaneedda; «Ammaneela» yaagiyaawe, «S'oossay nuunanna de'ee» yaagiyaawaa." 
Matthew1:23  
Matthew1:24 Yooseefo gemishuwaappe beegottiide, Godaa kiitanchchay barena azazowaadan, Mayraamo bare golle afeedda." 
Matthew1:25 Shin na'ay yelettana gakkanaw Yooseefo izikko shiik'ibeenna; k'ay na'aakka Yesuusa giide suntseedda. 
Matthew2:1 Yesuusi Yihudaa gadiyaan Beeteleeme geetettiyaa katamaan Heroodise kawutiide de'iyaa wode yeletteedda; hewaappe guyyiyaan, s'oolinttiyaa paydiyaa asay awayifii doliyaa baggappe Yerusaalame yiide," 
Matthew2:2 «Ayihuda kaatiyaa gidanaw yeletteedda na'ay hak'an de'ii? Nuuni awayifii doliyaa baggana keseedda Aa s'oolinttiyaa be'iide, aw goyinnanaw yeeddo» yaagiide oochcheeddino." 
Matthew2:3 Kaatiyaa Heroodise, hewaa sisiide dagammeedda; Yerusaalamen de'iyaa Asay ubbaykka wozanaa bayeeddino." 
Matthew2:4 Heroodise k'eesatuwaa kaappatuwaa ubbatuwaanne Muse higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawantta s'eesiide, «Kiristtoosi hak'an yelettanddeeshsha?» yaagiide oochcheedda." 
Matthew2:5 Unttunttu zaariide, «Yihudaa gadiyaan Beeteleeme katamaan yelettanawaa. Nabii, « ‹Yihudaa gadiyaan de'iyaa Beeteleeme, neeni Yihudaa gadiyaan de'iyaa wolk'k'aama katamatuwaappe laafakka. Israa'eeliyaa mooddiyaawe neeppe kesanawaa› giide s'aafeedda» yaageeddino." 
Matthew2:6  
Matthew2:7 Hewaappe kaala, Heroodise awayifii doliyaa baggappe yeedda asatuwaa geeman s'eesiide, s'oolinttii unttunttoo beetteedda wodiyaa unttunttuppe geeshshiide ereedda." 
Matthew2:8 Yaatiide Beeteleeme unttuntta yeddiidde, «Biide na'aa loytsi koyyite; Aa demmeedda wode taanikka baade aw goyinnanaadan, taanakka erissite» yaageedda." 
Matthew2:9 Unttunttu kaatii geeddawaa sisi biidde ogiyaan awayifii doliyaa baggana unttunttu kase be'eedda s'oolinttiyaa be'eeddino; na'ay de'iyaasaa gakkiide ek'k'ana gakkanaw, s'oolinttii unttuntta kaaletseedda." 
Matthew2:10 Unttunttu he s'oolinttiyaa be'eedda wode, zaway baynna daro nashechchaa nashetteeddino." 
Matthew2:11 Golle geliide, na'ay bare daay Mayraaminna de'iyaawaa be'eeddino; gulbbatiide aw goyinneeddino; hewaappe kaala, barenttu saas'iniyaa dooyyiide, work'k'aa, is'aanaanne kawaraa aw imotaa shiishsheeddino." 
Matthew2:12 Unttunttu Heroodisakko simmenna mala, S'oossay akumuwaan unttuntta, «Hinttena erite» giina hara ogiyaanna barenttu gade simmeeddino." 
Matthew2:13 Unttunttu beeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Godaa kiitanchchay akumuwaan Yooseefoo beettiide, «Heroodise na'aa wod'anaw koyyiyaa diraw, denddaade na'aanne Aa daayo akkaade Gibs'e gadiyaa beta; taani new odana gakkanaw, yaan de'ashsha» yaageedda." 
Matthew2:14 Yooseefo k'amma denddiide, na'aanne Aa daayo akkiide, Gibs'e gadiyaa beedda; Goday nabiyaa baggana, «Taani ta na'aa Gibs'e gadiyaappe s'eesaad» yaageeddawe polettana mala, Heroodise hayk'k'ana gakkanaw I yaan de'eedda." 
Matthew2:15  
Matthew2:16 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Heroodise awayifii doliyaa baggappe yeeddawanttu barena c'immeeddawaa ereedda wode, daro hank'k'ettiide, s'oolinttii kase beetteedda wodiyaa unttunttuppe siseeddawaadan, wotaadaratuwaa yeddiide, Beeteleemeninne yuushshuwaan de'iyaa laa""u laytsaa attuma naanaanne laa""u laytsaappe garssanna de'iyaa attuma naanaa ubbaa wod'iseedda." 
Matthew2:17 Nabiyaa Ermaasi, «Yeekuunne zilaassay Raama geetettiyaa katamaan sisetteedda; Raaheela bare naanaw yeekkaw. Unttunttu hayk'k'idiggo diraw, agga giina, aggenaan is's'aaddu» giide odeeddawe poletteedda." 
Matthew2:18  
Matthew2:19 Heroodise hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Godaa kiitanchchay Gibs'en Yooseefoo akumuwaan beettiide" 
Matthew2:20 Aa, «Dendda; na'aanne Aa daayo akkaade, Israa'eeliyaa gadiyaa simma. Na'aa wod'anaw koyyiyaawanttu hayk'k'i diggeeddino» yaageedda." 
Matthew2:21 Yooseefo denddiide, na'aanne Aa daayo akkiide, Israa'eeliyaa simmeedda." 
Matthew2:22 Shin Yooseefo Arkkelawoosi bare aawuwaa Heroodisa oydiyaan Yihudaa gadiyaan kawuteeddawaa siseedda wode, yaa baanaw yayyeedda; S'oossay aw akumuwaan hinttena erite giina, Galiilaa gadiyaa beedda." 
Matthew2:23 Nabatuu, «Asay Aa, ‹Naazireetiyaa asaa› giide s'eesana» yaageeddawe polettana mala, Naazireete geetettiyaa katamaa biide de'eedda." 
Matthew3:1 He wode S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisi asaa, «Saluwaa kawutetsay matatteedda diraw, hintte nagaraappe simmite» yaagiidde, Yihudaa mela biittaan odiidde yeedda." 
Matthew3:2  
Matthew3:3 Ayaw gooppe, nabiyaa Isiyaase, Yohaannisabaa odiidde, «Ittuu mela biittaan bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, ‹Godaa ogiyaa giigissite. I hemettana loossuwaakka aw sitti ootsite› geedda» yaageedda." 
Matthew3:4 Yohaannisaw gaaluwaa isikiyaa dadetteedda mayuu de'ee; k'ay bare s'eessan dafuwaa danc'c'eedda; I miyaa k'umaykka booliyaanne bazzuwaa eessaa. 
Matthew3:5 Asay he wode Yerusaalameppe, Yihudaa gadiyaa ubbaa saappenne Yorddaanoosa Shaafaa heeraan de'iyaa gadiyaa ubbaappe aakko yiino." 
Matthew3:6 Barenttu nagaraa paas'ina, Yorddaanoosa Shaafaan asaa s'ammak'eedda." 
Matthew3:7 Shin Yohaannisi daro Parisaawatuunne Saduk'aawanatuu s'ammak'ettanaw barekko yiyaawantta be'iide, «Ha shooshshatoo, S'oossaa hank'k'uu yaana haniyaawaappe attana mala, hinttew oonee odeeddawe?" 
Matthew3:8 Simmi hintte, hinttenttu nagaraappe simmeeddawaa erissiyaa oosuwaa, ootsite." 
Matthew3:9 Hintte hinttenttu wozanaan, ‹Abraahaame nu aabba› giide k'oppiyaawaa hinttew malatoppo. Ayaw gooppe, taani hinttenttoo oday; S'oossay ha shuchchatuwaappe Abraahaamoo naanaa ootsi dentsanaw danddayee." 
Matthew3:10 Bees'i mitsaa s'ap'uwaan k'ans's'anaw giigi utteedda; loo ayfiyaa ayfena mitsaa ubbay k'ans's'ettiide, tamaan yegettana." 
Matthew3:11 «Hintte hinttenttu nagaraappe simmiyaawaa bessanaw, taani hinttena haatsaan s'ammak'ay; shin taappe guyyenna yiyaawe, hinttentta Geeshsha Ayyaanaaninne tamaan s'ammak'ana. I taappe daro minnee; Aa c'aammaa tookkanawukka taani bessiyaa asaa gidikke." 
Matthew3:12 Aa kushiyan katsaa ses's'iyaa layday de'ee. Uddumaan de'iyaa katsaa loytsi geeshshee; bare zarggaa diyiyaan k'olana; shin dalaa to'enna tamaan guuddana» yaageedda. 
Matthew3:13 Yesuusi he wode Yohaannisan s'ammak'ettanaw, Galiilaappe Yorddaanoosa geetettiyaa shaafaa aakko beedda." 
Matthew3:14 Shin Yohaannisi, «Taani neenan s'ammak'ettanaw bessiyaa wode, neeni taakko yay?» yaagiide, Aa digganaw koyyeedda." 
Matthew3:15 Shin Yesuusi zaariide Aa, «Nuuni s'illotetsaa oosuwaa ubbaa hawaadan polanaw bessiyaa diraw, ha""i taw eeno ga» yaageedda. Yohaannisikka aw eeno geedda." 
Matthew3:16 Yesuusi s'ammak'ettowaappe guyyiyaan, ellekka haatsaappe keseedda; saluu dooyettina, S'oossaa Ayyaanay harap'p'iyaadan saluwaappe wod'd'iide bare bolla yiyaa wode be'eedda;" 
Matthew3:17 k'ay saluwaappe, «Taani siik'iyaa, taana nashechchiyaa, ta Na'ay hawaa» yaagiyaa k'aalay yeedda." 
Matthew4:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, s'alahiyaan paac'ettana mala, Geeshsha Ayyaanay Asay de'enna sa'aa Yesuusa afeedda." 
Matthew4:2 Yesuusi oytamu gallassaanne oytamu k'ammaa s'oomowaappe guyyiyaan koshatteedda. 
Matthew4:3 S'alahii yiide Aa, «Neeni S'oossaa Na'aa gidooppe, ane ha shuchchatuwaa ukitsaa gidana mala ga» yaageedda." 
Matthew4:4 Shin Yesuusi zaariide, «S'oossaa mas'aafaan, ‹Asay S'oossay haasayiyaa k'aalaa ubbaan de'anaappe attin, ukitsaa s'alalaan de'enna› yaagetti s'aafetteedda» yaageedda." 
Matthew4:5 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, s'alahii Yesuusa geeshsha katamaa afi Geeshsha Golliyaa s'eeraan essiide," 
Matthew4:6 «Neeni S'oossaa Na'aa gidooppe, ane duge kundda. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa mas'aafaan, « ‹S'oossay bare kiitanchchatuwaa new azazanawaa› k'ay ‹Unttunttu ne gedii shuchchaan d'ubettenna mala, barenttu kushiyan neena dentsanawantta› yaagetti s'aafetteedda» yaageedda." 
Matthew4:7 Yesuusi zaariide Aa, «K'aykka S'oossaa mas'aafaan, ‹Godaa ne S'oossaa paac'c'oppa› yaagetti s'aafetteedda» yaageedda." 
Matthew4:8 K'ay s'alahii Yesuusa itti daro wolk'k'aama deriyaa s'eeraa kessiide, ha alamiyaan de'iyaa kawutetsaa ubbaanne unttunttu bonchchuwaa" 
Matthew4:9 bessiide Aa, «Neeni taw gulbbataade goyinnooppe, taani hawaa ubbaa new immana» yaageedda." 
Matthew4:10 He wode Yesuusi zaariide Aa, «Laa ha Sees'aanaw haakka; ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa mas'aafaan, ‹Godaw, ne S'oossaw goyinna; Aa s'alalaa gosheta› geetetti s'aafetteedda» yaageedda." 
Matthew4:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, s'alahii Yesuusa aggina, kiitanchchatuu yiide, aw ootseeddino." 
Matthew4:12 Yohaannisi k'ashetteeddawaa Yesuusi siseedda wode, Galiilaa geetettiyaa gadiyaa beedda." 
Matthew4:13 Naazireeteppe kesiide, K'ifirinaahooma katamaa biide, yaan de'eedda; K'ifirinaahoomi Zaabiloonaninne Nifttaaleeme gadiyaan de'iyaa Galiilaa abbaa mataan de'ee." 
Matthew4:14 Hawe haneeddawe nabiyaa Isiyaasi," 
Matthew4:15 «Zaabiloone gadiyaaninne Nifttaaleeme gadiyaan, abbaa ogiyaan Yorddaanoosa Shaafaappe hefintsa baggan, Ayihuda gidenna Asay de'iyaa Galiilaan," 
Matthew4:16 d'umaan de'iyaa asay, wolk'k'aama poo'uwaa be'eedda. K'ay hayk'uwaa kuway de'iyaa gadiyaan utteeddawanttoo poo'uu keseedda» yaageeddawe polettana malaasa." 
Matthew4:17 He wodiyaappe doommiide Yesuusi, «Hintte nagaraa paas'ite; ayaw gooppe, saluwaa kawutetsay matatteedda diraassa» giide k'aalaa oduwaa doommeedda." 
Matthew4:18 Yesuusi Galiilaa Abbaa mataanna aad'd'iidde, laa""u ishatuu P'es'iroosa geetettiyaa Simooninne Aa ishaa Inddiraasi, moliyaa oyk'k'iyaawantta gido diraw, dabbaa abbaan yeggiyaawantta be'eedda." 
Matthew4:19 Unttuntta, «Taana kaallite; taani hinttena moliyaa oyk'k'iyaawaadan asaa taakko ahiyaa ogiyaa tamaarissana» yaageedda." 
Matthew4:20 Unttunttu ellekka barenttu dabbaa aggiide, Yesuusa kaalleeddino." 
Matthew4:21 Yesuusi hewaappe sintsakko biidde, hara laa""u ishatuwaa, Zabddiyoosa naanaa Yaak'oobanne Aa ishaa Yohaannisa be'eedda; unttunttu barenttu aawuwaa Zabddiyoosanna haatsaa bollan biyaa wonggiriyaa giddon barenttu dabbaa giigissiyaawantta be'iide, s'eeseedda." 
Matthew4:22 Unttunttu ellekka haatsaan biyaa wonggiriyaanne barenttu aawuwaa aggiide, Yesuusa kaalleeddino." 
Matthew4:23 Yesuusi Ayihuda woosa golletuwaan tamaarissiidde, kawutetsaa mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odiiddinne k'ay harggiyaa ubbaappenne sakuwaa ubbaappe asaa patsiidde, Galiilaa gadiyaa ubbaan yuuyyeedda." 
Matthew4:24 Aa waarii Sooriyaa gadiyaa ubbaa gakkeedda; dumma dumma harggiyaan oyk'ettiide harggeedda asaa ubbaa, s'alahatuwaan oyk'etteeddawantta, yiic'uwaa sakuu de'iyaawantta, k'ay gunddeeddawantta Asay Yesuusakko aheedda; I unttuntta patseedda." 
Matthew4:25 C'ora Asay Galiilaappe, tammu katamatuwaappe, Yerusaalameppe, Yihudaappenne Yorddaanoosappe hefintsan de'iyaa gadiyaappe Yesuusa kaalleeddino." 
Matthew5:1 Yesuusi c'ora asaa be'iide, pude deriyaa kesiide utteedda. Aa kaalliyaawanttu aakko shiik'eeddino." 
Matthew5:2 Unttuntta hawaadan yaagi tamaarissuwaa doommeedda. 
Matthew5:3 «Barenttu ayaanaa de'uwaan, hiyyeesaa gideeddawaa eriyaawanttu anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, saluwaa kawutetsay unttunttussa." 
Matthew5:4 Kayyottiyaawanttu anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay unttuntta minisana." 
Matthew5:5 Ashikke gideeddawanttu anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu sa'aa laattana." 
Matthew5:6 S'illotetsaa koshattiyaawanttunne saamettiyaawanttu, anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay unttuntta kalissana." 
Matthew5:7 Maariyaawanttu anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay unttuntta maarana." 
Matthew5:8 Wozanaa geeshshatuu anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu S'oossaa be'ana." 
Matthew5:9 Asaa sigetsiyaawanttu anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay unttuntta, bare naanaa giide s'eesana." 
Matthew5:10 S'illotetsaa diraw, yederssettiyaawanttu anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, saluwaa kawutetsay unttunttussa." 
Matthew5:11 «Hintte taana kaalliyaa diraw, Asay hinttena boriyaa wodenne waayissiyaa wode, k'ay hintte bolla iitabaa ubbaa wordduwaan haasayiyaa wode, hintte anjjetteeddawantta." 
Matthew5:12 Hinttew saluwaan wolk'k'aama woytay de'iyaa diraw, nashettite; hashshu giite; ayaw gooppe, Asay hintteppe kase de'eedda nabatuwaa hewaadan yedersseeddino." 
Matthew5:13 «Asaa ubbaw hintte mas'ine mala; shin mas'inii malana d'ayooppe, zaariide Aa wooti mal""etsanee? Kare olina, Asay Aa yed'd'i hamettanaappe attin, sintsaw ayinne maaddenna." 
Matthew5:14 «Ha alamew hintte poo'o; deriyaa huup'iyaan kees'etteedda katamay geemmana danddayenna. 
Matthew5:15 S'omppiyaa s'omppiide, soyin de'iyaa asaa ubbaw poo'ana mala, d'ok'k'iyaa saan wotseeppe attin, kammiyaa miishshaa giddon k'um""i wotsiyaa Asay ooninne baawa." 
Matthew5:16 Hewaadankka, Asay hintte ootsiyaa lo""o oosuwaa be'iide, saluwaan de'iyaa hintte Aawuwaa bonchchana mala, hintte poo'uu asaa sintsaan poo'o." 
Matthew5:17 «Taani Muse higgiyaanne nabatuu tamaarissiyaawaa d'ayissanaw yeeddawaa hinttew malatoppo; taani polanaw yeeddawaappe attin, d'ayissanaw yabeykke." 
Matthew5:18 Ayaw gooppe, taani hinttew tumuwaa oday; saluunne sa'ay aad'd'ana gakkanaw, k'ay ubbabaykka polettana gakkanaw, higgiyaappe itti c'achchaykka woy k'eeri pidoliikka aad'd'enna." 
Matthew5:19 Hewaa diraw, ha azazuwaa ubbaappe guus's'iyaa itti azazuwaa mentsiyaa uray ooninne, k'ay haratuukka barewaadan hananaadan tamaarissiyaa uray ooninne, saluwaa kawutetsaan ubbaappe guutsa gidana; shin azazuwaa ootsiyaawenne haranttukka ootsanaadan tamaarissiyaawe ooninne saluwaa kawutetsaan d'ok'k'a gidana." 
Matthew5:20 Ayaw gooppe, hintte s'illotetsay Muse higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttu s'illotetsaappenne Parisaawatuwaa s'illotetsaappe darana d'ayooppe, saluwaa kawutetsaa hintte mule gelennawaa taani oday." 
Matthew5:21 «Beni asaw, ‹Asaa wod'oppa; asaa wod'eedda ooninne pirddettana› geeddawaa siseeddita." 
Matthew5:22 Shin taani hinttew oday; bare ishaa hank'k'ettiyaa ubbay pirddettana; bare ishaa boriyaa ubbay shangguwaa pirddaw shiik'ana; k'ay bare ishaa, ‹D'ullowe› giyaa ubbay Gaannamiyaa tamaa pirddaw shiik'ana." 
Matthew5:23 Hewaa diraw, neeni yarshshiyaasaan yarshshishshin, ne ishaa naak'k'eeddabay new hewaan hassayettooppe," 
Matthew5:24 ne yarshshuwaa hewaan aggaade ba; kasetaade ne ishaanna sigetta digga; hewaappe kaala yaade, ne yarshshuwaa yarshsha." 
Matthew5:25 «Neena mootiyaawaanna wodii de'ishshin elle aanana sigetta digga; hewe d'ayooppe, I neena daannaa sintsa aatsana; k'ay daannay neena polisew aatsi immina, polisii neena k'asho gollen yeggana." 
Matthew5:26 Taani new tumuwaa oday; neeni itti santtimii attenaan, ne maggac'c'uwaa wurssaade c'iggana gakkanaw, mulekka k'asho golleppe kesakka." 
Matthew5:27 « ‹Woshummoppa› geeddawaa siseeddita. 
Matthew5:28 Shin taani hinttew yaagay; ‹Mac'c'awuno s'eelliide amottiyaa ubbay, bare wozanaa giddon he wode iinanna woshummeedda.›" 
Matthew5:29 Ne ushechcha ayfii neena nagaraa oosisooppe, neeppe wooc'aade olaa agga; ayaw gooppe, ne bollay mulekka Gaannamiyaa tamaan olettiyaawaappe, aappe ittuu pac'c'intto new lo""a." 
Matthew5:30 K'ay ne ushechcha kushii neena nagaraa oosisooppe, neeppe k'ans's'aade olaa agga; ayaw gooppe, ne bollay mulekka Gaannamiyaa tamaan olettiyaawaappe, aappe ittuu pac'c'intto new lo""a." 
Matthew5:31 « ‹K'ay bare machchatto yeddiyaa ooninne izo yeddiyaa paramaa immo› geetetteedda. 
Matthew5:32 Shin taani hinttew yaagay; ‹Bare machchata woshummennaan de'ishshin yeddiyaa ooninne izo woshumma kessee; k'ay asinay yeddeedda mishiratto akkiyaawe ooninne woshummee.› 
Matthew5:33 «K'ay beni asaw, ‹Wordduwaan c'aak'k'oppa; shin ne Godaw c'aak'k'eeddawaa pola› geeddawaa siseeddita." 
Matthew5:34 Shin taani hinttew yaagay; ‹Ubbakka c'aak'k'oppite›; saluu S'oossaa kawutetsaa oydiyaa gidiyaa diraw, ‹Saluwaan c'aak'k'oppite›" 
Matthew5:35 k'ay sa'ay Aa gedii yed'd'iyaa sa'aa gidiyaa diraw, ‹Sa'aan c'aak'k'oppite›; k'aykka, Yerusaalame wolk'k'aama kaatiyaa katamaa gidiyaa diraw, ‹Yerusaalamenikka c'aak'k'oppite.›" 
Matthew5:36 Neeni itti binnanaakka bootsa woy karetsa kessanaw danddayenna diraw, ‹Ne huup'iyankka c'aak'k'oppa.›" 
Matthew5:37 Shin hintte, ‹Ee› woy, ‹Gidenna› giite; hawanttuppe haray Sees'aanaappe yee." 
Matthew5:38 « ‹Ayifiyaa diraw ayifiyaa; achchaa diraw achchaa› geeddawaa siseeddita. 
Matthew5:39 Shin taani hinttew yaagay; ‹Hinttew iitabaa ootsiyaa uraw iitan zaaroppite; ooninne ne ushechcha bagga shayiyaa bak'k'ooppe, ne haddirssa bagga shayiyaakka Aa bessa;" 
Matthew5:40 ne shaamic'c'iyaa akkanaw itti uray neena mootooppe, he uraw ne kootiyaakka gujja imma." 
Matthew5:41 Ooninne neena itti saatiyaa ogiyaa barenanna baanaadan wolk'k'antsooppe, aanana laa""u saatiyaa ogiyaa ba." 
Matthew5:42 Neena woossiyaa uraw imma; k'ay neeppe talana koyyiyaa urawukka diggoppa.› 
Matthew5:43 « ‹Ne laggetsatuwaa siik'a; ne morkkiyaa morkka› geeddawaa siseeddita. 
Matthew5:44 Shin taani hinttew yaagay; saluwaan de'iyaa hintte Aawoo naanaa gidana mala, hintte morkkatuwaa siik'ite; hinttena shek'k'iyaawantta anjjite; hinttena is's'iyaawanttoo lo""obaa ootsite; hinttena yederssiyaawanttoo, S'oossaa woossite; ayaw gooppe, iita asawukka lo""o asawukka S'oossay bare aawaa awas's'issee; k'ay s'illatookka nagaranchchatookka bare iraa bukissee." 
Matthew5:45  
Matthew5:46 Hintte hinttena siik'iyaawanttu s'alalaa siik'ooppe, hinttew ay woytay de'ii? Haray atto, nagaranchchatuukka hewaadan ootsiino." 
Matthew5:47 Hintte hinttenttu ishatuwaa s'alalaa sarotooppe, haratuu ootsiyaawaappe aad'd'iyaabaa ayaa ootseeditee? Haray atto, Ayihude gidenna asaykka hewaadan ootsee." 
Matthew5:48 Hewaa diraw, saluwaan de'iyaa hintte Aawuu polo gidowaadan, hinttekka polo gidite." 
Matthew6:1 «Hintte loo oosuwaa asaa bessanaw asaa sintsaan ootsenna mala naagettite; hewe d'ayooppe, saluwaan de'iyaa hintte Aawuu hinttew gatiyaa immenna." 
Matthew6:2 «Hewaa diraw, hintte awudenne hiyyeesaw immiyaa wode, lo""a malatiyaa iitatuu barentta bonchchissanaw, Ayihuda woosa golleninne ogiyaan haraani be'ettanaw ootsiyaawaadan ootsoppite; taani hinttew tumuwaa oday; unttunttu barenttu gatiyaa akki diggeeddino." 
Matthew6:3 Shin neeni hiyyeesaw immiyaa wode, geeman immanaadan, ne ushechcha kushii ootsiyaawaa haddirssa kushii eroppo. Geeman ootseeddawaa be'iyaa ne Aabbu, ne lo""o oosuwaa gatiyaa zaaranawaa." 
Matthew6:4  
Matthew6:5 «S'oossaa woossiidde, lo""a malatiyaa iitatuwaadan hanoppite; ayaw gooppe, barentta Asay be'ana mala, Ayihuda woosa golleninne ogiyaa doonaan ek'k'iide, S'oossaa woossiyaawaa dosiino; taani hinttew tumuwaa oday; unttunttu barenttu gatiyaa ubbaakka akkeeddino." 
Matthew6:6 Shin neeni S'oossaa woossiyaa wode, ne golle gela; ifitsaa k'achchaade, beettena ne Aawuwaa woossa; geeman oosettowaa be'iyaa ne Aabbu new immanawaa." 
Matthew6:7 «S'oossaa hintte woossiyaa wode, S'oossaa ammanenna asaadan, c'oo mela zaaretsuwaa darissoppite; unttunttu haasayaa daruwaan sisettee giide k'oppiino." 
Matthew6:8 Hewaa diraw, he asaadan hanoppite; ayaw gooppe, hintte Aabbu hinttena koshshiyaawaa hinttenttu woossanaappe kasetiide eree." 
Matthew6:9 «Simmi hinttenttu hawaa mala woosaa woossite; « ‹Saluwaan de'iyaa nu Aabboo, ne geeshsha suntsay anjjetto." 
Matthew6:10 Ne Kawutetsay yo; ne shenii saluwaan haneeddawaadan, saankka hano." 
Matthew6:11 Gallassaan gallassan koshshiyaa k'umaa nuw hachche imma. 
Matthew6:12 Nuuni nuuna naak'k'owanttoo atto yaagiyaawaadan, neenikka nu naak'uwaa atto ga." 
Matthew6:13 Nuuna iitabaappe ashshappe attin, paac'iyaan gelissoppa. Kawutetsay, wolk'k'aynne bonchchuu med'inawukka neessa. Amen""i.›" 
Matthew6:14 «Hinttenttu hinttena naak'k'eedda hara asaa naak'uwaa atto gooppe, saluwaan de'iyaa hinttenttu Aawuukka hinttew atto gaana." 
Matthew6:15 «Shin hinttenttu hinttena naak'k'eedda hara asaa naak'uwaa atto gaana d'ayooppe, hinttenttu Aawuukka hintte naak'uwaa atto geena." 
Matthew6:16 «K'ay hinttenttu s'oomiyaa wode, lo""a malatiyaa iitatuwaadan, kayyottiyaawaa malatoppite; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu s'oomiyaawaa Asay be'ana mala, barenttu som""iyaa bullaalissiino; taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; unttunttu barenttu gatiyaa akkeeddino." 
Matthew6:17 «Shin hinttenttu s'oomiyaa wode, hinttenttu Aabbu hintte s'oomiyaawaa erooppe attin, Asay erenna mala, hintte som""iyaa meec'ettite; hintte huup'iyaakka okettite; yaatooppe, beettena hintte Aawuu hinttenttu ootsiyaawaa geeman be'iide, hintte gatiyaa immanawaa." 
Matthew6:18  
Matthew6:19 «Miishshaa bilay miyasaaninne biratay shi'iide bayizziyaasan, kayisuukka bookkiide wuu""iyaasan, ha sa'aan hinttenttu huup'iyaw dagayoppite." 
Matthew6:20 Shin bilay meennasaaninne shi'enna saan, kayisuukka bookkiide wuu""enna saan hinttenttu huup'iyaw saluwaan miishshaa dagayite." 
Matthew6:21 Ayaw gooppe, ne wozanay ne miishshay de'iyaa saan de'ana." 
Matthew6:22 «Bollaa poo'uu ayfiyaa; hewaa diraw, ne ayfii pas'a gidooppe, ne bollaa ubbay poo'o gidana." 
Matthew6:23 Shin ne ayfii pas'a gidana d'ayooppe, ne bollaa ubbay d'umana; simmi neenan de'iyaa poo'uu d'umooppe, d'umay ay keenaa daranee!" 
Matthew6:24 «Laau godatoo moodettanaw danddayiyaawe ooninne baawa; ayaw gooppe, ittuwaa is's'iide, yekkuwaa siik'ee; woy ittuwaa bonchchiidde, yekkuwaa kad'ee; itti Asay S'oossawunne shaloo moodettanaw danddayenna." 
Matthew6:25 «Hewaa diraw, taani hinttenttoo oday; hintte de'oo maanabawunne ushanabaw, woy hintte bollaw mayyanabaw hirggoppite; shemppuu k'umaappe aad'd'ennee? K'ay bollay mayuwaappe aad'd'ennee?" 
Matthew6:26 Paalliyaa kafatuwaa s'eellite; unttunttu zerikkino; c'akkikkino; diyyiyankka k'olikkino; shin saluwaan de'iyaa hinttenttu Aawuu unttuntta mizee; hinttenttu unttunttuppe loytsi darikkitee? 
Matthew6:27 Hinttenttu giddon darssi hirggiide, bare geesaa bolla itti wad'aa gujjanaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
Matthew6:28 «Ayaw mayoo hirggiitee? Dembban de'iyaa c'iishshatuu wooti dic'c'iinontto, akeeki s'eellite; unttunttu daaburikkino woy puuttuwaa suk'k'ikkino." 
Matthew6:29 Shin taani hinttenttoo oday; haray atto, Solomone hewaa keena bonchchetteeddawaa gidiidde, he c'iishshatuwaappe ittuwaa malaakka mayyibeenna." 
Matthew6:30 Shin laafa ammanuu de'iyaawanttoo, S'oossay, hachche de'iide, wontti tamaan ees's'iyaa dembbaa maataa mayzziyaawe, hinttena unttuwaappe aatsiide wooti mayzzennee?" 
Matthew6:31 Simmi, ‹Nuuni ayaa maanee? Woy ayaa ushanee? Woy ayaa mayyanee?› yaagiide hirggoppite." 
Matthew6:32 Ayaw gooppe, he ubbabaa S'oossaa ammanennawanttu darissiide koyyiino; he ubbay hinttena koshshiyaawaa saluwaan de'iyaa hinttenttu Aawuu eree." 
Matthew6:33 Shin kasetiide, S'oossaa kawutetsaanne Aa s'illotetsaa koyyite; I hinttenttoo he ubbabaa immana." 
Matthew6:34 Hewaa diraw, wonttibaw hirggoppite; ayaw gooppe, wontti gallassay barew hirggana; gallassaa ubbawukka Aa huup'ew gidiyaa waayyii de'ee." 
Matthew7:1 «S'oossay hinttenttu bolla pirddenna mala, hinttekka haratuwaa bolla pirddoppite." 
Matthew7:2 Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu haratuwaa bolla pirddiyaawaadan, S'oossay hinttenttu bolla pirddana; k'ay hinttenttu haratoo immanaw makkiyaabaan I hinttew makkana." 
Matthew7:3 Ne ayfiyaan de'iyaa tuussaa be'akka; shin ne ishaa ayfiyaan de'iyaa suullaa ayaw s'eellay? 
Matthew7:4 Woy ne ayfiyaan tuussay de'ishshin, neeni ne ishaa, ‹Taani ne ayfiyaappe suullaa kessoo› waanaade gaanaw danddayay?" 
Matthew7:5 Laa ha louwaa malatiyaa iitaw! Kasetaade ne ayfiyaappe tuussaa kessa digga; hewaappe guyyiyaan, ne ishaa ayfiyaappe suullaa kessanaw geeshshaade s'eellanaw danddayaa." 
Matthew7:6 «Geeshshabaa kanatoo immoppite; unttunttu guyye simmiide, hinttena sa""ana. K'ay ink'k'uwaa geetettiyaa hinttenttu al""o shuchchaa guduntsatuwaa sintsan oloppite; unttunttu barenttu gediyaan yed'd'ana." 
Matthew7:7 «Woossite; hintte akkana. Koyyite; hintte demmana. Kariyaakko yiide s'eesite; hinttew penggii dooyettana. 
Matthew7:8 Ayaw gooppe, woossiyaa ubbay akkana; koyyiyaa uray demmana; k'ay kariyaakko yiide s'eesiyaa uraw penggii dooyettana." 
Matthew7:9 Woy hinttenttu giddon bare na'ay, ‹Ukitsaa imma› gooppe, shuchchaa immiyaa aawuu de'ii?" 
Matthew7:10 K'ay, ‹Moliyaa imma› gooppe, aw shooshshaa immanawee?" 
Matthew7:11 Hinttenttu iita gidiidde, hinttenttu naanaatoo lo""obaa immiyaawaa erooppe, yaatina, saluwaan de'iyaa hinttenttu Aawuu barena woossiyaawanttoo lo""obaa wooti darssi immennee!" 
Matthew7:12 «Hewaa diraw, hara Asay hinttew ootsanaw koyyiyaa ubbabaa hinttekka asaw ootsite; ayaw gooppe, Muse higgiyaa biletsaynne nabatuu tamaarissiyaawe hawaa." 
Matthew7:13 «Una penggiyaanna gelite. Ayaw gooppe, bayetsaw afiyaa penggii aakuwaa; ogiikka wogaa. Hewaanna geliyaa asaykka c'ora." 
Matthew7:14 «Shin, de'oo afiyaa penggii un""a; ogiikka s'untsaa. K'ay hewaa demmiyaawanttukka guutsa." 
Matthew7:15 «Bolla baggana dorssaa malatiide, hinttekko yiyaa worddo nabatuwaappe naagettite; shin unttunttu garssa baggana wallatuwaa mala." 
Matthew7:16 Unttunttu ayfiyaa ayfiyaawaan hintte unttuntta erana; aguntsay woddentsaa ayfiyaa ayfena; gomioriikka kookkiyaa ayfiyaa ayfena. 
Matthew7:17 Hewaadankka, lo""o mitsaa ubbay lo""o ayfiyaa ayfee; shin iita mitsay iita ayfiyaa ayfee." 
Matthew7:18 Loo mitsay iita ayfiyaa ayfanaw danddayenna; k'ay iita mitsaykka loo ayfiyaa ayfanaw danddayenna. 
Matthew7:19 Loo ayfiyaa ayfena mitsaa ubbay k'ans's'ettiide, tamaan yegettana." 
Matthew7:20 Hewaa diraw, hintte unttunttu ayfiyaa ayfiyaawaan unttuntta eranita." 
Matthew7:21 «Saluwaan de'iyaa Ta Aabbu geeddawaa ootsiyaa uray saluwaa kawutetsaa gelanaappe attin, ‹Godaw, Godaw› giyaa ubbay gelenna." 
Matthew7:22 Pirddaa gallassi daro Asay taana, ‹Godaw, Godaw, nuuni ne suntsan S'oossay kiittowaa odibeykkoo? Ne suntsan s'alahatuwaa kessibeykkoo? K'ay nuuni S'oossay ootsiyaa maalalissiyaabaa ne suntsaan ootsibeykkoo?› yaaganawantta." 
Matthew7:23 Taani he wode unttuntta, ‹Taani hinttena ubbakka erikke; iitabaa ootsiyaawanttu hintte ta matappe haakkite› yaagana." 
Matthew7:24 «Hewaa diraw, hawaa ta k'aalaa sisiide ootsiyaa ubbay mino zaallaa bolla bare golliyaa kees's'eedda wozanaama asaa mala." 
Matthew7:25 Iray bukkiide, di'uu di""eedda; c'arkkuukka c'arkkiide, he golliyaa sugeedda. Shin gollii mino zaallaa bolla kees'etteedda diraw, kunddibeenna." 
Matthew7:26 «Hawaa ta k'aalaa sisiide ootsenna Asay ubbay, bare golliyaa shafiyaa bolla kees's'eedda booza asaa mala." 
Matthew7:27 Iray bukkiide, di'uu di""eedda; c'arkkuukka c'arkkiide, he golliyaa sugina, gollii ellekka kunddeedda. He gollii wolk'k'aama kunddetsaa kunddeedda.»" 
Matthew7:28 Yesuusi bare haasayiyaawaa wursseedda wode, Asay I tamaarissiyaawaan maalaletteeddino." 
Matthew7:29 Ayaw gooppe, I unttuntta tamaarissiidde, Muse higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttudan gidennaan, maatay de'iyaa asaadan tamaarisso diraassa." 
Matthew8:1 Yesuusi deriyaappe wod'd'eedda wode, c'ora Asay Aa kaalleedda." 
Matthew8:2 He wode oolluu oyk'k'eedda itti bitanii Yesuusakko yi Aa sintsaan gulbbatiide, «Godaw, ne shene gidooppe, taana patsaade geeshshanaw danddayaa» yaageedda." 
Matthew8:3 Yesuusi bare kushiyaa yeddi Aa bochchiide, «Taani koyyay; pas'aade geeyya!» yaageedda. Ellekka oolluu bitaniyaa yeddi aggeedda." 
Matthew8:4 Yesuusi Aa, «Simmi hawaa oossinne odoppa; shin k'eesaakko baade ne pas'aade geeyyeeddawaa Aa bessa; ne pas'aade geeyyeeddawaa asaa erissanaw Muse azazeedda yarshshuwaa S'oossaw yarshsha» yaageedda." 
Matthew8:5 Yesuusi K'ifirinaahooma katamaa geleedda wode, itti Roomaa gade S'eetuwaa Kaappuu aakko yiide, «Ta Godaw, ta k'oomaa bollay gunddina, daro sakettiidde, soyin giseedda; hayya godo taw patsaarikkii» yaagi woosseedda." 
Matthew8:6  
Matthew8:7 Yesuusi, «Taani baade Aa patsana» yaageedda." 
Matthew8:8 Shin s'eetuwaa kaappuu zaariide, «Ta Godaw, neena ta soy gelissanaw taw bessena; shin neeni k'aalaa s'alalaa haasaya; ta k'oomay pas'anawaa." 
Matthew8:9 Ayaw gooppe, taani taappe bollanna de'iyaawanttoo eeno giyaa asaa; k'ay taappe garssaanna wotaadaratuu de'iino. Taani ittuwaa, ‹Ba!› gooppe bee; k'ay yekkuwaa, ‹Haaya!› gooppe yee; ta k'oomaa, ‹Hawaa ootsa!› gooppe ootsee» yaageedda." 
Matthew8:10 Yesuusi hewaa siseedda wode maalalettiide, barena kaalliyaa asaa, «Taani hinttew tumuwaa oday; taani hawaa mala ammanuwaa haray atto, Israa'eeliyaa gadiyankka be'abeykke." 
Matthew8:11 C'ora Asay awayifii doliyaa baggappenne wulliyaa baggappe yiide, Abraahaamona, Yisaak'ananne Yak'oobanna saluwaa kawutetsaa gaytaan ittippe uttanawantta yaagay." 
Matthew8:12 Shin kawutetsaan de'anaw bessiyaa Asay wolk'k'aama d'umaa garssa kare olettana; hewaan unttunttu yeekkananne barenttu achchaa d'ak'anawantta» yaageedda. 
Matthew8:13 Hewaappe kaala Yesuusi s'eetuwaa kaappuwaa, «Ne soy ba; neeni ammaneeddawaadan new hano» yaageedda; s'eetuwaa kaappuwaa k'oomay he saatiyankka pas'i aggeedda." 
Matthew8:14 Yesuusi P'es'iroosa soy biide, Aa bollotatta k'os'uwaa harggaade giseeddawunno be'eedda." 
Matthew8:15 Izi kushiyaa Yesuusi bochchina, k'os'uu izo bashi aggeedda; izakka denddaade aw miyaabaa giigissaaddu." 
Matthew8:16 Sa'ay omarsseedda wode, Asay iita ayyaanatuu oyk'k'eedda c'ora asaa Yesuusakko aheedda; nabiyaa Isiyaasi, «I nu daaburaa barew akkeedda; k'ay nu harggiyaakka tookkeedda» yaageeddawe polettana mala, Yesuusi iita ayyaanatuwaa bare k'aalaan kessiide, harggeedda asaa ubbaakka patseedda." 
Matthew8:17  
Matthew8:18 Yesuusi c'ora Asay bare yuushshuwaan de'iyaawantta be'iide, abbaappe hefintsa pinnana mala, barena kaalliyaawantta azazeedda." 
Matthew8:19 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Muse higgiyaa tamaarissiyaa ittuu aakko yiide, «Tamaarissiyaawoo, neeni biyaasaa ubbaa taani neena kaallana» yaageedda." 
Matthew8:20 Yesuusi Aa, «Worakanatoo ollay de'ee; kafatuwaassikka keetsay de'ee; shin Taw, Asaa Na'aw, shemppa akkiyaasaykka baawa» yaageedda." 
Matthew8:21 K'ay kaalliyaawanttuppe ittuu Yesuusa, «Godaw, taani sintsata baade ta aabba mooganaw ba yaagaarikkii» yaageedda." 
Matthew8:22 Shin Yesuusi Aa, «Neeni taana kaala; hayk'k'eeddawanttu barenttu anhaa moogino» yaageedda." 
Matthew8:23 Yesuusi wonggiriyaan geloode, Aa kaalliyaawanttu aanana beeddino." 
Matthew8:24 Beetay wonggiriyaa mittana gakkanaw, abbaan wolk'k'aama hobbii denddeedda; shin Yesuusi gem""isheedda." 
Matthew8:25 Aa kaalliyaawanttu aakko biide, gem""ishuwaappe dentseeddino; hewaappe simmiide Aa, «Godaw, nuuni d'ayeetto; nuuna ashshaarikkii» yaageeddino." 
Matthew8:26 Yesuusi unttuntta, «Ha ammanuu pac'c'eeddawanttoo, ayaw yayyiitee?» yaageedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan denddiide, gotuwaanne beetaa aggite giina, gotuunne beetay c'o""u geedda." 
Matthew8:27 Asay maalalettiide, «Hawe laa haray atto, gotuunne beetay azazettiyaawe ayba asee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew8:28 Yesuusi Galiilaa abbaappe hefintsan de'iyaa Gerggesenoona geetettiyaa gadiyaa pinneedda; iita ayyaanatuu oyk'k'eedda laau asatuu he gadiyaan de'iyaawanttu duufuwaappe kesiide, aanana gaketteeddino. Unttunttu daro iita gidiyaa diraw, ooninne he ogiyaanna aad'd'anaw danddayibeenna." 
Matthew8:29 Unttunttu barenttu k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «S'oossaa Na'aw, nuunanna new ayi allaallii de'ii? Wodii gakkennaan nuuna muranaw yaaddii?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew8:30 Unttunttuppe laafaa haakkiyaasan guduntsaa wudii heemettee. 
Matthew8:31 Iita ayyaanatuu Yesuusa, «Neeni nuuna kessiyaawaa gidooppe, hini guduntsaa wudiyaa giddo yeddaarikkii» yaagiide woosseeddino." 
Matthew8:32 Yesuusi unttuntta, «Biite!» giina unttunttu bitanatuwaappe kesi biide, guduntsatuwaan geleeddino. Guduntsaa wudii ubbay kakaa lank'k'iyaanna kajjottiidde, abbaan geliide, mitetti aggeeddino." 
Matthew8:33 Guduntsaa wudiyaa heemmiyaawanttu bak'atiide katamaa bi aggeeddino; beeddasaan iita ayyaanatuu oyk'k'eedda asatuu haneeddabaa ubbaa odeeddino. 
Matthew8:34 Hewaa siseedda katamaan de'iyaa Asay ubbay Yesuusanna gakettanaw keseeddino; Aa be'eedda wode, barenttu gadiyaappe baana mala woosseeddino." 
Matthew9:1 Hawaappe kaala Yesuusi wonggiriyaan geliide, abbaa pinniide, bare katamaa yeedda." 
Matthew9:2 Amareeda Asay bollay gunddeedda itti bitaniyaa shanchchamaan tookkiide, Yesuusakko aheeddino; Yesuusi unttunttu ammanuwaa be'iide, bollay gunddeedda bitaniyaa, «Ta na'aw, yayyoppa; ne nagaray atto geetetteedda» yaageedda." 
Matthew9:3 Higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttuppe ittuu ittuu barenttu wozanaan, «Laa ha bitanii S'oossaa bolla iitabaa haasayeettee!» yaagi k'oppeeddino." 
Matthew9:4 Yesuusi unttunttu k'ofaa eriide, unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Hinttenttu hintte wozanaan hawaa mala iitabaa ayaw k'oppiitee?" 
Matthew9:5 ‹Ne nagaray atto geetetteedda› yaagiyaawe mateeyee? Woy, ‹Dendda ek'k'aade hametta› yaagiyaawe matee?" 
Matthew9:6 Shin sa'aa bollan nagaraa atto gaanaw taw, Asaa Na'aw, maatay de'iyaawaa taani hinttena erissana» yaagiide, hewaappe guyye I he bollay gunddeedda bitaniyaa, «Dendda ek'k'a; yaataade ne shanchchamaa tookkaade, ne golle ba» yaageedda." 
Matthew9:7 Gunddeedda bitaniikka denddi ek'k'iide, bare golle beedda." 
Matthew9:8 Shin daro Asay hewaa be'iide yayyeeddino; asaw hawaa mala maataa immeedda S'oossaa galateeddino. 
Matthew9:9 Yesuusi hewaanna aad'd'iidde, Maatoossa yaagiyaawe k'aras'aa k'ans's'iyaa saan utteeddawaa demmiide Aa, «Taana kaala» yaageedda. Maatoossikka denddi ek'k'iide, Aa kaalleedda." 
Matthew9:10 Yesuusi Maatoossa gollen k'umaa maanaw utti de'ishshin, k'aras'aa akkiyaa c'ora asaynne nagaranchchatuu yiide, aanananne Aa kaalliyaawanttunna ittippe gaytaan utteeddino." 
Matthew9:11 Itti itti Parisaawatuu hewaa be'iide, Yesuusa kaalliyaawantta, «Hinttena tamaarissiyaawe k'aras'aa k'ans's'iyaawanttunnanne nagaranchchatuwaanna k'umaa ayaw ittippe mii?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew9:12 Shin Yesuusi unttunttu yaagiyaawaa sisiide, «Hargganchchatuwaappe attin, pas'atoo aakimii koshshenna." 
Matthew9:13 Shin hinttenttu biide, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, ‹Taani maarotetsaa koyyayippe attin, yarshshuwaa koyyikke› yaagiyaawe waagiyaawentto erite; ayaw gooppe, taani nagaranchchatuwaa s'eesanaw yeeddawaappe attin, s'illatuwaa s'eesanaw yabeykke» yaageedda." 
Matthew9:14 He wode Yohaannisa kaalliyaawanttu Yesuusakko yiide, «Nuuninne Parisaawatuu ubbaa wode s'oomeetto; shin neena kaalliyaawanttu ayaw s'oomikkinoo?» yaagiide Aa oochcheeddino." 
Matthew9:15 Yesuusi unttuntta, «Bullachchaa yeedda Asay machchatto akkiyaawe barenttuna de'ishshin, kayyottanaw danddayiinoo? Danddayikkino; shin machchatto akkiyaawaa unttunttu matappe afana wodii yaana; unttunttu he wode s'oomanawantta» yaageedda." 
Matthew9:16 «Ec'a mayuwaa bolla ooratsa d'efiyaa wotsiide sikkiyaa Asay baawa; ayaw gooppe, ooratsa d'efii ec'a mayuwaa peed'ereetsana; peed'etsaykka kasewaappe daranawaa." 
Matthew9:17 Hoo woyniyaa eessaa ec'a ogoruwaan naaiyaa Asay baawa. Shin naaooppe, he woyniyaa eessay ogoruwaa daakkana; barewukka woofettana; ogoruukka bayanawaa. Shin, ho""o woyniyaa eessaa ooratsa ogoruwaan naa""anaw bessee; laa""uukka baykkino» yaageedda." 
Matthew9:18 Yesuusi unttunttoo hewaa odishin, Ayihude Woosa Golle kaappatuwaappe ittuu aakko yi Aa sintsaan gulbbatiide, «Ta naatta ha""i hayk'k'aaddu; shin neeni yaade ne kushiyaa izi bolla wotsaarikkii; iza de'uwaan de'anawunnu» yaageedda." 
Matthew9:19 Yesuusi denddiide, barena kaalliyaawanttunna ittippe bitaniyaa kaalliide beedda." 
Matthew9:20 He wode tammanne laau laytsaa kumentsaa, izi bollaappe suutsay goggiyaa itti mishiratta guyyenna shiik'aade, Yesuusa mayuwaa mac'araa bochchaaddu." 
Matthew9:21 Hawaa iza ootsowe, iza bare wozanaan, «Taani Aa mayuwaa s'alalaa bochchantto pas'ana» yaagaade k'oppaaddu." 
Matthew9:22 Shin Yesuusi yuuyyi izo s'eelliide, «Ta naattee, yayyoppa; neena ne ammanuu patseedda» yaageedda. He man''iyaan mishiratta pas'aa aggaaddu." 
Matthew9:23 Yesuusi Ayihuda Woosa Golle kaappuwaa soy gakkeedda wode, yeekuwaan dinkkaa punniyaa asaanne yeekkiyaa asaa be'iide," 
Matthew9:24 «Kare kesite; guutsa naatta gemishshaadduppe attin, hayk'k'abeykku» yaageedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan Asay Aa bolla darii miic'c'eedda." 
Matthew9:25 Shin c'ora asaa kare I kesseeddawaappe guyyiyaan, golle geliide, naatti kushiyaa oyk'k'eedda; naattakka dendda aggaaddu." 
Matthew9:26 He waarii, he man''iyaan he gadiyaan ubbaan sisetteedda." 
Matthew9:27 Yesuusi hewaanna aad'd'iide biyaa wode, laa""u k'ook'atuu barenttu k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Daawite na'aw, nuuna maaraarikkii» yaagiidde Aa kaalleeddino." 
Matthew9:28 Yesuusi golle geleedda wode, k'ook'atuu aakko yeeddino; Yesuusi unttuntta, «Taani hawaa ootsanaw danddayiyaawaa ammaniitee?» yaageedda. Unttunttu, «Ee Godaw» yaagi zaareeddino." 
Matthew9:29 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yesuusi unttunttu ayfiyaa bare kushiyaan bochchiide unttuntta, «Hinttew hinttenttu ammanuwaadan hano» yaageedda." 
Matthew9:30 Unttunttu ayfii dooyetti aggeedda; Yesuusi unttunttoo, «Hawaa oossinne odoppite» yaagiide minisiide odeedda." 
Matthew9:31 Shin unttunttu biide, he gadiyaa ubbaan Yesuusabaa odeeddino." 
Matthew9:32 Unttunttu kesiide biyaa wode, amareeda Asay iita ayyaanay oyk'k'ina duudeedda bitaniyaa Yesuusakko aheeddino." 
Matthew9:33 Yesuusi iita ayaanaa kesseeddawaappe guyyiyaan, duude bitanii haasayeedda. Asay, «Hawe ooratsabaa; hawaa malabay Israa'eeliyaa gadiyaan ubbakka hanibeenna» yaagi maalaletteeddino." 
Matthew9:34 Shin Parisaawatuu, «I iita ayyaanatuwaa kaappuwaa wolk'k'aan s'alahatuwaa kessee» yaageeddino." 
Matthew9:35 Yesuusi unttuntta Ayihuda woosa golletuwaan tamaarissiiddenne kawutetsaa wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiidde, k'ay harggiyaa ubbaappenne sakuwaa ubbaappe asaa patsiidde, wogga katamatuwaaninne k'eeri katamatuwaa ubbaan yuuyyeedda." 
Matthew9:36 C'ora asaa be'iide, heemmiyaa Asay baynna dorssaadan Asay hirggettiyaa dirawunne asaa maaddiyaabay baynna diraw, asaw k'aretteedda." 
Matthew9:37 Yaatiide barena kaalliyaawantta, «K'oychchaw gakka katsay dara; shin c'akkiyaa Asay guutsa." 
Matthew9:38 Simmi katsaa Goday katsaa c'akkanaw oosanchchatuwaa yeddana mala, Aa woossite» yaageedda." 
Matthew10:1 Yesuusi bare tammanne laau kaalliyaawantta s'eesiide, unttunttu iita ayaanaa kessana mala, k'ay harggiyaa ubbaanne sakuwaa ubbaa patsana mala, unttunttoo maataa immeedda." 
Matthew10:2 Yesuusi kiitteedda tammanne laaatuwaa suntsay, koyrowe P'es'iroosa geetettiyaa Simoonanne Aa ishaa Inddiraasa, Zabddiyoosa naanaa, Yaak'oobanne Yohaannisa," 
Matthew10:3 Pilip'p'oosa, Barttalamoosa, Toomaasa, k'aras'aa akkiyaa Maatoossa, Ilppiyoosa na'aa Yaak'oobanne Taadoosa;" 
Matthew10:4 bare gadew k'arettiyaa Simoonanne Yesuusa aatsi immeedda Ask'k'orootu Yihudaa. 
Matthew10:5 Yesuusi ha tammanne laaatuwaa hawaadan yaagiide kiitteedda; «Ayihuda gidenna asaa gadiyaa booppite; k'ay Samaaretuwaa katamaakka geloppite; 
Matthew10:6 hewaa diraa bayeedda dorssaakko, Israa'eeliyaa asaakko" 
Matthew10:7 biide, ‹Saluwaa kawutetsay mateedda› yaagiide odite." 
Matthew10:8 Hargganchchatuwaa patsite; anhaa hayk'uwaappe dentsite; oolluu oyk'k'eeddawantta patsite; iita ayyaanatuwaakka kessite. Hinttenttu c'oo akkeeddita; c'oo immite. 
Matthew10:9 Work'k'aa woy biraa woy santtimiyaa hinttenttu kiisiyaan oyk'k'oppite; 
Matthew10:10 woy ogew k'arc'c'iitiyaa, woy laa'entsiyaa mayuwaa, woy c'aammaa woy s'am""aa oyk'k'oppite. Ayaw gooppe, oosanchchaw koshshiyaabay k'umaa." 
Matthew10:11 «Hinttenttu geliyaa katamaan woy k'eeri katamaa ubbaan hinttena mokkanaw nashettiyaawe oonentto akeekan s'omoosite; hinttenttu hewaappe kesana gakkanaw, hewaan uttite." 
Matthew10:12 K'ay golle geliidde sarotite. 
Matthew10:13 He gollen de'iyaa Asay hinttena mokkooppe, hinttenttu saroteedda sarotay unttuntta gakko. Shin unttunttu hinttena mokkennaan is's'ooppe, hinttenttu saroteedda sarotay hinttew guyye simmo." 
Matthew10:14 K'ay itti itti gollii woy katamay hinttena mokkennaan woy hinttenttu odiyaawaa sisennaan is's'ooppe, he golleppe woy he katamaappe kesiidde, hinttenttu gediyaappe baanaa shoc'ite." 
Matthew10:15 Taani hinttew tumuwaa oday; S'oossay pirddiyaa gallassi he katamaa asaappe, Sodoomaa katamaa asawunne Gamoora katamaa asaw pirddaa kawushissana." 
Matthew10:16 «Be'ite! Taani hinttena dorssaa wallatuwaa giddo yeddiyaawaadan yedday. Hewaa diraw, shooshshaadan c'inc'c'a gidite; k'ay harap'p'iyaadan, ashikke gidite." 
Matthew10:17 Shin asaappe naagettite. Ayaw gooppe, Asay hinttena pirddaa gollew aatsiide immana; k'ay bare Ayihuda woosa golletuwaankka hinttena lissuwaan peeddana." 
Matthew10:18 Gadiyaa ayissiyaawanttu sintsaaninne kaatatuwaa sintsaan ta diraw hinttenttu ek'k'iide, unttunttoonne Ayihuda gidenna asaa sintsaan taw markka gidanita." 
Matthew10:19 Shin unttunttu hinttena pirddaw aatsiyaa wode, hinttenttu haasayanabaa he saatiyaan S'oossay hinttew immiyaa diraw, hinttenttu gaanabawunne woy waagiide haasayanenttonne hirggoppite." 
Matthew10:20 Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttun ak'iide haasayiyaawe hinttenttu Aawuwaa Geeshsha Ayyaanaappe attin, haasayiyaawanttu hinttentta gidikkita." 
Matthew10:21 «Ishay bare ishaa, aawuu bare na'aa bolla denddana; naanay barenttu aattinne aawuwaa bolla denddiide, unttuntta wod'isana." 
Matthew10:22 K'ay Asay ubbay hinttentta ta suntsaa diraw is's'ana; shin wurssetsay gakkanaw genc'c'iyaawe attanawaa. 
Matthew10:23 Unttunttu hinttena itti katamaappe yederssooppe, hara katamaa biite. Ayaw gooppe, taani hinttew tumuwaa gay; taani, Asaa Na'ay, yaana gakkanaw, hinttenttu hintte oosuwaa Israa'eeliyaa katamaa ubbaan ootsiide wurssikkita." 
Matthew10:24 «Tamaariyaawe barena tamaarissiyaawaappe darenna; k'oomaykka bare godaappe darenna. 
Matthew10:25 Tamaariyaawe barena tamaarissiyaawaa keena gidiyaawe, k'oomaykka bare godaa keena gidiyaawe aw gidana; unttunttu golle godaa Bi'eel-Zebuula giide s'eesooppe, Aa golle asaa waagi s'eesaneeshsha!" 
Matthew10:26 «Simmi asaw yayyoppite; ayaw gooppe, gentsi wotseeddabay k'onc'c'iyaa kesennaan attena; k'oseeddabaykka erettennaan attena." 
Matthew10:27 Taani hinttenttoo d'umaan odiyaabaa poo'uwaan haasayite; hinttew haytsaan saasukkiide odeeddawaa, d'ok'k'asaan awaayite." 
Matthew10:28 Ashuwaa wod'iyaawanttoo yayyoppite; unttunttu, shemppuwaa wod'anaw danddaykkino. Shin shemppuwaanne ashuwaa Gaannamiyan d'ayissanaw danddayiyaa S'oossaw yayyite." 
Matthew10:29 Laau suunniyaa kafatuu santtimiyaan zalettikkinoo? Hinttenttu Aawuwaa sheniyaa gidana d'ayooppe, he suunniyaa kafatuwaappe ittinnakka sa'aan wod'd'aade bayukku." 
Matthew10:30 Shin haray atto, hinttenttu huup'iyaan de'iyaa binnaanay ubbaykka payduwaan de'ee." 
Matthew10:31 Simmi yayyoppite; daro suunniyaa kafatuwaappe hinttenttu aad'd'iita. 
Matthew10:32 «Hewaa diraw, asaa sintsaan tabaa markkattiyaa oossi gidooppenne, taanikka saluwaan de'iyaa ta Aabbu sintsan markkattana;" 
Matthew10:33 shin asaa sintsaan taana kaddiyaa oonanne taanikka k'ay saluwaan de'iyaa ta Aabbu sintsaan Aa kaddana. 
Matthew10:34 «Taani sa'aw sarotetsaa ahanaw yeeddawaa hinttew malatoppo; taani tooraa ahanaw yeeddawaappe attin, sarotetsaa ahanaw yabeykke." 
Matthew10:35 Ayaw gooppe, taani na'aa Aa aabbuppe, naatto izi daayippe, na'aa machchattokka izi bollotattippe shaakkanaw yaad;" 
Matthew10:36 asaw morkketuu Aa golle asatuwaa gidanawantta. 
Matthew10:37 «Bare aabba woy bare daayo taappe aatsiide siik'iyaawe tawaa gidanaw bessena; bare attuma na'aa woy bare mac'c'a naatto taappe aatsiide siik'iyaawe tawaa gidanaw bessena. 
Matthew10:38 Bare mask'k'aliyaa tookkiide, ta geeduwaa kaallennawe tawaa gidanaw bessena." 
Matthew10:39 Bare shemppuwaa ashshiyaawe bayizzanawaa; shin ta diraw bare shemppuwaa bayizziyaawe ashshanawaa. 
Matthew10:40 «Hinttentta mokkiyaawe taana mokkee; k'ay taana mokkiyaawe taana kiitteeddawaa mokkee. 
Matthew10:41 Nabiyaa, nabiyaa suntsaan mokkiyaawe, nabiyaa gatiyaa aanana gishettanawaa; k'ay s'illuwaa, s'illuwaa suntsaan mokkiyaawe, s'illuwaa gatiyaa aanana gishettanawaa." 
Matthew10:42 Ooninne ha taana kaalliyaawanttuppe guus's'iyaa ittoo, haray atto buliyaa haatsaa s'alalaa ushanaw immooppekka, taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa gay; I bare gatiyaa akkana» yaageedda." 
Matthew11:1 Yesuusi bare tammanne laau kaalliyaawantta azaziyaawaa poleedda wode, hewaappe denddiide, katamatuwaan tamaarissanawunne odanaw beedda." 
Matthew11:2 S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisi k'asho gollen de'iidde, Kiristtoosi ootseeddawaa sisiide, barena kaalliyaawantta aakko kiittiide," 
Matthew11:3 «Yaanawe neeneeyye? Woy haraa naaganee?» yaagi oochchanaadan ootseedda. 
Matthew11:4 Yesuusi zaariide, unttunttoo hawaadan yaageedda; «Biide hinttenttu be'iyaawaanne sisiyaawaa Yohaannisaw odite;" 
Matthew11:5 k'ook'atuu s'eelliino; wobbatuu hamettiino; oolluu oyk'k'eeddawanttu pas'iide geeyyiino; tullatuu sisiino; hayk'k'eeddawanttu denddiino; hiyyeesatuu wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa sisiino. 
Matthew11:6 Tabaa sid'enna uray anjjetteeddaawaa» yaageedda. 
Matthew11:7 Yohaannisa kaalliyaawanttu simmi beedda wode, Yesuusi Yohaannisabaa shiik'eedda asaw hawaadan yaagi haasayeedda; «Ayaa be'anaw Asay de'enna mela biittaa keseedditee? C'arkkuu k'aatsiyaa mak'k'aa be'anaw keseedditee?" 
Matthew11:8 Yaatina, ayaa be'anaw keseedditee? Lo""iyaa mayuwaa mayyeedda bitaniyaa be'anaw keseedditee? Lo""iyaa mayuwaa mayyeeddawanttu kaatatuwaa gollen de'iino." 
Matthew11:9 Yaatina, ayaa be'anaw keseedditee? Nabiyaa be'anaw keseedditee? Ee, Taani hinttew oday; nabiyaappekka aad'd'iyaawaa be'eeddita." 
Matthew11:10 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafan, « ‹S'oossay, «Be'a, taani kiittiyaawaa neeppe sintsaw yeddana.» I new ogiyaa giigissanawaa› yaageedda geetettiide Yohaannisabay s'aafetteedda.»" 
Matthew11:11 Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; aatti uluwaappe yeletteedda asaa ubbaan S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisappe aad'd'iyaawe ooninne denddibeenna; shin saluwaa kawutetsaan ubbaappe laafiyaawe aappe aad'd'ana. 
Matthew11:12 S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisa wodiyaappe doommiide, hachche gakkanaw, saluwaa kawutetsatta daro naak'ettaw; min baas'etiyaawanttu izo demmiino." 
Matthew11:13 Ayaw gooppe, nabatuu ubbatuunne Muse higgii Yohaannisa wodii gakkanaw, timbbitiyaa haasayeeddino;" 
Matthew11:14 simmi hinttenttu unttunttu haasayowaa ammananawaa gidooppe, yaanawaa geetetteedda Eelaas ha Yohaannisa." 
Matthew11:15 Sisiyaa haytsay de'iyaawe siso! 
Matthew11:16 «Shin taani ha wodiyaa asaa ayaanna leemisoo? Unttunttu k'oc'aan uttiyaa naanaa malatiino; unttunttu barenttu laggetsatuwaa s'eesiide," 
Matthew11:17 ‹Nuuni hinttenttoo his'is'iyaa punneeddo; shin duribeykkita; yeekuwaa yetsaakka kesseeddo; shin yeekkibeykkita› yaagiino. 
Matthew11:18 Ayaw gooppe, Yohaannisi s'oomiidenne woyniyaa eessaa ushennaan yiina unttunttu, ‹Aa bolla iita ayyaanay de'ee› yaageeddino." 
Matthew11:19 Taani, Asaa Na'ay, maaddenne ushaadde yiina, unttunttu taana, ‹Ha nafisaamaanne woyniyaa eessaa ushiyaawaa be'ite; k'aras'aa k'ans's'iyaawanttunnanne nagaranchchatuwaanna siik'ettee› yaagiino; shin S'oossaa aad'd'eedda eratetsay bare oosuwaan tuma gidiide beettee» yaageedda." 
Matthew11:20 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yesuusi bare malaataappe dariyaa bagga ootseedda katamatuwaan de'iyaa Asay barenttu nagaraappe simmibeenna diraw, unttuntta hawaadan yaagiide, tooshiyaa doommeedda;" 
Matthew11:21 «Koraaziine katamaw, new aayyero; Beetesayda katamaw, newukka aayyero; ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu bolla S'oossay ootseedda malaatay S'iiroosa katamaaninne Sidoonaa katamaan oosettowaa gidintto, unttunttu maak'iyaa mayyiide, bidintsaa okettiide, beni barenttu nagaraappe simmanawanttashshin." 
Matthew11:22 Taani hinttew oday; pirddaa gallassi S'oossay hintteppe S'iiroosa katamawunne Sidoonaa katamaw pirddaa kawushissana. 
Matthew11:23 K'ay K'ifirinaahooma katamaw, neeni saluwaa pude d'ok'k'u gaanaw koyaad? Neeni Si'ooliyaa duge yegettana; ayaw gooppe, ne bolla S'oossay ootseedda malaatay Sodoomaa katamaan oosettowaa gidintto, Sodoomaa katamay hachche gakkanaassikka de'anawaashshin." 
Matthew11:24 Taani hinttew oday; pirddaa gallassi S'oossay neeppe Sodoomaw pirddaa kawushissana» yaageedda. 
Matthew11:25 Yesuusi he wode zaariide, hawaadan yaageedda; «Ta Aabboo, saluwaa sa'aa Godaw, neeni hawaa aad'd'eedda eranchchatuwaappenne akeekanchchatuwaappe gentsaade, erenna naanaatoo k'onc'c'isseedda diraw, neena galatay;" 
Matthew11:26 Ee ta Aabboo, ayaw gooppe, hawe ne sheniyaadan oosetteedda." 
Matthew11:27 «Ta Aabbu taw ubbabaa immeedda; Aawuwaappe haray Na'aa erenna; Na'aappenne Na'ay Aawuwaa k'onc'c'issanaw koyyiyaa asaappe attin, haray Aawuwaa erenna." 
Matthew11:28 «Daaburanchchatoo, dees'uwaa tookkowanttoo ubbatoo, taakko haa yiite; taani hinttentta shemppissana." 
Matthew11:29 Taani garanne ta wozanaan ashikke gido diraw, ta morgge mitsaan waas'ettite; taappe tamaarite; hinttenttu sheemppookka hintte shemppuwaa demmana." 
Matthew11:30 Ayaw gooppe, ta morgge mitsay giigaa; k'ay taani hinttentta toosseeddawekka kawushsha» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:1 Yesuusi he wode Sambbata gallassi, tisha banggaa giddonna aad'd'ishshin Aa kaalliyaawanttu koshattiide, tisha banggaa duutsiide, muussaa doommeeddino." 
Matthew12:2 Shin Parisaawatuu hewaa be'iide Yesuusa, «Be'a, neena kaalliyaawanttu Sambbata gallassi ootsanaw woga gidennabaa ootsiino» yaageeddino." 
Matthew12:3 Shin Yesuusi unttunttoo hawaadan yaageedda; «Daawitenne aanana de'iyaawanttu koshatteedda wode, Daawite ootseeddawaa nabbabi beykkitee?" 
Matthew12:4 Daawite S'oossaa golle geliide, k'eesatuwaa s'alalay maanaappe attin, inne aanana de'iyaawanttu maanaw woga gidenna S'oossaw yarshsheedda k'umaa meedda." 
Matthew12:5 Woy Sambbataa ubbaan Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa k'eesatuu Sambbataa wogaa mentsiyaawaa, k'ay unttunttoo hewe bayizzo gidennawaa Muse higgiyan nabbabi beykkitee?" 
Matthew12:6 Shin taani hinttew oday; Geeshsha Golliyaappe aad'd'iyaawe hawaan de'ee. 
Matthew12:7 S'oossaa Mas'aafay, ‹Taani maarotetsaa koyyayippe attin, yarshshuwaa koyyikke› yaagiyaawe waagiyaawentto hinttenttu eriitentto, bayizzuu baynna asaa bolla pirddikkita." 
Matthew12:8 Ayaw gooppe, taani, Asaa Na'ay, Sambbataa Godaa» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:9 Yesuusi hewaappe denddiide, Ayihuda woosa golle beedda." 
Matthew12:10 Hewaan kushii gunddeedda itti bitanii de'ee; Yesuusa mootanaw gaasuwaa koyyiyaa asatuu, «Sambbataan, hargganchchaa patsiyaawe wogee?» yaagiide Aa oochcheeddino." 
Matthew12:11 Yesuusi unttuntta, «Hinttenttu giddon itti dorssay de'iyaa uray, he dorssay Sambbata gallassi ollaan kunddooppe, oyk'k'iide kessennawe oonee?" 
Matthew12:12 Yaatina, Asay dorssaappe wooti loytsiide darennee! Hewaa diraw, Sambbata gallassi lo""obaa ootsiyaawe woga» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:13 Hewaappe guyyiyaan bitaniyaa, «Ne kushiyaa piddi ootsa» yaagina bitanii piddi ootsowaappe guyyiyaan, Aa kushii yekko kushiyaawaadankka pas'i aggeedda." 
Matthew12:14 Shin Parisaawatuu kare kesiide, Yesuusa wooti wod'anentto mak'k'eteeddino." 
Matthew12:15 Shin Yesuusi unttunttu zoretaa eriide, hewaappe aggiide biyaa wode, daro Asay Aa kaalleedda; harggeedda ubbaa patseedda." 
Matthew12:16 S'oossay nabiyaa Isiyaasa baggana odeeddawe polettana mala, Yesuusi asatoo, «Tabaa hara asaw odoppite» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:17  
Matthew12:18 S'oossay Isiyaasa baggana hawaadan yaageedda; «Taani dooreedda ta ayilii, taani siik'iyaa, taana nashechchiyaawe haweku. Taani ta Ayaanaa Aa bolla wotsana. I suure pirddaa asaw ubbaw odanawaa." 
Matthew12:19 I palumettenna; woy waassenna. Bare k'aalaakka ogiyaan sissenna. 
Matthew12:20 Suure pirdday s'ooni kesana gakkanaw, tinc'c'etteedda mak'k'aa mentsenna; k'ay c'uwattiyaa muk'aaddaa k'unc'c'uutiyaakka I toyissenna." 
Matthew12:21 Ayihuda gidenna Asay ubbay, Aa bolla barenttu hidootaa wotsana» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:22 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, amareeda asatuu iita ayyaanay oyk'k'ina duudeedda itti k'ook'a bitaniyaa Yesuusakko aheeddino; Yesuusi he duude bitaniyaa patseedda; bitaniikka haasayaanne s'eelaa doommeedda." 
Matthew12:23 Asay ubbay maalalettiide, «Laa hawe Daawite na'aa gidanddeeshsha?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew12:24 Shin Parisaawatuu hewaa sisiide, «Ha bitanii iita ayyaanatuwaa kaappuu ‹Bi'eel-Zebuuli› barew wolk'k'aa immina, s'alahatuwaa kessee» yaageeddino." 
Matthew12:25 Shin Yesuusi unttunttu k'ofaa eriide, unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Bare giddon shaakettiyaa kawutetsay ubbay d'ayana; k'ay bare giddon shaakettiyaa katamay woy gollen de'iyaa asaykka minnenna." 
Matthew12:26 K'ay Sees'aanay Sees'aanaa kessiyaawaa gidooppe, bare giddon shaakettee; yaatina, Aa kawutetsay waaniide min ek'k'anawee?" 
Matthew12:27 Taw Bi'eel-Zebuuli wolk'k'aa immina, taani s'alahatuwaa kessiyaawaa gidooppe, hinttenttu asaw wolk'k'aa ooni immina s'alahatuwaa kessanee? Hewaa diraw, unttunttu hintte bolla pirddana." 
Matthew12:28 Shin S'oossaa Geeshsha Ayyaanay taw wolk'k'aa immina, taani s'alahatuwaa kessiyaawaa gidooppe, simmi S'oossaa kawutetsay hintte bolla yi diggeedda." 
Matthew12:29 «Woy Asay kasetiide, wolk'k'aama asaa k'achchennaan de'iidde, Aa golle geliide, Aa miishshaa bonk'k'anaw waaniide danddayii? K'achcheeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Aa miishshaa bonk'k'anaw danddayee." 
Matthew12:30 «Ta bagga gidenna uray tawaa is's'ee; k'ay taananna ittippe shiishshennawe laalee. 
Matthew12:31 Hewaa diraw, taani hinttew oday; S'oossay asaw ay nagaraa gidinakka, k'ay ay bore gidinakka atto gaana; shin Geeshsha Ayaanaa boriyaawaa atto geena." 
Matthew12:32 Ta bolla, Asaa Na'aa bolla, iitabaa haasayiyaa O nagaraanne S'oossay atto gaana; shin Geeshsha Ayaanaa bolla iitabaa haasayiyaa O nagaraanne sa'aan gidina, saluwankka S'oossay atto geena." 
Matthew12:33 «Loo ayfiyaa demmanaw loo mitsaa dichchanaw bessee; iita mitsaa hinttenttu dichchooppe, iita ayfiyaa demmanita; ayaw gooppe, mitsay erettiyaawe bare ayfiyaa ayfiyaawaana." 
Matthew12:34 Shooshshatoo, hinttenttu iita gidiidde, wooti lo""obaa haasayanaw danddayiitee? Ayaw gooppe, doonay wozanaa giddon kumeeddawaa haasayee." 
Matthew12:35 Loo Asay bare loo minjjuwaappe loobaa kessee; k'ay iita Asay bare iita minjjuwaappe iitabaa kessee. 
Matthew12:36 Taani hinttenttoo oday; Asay bare haasayeedda maaddenna haasayaa ubbaw pirddaa gallassi zaaruwaa immanawaa. 
Matthew12:37 Ayaw gooppe, ne haasayay neena s'illissana; woy ne haasayay ne bolla pirddissana» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:38 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaa itti itti asaynne Parisaawatuu zaariide Yesuusa, «Tamaarissiyaawoo, neeni malaataa ootsishshin, nuuni be'anaw koyyeetto» yaageeddino." 
Matthew12:39 Shin I zaariide, unttunttoo hawaadan yaageedda; «Ha wodiyaa Asay iitanne S'oossaa ammanenna diraw, malaataa koyyee; nabiyaa Yoonaasa malaataappe attin, hara malaatay imettenna." 
Matthew12:40 Yoonaasi wogga moliyaa uluwaan heezzu gallassaanne heezzu k'ammaa de'eeddawaadan, Asaa Na'aykka, biittaa giddon heezzu gallassaanne heezzu k'ammaa de'anawaa." 
Matthew12:41 Nanawe Asay Yoonaasi odeeddawaan barenttu nagaraappe simmeedda diraw, pirddaa gallassi denddiide, hinttentta mootanawantta; beyte, Yoonaasappe aad'd'iyaawe hawaan de'ee." 
Matthew12:42 Duge bagga gadiyaa kaatatta Solomonew de'iyaa aad'd'o eratetsaa sisanaw sa'aa gas'aappe yeedda diraw, pirddaa gallassi denddaade, hinttentta mootanawunnu; beyte, Solomoneppekka aad'd'iyaawe hawaan de'ee." 
Matthew12:43 «Iita ayyaanay asaappe keseedda wode, barew shemppiyaa sa'aa koyyiide, haatsay baynna melasaanna yuuyyee; shin demmenna." 
Matthew12:44 He wode, ‹Taani aggaade yeedda ta golle simmana› yaagee; simmiide yiyaa wode, gollii mela de'iyaawaanne pitetti geeyyiide, giigi utteeddawaa demmee." 
Matthew12:45 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, biide bareppe iitiyaa laappu hara ayyaanatuwaa akkiide yee; he ayyaanatuu geliide, hewaan de'iino. He bitaniyaa de'uu kasewaappe darii iitee. Ha wodiyaa iita asawukka k'ay hewaadan hanana» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:46 Yesuusi daro asaw haasayishshin, Aa daayanne Aa ishatuu aanana haasayanaw koyyiide, karen ek'k'eeddino." 
Matthew12:47 Hewaan de'iyaa asaappe ittuu Aa, «Ne daayanne ne ishatuu neenanna haasayanaw koyyiide, karen ek'k'eeddino» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:48 Shin Yesuusi zaariide, «Ta daaya oonee? Ta ishatuu oonee?» yaageedda." 
Matthew12:49 Bare kushiyan barena kaalliyaawanttukko s'orssiide, «Beyte, ta daayanne ta ishatuu hawanttushi." 
Matthew12:50 Ayaw gooppe, saluwaan de'iyaa ta Aabbu sheniyaa ootsiyaa ubbay, ta ishaa, ta michchatonne ta daayo» yaageedda." 
Matthew13:1 Yesuusi he gallassi soyippe kesiide, abbaa gas'aan utteedda." 
Matthew13:2 Daro c'ora Asay bare yuushshuwaan yuuyyi aad'd'iide shiik'ina, wonggiriyaa giddo geliide utteedda; Asay ubbay abbaa gas'aan ek'k'eedda." 
Matthew13:3 Asaw leemisuwaan darobaa hawaadan yaagiide odeedda; «Itti bitanii zeretsaa zeranaw keseedda. 
Matthew13:4 I zerishshin, itti itti zeretsay ogiyaa doonaan wod'd'eedda; yaatina kafuu yiide meedda." 
Matthew13:5 K'ay itti itti zeretsay anc'c'o gideedda biittaa bolla wod'd'eedda; daro biittay baynna diraw, he zeretsay ellekka doleedda." 
Matthew13:6 Shin away keseedda wode c'arshshay shulleedda; adussa s'ap'uwaa yeddibeenna diraw meli aggeedda. 
Matthew13:7 Itti itti zeretsay aguntsaa giddon wod'd'eedda; hewaan doleeddawaa aguntsay dic'c'iide c'uulleedda. 
Matthew13:8 Itti itti zeretsay tu'e biittaan wod'd'iide doleedda; ittuu s'eetu ayfiyaa, ittuu usuppun tammuwaa, ittuu hattamuwaa ayfeedda." 
Matthew13:9 Sisiyaa haytsay de'iyaa uray siso!» yaageedda. 
Matthew13:10 Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu aakko shiik'iide, «Neeni ayaw asaw leemisuwaan oday?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew13:11 Yesuusi zaariide, unttunttoo hawaadan yaageedda; «Hinttenttoo saluwaa kawutetsaa s'uuraa erussay imetteedda; shin unttunttoo imettibeenna." 
Matthew13:12 Ayaw gooppe, de'iyaawoo gujettana; aw daranawaa; shin baynnawaappe haray atto, he de'iyaawekka aketanawaa." 
Matthew13:13 Taani unttunttu s'eelliidde s'eellennawaadan, sisiide sisennawaadan haniyaa diraw, woy k'ay akeekena diraw unttunttoo leemisuwaan oday." 
Matthew13:14 «Isiyaasi unttunttubaa hawaadan odowe polettanawaa; « ‹Hinttenttu sissaa sisana; shin hinttenttoo gelenna; hinttenttu s'eelaa s'eelana; shin be'ikkita. 
Matthew13:15 Ayaw gooppe, ha asaa wozanay guzumeedda; barenttu haytsaa tullisseeddino; barenttu ayifiyaakka c'iilummeeddino. Hawe baawentto, unttunttu barenttu ayfiyaan be'ana; barenttu haytsaan sisana; barenttu wozanaankka akeekaana; unttunttu taakko, S'oossaakko simmana; taanikka unttuntta patsana› yaagee." 
Matthew13:16 «Shin hinttenttu ayfii s'eelliyaa dirawunne hinttenttu haytsaykka sisiyaa diraw, hinttenttu anjjetteeddawantta." 
Matthew13:17 Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; daro nabatuunne s'illatuu hinttenttu be'iyaawaa be'anaw amotteeddino; shin be'ibeykkino. Hinttenttu sisiyaawaa sisanaw amotteeddino; shin sisibeykkino. 
Matthew13:18 «Simmi katsaa zeriyaawaa leemisuwaa biletsay giyaawaa sisite. 
Matthew13:19 Kawutetsaa k'aalaa sisiide, akeekena ooninne ogiyaa doonaan wod'd'eedda zeretsaa mala; s'alahiyaa kaappuu yiide, unttunttu wozanaan zeretteeddawaa mas'i diggee." 
Matthew13:20 Anc'c'o biittaan wod'd'eedda zeretsay k'aalaa sisiide, ellekka nashechchaan akkiyaawantta malatee." 
Matthew13:21 Shin he asatuu haissappe attin, unttunttun s'ap'uu baawa; k'aalaa gaasuwaan metuu woy yedesay yiyaa wode, ellekka d'ubetti aggiino." 
Matthew13:22 K'ay aguntsaa giddon wod'd'eeddawe k'aalaa sisiyaawaa bessee; shin ha sa'aa de'oo hirggussaynne duretetsaa siik'ussay k'aalaa c'uullee; ha gaasuwaan he zeretsaykka ayfenaan atti aggee. 
Matthew13:23 Tu'e biittaan zeretteeddawe, k'aalaa sisiide, akeekiyaa asaa bessee; ikka ayfee; ittuu s'eetuwaa, ittuu usuppun tammuwaa, ittuu hattamuwaa ayfee» yaageedda." 
Matthew13:24 Yesuusi unttunttoo hara leemisuwaa hawaadan yaagiide odeedda; «Saluwaa kawutetsay bare goshshan loo zeretsaa zereedda bitaniyaa malatee. 
Matthew13:25 Shin k'amma Asay gemishidiggina, Aa morkkii yiide, zarggaa zereeddawaa bolla zaaringgiyaa zeriide beedda." 
Matthew13:26 Shin zarggay doli ayfeedda wode, zaaringgii he wode beetteedda." 
Matthew13:27 «Aa k'oomatuu aakko yiide, ‹Godaw, neeni ne goshshan lo""o zeretsaa zerabeykkii? Yaatina, zaaringgii hak'appe yeeddee?› yaageeddino." 
Matthew13:28 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan goday, ‹Hewaa morkkii ootseedda› yaageedda. K'oomatuu, ‹Nuuni biide shoddanaadan dosay?› yaageeddino." 
Matthew13:29 «Shin I, ‹Aggite, zaaringgiyaa hinttenttu shoddiidde, zarggaanna shoddanita." 
Matthew13:30 Bochchoppite; k'oyc'iyaa wodii gakkanaw, ittippe dic'c'ino. K'oyc'iyaa wodii gakkoode, taani k'oyc'iyaawantta, kasetiide zaaringgiyaa mas'ite; tamaan guuddanaw pochchiyaan pochchiyaan k'achchite; shin zarggaa shiishshiide diyiyaan k'olite› gaana» yaageedda." 
Matthew13:31 Yesuusi unttunttoo hara leemisuwaa yaagiide odeedda; «Saluwaa kawutetsay sannaafic'iyaa geetettiyaa guutsa mitsatti ayfiyaa malatee; he mitsatti ayfiyaa Asay akkiide, bare goshshan zereedda." 
Matthew13:32 He zeretsata hara zeretsaa ubbaappe guus's'aw; shin dic'c'eedda wode, hara atakilttiyaa ubbaappe daraw; kafuu yiide, izi k'ankkaan kees's'iyaawaa keena wogga mitsaa gidaaddu» yaageedda." 
Matthew13:33 K'ay Yesuusi hara leemisuwaa unttunttoo yaagiide odeedda; «Saluwaa kawutetsay itti mishiratta heezzu keriyaa d'iiliyaa akkaade, munak'k'eedda munak'ay ubbay denddana gakkanaw, aan tigeedda irshshuwaa malatee» yaageedda." 
Matthew13:34 Yesuusi asaw he ubbaa leemisuwaan odeedda; leemisuu baynnaan I ittibaakka odenna; nabii, «Taani unttunttoo haasayiyaa wode, leemisuwaan haasayay. Alamii med'ettoodeppe doommiide geemmeedda yewatuwaa oday» yaageeddawe polettana mala, hewaa I odeedda." 
Matthew13:35  
Matthew13:36 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yesuusi asaa aggiide, soy geleedda; Aa kaalliyaawanttu aakko biide, «Goshshan de'iyaa zaaringgiyaa leemisuwaa biletsaa nuw oda» yaageeddino." 
Matthew13:37 Yesuusi zaariide, hawaadan yaageedda; «Lo""o zeretsaa zeriyaawe Asaa Na'aa;" 
Matthew13:38 goshshay ha alamiyaa; loo zeretsay S'oossaa kawutetsaa asaa; zaaringgii s'alahiyaa kaappuwaa naanaa. 
Matthew13:39 Zaaringgiyaa zereeddawe morkkiyaa s'alahiyaa; k'oychchaa wodii, wodiyaa wurssetsaa; k'ay k'oyc'iyaawanttu kiitanchchatuwaa." 
Matthew13:40 «Hewaa diraw, zaaringgiyaa mas'iide, tamaan guuddiyaawaadan, wodiyaa wurssetsaan hewaa mala gidanawaa." 
Matthew13:41 Asaa Na'ay, kiitanchchatuwaa kiittanawaa; unttunttu Aa kawutetsaa giddon nagaraw gaaso gidiyaa ubbatuwaanne iitabaa ootsiyaawantta mas'iide kessanawantta." 
Matthew13:42 Yaatiide to'enna tamaan olanawantta; hewaan unttunttu yeekkanawanttanne achchaa d'ak'anawantta. 
Matthew13:43 He wode s'illatuu barenttu aabbu kawutetsaan awaadan poo'ana. Sisiyaa haytsay de'iyaa uray siso! 
Matthew13:44 «Saluwaa kawutetsay goshshaan moogetteedda miishshaa bessee; itti bitanii he miishshaa demmiide, zaariide moogi aggeedda; daro nashettiidde biide, barew de'iyaawaa ubbaa zal""iide, he goshshaa shammeedda." 
Matthew13:45 «K'ay saluwaa kawutetsay ink'k'uwaa geetettiyaa daro alo shuchchaa shammanaw koyyiyaa zalanchchaa malatee. 
Matthew13:46 He zalanchchay daro alo ink'k'uwaa demmiide, biide barew de'iyaawaa ubbaa zal""iide, Aa shammeedda." 
Matthew13:47 «K'ay saluwaa kawutetsay ubbaa k'ommo moliyaa oyk'k'iyaa, abbaan yegetteedda dabbaa malatee." 
Matthew13:48 Molii dabbaa kumeedda wode, moliyaa oyk'k'iyaa asatuu abbaappe gas'aa kesiide utteeddino; yaatiide lo""o moliyaa k'oriide, yeggiyaa miishshaan yeggeeddino; shin iita moliyaa wora oleeddino." 
Matthew13:49 Wodiyaa wurssetsaan hewaadan hanana; kiitanchchatuu yiide, nagaranchchatuwaa s'illatuwaa gidooppe k'oriide," 
Matthew13:50 to'enna tamaan olanawantta; hewaan unttunttu yeekkanawanttanne achchaa d'ak'anawantta. 
Matthew13:51 «Hawe ubbay hinttenttoo geleeddee?» yaagiide unttuntta oochcheedda. Unttunttu, «Ee» yaageeddino." 
Matthew13:52 I, «Hewaa diraw, saluwaa kawutetsaa s'uuraa loytsi eriyaa, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaa ubbay, bare miishshaa shiishshi wotseedda golliyaappe ooratsa miishshaanne ec'a miishshaa shaakki kessiyaa izaawa malatee» yaagi zaareedda." 
Matthew13:53 Yesuusi ha leemisatuwaa odi wurssowaappe guyyiyaan, hewaappe denddiide," 
Matthew13:54 bare katamaa Naazireete beedda. Ayihuda woosa gollen tamaarissiyaawaa siseedda Asay maalalettiide, hawaadan yaageedda; «Hawe ha aad'd'o eratetsaanne S'oossay ootsiyaa malaataa ootsanaw wolk'k'aa hak'appe akkeeddee?" 
Matthew13:55 Hawe anaas'iyaa na'aa gidennee? Aa daaya Mayraamo gidekkee? Aa ishatuu Yaak'ooba, Yooseefo, Simoonanne Yihudaa gidikkinoo?" 
Matthew13:56 Aa michchatuu ubbay nuunanna de'ikkinoo? Yaatina, I ha eraa ubbaa hak'appe demmeeddee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew13:57 Unttunttu I giyaabaa akkenaan is's'eeddino. Shin Yesuusi he asaw, «Nabii bare gadiyaaninne bare soy asaan bonchchettenna; shin harasaa ubbaan bonchchetee» yaageedda." 
Matthew13:58 Unttunttu ammanibeenna diraw, Yesuusi daro malaataa he saan ootsibeenna." 
Matthew14:1 He wode Galiilaa gadiyaa ayissiyaa Heroodise Yesuusabaa siseedda; 
Matthew14:2 yaatiide bare k'oomatoo, «Hawe hayk'uwaappe denddeedda S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisa; S'oossay ootsiyaa wolk'k'aama malaataa I ootsiyaawe hewaassa» yaageedda." 
Matthew14:3 Ayaw gooppe, Heroodisi bare ishaa Pilip'p'oosa machchatti Heeroodiyaadi gaasotaan Yohaannisa oytsi k'ashissiide, k'asho gollen yeggi wotseedda." 
Matthew14:4 Ayaw gooppe, Yohaannisi Heroodisa, «Neeni Heeroodiyaado, ne ishaa machchatto akkanaw higgii diggee» yaageedda." 
Matthew14:5 Heroodisi Yohaannisa wod'anaw koyyeedda; shin Yihudaa Asay nabiyaadan Yohaannisa s'eelleedda diraw, asaw yayyeedda." 
Matthew14:6 Shin Heroodisi yeletteedda gallassaa baalay gakkina, Heeroodiyaadi naatta asaa sintsaan duraadde Heroodisa nashechchaw." 
Matthew14:7 Heroodisi naatto, «Neena lo""eeddawaa ayaanne gidooppe, taana oochcha; taani new immana» yaagiide iziw c'aak'k'eedda." 
Matthew14:8 Naatta bare daay zoriyaa akkaade Heroodisa, «S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisa huup'iyaa ha woc'iitiyaan wotsaade taw imma» yaagaaddu." 
Matthew14:9 Kaatii aw k'aretteedda; shin bare c'aak'uwaa dirawunne barenanna maaddaan utteedda imatsaa diraw, iziw Yohaannisa huup'ii imettana mala azazeedda." 
Matthew14:10 Kaatii kiittiide, Yohaannisa k'ood'iyaa k'asho gollen muuc'isseedda." 
Matthew14:11 Huup'iyaa woc'iitiyaan wotsi ahiide, naattiw immeeddino; naatta he huup'iyaa bare aattikko afaaddu." 
Matthew14:12 Yohaannisa kaalliyaawanttu yiide, Aa anhaa afiide moogeeddino; hewaappe simmiide ha yewuwaa Yesuusaw biide odeeddino." 
Matthew14:13 Yesuusi hewaa sisiide, wonggiriyaan geliide, hewaappe barekka Asay baynnasaa beedda; Asay hewaa sisiide, katamaappe denddiide, gediyaan Aa kaalleeddino." 
Matthew14:14 Yesuusi wonggiriyaappe keseedda wode, daro asaa be'iide, he asaw k'aretteedda; yaatiide unttunttunna de'iyaa hargganchchatuwaa patseedda." 
Matthew14:15 Sa'ay omarssiyaa wode, Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu aakko yiide, «Hawe sa'ay Asay baynnasaa; ha""i sa'ay k'ammi diggeedda; Asay ubbay k'eeri katamatuwaa biide, barenttoo k'umaa shammana mala, asaa moyzza» yaageeddino." 
Matthew14:16 Shin Yesuusi unttuntta, «Asay baanaw koshshenna; asaw meetettiyaabaa hinttenttu immite» yaageedda." 
Matthew14:17 Unttunttu zaariide Aa, «Nuw hawaan ichcheshu ukitsaappenne laa""u moliyaappe attin, haray baawa» yaageeddino." 
Matthew14:18 Yesuusi unttuntta, «Hewantta, haa taakko ahite» yaageedda." 
Matthew14:19 Asay maattaani uttana mala, Yesuusi azazeedda; ichcheshu ukitsaanne laa""u moliyaa oyk'k'iide, saluwaa pude s'eelliide, S'oossaa galateedda; he ukitsaa mentsiide, barena kaalliyaawanttoo immina, unttunttu c'ora asaw gisheeddino." 
Matthew14:20 Asay ubbay miide kalleedda; atteedda suuppa dokkaa tammanne laau zambbeeliyaa kumeeddawaa dentseeddino. 
Matthew14:21 Meedda Asay mac'c'a asaanne naanaa paydennaan, ichcheshu sha""aa gidiyaawaa keena." 
Matthew14:22 Yesuusi c'ora asaa moyzziidde, barena kaalliyaawantta wonggiriyaan geliide, bareppe sintsatiide, abbaappe hefintsa pinnana mala azazeedda." 
Matthew14:23 Asaa moyzziide, S'oossaa woossanaw deriyaa huup'iyaa barekka keseedda; sa'ay k'ammi digginakka hewaan barekka de'ee." 
Matthew14:24 Shin wonggirii he wode, abbaa bollan de'ishshin, sintsa baggana c'arkkuu c'arkkiyaa diraw, beetay wonggiriyaa yaanne haanne sugee." 
Matthew14:25 Bayira kuttuu waassi simmina, Yesuusi abbaa bolla hamettiidde, unttunttukko yeedda." 
Matthew14:26 Aa kaalliyaawanttu abbaa bolla I hamettishshin be'i dagammiide, «Hawe moyttilliyaa gidennee!» gi yayyiide waasseeddino." 
Matthew14:27 Shin Yesuusi ellekka unttuntta, «Ayinne baawa; taanattee; yayyoppite!» yaageedda." 
Matthew14:28 P'es'iroosi zaariide Aa, «Ta Godaw, hawe neena gidooppe, taani haatsaa bollanna neekko baana mala, taana azazaarikkii» yaageedda." 
Matthew14:29 Yesuusi P'es'iroosa, «Haaya!» yaageedda. P'es'iroosi wonggiriyaappe wod'd'iide, haatsaa bollanna hamettiidde, Yesuusakko buussaa doommeedda." 
Matthew14:30 Shin c'arkkuwaa wolk'k'aa be'iide, yayyeedda; haatsay barena mituwaa doommeedda wode, bare kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Ta Godaw taana ashshaarikkii!» yaagi waasseedda." 
Matthew14:31 He man''iyaan Yesuusi bare kushiyaa yeddi P'es'iroosa oyk'k'iide, «Laa ha ammanuu laafeeddawoo! Ayaw sid'aaddii?» yaageedda." 
Matthew14:32 Unttunttu laauu wonggiriyaan geleedda wode, c'arkkuu woppu geedda." 
Matthew14:33 Wonggiriyaa giddon de'iyaa Aa kaalliyaawanttu Yesuusa, «Neeni S'oossaa Na'aa gideeddawe tuma» yaagiide aw goyinneeddino." 
Matthew14:34 Unttunttu abbaa pinniide, Gensaarees'a geetettiyaa gadiyaa gakkeeddino." 
Matthew14:35 He gadiyaa Asay Yesuusa gidiyaawaa ereeddino; hewaa heeraa gadiyaa ubbaa kiittiide, harggiyaa asaa ubbaa aakko aheeddino." 
Matthew14:36 Harggiyaa Asay Aa mayuwaa mac'araa s'alalaa bochchana mala, Aa woosseeddino; Aa mayuwaa mac'araa bochcheedda ubbaykka pas'eedda." 
Matthew15:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaa itti itti asaynne Parisaawatuu Yerusaalameppe Yesuusakko yiide," 
Matthew15:2 «Neena kaalliyaawanttu ayaw nu aawotuwaa wogaa bayzziinoo? Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu k'umaa maanaappe kasetiide, barenttu kushiyaa meec'ettikkino» yaageeddino." 
Matthew15:3 Yesuusi zaariide, unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Hinttenttu hintte wogaa diraw, S'oossaa azazuwaa poliyaawaa ayaw is's'iitee?" 
Matthew15:4 Ayaw gooppe S'oossay, ‹Ne aabbanne ne daayo bonchcha› k'ay, Bare aabba woy bare daayo boriyaawe hayk'k'o yaageedda." 
Matthew15:5 Shin hinttenttu, ‹Itti Asay bare aabba woy bare daayo maaddiyaabay barew de'iina, Hewe S'oossaawaa gooppe, bare aabba woy bare daayo bonchchanaw bessena› yaagiita; yaatiide hinttenttu hinttenttu wogaa polanaw S'oossaa k'aalaw azazettikkita." 
Matthew15:6  
Matthew15:7 Ha loa malatiyaa iita asatoo, Isiyaasi balenaan hinttenttubaw timbbitiyaa odiidde," 
Matthew15:8 « ‹S'oossay hawaadan yaageedda; «Hawe Asay taana, bare bolla doonaan bonchchee; shin unttunttu wozanay, taappe haakuwaan de'ee." 
Matthew15:9 Asay taw mela goyinnee; ayaw gooppe, Asay ootseedda azazuwaa, S'oossaa higgiyaa malatissiide, tamaarisseeddino» geedda› » yaageedda." 
Matthew15:10 Yesuusi daro asaa barekko s'eesiide, «Sisitenne akeekite;" 
Matthew15:11 asaa tunissiyaawe doonaa giddo geliyaawaa gidenna; shin asaa tunissiyaawe doonaappe kesiyaawaa» yaageedda. 
Matthew15:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Aa kaalliyaawanttu aakko yiide, «Parisaawatuu neeni haasayeeddawaa sisiide, hank'k'etteeddawaa akeekay?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew15:13 Shin Yesuusi zaariide, «Saluwaan de'iyaa ta Aabbu tokkibeenna mitsaa ubbay shodettanawaa." 
Matthew15:14 Unttunttoo hirggoppite; unttunttu k'ook'aa kaaletsiyaa k'ook'atuwaa; k'ook'ay k'ook'aa kaaletsooppe, laa""uukka ollaan kunddee» yaageedda." 
Matthew15:15 P'es'iroosi zaariide, «Ha leemisuwaa biletsaa nuw odaarikkii» yaageedda." 
Matthew15:16 Yesuusi unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Hinttenttoo k'ay hai gakkanawukka gelibeennee? 
Matthew15:17 Doonaana geliyaa ubbay uluwaa giddo biide, k'ay uluwaappe kare kesiyaawaa erikkitee?" 
Matthew15:18 Shin doonaappe kesiyaawe wozanaappe kesee; asaa tunissiyaawe hewaa malaa. 
Matthew15:19 Ayaw gooppe, wozanaa giddoppe iita k'ofay, wod'iyaawe, woshummiyaawe, k'ay woshummanaw kajjeeliyaawe ubbay, wuu""iyaawe, wordduwaan markkattiyaawe, borii kesee." 
Matthew15:20 Hewaa malatiyaawe asaa tunissiyaawaappe attin, meec'c'ibeenna kushiyaan miyaawe asaa tunissenna» yaageedda." 
Matthew15:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yesuusi hewaappe aggiide, S'iiroosanne Sidoonaa geetettiyaa katamatuu de'iyaa gadiyaa beedda." 
Matthew15:22 Kanaane geetettiyaa gadiyaa mac'c'awunna ittinna hewaappe Yesuusakko yaade, bare kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsaade, «Ta Godaw, Daawita na'aw, taw k'arettaarikkii; ta naatto iita ayyaanay lo""enna oytsaa oyk'k'eedda» yaagaaddu." 
Matthew15:23 Shin Yesuusi iziw ay k'aalaanne k'aattibeenna; Aa kaalliyaawanttu aakko yiide, «Ha mishiratta nu geeduwaa kaala kaalaade, bare kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsaade odaw; hewaa diraw, neeni izo yeddaarikkii» yaagiide woosseeddino." 
Matthew15:24 Yesuusi zaariide, «Taani bayeedda dorssaw, Israa'eeliyaa asaa s'alalaw kiitettaad» yaageedda." 
Matthew15:25 Shin iza yaade, «Ta Godaw, taana maaddaarikkii!» yaagaade aw goyinnaaddu." 
Matthew15:26 K'ay I zaariide, «Naanaa k'umaa akkiide, kanaa maraw oliyaawe lo""a gidenna» yaageedda." 
Matthew15:27 Mishiratta, «Ee ta Godaw, hewe tuma; shin haray atto kanaa maratuu barenttu godatuu miina, samppaappe laaletteedda suuppaa miinottennee» yaagaaddu." 
Matthew15:28 Yesuusi zaariide izo, «Ha mishirattee, ne ammanuu wolk'k'aama; neeni koyyeeddawaadan new hano» yaageedda. Izi naatta ellekka pas'a aggaaddu." 
Matthew15:29 Yesuusi hewaappe denddiide, Galiilaa Abbaa mataa beedda; k'ay itti deriyaa bolla kesiide, hewaan utteedda." 
Matthew15:30 Daro Asay wobbatuwaa, k'ook'atuwaa, k'uunatuwaanne duudetuwaa, k'ay hara c'oratuwaa aakko ahiide, Aa mataan wotseedda. Yesuusi unttuntta patseedda." 
Matthew15:31 Hewaa diraw, Asay duudatuu haasayishshin, k'uunatuu suurishshin wobbatuu hamettishshin, k'ook'atuu s'eellishshin be'i maalalettiide, Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaa galateeddino."
