Matthew15:32 Yesuusi barena kaalliyaawantta barekko s'eesiide, «Ha c'ora Asay taananna heezzu gallassay gakkanaw gam""eedda diraw, taani ha asaw k'arettay; unttunttoo ha""i miyaawe baawa. K'ay unttunttu ogiyaan daaburiide kunddenna mala, k'umaa mizennaan unttuntta mela yeddanawukka koyyikke» yaageedda." 
Matthew15:33 Aa kaalliyaawanttu zaariide Yesuusa, «Nuuni ha bazzuwaan hawaa keena asaa kalissiyaa k'umaa hak'appe demmanee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew15:34 K'ay Yesuusi unttuntta, «Hinttenttoo aappun ukitsay de'ii?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Unttunttu, «Laappu ukitsaynne moletuwaappe amareedawanttu de'iino» yaageeddino." 
Matthew15:35 Yesuusi asaa, «Sa'aan uttite» yaageedda." 
Matthew15:36 He laappu ukitsaanne moliyaa oyk'k'iide, S'oossaa galateedda; mentsereetsiide barena kaalliyaawanttoo immeedda; k'ay unttunttu c'ora asaw immeeddino." 
Matthew15:37 Asay ubbay miide kalleedda; miina atteedda laappu zambbeeliyaa kumeedda suuppaa Aa kaalliyaawanttu dentseeddino. 
Matthew15:38 Meedda Asay mac'c'a asaanne naanaa paydennaan, oyddu sha""a attuma asaa." 
Matthew15:39 Yesuusi asaa yeddowaappe guyyiyaan, wonggiriyaan geliide, Megedoone geetettiyaa gadiyaa beedda." 
Matthew16:1 Itti itti Parisaawatuunne Saduk'aawanatuu Yesuusakko yiide, Aa paac'c'anaw koyyeeddino; yaatiide barentta saluwaappe malaataa bessana mala woosseeddino." 
Matthew16:2 Shin Yesuusi zaariide, unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Sa'ay k'ammiyaa wode hinttenttu, ‹Saluu zo""eedda diraw, sa'ay shammanawaa› yaagiita;" 
Matthew16:3 wonttumaatsaan k'ay, ‹Saluu zo""iide gubbaneedda diraw, hachche iray bukkanawaa› yaagiita; saluwaa s'eelliide, sa'ay hananawaa eranaw danddayiita; shin ta yuussaa wodiyaa malaataa shaakki eranaw danddaykkitee?" 
Matthew16:4 Ha wodiyaa Asay iitaynne woshummiyaawe, S'oossaw ammanettennawe, malaataa koyyee; nabiyaa Yoonaasa malaataappe attin, hara malaatay aw imettenna» yaageedda. Hewaappe simmiide, unttuntta aggiide beedda." 
Matthew16:5 Aa kaalliyaawanttu abbaa pinneedda wode, k'umaa afanawaa dogeeddino." 
Matthew16:6 Yesuusi unttuntta, «Parisaawatuwaa irshshuwaappenne Saduk'aawanatuwaa irshshuwaappe hinttentta eriide naagettite» yaageedda." 
Matthew16:7 Unttunttu barenttu giddon, «I hawaa yaagiyaawe nuuni k'umaa ahibeena diraassa» yaagiide haasayaa doommeeddino." 
Matthew16:8 Shin unttunttu giyaawaa Yesuusi eriide, «Ha ammanuu pac'c'eeddawanttoo, k'umay baynna diraw, ayaw hinttenttu giddon haasayiitee?" 
Matthew16:9 Haikka hinttenttoo gelibeennee? Taani ichcheshu ukitsaa ichcheshu shaa asaa mizaade kalisseeddawaa, k'ay hinttenttu aappun zambbeeliyaa kuntsiide atteedda suuppaa dentseedditentto wozanaa aatsikkitee?" 
Matthew16:10 Woy taani laappu ukitsaa oyddu shaa asaa miza kalisseeddawaa, k'ay hinttenttu aappun zambbeeliyaa kuntsiide atteedda suuppaa dentseedditentto wozanaa aatsikkitee?" 
Matthew16:11 Taani hinttentta Parisaawatuwaa irshshuwaappenne Saduk'aawanatuwaa irshshuwaappe naagettite giyaawaappe attin, ukitsaabaa hinttenttoo haasayabeennaawaa hinttenttu waaniide akeekikkitee?» yaageedda." 
Matthew16:12 Aa kaalliyaawanttu Yesuusi barenttoo odeeddawaa, Parisaawatuwaa timirttiyaappenne Saduk'aawanatuwaa timirttiyaappe unttunttu naagettana mala odettowaappe attin, munak'aan tigiyaa irshshuwaappe naagettana mala gidennawaa he wode akeekeeddino." 
Matthew16:13 Yesuusi K'iisaariyaa Piliip'p'oosa geetettiyaa gadiyaa gakkeedda wode, barena kaalliyaawantta, «Asay taana, Asaa Na'aa oona gii?» yaagiide oochcheedda." 
Matthew16:14 Aa kaalliyaawanttu zaariide, «Neena itti itti asay, S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisa yaagee; haranttu k'ay Eelaasa yaagiino; k'ay haranttu Ermaasa woy nabatuwaappe ittuwaa yaagiino» yaageeddino." 
Matthew16:15 Yesuusi unttuntta, «Yaatina hinttenttu taana oona giitee?» yaageedda." 
Matthew16:16 Simooni P'es'iroosi zaariide, «Neeni de'uwaa S'oossaa Na'aa Kiristtoosa» yaageedda." 
Matthew16:17 Yesuusi zaariide, hawaadan yaageedda; «Yoona na'aa Simoonaa, hawaa new saluwaan de'iyaa ta Aabbu erisseeddawaappe attin, Asay ooninne neena erissibeenna diraw, neeni anjjetteeddaawaa." 
Matthew16:18 P'es'iroosaa, taani new oday; neeni shuchchaa; taani ha zaallaa bolla ta woosa golliyaa kees's'ana; ta woosa golliyaa haray atto, Si'ooliyaa wolk'k'aykka s'oonanaw danddayenna." 
Matthew16:19 Taani new saluwaa kawutetsaa k'ulppiyaa immana; neeni sa'aan hano goowe ubbay saluwaan S'oossaa sintsan hanana; shin neeni sa'aan hanoppo geeddawe saluwankka hanenna» yaageedda. 
Matthew16:20 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, I Kiristtoosa gideeddawaa Aa kaalliyaawanttu oossinne odenna mala, unttuntta azazeedda." 
Matthew16:21 He wodiyaappe doommiide Yesuusi, «Taani Yerusaalame biina, taana c'imatuu, k'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttu darii waayissanaw bessee; unttunttu taana wod'anawunne taani heezzentso gallassi hayk'uwaappe denddanaw bessee» yaagiide, barena kaalliyaawanttoo geeshshiide oduwaa doommeedda." 
Matthew16:22 P'es'iroosi Aa itti bagga zaariide, «Ta Godaw, S'oossay neena hewaappe ashsho; hawe ne bolla ubbakka yeenna» yaagiide Aa zoranaw doommeedda." 
Matthew16:23 Shin Yesuusi guyye simmiide P'es'iroosa, «Ha Sees'aanaw, neeni ta matappe kichcha; neeni Asay dosiyaawaa k'oppiyaawaappe attin, S'oossay dosiyaawaa k'oppenna diraw, taw d'ubo gidaadda» yaageedda." 
Matthew16:24 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yesuusi barena kaalliyaawantta hawaadan yaageedda; «Taana kaallanaw koyyiyaa uray de'ooppe, barena kaado; yaatiide bare mask'k'aliyaa tookkiide, taana kaallo." 
Matthew16:25 Ayaw gooppe, bare shemppuwaa ashshanaw koyyiyaa uray bayizzanawaa; shin bare shemppuwaa ta diraw bayizziyaa uray ashshanawaa." 
Matthew16:26 Itti uray sa'aan de'iyaa ubbabaa barew shiishshiide, bare shemppuwaa bayizzooppe, Aa ayaa maaddanee? Woy itti uray bare shemppuwaa wozanaw ayaa immana danddayii?" 
Matthew16:27 Ayaw gooppe, taani, Asaa Na'ay, ta Aabbu bonchchuwaan ta kiitanchchatuwaanna yaana hanay; asaa ubbaw he wode Aa oosuwaa gatiyaa immana." 
Matthew16:28 Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa gay; amareeda asatuu, taani, Asaa Na'ay, kaatiyaa gidaade yiyaawaa be'ana gakkanaw, hayk'k'ennawanttu hawaan de'iino» yaageedda." 
Matthew17:1 Yesuusi usuppun gallassaappe guyyiyaan, barenanna P'es'iroosa, Yaak'oobanne, Yaak'ooba ishaa Yohaannisa akkiide, unttunttu s'alalaa wogga deriyaa huup'iyaa kesseedda." 
Matthew17:2 K'ay unttunttu s'eellishshin, unttunttu sintsaan laametteedda; Aa deemuu awayfiyaadaan poo'eedda; Aa mayuukka poo'uwaadan p'ooleedda." 
Matthew17:3 Musenne Eelaas Yesuusanna haasayishshin, ha heezzu Aa kaalliyaawanttu be'eeddino." 
Matthew17:4 P'es'iroosi Yesuusa, «Ta Godaw, nuuni hawaan de'iyaawe nuw lo""a; neeni dosooppe, nuuni hawaan heezzu daasiyaa ittuwaa new, ittuwaa Musew, ittuwaa Eelaasaw kees's'ana» yaageedda." 
Matthew17:5 I haasayishshin, poo'iyaa shaarii yiinne unttuntta kammi aggeedda; shaariyaa giddoppe, «Hawe taani siik'iyaa taana nashechchiyaa ta Na'aa; I giyaawaa sisite» giyaa k'aalay yeedda." 
Matthew17:6 Aa kaalliyaawanttu he k'aalaa siseedda wode, daro yayyiide, guufanni aggeeddino." 
Matthew17:7 Yesuusi unttunttukko yiide, unttuntta bochchiide, «Denddite; yayyoppite» yaageedda." 
Matthew17:8 Unttunttu d'ok'k'u giide s'eelliyaa wode, Yesuusa s'alalaappe attin, hara asaa oonanne be'ibeykkino." 
Matthew17:9 Unttunttu deriyaappe wod'd'ishin, Yesuusi unttuntta, «Taani Asaa Na'ay, hayk'uwaappe denddana gakkanaw, ha hinttenttu be""eeddawaa oossinne odoppite» yaagiide azazeedda." 
Matthew17:10 Aa kaalliyaawanttu Yesuusa, «Yaatina, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttu ayaw, ‹Eelaas kasetiide yaanaw bessee› giinoo?» yaagiide oochcheeddino." 
Matthew17:11 I zaariide yaageedda; «Eelaas kaseti yiide, ubbabaa giigissanawaa." 
Matthew17:12 Shin taani hinttenttoo oday; Eelaas hawaappe kase yi diggeedda. He wode Asay Aa, barenttoo koyyeeddawaadan ubbaa ootseeddawaappe attin Aa eribeykkino; hewaadankka, k'ay taana, Asaa Na'aa, Asay waayissanawaa» yaageedda." 
Matthew17:13 Aa kaalliyaawanttu he wode barenttoo Yesuusi S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisabaa odiyaawaa akeekeeddino. 
Matthew17:14 Unttunttu daro asaakko yeedda wode, itti bitanii Yesuusakko yiide, Aa sintsaan gulbbatiide," 
Matthew17:15 «Ta Godaw, ta na'aa wozanaa bayizziyaa harggii oyk'k'ina, I daro wode tamaan, k'ay daro wode haatsaan kunddiyaa diraw, I darii sakettee; Aa patsaarikkii." 
Matthew17:16 Neena kaalliyaawanttukkokka Aa ahaad; shin patsanaw danddayibeykkino» yaageedda. 
Matthew17:17 Yesuusi zaariide unttuntta, «Ammanenna ha wodiyaa geella asaw! Taani hinttenanna awude gakkanaw de'anee? K'ay hinttenttubaa awude gakkanaw danddayanee? Na'aa taakko haa akkiide yiite» yaageedda." 
Matthew17:18 Yesuusi iita ayaana, «Aappe kesa» giide azazina, iita ayyaanay na'aappe kesi aggeedda; ellekka na'ay pas'i aggeedda." 
Matthew17:19 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Aa kaalliyaawanttu barenttu s'alala Yesuusakko yiide, «Nuuni iita ayaana kessanaw ayaw danddayibeykkoo?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew17:20 Yesuusi unttuntta yaageedda; «Hewe hinttenttu ammanuu guus's'eedda diraassa; taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; hinttenttoo sannaafic'iyaa geetettiyaa guutsa mitsatti ayfiyaa keena ammanuu de'intto, hinttenttu ha deriyaa, ‹Hawaappe yaa shiik'a› yaagintto I shiik'ana; hinttenttu ayaanne ootsanawukka danddayanita." 
Matthew17:21 Shin hawaa malaa woosaappenne s'oomaappe harabay kessanaw danddayenna» yaageedda. 
Matthew17:22 Aa kaalliyaawanttu Galiilaan, ittippe shiik'i utti de'ishshin, Yesuusi unttuntta, «Taana, Asaa Na'aa, Asay asaw aatsiide immana." 
Matthew17:23 Asay taana wod'anawaa; hewaappe guyyiyaan taani heezzentsiyaa gallassi hayk'uwaappe denddana» yaageedda. Aa kaalliyaawanttu daro k'aretteeddino. 
Matthew17:24 Yesuusinne Aa kaalliyaawanttu K'ifirinaahooma katamaa yeedda wode, Geeshsha Golliyaassi k'aras'aa akkiyaawanttu P'es'iroosakko yiide, «Hinttentta tamaarissiyaawe Geeshsha Golliyaa giiraa giirennee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew17:25 I zaariide, «Giiree» yaageedda. P'es'iroosi soy geleedda wode, Yesuusi kasetiide Aa, «Simoonaa, ne k'ofay ayee? Ha sa'aa kaatatuu k'aras'aa woy giiraa ooppe akkiinoo? Barenttu gadiyaa asaappe akkiino woy hara gadiyaa asaappe akkiinoo?» yaageedda." 
Matthew17:26 P'es'iroosi, «Hara gadiyaa asaappe akkiino» yaageedda. Yesuusi P'es'iroosa, «Yaatooppe, gadiyaa Asay giiranaw bessena." 
Matthew17:27 Shin nuuni ha asatuwaa hank'k'etsanaw koyyokko; neeni abbaa baade aan dabbaa yegga; yaataade koyro kesiyaa moliyaa oyk'k'aade, Aa doonaa pook'iyaa wode, giiraw gidiyaa miishshaa neeni demmana. Hewaa akkaade, ta giiraanne ne giiraa unttunttoo imma» yaageedda." 
Matthew18:1 Aa kaalliyaawanttu Yesuusakko he wode yiide, «Saluwaa kawutetsaan ubbaappe aad'd'iyaawe oonee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew18:2 Yesuusi itti guutsa na'aa s'eesi unttunttu giddon essiide, hawaadan yaageedda;" 
Matthew18:3 «Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; S'oossaakko hinttenttu simmiide, guutsa naanaadan hanana d'ayooppe, saluwaa kawutetsaa ubbakka gelanaw danddaykkita." 
Matthew18:4 Simmi ha guutsa na'aadan, barena kawushshiyaa ooninne saluwaa kawutetsaan ubbaappe aad'd'iyaawaa." 
Matthew18:5 K'ay hawaa mala na'aa ta suntsaan mokkiyaa ooninne taana mokkee. 
Matthew18:6 Shin taana ammaniyaa ha guutsa naanaappe ittuwaa baletsiyaa ooninne, gaac'c'iyaa wogga wos'aa bare k'ood'iyaan k'achchiide, abbaa c'iimmuwaan mitettiyaawe aw lo""a." 
Matthew18:7 «Alamii asaa d'ubbiyaa diraw, sa'aw aayyero; ayaw gooppe, d'ubbiyaabay yuussaa aggena; shin d'ubuu Aa gaasotaan yiyaa uraw aayyero." 
Matthew18:8 «Neena kushii woy ne gedii neena baletsooppe, neeppe k'ans's'a ola; neeni laa""u kushiyaannanne laa""u gediyaanna med'inaa tamaan olettiyaawaappe wobba woy duus'a kushiyaanna med'inaa de'uwaa geliyaawe new lo""a." 
Matthew18:9 K'ay ne ayfii neena baletsooppe, neeppe wooc'a kessa ola; neeni laa""u ayifiyaana Gaannamiyaa tamaan olettiyaawaappe itti ayifiyaana med'inaa de'uwaa geliyaawe new lo""a." 
Matthew18:10 «Hinttenttu ha guutsatuwaappe ittuwaanne kad'enna mala, hinttentta naagite; ayaw gooppe, taani hinttenttoo oday; saluwaan unttunttu kiitanchchatuu ubbaa wode, saluwaan de'iyaa ta Aabbu sintsaan de'iino." 
Matthew18:11 Ayaw gooppe, taani, Asaa Na'ay, bayeeddawaa ashshanaw yaad." 
Matthew18:12 «Itti asaw s'eetu dorssatuu de'iyaawanttuppe ittuu bayooppe, udduppu tammanne udduppunuwaa deriyaan aggiide, he bayeeddawaa koyyanaw beennee? Hinttenttu waagiitee?" 
Matthew18:13 Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa gay; I demmooppe, bayibeenna udduppu tammanne udduppu dorssatuwaappe aatsiide, he itti dorssaan nashettee." 
Matthew18:14 Hewaadankka, saluwaan de'iyaa hinttenttu Aabbu ha guutsatuwaappe ittuu bayanawaakka koyyenna." 
Matthew18:15 «Ne ishay neena naak'k'ooppe, neerekka aakko baade, Aa naak'uwaa aw oda; I newaa sisooppe, ne ishaa balaappe zaaraadda." 
Matthew18:16 Shin I newaa sisennaan is's'ooppe, laa""u woy heezzu markkay markkattowaan yewuu ubbay tumattiyaa diraw, hara itti woy laa""u asaa neenanna ittippe afa." 
Matthew18:17 I unttunttubaa sisennaan is's'ooppe, ubbabaa ammaniyaa asaw oda; K'ay ammaniyaa Asay giyaawaakka I sisennaan is's'ooppe, ammanenna asaadaaninne k'aras'aa shiishshiyaa asaadan Aa payda." 
Matthew18:18 «Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa gay; neeni sa'aan hano goowe ubbay saluwaan S'oossaa sintsaan hanana; shin neeni sa'aan hanoppo geeddawe saluwankka hanenna. 
Matthew18:19 «K'aykka taani hinttenttoo oday; hintteppe laau uray sa'aan S'oossaa woossiyaawaan ay yewuwaaninne itti wozanaa gidooppe, saluwaan de'iyaa ta Aabbu hewaa hinttenttoo immana." 
Matthew18:20 Ayaw gooppe, laa""u uray woy heezzu uray ta suntsaan shiik'iyaasaan, taani hewaan unttunttu gidduwaan de'ay» yaageedda." 
Matthew18:21 P'es'iroosi; he wode Yesuusakko yiide, «Godaw, ta ishay taana aappu kaala naak'k'ooppe taani aw atto gaanaw bessii? Laappunuwaa gakkanaw naak'k'ineeyee?» yaagiide Aa oochcheedda." 
Matthew18:22 Yesuusi zaariide Aa, «Gidenna, taani neena laappun tammu kaala laappunuwaa gayippe attin, laappunuwaa s'alalaa giikke." 
Matthew18:23 «Ayaw gooppe, saluwaa kawutetsay bare k'oomatuwaanna miishshaa heetettanaw k'oppeedda kaatiyaa bessee." 
Matthew18:24 He kaatii miishshaa heetettanaw doommeedda wode, daro miiloone biraa ac'uu de'iyaa itti bitaniyaa aakko aheeddino." 
Matthew18:25 Shin he k'oomaw ac'uwaa c'iggiyaawe d'ayina, Aa goday he ac'uwaa c'igganaw, Aa machchattanne inne Aa naanay, k'ay aw de'iyaa ubbabay zal""ettana mala, Aa azazeedda." 
Matthew18:26 Hewaa diraw, k'oomay bare godaa sintsaan gulbbatiide, ‹Ta godaw, hayya godo guutsa wodiyaa naagaarikkii; taani new ubbabaakka c'iggana yaagiide Aa woosseedda.›" 
Matthew18:27 Aa goday aw k'arettiide, Aa yeddi aggeedda; Aa ac'uwaakka aw maari aggeedda." 
Matthew18:28 «Shin he k'oomay kesiide, bare laggetsaa k'oomatuwaappe ittuu bareppe s'eetu biraa santtimiyaa tal""eeddawaanna gakettiide, ‹Ne bolla de'iyaa ta miishshaa c'igga› yaagi oyk'k'iide, Aa c'uulleedda." 
Matthew18:29 «Yaatina he Aa laggetsaa k'oomay Aa sintsaan gulbbatiide, ‹Ha""i tayishay guutsa wodiyaa naagaarikkii; taani new ubbabaakka c'iggana› yaagiide Aa woosseedda." 
Matthew18:30 «Shin is's'i akki biide, Aa laggetsay he ac'uwaa k'ans's'ana gakkanaw, k'asho golle gelisseedda." 
Matthew18:31 Hewaa diraw, Aa laggetsaa k'oomatuu hewaa be'iide, daro yiloteeddino; barenttu godaakko biide, I ootseedda ubbabaa aw odeeddino." 
Matthew18:32 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan, goday he k'oomaa s'eesiide, ‹Ha iita k'oomaw, neeni taana woosseedda diraw, taani he ac'uwaa ubbaa new maaraa aggaad." 
Matthew18:33 Taani new he ac'uwaa maareeddawaadan, neenikka ne laggetsaa k'oomaw maaranaw bessennee?› yaageedda." 
Matthew18:34 Hewaappe simmiide aw daro hank'k'ettiide, bare ac'uwaa ubbaa I c'iggi wurssana gakkanaw, pas'a kaa'ettana mala, k'asho golle gelisseedda." 
Matthew18:35 «Hinttenttu huup'iyaan huup'iyaan hinttenttu ishaw wozanaappe atto gaana d'ayooppe, he goday bare k'oomaa ootseeddawaadan, saluwaan de'iyaa ta Aabbukka hinttentta hewaadan ootsana» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:1 Yesuusi he haasayaa wurssowaappe guyyiyaan, Galiilaappe denddiide, Yorddaanoosa Shaafaappe hefintsan de'iyaa Yihudaa gadiyaa beedda." 
Matthew19:2 Daro Asay Aa kaalliide beeddawaa hewaan patseedda. 
Matthew19:3 Itti itti Parisaawatuu paac'c'anaw Yesuusakko yiide, «Itti Asay ay gaasuwaaninne, bare machchatto yeddanaw nu higgii azazii?» yaagiide Aa oochcheeddino." 
Matthew19:4 Yesuusi zaariide, hawaadan yaageedda; «S'oossay koyro unttuntta med'd'iidde, attumawaanne mac'c'awuno ootseedda." 
Matthew19:5 Hewaa diraw, ‹Itti Asay bare aabbanne bare daayo aggiide, bare machchattinna ittippe de'ee; unttunttu laa""uu itti asaa gidiino› yaagiyaa k'aalaa nabbabibeykkitee?" 
Matthew19:6 Hewaa diraw, unttunttu itti asaa gidiyaawaappe attin, laa""u asaa gidikkino; hewaa diraw, S'oossay ittippe de'anaadan gatsowaa Asay shaakkoppo» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:7 Parisaawatuu Yesuusa, «Yaatina, Muse ayaw itti uray bare machchatto pirimaa peed'iide yeddana mala azazeeddee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew19:8 Yesuusi zaariide, «Hinttenttu hinttenttu machchatuwaa yeddana mala, Muse hinttentta azazeeddawe, hinttenttu odina sisenna guzuma gido diraappe attin, koyro hewaa mala gidenna." 
Matthew19:9 Taani hinttenttoo oday; bare machchatto woshummennaan de'ishshin yeddiide, hararo akkiyaa ooninne woshummee; haray yeddeeddawunno akkiyaawekka woshummee» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:10 Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu Aa, «Asinaa gidduwaaninne machchatti gidduwaan de'iyaa wogay hewaa mala gidooppe, akkenaaninne gelennaan de'iyaawe lo""a» yaageeddino." 
Matthew19:11 Shin Yesuusi unttuntta yaageedda; «Hewaa mala timirttii S'oossay immowanttussappe attin, asaa ubbaassa gidenna;" 
Matthew19:12 ayaw gooppe, barenttu daay uluwaappe yelettiyaa wodekka, shuufa gideeddawanttu de'iino; k'ay Asay k'aaratina mureesa gideeddawanttu de'iino; k'ay saluwaa kawutetsaa diraw, barentta shuufa ootseeddawanttu de'iino; ha timirttiyaa akkanaw danddayiyaawe ooninne akko» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:13 Yesuusi he wode bare kushiyaa guutsa naanaa bolla wotsiide, S'oossaa woosana mala, itti itti Asay naanaa aakko aheedda; shin Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu he asaa ahenna mala hank'k'etteeddino." 
Matthew19:14 Shin Yesuusi, «K'eeri naanay taakko yiyaawaa diggoppite; ayaw gooppe, saluwaa kawutetsay hewanttu malaasa» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:15 Hewaappe simmiide bare kushiyaa unttunttu bolla wotseeddawaappe guyyiyaan, hewaappe bashi beedda." 
Matthew19:16 Itti bitanii Yesuusakko yiide, «Tamaarissiyaawoo, taani med'inaa de'uwaa demmanaw lo""obaa ayaa ootsoo?» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:17 Yesuusi Aa, «Lo""obay ayentto taana ayaw oochchay? Ittuwaa s'alalay lo""a; shin neeni med'inaw de'anaw koyyooppe, azazatuwaa naaga» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:18 Bitanii, «Hak'awantta?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Yesuusi zaariide, «Wod'oppa; woshummoppa; wuu""oppa; wordduwaa markkattoppa;" 
Matthew19:19 ne aabbanne ne daayo bonchcha; ne shooruwaakka ne huup'iyaadaan siik'a» yaageedda. 
Matthew19:20 He yalaga bitanii Yesuusa, «Taani hewaa ubbaakka guutsatetsaappe doommaade naagaad; yaatina, taw pac'c'iyaawe ayee?» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:21 Yesuusi bitaniyaa, «Neeni polo asaa gidanaw koyyooppe, baade new de'iyaawaa zal""aade, he miishshaa hiyyeesaw imma; neeni saluwaan durettana; yaataade yaade taana kaala» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:22 Shin he yalaga bitanii hewaa siseedda wode, I daro dure gidiyaa diraw, k'arettiidde bashi beedda." 
Matthew19:23 Yesuusi barena kaalliyaawanttoo, «Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa gay; dure Asay saluwaa kawutetsaa gelanawe daro meto gidanawaa." 
Matthew19:24 Taani gujjaadekka hinttenttoo oday; dure Asay S'oossaa kawutetsaa gelanaappe, gaaluu marppiyaa lukuwaanna aad'd'anawe matattee» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:25 Aa kaalliyaawanttu hewaa sisi maalalettiide, «Yaatina, ooni attanaw danddayii?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew19:26 Yesuusi unttuntta c'addi s'eelliide, «Hawe asaw danddayettenna; shin S'oossaw ubbabay danddayettee» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:27 P'es'iroosi he wode zaariide Yesuusa, «Be'a, nuuni nuw de'iyaa ubbabaa bashiide, neena kaalleeddo; yaatiide nuuni ayaa demmaneeshsha?» yaageedda." 
Matthew19:28 Yesuusi unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa gay; taani, Asaa Na'ay, ooratsa gadiyaan ta kawutetsaa oydiyaan uttiyaa wode, taana kaalleedda hinttenttukka tammanne laa""u Israa'eeliyaa zaratuwaa bolla pirddanaw, tammanne laa""u kawutetsaa oydiyaan uttanita." 
Matthew19:29 Ta suntsaa diraw, golliyaa woy ishatuwaa woy michchatuwaa, woy aawuwaa woy aatto woy machchatto, woy naanaa woy gadiyaa aggeedda ooninne, s'eetu dakkuwaappe daruwaa akkana; k'ay med'inaa de'uwaakka laattana." 
Matthew19:30 Shin c'oratuu hai sintsateeddawanttu guyyetanawantta; k'ay c'oratuu hai guyyen de'iyaawanttu sintsatanawantta. 
Matthew20:1 «Saluwaa kawutetsay woyniyaa geetettiyaa turaa gidduwaa ootsiyaawantta uniyaa oosissanaw, wontta guuraan keseedda woyniyaa turaa godaa bessee." 
Matthew20:2 I he oosanchchatoo hachche hachche ootseeddawaa wolk'k'aa gatiyaa c'igganaw unttunttunna giigiide, bare woyniyaa turaa gidduwaa oosissanaw unttuntta yeddeedda." 
Matthew20:3 «K'ay heezzu saatiyaa gidoode kesiide, oosuu baynnaan k'oc'aan ek'k'eedda hara asatuwaa be'iide," 
Matthew20:4 unttuntta, ‹Hinttenttukka k'ay ta woyniyaa turaa gidduwaa ootsanaw biite; taani hinttenttoo bessiyaa gatiyaa c'iggana› yaageedda; hewaappe guyyiyaan unttunttu beeddino." 
Matthew20:5 Laa'entsuwaakka usuppun saatiyaaninne udduppu saatiyaan kesiide, hewaadan ootseedda." 
Matthew20:6 Tammanne itti saatiyaa heeraan I kesiyaa wode, haranttu hewaan ek'k'eeddawantta demmiide, ‹Oosuwaa ootsennaan kumentsaa gallassaa hawaan ayaw ek'k'i peesheedditee?› yaageedda." 
Matthew20:7 «Unttunttu, ‹Nuuna oosissiyaa Asay d'ayeedda diraw ek'k'i peesheeddo› yaageeddino. «I, ‹Unttunttakka k'ay ta woyniyaa turaa gidduwaa ootsanaw biite› yaageedda." 
Matthew20:8 «Sa'ay omarssiyaa wode, woyniyaa turaa goday ootsiyaawanttu kaappuwaa, ‹Oosanchchatuwaa s'eesaade, wurssetsaan oosuwaan geleeddawanttuppe doommaade koyro geleeddawantta gakkanaw, unttunttu oosuwaa dirgguwaa c'igga› yaageedda." 
Matthew20:9 «Tammanne itti saatiyaa heeraan oosuwaa doommeeddawanttu yiide, huup'iyaan huup'iyaan ootsiide peesheedda wolk'k'aa gatiyaa akkeeddino." 
Matthew20:10 Koyro oosuwaa doommeedda Asay yeedda wode, daruwaa akkanaw k'oppeeddino; shin unttunttukka huup'iyaan huup'iyaan barenttu oosuwaa wolk'k'aa gatiyaa akkeeddino." 
Matthew20:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, ‹Ha guyyeppe yeeddawanttu itti saatiyaa s'alalaa ootseeddino; kumentsaa gallassaa daaburiide c'awotteedda nuwaanna unttunttu oosuwaa dirgguwaa k'araa ootsaadda› yaagiide barentta oosuwaan gelisseeddawaa bolla zuuzummeeddino." 
Matthew20:12  
Matthew20:13 «Shin I unttunttuppe ittuwaa hawaadan yaageedda; ‹Ta laggew, taani neena naak'k'abeykke; ootsaade peesheedda wolk'k'aa gatiyaa taananna giigabeykkiyee?" 
Matthew20:14 Newaa akkaade ba; taani hai wurssetsaan oosuwaan geleeddawookka newaa keenaa immanaw koyyay. 
Matthew20:15 Taani ta miishshaan ta koyyeeddawaadan ootsanaw taw maatay baawee? Woy taani loa gideedda diraw, neeni k'anaatay?› yaageedda." 
Matthew20:16 «Hewaadankka, k'ay guyyeteeddawanttu sintsatanawantta; sintsateeddawanttu k'ay guyyetanawantta; ayaw gooppe, s'eesetteeddawanttu c'ora; shin dooretteeddawanttu guutsa» yaageedda." 
Matthew20:17 Yesuusi Yerusaalame biidde, ogiyaan barenanna biyaa tammanne laa""u barena kaalliyaawantta gas'aa kessiide, dumma unttunttoo yaageedda." 
Matthew20:18 «Be'ite, nuuni Yerusaalame ha""i keseetto. Yaan taana, Asaa Na'aa k'eesatuwaa kaappatoonne higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttoo aatsiide immanawantta; unttunttu ta bolla hayk'uwaa pirddaa pirddanawantta." 
Matthew20:19 K'ay Ayihuda gidenna asawukka taana aatsiide immanawantta; he Ayihuda gidenna Asay ta bolla k'iliic'anawanttanne taana lissuwaan shoc'anawantta; yaatiide mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide, taana kak'k'anawantta; taani heezzentsiyaa gallassi hayk'uwaappe denddana» yaageedda." 
Matthew20:20 He wode Zabddiyoosa naanaa daaya bare naanaanna Yesuusakko yaaddu; Aa sintsaan gulbbataade ittibaa Aa woossaaddu. 
Matthew20:21 Yesuusi izo, «Ayaa koyyay?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Iza zaaraade, «Ha ta laa""u naanay ne kawutetsaan ittuu neeppe ushechcha baggana, k'ay ittuu neeppe haddirssa baggana uttino yaagaarikkii» yaagaade woossaaddu." 
Matthew20:22 Shin Yesuusi zaariide naanaa, «Hinttenttu ayaa woossanaw bessintto erikkita. Taana gakkiyaa wolk'k'aama metuwaa metootanitee? Taani s'ammak'ettana s'ink'k'ataa s'ammak'ettanaw danddayiitee?» yaageedda. Unttunttu, «Ee danddayana» yaageeddino." 
Matthew20:23 Yesuusi, «Taana gakkiyaa wolk'k'aama metuwaa tumakka hinttenttu metootanita; shin taappe ushechcha baggannanne haddirssa baggana uttanawantta dooranaw taw maatay baawa; shin he sa'ay ta Aabbu immanaw giigissi wotseeddawanttussa» yaageedda." 
Matthew20:24 Yekko tammu Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu hewaa siseedda wode, he laa""u ishatoo hank'k'etteeddino." 
Matthew20:25 Shin Yesuusi unttunttu ubbatuwaakka barekko s'eesiide, hawaadan yaageedda; «Ahizaabe asatuwaa kaappatuunne hawantta kaaletsiyaa asatuu barenttu asaa ayissiyaawaa eriita." 
Matthew20:26 Hinttenttu gidduwaan hewaa mala gidenna; shin hinttenttu gidduwaan d'ok'k'atetsaa koyyiyaa ooninne hinttenttoo k'ooma gidanaw bessee. 
Matthew20:27 K'ay hinttenttu gidduwaan ubbaappe bolla gidanaw koyyiyaawe ooninne hinttenttoo ayile gidanaw bessee. 
Matthew20:28 Hewaadan taani, Asaa Na'ay, asaw ootsanawunne daro asaa wozanaw ta shemppuwaa immanaw yeeddawaappe attin, Asay taw ootsana mala yabeykke» yaageedda." 
Matthew20:29 Yesuusinne Aa kaalliyaawanttu Iyyarkkoppe kesishshin, daro Asay unttuntta kaalleedda." 
Matthew20:30 Laau k'ook'a asatuu ogiyaa doonaan utteeddawanttu Yesuusi hewaanna aad'd'iyaawaa sisiide, barenttu kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Godaw, Daawita na'aw, nuw k'arettaarikkii» yaageeddino." 
Matthew20:31 Daro Asay unttuntta, «Hayzzite» giide hank'k'etteedda; shin unttunttu barenttu kooshshaa darii d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Godaw, Daawita na'aw, nuuna maaraarikkii!» yaageeddino." 
Matthew20:32 Yesuusi ogiyaan ek'k'iide, unttuntta s'eesiide, «Taani hinttenttoo ayaa ootsana mala koyyiitee?» yaageedda." 
Matthew20:33 K'ook'atuu, «Godaw, nu ayfiyaa patsaarikkii» yaageeddino." 
Matthew20:34 Yesuusi unttunttoo k'arettiide, unttunttu ayfiyaa bochcheedda; ellekka unttunttu ayfii s'eelli aggina, Aa kaalli aggeeddino." 
Matthew21:1 Unttunttu Yerusaalame matiide, Debre Zayite geetettiyaa deriyaa lank'k'iyaan de'iyaa Beetefaage geetettiyaa k'eeri katamaa gakkeeddino; Yesuusi barena kaalliyaawanttuppe laa""uwaa sintsaw kiittiide," 
Matthew21:2 unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Hinttenttuppe sintsaan de'iyaa k'eeri katamaa biite; hewaan itti haratta k'ashuwaan de'ewunno izi maraanna hinttenttu bi simmo sankka demmanita; unttuntta billiide, taw akki yiite." 
Matthew21:3 Ooninne hinttentta oochchooppe, ‹Goday hawantta koyyee› yaagite; ellekka I unttuntta yeddi agganawaa.»" 
Matthew21:4 Timbbitiyaa odiyaa nabii, «S'iyoone katamaa asaw, ‹Be'a, ne kaatii ashikke gidiide, hariyaa bolla, hare maraa bolla uttiide, neekko yee› yaagite» yaagiide haasayeeddawe polettana mala, hawe haaneedda." 
Matthew21:5  
Matthew21:6 Aa kaalliyaawanttu biide, Yesuusi barentta azazowaadan ootseeddino." 
Matthew21:7 Harattonne hare maraa ahiide, barenttu mayuwaa unttunttu zokkiyaan wotseeddino; hewaappe simmina Yesuusi toggeedda." 
Matthew21:8 He c'ora asaappe dariyaa baggay bare mayuwaa ogiyaan hiis's'eedda; k'ay haranttu mitsaa haytsaa kar kariide, ogiyaan yeggeeddino." 
Matthew21:9 Yesuusappe sintsanna hamettiyaa c'ora asaynne k'ay Aa geeduwaa kaalliyaa c'ora asay, barenttu kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Daawita na'ay galatetto! Godaa suntsaan yiyaawe anjjetteeddawaa! S'oossay galatetto!» yaageedda." 
Matthew21:10 Yesuusi Yerusaalame katamaa geleedda wode, katamaan de'iyaa Asay ubbay, «Hawe oonee?» yaagiide shabbiretteeddino." 
Matthew21:11 Asay, «Hawe Galiilaan de'iyaa Naazireete geetettiyaa katamaappe yeedda nabiyaa Yesuusa» yaageedda." 
Matthew21:12 Yesuusi Geeshsha Golliyaa geliide, hewaan zal""iyaawanttanne shammiyaawantta ubbaa kare yedersseedda; k'ay miishshaa laammiyaawanttu s'arap'p'eezaanne dogommuwaa zal""iyaawanttu oydiyaa gup'p'i yeggiide," 
Matthew21:13 unttuntta, «S'oossaa Mas'aafan, ‹Ta gollii S'oossaa woossiyaa golliyaa geetettana› yaagettiide s'aafetti utteedda; shin hinttenttu Aa bonk'k'iyaawanttu k'osettiyaa gonggoluwaa kesseeddita» yaageedda." 
Matthew21:14 K'ook'atuunne gedii sileeddawanttu Yesuusakko Geeshsha Golliyaa yiina, I unttuntta patseedda." 
Matthew21:15 Shin k'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttu Yesuusi ootsiyaa ooratsabaa be'eedda wodenne, guutsa naanay Geeshsha Golliyaan barenttu kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Daawita na'ay galatetto» yaagiyaawaa be'eedda wode hank'k'etteeddino." 
Matthew21:16 Yaatiide Yesuusa, «Hawanttu giyaawaa sisay?» yaageeddino. Yesuusi, «Ee sisay; S'oossaa Mas'aafay, ‹Guutsa naanaynne d'ammiyaa naanay neena galatana mala, unttuntta erissaadda› yaagiyaawaa ubbakka nabbabi beykkitee?» yaageedda." 
Matthew21:17 Yesuusi unttuntta aggiide, he katamaappe Biitaaniyaa geetettiyaa katamaa biide, yaan ak'eeda." 
Matthew21:18 Yesuusi wontta guuraanna katamaa beedda diraw koshatteedda. 
Matthew21:19 Ogiyaa doonaan itti balasiyaa geetettiyaa mitsatto be'iide, iikko beedda; bi gakkiyaa wode he mitsattin haytsaa s'alalaappe attin, ayfiyaa ayinne demmibeenna; izo, «Laa'entsuwaa med'inawukka ayfoppa» yaagina, he balasatta elekka mela aggaaddu." 
Matthew21:20 Aa kaalliyaawanttu hewaa be'iide maalalettiide, «Ha balasatta waanaade itti kutsaan mela aggaaddee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew21:21 Yesuusi zaariide, «Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa gay; hinttenttu ammanuu de'iyaawanttanne sid'ennawantta gidooppe, ha balasatto taani ootseeddawaa mala s'alalaa ootsikkita; shin haray atto hinttenttu ha deriyaa, ‹Denddaade abbaan kundda› ginttokka hanana;" 
Matthew21:22 hinttenttu ammaniide S'oossaa woossiyaawaa ayaa gidinttokka akkana» yaageedda. 
Matthew21:23 Yesuusi Geeshsha Golliyaa yiide tamaarissishshin, k'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne Ayihuda c'imatuu aakko yiide, «Neeni hawaa ootsanaw new ay maatay de'ii? New ha maataa oonee immeeddawee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew21:24 Yesuusi zaariide unttuntta, «Taanikka hinttentta ittibaa oochchana; hinttenttu taw hewaa odooppe, taani hawaa ay maattaani ootsaytantto, hinttenttoo odana;" 
Matthew21:25 Yohaannisi s'ammak'iyaa maatay hak'appe yeeddee? S'oossaappe yeeddeyye asaappe yeeddee?» yaageedda. Unttunttu barenttu gidduwaan palumaa doommiide, «Nuuni, ‹S'oossaappe yeedda› yaagooppe I nuuna, ‹Yaatooppe, Yohaannisi odeeddawaa ayaw ammanibeykkitee?› yaaganawaa." 
Matthew21:26 Shin nuuni, ‹Asaappe yeedda› yaagooppe, Asay ubbay Yohaannisi nabiyaa gideeddawaa eriyaa diraw, asaw yayyeetto» yaageeddino." 
Matthew21:27 Unttunttu Yesuusaw, «Nuuni erokko» yaagiide zaareeddino. Yesuusi, «Taanikka hawaa ay maattaani ootsaytantto, hinttenttoo odikke» yaageedda." 
Matthew21:28 «Shin hinttenttu ayaa k'oppiitee? Laau naanay de'iyaa itti bitanii de'ee; he bitanii bayira na'aakko biide, ‹Ta na'aw, hachche baade ta woyniyaa turaa ootsa› yaageedda." 
Matthew21:29 Na'ay zaariide, ‹Biikke› geedda; shin guyyeppe bare wozanaan k'oppi akkiide, woyniyaa turaa ootsanaw beedda." 
Matthew21:30 Aawuu yekko na'aakko biide, bayiraw geeddawaadankka aw geedda; teefa na'ay zaariide, ‹Lo""a ta godaw› yaageedda; shin bibeena." 
Matthew21:31 Ha laau naanaappe bare aawuu koyyeeddawaa ootseeddawe hak'awee?» yaageedda. Unttunttu, «Bayiraa» yaageeddino. Yesuusi unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa gay; k'aras'aa akkiyaawanttunne woshummiyaawanttu hintteppe sintsatiide, S'oossaa kawutetsaa gelana." 
Matthew21:32 Ayaw gooppe, S'ammak'iyaa Yohaannisi s'illotetsaa ogiyaa tamaarissiidde, hinttekko yiina, I giyaawaa ammanibeykkita. Shin k'aras'aa akkiyaawanttunne woshummiyaawanttu I giyaawaa ammaneeddino; hinttenttu haray atto hewaa be'iidekka, hinttenttu nagaraappe simmiide, I giyiyaawaa ammanibeykkita» yaageedda." 
Matthew21:33 K'aykka Yesuusi hawaadan yaageedda; «Hara leemisuwaakka sisite; woyniyaa geetettiyaa turaa tokkeedda itti bitanii de'ee; woyniyaa turaa yuushshi aatsiide direedda; k'ay he woyniyaa gumiiyaa ollaakka bookkeedda; hewaa naagiyaa asaw adussa shuchchaa gimbbeedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, kotsaa ootsiyaa asaw immiide, hara gade beedda." 
Matthew21:34 Woynniyaa ayfiyaa mas'iyaa wodii gakkina, barena gakkiyaawaa akkiide yaana mala, bare k'oomatuwaa bare kotsaawatuwaakko kiitteedda." 
Matthew21:35 Kotsaawatuu Aa k'oomatuwaa oyk'k'iide, ittuwaa wod'eeddino; k'ay yekkuwaa shuchchaan p'alk'k'eeddino." 
Matthew21:36 K'aykka he bitanii kasewanttuppe dariyaa hara k'oomatuwaa kiitteedda; kotsaawatuu he k'oomatuwaakka kasewanttuwaadan ootseeddino. 
Matthew21:37 «Shin wurssetsaan I, ‹Ta na'aa unttunttu bonchchanawantta› yaagiide bare na'aa unttunttukko kiitteedda." 
Matthew21:38 «Shin kotsaawatuu na'aa be'iide, barenttu gidduwaan, ‹Gadiyaa laattanawe hawaa; biide Aa wod'iide, gadiyaa nuuni laattana› yaageeddino." 
Matthew21:39 Na'aa oyk'k'iide, woyniyaa turaa giddoppe gas'aa kessiide wod'eeddino." 
Matthew21:40 «Simmi woyniyaa turaa goday yiyaa wode, he kotsaawatuwaa wootanee?» yaagiide oochcheedda." 
Matthew21:41 Unttunttu, «I he iita asatuwaa wod'i wurssiide, woyniyaa turay ayfiyaa wode barena gakkiyaawaa wodiyaan sheed'd'iyaa hara kotsaawatoo immana» yaageeddino." 
Matthew21:42 Yesuusi unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; « ‹Gimbbiyaawanttu kad'iide is's'eedda shuchchay, godaa s'ap'uwaa minisiyaa, ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa shuchchaa gideedda. Hawe Goday ootseeddawaa; k'ay nu s'eelawukka maalalissiyaawaa› yaagiyaawaa S'oossaa mas'aafaappe ubbakka nabbabi beykkitee?" 
Matthew21:43 «Hewaa diraw, taani hinttenttoo oday; S'oossaa kawutetsay hintteppe aketiide, lo""o ayfiyaa immiyaa asaw imettanawaa." 
Matthew21:44 He shuchchaa bolla kunddiyaa ubbay me'erettana; k'ay he shuchchay asaa bolla kunddooppe, he kunddeedda uraa liik'issana» yaageedda." 
Matthew21:45 K'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne Parisaawatuu Yesuusi odeedda leemisuwaa siseedda wode, barenttuwaa haasayiyaawaa ereeddino." 
Matthew21:46 Unttunttu Yesuusa oyk'k'anaw koyyeeddino; shin Yesuusa daro Asay nabiyaa giide k'oppi utteedda diraw, he asaw yayyeeddino." 
Matthew22:1 Yesuusi asaw laa'entsuwaa leemisuwaan hawaadan yaagiide haasayeedda; 
Matthew22:2 «Saluwaa kawutetsay bare na'aw machchiyaa immanaw ubbabaa makkeedda kaatiyaa mala. 
Matthew22:3 He kaatii bullachchaw odi wotseedda asatuwaa s'eesanaw bare k'oomatuwaa kiitteedda; shin asatuu yaanaw koyyibeykkino. 
Matthew22:4 «K'ay hara k'oomatuwaa, ‹S'eesetteeddawantta, «Taani k'umaa giigissaaddi; ta sanggatuunne ta mod'd'o miyatuu shuketteeddino; ubbabaykka maketteedda. Bullachchaa haa yiite» yaagite› yaagiide kiitteedda." 
Matthew22:5 Shin s'eesetteeddawanttu koyyennaan is's'iide, barenttu oosoo beeddino; ittuu bare goshshaw biina, yekkuu bare zal""ew beedda." 
Matthew22:6 Atteeddawanttu k'ay kaatiyaa k'oomatuwaa oyk'k'i wad'd'iide wod'eeddino. 
Matthew22:7 «Kaatii daro hank'k'etteedda; k'ay bare wotaadaratuwaa yeddiide, he shemppuwaa wod'eeddawantta wod'isiide, unttunttu katamaa guudisseedda." 
Matthew22:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, bare k'oomatuwaa, ‹Bullachchay maketteedda; shin s'eesetteeddawanttu bullachchaw bessiyaa asaa gidikkino." 
Matthew22:9 Hewaa diraw, wogga k'ad'd'aa biide, hinttenttu demmeedda asaa ubbaa bullachchaw s'eesite› yaageedda." 
Matthew22:10 He k'oomatuu k'ad'd'aa biide, barenttu demmeedda asaa ubbaa lo""uwaa iitaa shiishshiide, bullachchaa daasiyaa kuntseeddino." 
Matthew22:11 «Shin kaatii k'umaa maanaw utteedda asaa be'anaw geleedda wode, bullachchaa mayuwaa mayyibeenna itti bitaniyaa hewaan be'iide," 
Matthew22:12 ‹Ta laggew, bullachchaa mayuwaa mayyennaan waanaade hawaa gelaaddii?› yaagina bitanii c'o""u geedda." 
Matthew22:13 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan, kaatii bare k'oomatuwaa, ‹Ha bitaniyaa kushiyaanne gediyaa k'achchiide, kare d'umaa kessi olite; I hewaan yeekkananne achchaa d'ak'ana› yaageedda." 
Matthew22:14 «Ayaw gooppe, s'eesetteeddawanttu dara; shin dooretteeddawanttu guutsa» yaageedda." 
Matthew22:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Parisaawatuu biide, Aa haasayaappe balaa demmiide, Aa oyk'k'ana mala mak'k'eteeddino." 
Matthew22:16 K'ay barentta kaalliyaawanttuppenne Heroodisa baggatuwaappe amareedawantta aakko kiitteeddino. Unttunttu, «Tamaarissiyaawoo, neeni tumuwaa haasayiyaawaanne S'oossaa ogiyaa tumatetsaan tamaarissiyaawaa nuuni ereetto; ayaw gooppe, neeni asaappe asaa shaakkakkanne dummayakka." 
Matthew22:17 Ne k'ofay ayentto nuw oda; nuuni Roome gadiyaa Kaatiyaa K'eesaarew giiraa giiriyaawe wogeeyye woga gidennee?» yaageeddino. 
Matthew22:18 Shin Yesuusi unttunttu iita k'ofaa eriide, «Ha lo""a malatiyaa iita asatoo, ayaw taana paac'c'iitee?" 
Matthew22:19 Giiraa giiriyaa miishshaa taana bessite» yaageedda. Hewaappe guyye unttunttu biraa santtimiyaa aw aheeddino. 
Matthew22:20 I, «Ha malaynne suntsay oowee?» yaageedda." 
Matthew22:21 Hewaappe simmiide unttuntta oochchina, unttunttu, «Roome gadiyaa Kaatiyaa K'eesaarewaa» yaageeddino. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yesuusi unttuntta, «Yaatooppe, K'eesaarewaa K'eesaarew, S'oossaawaa S'oossaw immite» yaageedda." 
Matthew22:22 Unttunttu hewaa siseedda wode, maalalettiide Aa aggiide beeddino." 
Matthew22:23 Hayk'k'eedda Asay denddenna giyaa Saduk'aawanatuwaappe itti itti asatuu he gallassi Yesuusakko yiide, hawaadan yaagiide, Aa oochcheeddino;" 
Matthew22:24 «Tamaarissiyaawoo, Muse, ‹Itti Asay na'aa yelennaan hayk'k'ooppe, he hayk'k'eeddawaa ishay Aa machchatto laattiide, bare ishaw na'aa yelanaw bessee› yaageedda." 
Matthew22:25 Nuunanna laappu ishatuu de'iino; bayiray machchatto akkiide, na'aa yelennaan hayk'k'eedda; hewaappe guyyiyaan Aa machchatto Aa ishay akkeedda." 
Matthew22:26 K'ay laa'entsiyaawekka hayk'k'eedda; heezzetsiyaawekka, laappuntsa gakkanawukka hewaadan haneeddino." 
Matthew22:27 Ubbaappe guyyiyaan, he mishiratta hayk'k'aaddu." 
Matthew22:28 Yaatina, hayk'k'eedda Asay hayk'uwaappe denddiyaa gallassi he mishiratta laappunatuwaappe hak'awoo machche gidanee? Ayaw gooppe, laappunatuu ubbaykka izo akkeeddino» yaageeddino." 
Matthew22:29 Yesuusi zaariide, hawaadan yaageedda; «S'oossaa Mas'aafatuwaa woy Aa wolk'k'aa hinttenttu erenna diraw baliita." 
Matthew22:30 Ayaw gooppe, hayk'k'eedda Asay hayk'uwaappe denddiyaa gallassi, saluwaan de'iyaa kiitanchchatuwaa mala gidanaappe attin, attuma asaynne akkena; mac'c'a asaynne gelenna." 
Matthew22:31 Shin hayk'k'eeddawanttu dendduwaabaa gidooppe, S'oossay, ‹Taani Abraahaame S'oossaa, Yisaak'a S'oossaa, Yaak'ooba S'oossaa› yaagiide hinttew odeeddawaa ubbakka nabbabi beykkitee? S'oossay pas'a de'iyaawanttu S'oossaa gidiyaawaappe attin, hayk'k'eeddawanttu S'oossaa gidenna» yaageedda." 
Matthew22:32  
Matthew22:33 Daro Asay hewaa sisiide, Aa timirttiyaan maalaletteeddino." 
Matthew22:34 Shin Yesuusi Saduk'aawanatuwaa c'ou ootseeddawaa Parisaawatuu siseedda wode, ittisaa shiik'eeddino." 
Matthew22:35 Unttunttu giddoppe higgiyaa tamaarissiyaa ittuu, Yesuusa paac'c'anaw ittibaa oochcheedda." 
Matthew22:36 «Tamaarissiyaawoo, higgiyaa gidduwaan ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa azazuu hak'awee?» yaagiide Aa oochcheedda." 
Matthew22:37 Yesuusi zaariide, hawaadan yaageedda; « ‹Neeni Godaa ne S'oossaa ne kumentsaa wozanaappe, ne kumentsaa shemppuwaappe, ne kumentsaa k'ofaappe siik'a› yaageedda." 
Matthew22:38 Hewe ubbaappe dariyaa azazuwaanne k'ay ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa azazuwaa. 
Matthew22:39 K'ay laa'entsiyaa azazuukka Aa mala; hewe, ‹Neeni ne shooruwaa ne huup'iyaadaan siik'a› giyaawaa." 
Matthew22:40 Muse higgiyaa ubbaynne nabatuwaa timirttii ha laau azazatuwaan k'ashettee» yaageedda. 
Matthew22:41 Parisaawatuu ittisaa shiik'eeddasaan Yesuusi unttuntta, «Kiristtoosabaa waagiide k'oppiitee? I O na'ee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Unttunttu, «Kiristtoosi Daawita na'aa» yaageeddino." 
Matthew22:42  
Matthew22:43 Yesuusi unttuntta, «Yaatina, Daawite barena Geeshsha Ayyaanay haasayissina Kiristtoosa waagiide, ‹Godaa› giide s'eesii?" 
Matthew22:44 K'aykka Daawite, «Goday ta Godaa, Taani, ‹Ne morkkatuwaa, neeni yed'd'a ek'k'iyaawaa ootsana gakkanaw, hawaan taappe ushechcha baggana uttaade taananna ittippe daannata geedda› yaageedda." 
Matthew22:45 Daawite Kiristtoosa, ‹Godaa› giide s'eesooppe, yaatina, Kiristtoosi waaniide Daawita na'aa gidii?» yaageedda." 
Matthew22:46 Yesuusaw itti k'aalaa zaaranaw danddayeedda itti asaynne baawa; k'ay he gallassaappe doommina, hara ooshaa Aa oochchanaw s'aleeddawe ooninne baawa." 
Matthew23:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yesuusi shiik'eedda asawunne barena kaalliyaawanttoo hawaadan yaagiide haasayeedda;" 
Matthew23:2 «Higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttunne Parisaawatuu Muse higgiyaa tamaarissiyaa maataanna de'iino. 
Matthew23:3 Hewaa diraw, hinttenttu ootsana mala, unttunttu hinttentta azaziyaa ubbabaa ootsitenne k'ay naagite; shin unttunttu ootsiyaawaadan ootsoppite; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barenttu odiyaawaa ootsikkino." 
Matthew23:4 Tookkanaw dees'iyaa tookuwaa unttunttu k'achchiide, asaa toossiino; shin barenttu huup'iyaan haray atto, he tookuwaa birad'd'iyan bochchanawukka koyyikkino." 
Matthew23:5 «Shin unttunttu barenttu oosuwaa ubbaa Asay be'anaadan ootsiino; ayaw gooppe, barenttu som""iyaaninne barenttu kushiyaa k'esiyaan k'achchiyaa s'ik'isiyaanna de'iyaa kitaafaa aassiinonne barenttu mayuwaa mac'araakka adussiino." 
Matthew23:6 Asay barentta shoobbiide afosaan bonchcho utuwaa dosiino; k'ay Ayihuda woosa golletuwaankka daro loiyaa oydiyaa dosiino. 
Matthew23:7 Asay gewaan barentta bonchchiidde sarotana malanne ‹Tamaarissiyaawoo› giide barentta s'eesanaadan koyyiino. 
Matthew23:8 «Shin hinttentta tamaarissiyaawe ittuwaa s'alalaa gideedda dirawunne hinttenttu ubbay ishatuwaa gideedda diraw, ittuu ittuwaa, ‹Tamaarissiyaawoo› giide s'eesoppite." 
Matthew23:9 Ha sa'aan oonanne ‹Aawuwaa› giide s'eesoppite; ayaw gooppe, hinttenttoo saluwaan de'iyaa itti Aawuu de'ee." 
Matthew23:10 Ittuu ittuwaa, ‹Tamaarissiyaawoo› giidekka s'eesoppite; ayaw gooppe, hinttenttoo itti Goday, Kiristtoosa s'alalay de'ee." 
Matthew23:11 Hinttenttu giddon ubbaappe dariyaawe hinttenttoo k'ooma gidanaw bessee. 
Matthew23:12 Barena darissiyaawe ooninne tooshettana; k'ay barena toochchiyaawe ooninne d'ok'k'u gaana. 
Matthew23:13 «Loa malatiyaa iitatoo, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttoonne Parisaawatoo, asaw saluwaa kawutetsaa hinttenttu gorddiyaa diraw, hinttenttoo aayyero; ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu huup'ewunne gelikkita; k'ay gelanaw koyyiyaawanttakka gelissikkita." 
Matthew23:14 «Loa malatiyaa iitatoo, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttoonne Parisaawatoo am""etuwaa golliyaa hinttenttu bonk'k'iide, hinttenttoo lo""a malatanaw S'oossaa woosaa adussiita; hewaa diraw, hinttenttoo aayyero; ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa pirddaa hinttenttu akkana." 
Matthew23:15 «Loa malatiyaa iitatoo, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttoonne Parisaawatoo hinttenttu itti uraa ammantsanaw abbaaninne sa'aan yuuyyiyaa dirawunne k'ay hinttenttu Aa ammantsiyaa wode, he uraa hinttenttuwaappe laa""u kushiyaa iiteedda Gaannamew na'aa ootsiyaa diraw, hinttenttoo aayyero." 
Matthew23:16 « ‹Ooninne Geeshsha Golliyaan c'aak'k'ooppe, ayinne baawa; shin Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa work'k'aan c'aak'k'ooppe, he c'aak'uu Aa gakkee› giyaa hinttenttoo k'ook'i uttiide asaa kaaletsiyaawanttoo, hinttenttoo aayyero." 
Matthew23:17 Ha eeyatuu, ha k'ook'atuu, work'k'ay aad'd'iiyee? Work'k'aa geeshsha ootsiyaa Geeshsha Gollii aad'd'ii?" 
Matthew23:18 K'ay hinttenttu, ‹Ooninne yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaaban c'aak'k'ooppe, ayinneekka baawa; shin ooninne Aa bolla de'iyaa yarshshuwaan c'aak'k'ooppe, he c'aak'uu Aa gakkee› yaagiide tamaarissiita." 
Matthew23:19 Ha eeyatuu, ha k'ook'atuu, yarshshuu aad'd'iiyee? Woy yarshshuwaa geeshsha ootsiyaa Aa yarshshiyaabay aad'd'ii?" 
Matthew23:20 Hewaa diraw, yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaaban c'aak'k'iyaa uray he yarshshiyaawaanikka c'aak'k'ee; k'ay Aa bolla de'iyaa ubbabankka c'aak'k'ee." 
Matthew23:21 Geeshsha Golliyaan c'aak'k'iyaa uray, he Geeshsha Golliyaaninne Aa giddon de'iyaa S'oossaan c'aak'k'ee." 
Matthew23:22 Saluwaan c'aak'k'iyaa uray, S'oossaa kawutetsaa oydiyaaninne he oydiyaan uttiyaawaan c'aak'k'ee." 
Matthew23:23 «Loa malatiyaa iitatoo, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttoonne Parisaawatoo, hinttenttoo aayyero. Ayaw gooppe, karetsa anuugaappe, shillaariyaappenne okashiyaappe asiraataa hinttenttu immiita; shin higgiyan de'iyaa darii koshshiyaawantta aggiita; hewanttu pirddaa, maarotetsaanne s'illotetsaa. Haranttakka aggenaan, hinttenttu ootsanaw bessiyaa yewatuu hawantta." 
Matthew23:24 Hinttenttoo k'ook'i uttiide, asaa kaaletsiyaawanttoo, hinttenttu ushshaappe uduns's'iyaa gac'c'iide, gaaluwaa mittiita." 
Matthew23:25 «Loa malatiyaa iitatoo, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttoonne Parisaawatoo, hinttenttoo aayyero. Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu shaataanne keriyaa bolla bagga geeshshiita; shin Aa gidduwaan bonk'k'iyaaninne uuzetetsaan kuntseeddita." 
Matthew23:26 Ha k'ook'a Parisaawew, shaataanne keriyaa garssaa kasetaade geeshsha digga; hewaappe guyyiyaan, bolla baggaykka geeshsha gidanawaa." 
Matthew23:27 «Loa malatiyaa iitatoo, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttoonne Parisaawatoo, hinttenttoo aayyero. Ayaw gooppe, kare baggana booshinchchaan okettiide, lo""o uttiide, k'ay garssa baggana hayk'k'eedda asaa mek'etsaynne wook'k'eeddabay ubbabay kumeedda duufotuwaa malatiita." 
Matthew23:28 Hewaadankka, k'ay bolla baggana asaa ubbaw s'illuwaa malatiita; shin hinttenttoo garssa baggana lo""a malatiyaa iitatetsaynne makkalay kumi utteedda." 
Matthew23:29 «Loa malatiyaa iitatoo, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttoonne Parisaawatoo, hinttenttoo aayyero. Ayaw gooppe, nabatuwaa duufuwaa bolla golliyaa kees's'iita; k'ay s'illatuwaa duufuwaakka loytsiita." 
Matthew23:30 K'ay hinttenttu, ‹Nuuni beni nu aawotuwaa wode de'eeddawantta gidintto, unttunttunna ittippe nabatuwaa wod'okko shin› yaagiita." 
Matthew23:31 Hewaa gidooppe, nabatuwaa wod'eeddawanttu naanaa hinttenttu gideeddawaa hinttenttu huup'iyaan markkattiita." 
Matthew23:32 Simmi hinttenttu aawotuu doommeeddawaa polikkitee! 
Matthew23:33 «Ha shooshshatoo, shooshshaa naanaw, Gaannamiyaa pirddaappe waaniide attanitee?" 
Matthew23:34 Hewaa diraw, beyte, taani nabatuwaa aad'd'o eranchchatuwaanne higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawantta hinttekko kiittana. Unttunttuppe ittuwaa ittuwaa hinttenttu wod'ananne mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide kak'k'anita; k'ay ittuwaa ittuwaa hinttenttu woosa golletun lissuwaan shoc'anitanne katamaappe katamaa yederssanita." 
Matthew23:35 Hewaa diraw, s'illuwaa Aabeela wod'oodeppe doommiide, Geeshsha Golliyaappenne yarshshiyaa saappe gidduwaan hinttenttu wod'eedda Baraakiyaa na'aa Zakkaraasa wodiyaa gakkanaw, hayk'k'eedda s'illatuwaa ubbatuwaa suutsaa diraw, hinttenttu murettanita." 
Matthew23:36 Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; ha ubbabay ha wodiyaa asaa bolla gakkanawaa. 
Matthew23:37 «Yerusaalame katamaa asaw, Yerusaalame katamaa asaw, nabatuwaa hinttenttu wod'iita; S'oossay hinttenttukko kiitteeddawanttakka shuchchaan c'addiita; kuttatta bare maratuwaa bare k'efiyaan hap'p'iyaawaadan, taani hinttenttu asaa ittisaa shiishshanaw aappu kaala koyaadditaa! Shin taana diggeeddita." 
Matthew23:38 Be'ite, hinttenttu gollii ubbakka ona gidanawaa." 
Matthew23:39 Ayaw gooppe, taani hinttenttoo oday; hinttenttu, ‹Godaa suntsaan yiyaawe anjjetteeddawaa gaana gakkanaw, laa'entsuwaa taana be'ikkita› gay» yaageedda." 
Matthew24:1 Yesuusi Geeshsha Golliyaappe kesiide biyaa wode, Geeshsha Golliyaa dirssaa giddon de'iyaa golliyaa bessanaw Aa kaalliyaawanttu aakko yeeddino." 
Matthew24:2 Yesuusi zaariide unttuntta, «Hewaa ubbaa be'iitee? Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; ha golletuwaan de'iyaa itti shuchchaynne attenaan ubbay kolettana» yaageedda." 
Matthew24:3 Yesuusi Debre Zayite geetettiyaa deriyaa bollan utti de'ishshin, Aa kaalliyaawanttu barenttu s'alalaa aakko yiide Aa, «Hewe awude hananentto, nuw odaarikkii; k'ay ne yuussawunne wodiyaa wurssetsaw mallay ayaa gidanee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew24:4 Yesuusi zaariide, unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Hinttentta ooninne baletsena mala naagettite." 
Matthew24:5 Ayaw gooppe, daro Asay ta suntsaan, ‹Taani Kiristtoosa› yaagiidde yaana; yaatiide daro asaa baletsana." 
Matthew24:6 Matan de'iyaa olaa waasuwaanne haakuwaan de'iyaa olaa oduwaa sisanaw hinttenttu de'iita; hewaa malabay hananaw bessiyaa diraw, naagettite; hirggoppite; shin wurssetsay biraa." 
Matthew24:7 Ayaw gooppe, itti gadiyaa Asay hara gadiyaa asaana olettana; k'ay itti kawutetsay hara kawutetsaanna olettana; koshaynne biittaa k'aatsay ubba saan de'anawaa." 
Matthew24:8 Hewe ubbaykka koyro oytsaa mala. 
Matthew24:9 «Asay he wode hinttentta waayissananne wod'anawaa; ta suntsaa diraw, gade ubbay hinttentta is's'anawaa." 
Matthew24:10 He wode c'ora Asay ammanuwaa agganawantta; barenttu giddon ittuu ittuwaa aatsiide immananne ittuu ittuwaa is's'anawaa. 
Matthew24:11 K'ay worddo nabatuu c'oratuu denddiide, daro asaa c'immanawantta." 
Matthew24:12 Makkalay dariyaa diraw, c'ora asaa siik'uu irs's'anawaa." 
Matthew24:13 Shin wurssetsay gakkanaw genc'c'iyaa uray attanawaa. 
Matthew24:14 Asaw ubbaw markka gidana mala, kawutetsaa wonggalaa mishiraachchuu sa'aa ubbaan odettanawaa; hewaappe guyyiyaan, wurssetsay gakkanawaa.»" 
Matthew24:15 «Hewaa diraw, nabiyaa Daaneel odeedda bashshaa tunatetsay geeshsha saan ek'k'eeddawaa hinttenttu be'ana; hewe waagiyaawentto, nabbabiyaawe akeeko." 
Matthew24:16 «Yihudaa gadiyaan he wode de'iyaawanttu deriyaakko kesino. 
Matthew24:17 Golliyaa huup'iyaan de'iyaa uraykka bare soyin de'iyaawaa akkanaw wod'd'oppo. 
Matthew24:18 Gaden de'iyaawe bare mayuwaa akkanaw guyye simmoppo. 
Matthew24:19 He wode shahaara mac'c'awanttoonne d'antsiyaa mac'c'awanttoo aayyero. 
Matthew24:20 Balgguwaan woy Sambbataan hinttenttu betenna mala, S'oossaa woossite;" 
Matthew24:21 ayaw gooppe, alamii med'ettoodeppe hachche gakkanaw de'ibeennabaynne k'ay hawaappe sintsawukka ubbaa de'enna iita waayyii he wode de'anawaa." 
Matthew24:22 S'oossay he gallassatuwaa payduwaa guutsiyaawe baawentto, asaa gideedda ooninne attena; shin I bare dooreedda asatuwaa diraw, he gallassatuwaa payduwaa guutsanawaa." 
Matthew24:23 «He wode ooninne hinttentta, ‹Be'ite. Kiristtoosi hawaan de'ee› woy, ‹Hewaan de'ee› yaagooppe aawaa ammanoppite." 
Matthew24:24 Ayaw gooppe, worddo Kiristtoosatuunne worddo nabatuu denddana; yaatiide barenttoo danddayettooppe, haray atto S'oossay dooreeddawanttakka baletsanaw wolk'k'aama malaataanne maalalissiyaabaa bessanawaa." 
Matthew24:25 Be'ite, taani hinttew hewaa kasetaade odaaddi." 
Matthew24:26 «Hewaa diraw, Asay hinttentta, ‹Be'ite, Kiristtoosi bazzuwaan de'ee› gooppe, yaa booppite; woy hinttentta, ‹Be'ite, k'ol""on de'ee› ginttokka, unttunttubaa ammanoppite." 
Matthew24:27 Ayaw gooppe, walk'k'antsay awayifii doliyaa baggappe walk'k'ammiide, awayifii wulliyaa bagga gakkanaw p'olk'k'u giyaawaadan, ta yuussay, Asaa Na'aa yuussay, hewaadan hananawaa." 
Matthew24:28 «Bakkutay de'iyaasaa shorttii shiik'ana.» 
Matthew24:29 «He wode waayiyaappe guyyiyaan, elekka away d'umaana; agenay poo'iyaawaa agganawaa; s'oolinttatuu saluwaappe kunddanawantta; k'ay saluwaan de'iyaa wolk'k'atuukka k'aas'ettanawantta." 
Matthew24:30 He wode ta mallay, Asaa Na'aa mallay, saluwaan beettanawaa; sa'aan he wode de'iyaa asaa zarii ubbay yeekkanawantta. K'ay taani, Asaa Na'ay, wolk'k'aannanne wolk'k'aama bonchchuwaanna saluwaappe shaariyaa giddonna yiishshin, unttunttu be'ana." 
Matthew24:31 I bare kiitanchchatuwaa wolk'k'aama malakataanna kiittana; kiitanchchatuu alamew ha gas'aappe ya gas'aa gakkanaw, k'ay sa'aan oyddu baggappe aw dooretteedda asaa shiishshanawaa." 
Matthew24:32 «Leemisuwaa balasatto geetettiyaa mitsattippe akeekite; balasatta aac'iya wodenne izi haytsay k'olettiyaa wode, bonii mateeddawaa hinttenttu eranita." 
Matthew24:33 Hewaadankka, hinttenttu he ubbabaa be'iyaa wode, I matiide penggiyaa shiik'eeddawaa erite." 
Matthew24:34 Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; ha ubbabay hanana gakkanaw, ha wodiyaa Asay hayk'k'idiggenna." 
Matthew24:35 Saluunne sa'ay aad'd'ana; shin ta k'aalay ubbakka aad'd'enna. 
Matthew24:36 «Shin he gallassaanne he saatiyaa Aawuwaa s'alalaappe attin, haray atto saluwaan de'iyaa kiitanchchatuwaa gidina, woy taana Na'aa gidinakka ooninne eriyaawe baawa." 
Matthew24:37 Ta yuussay, Asaa Na'aa yuussay, Nohe wode hanowaa mala gidanawaa." 
Matthew24:38 Ayaw gooppe, bashshaa haatsaa yuussaappe kase wode, Nohe markkabiyaan geleedda gallassay gakkanaw, Asay meenne usheenne; k'ay attuma Asay akkeenne mac'c'a Asay asinaa gelee." 
Matthew24:39 Bashshaa haatsay yiide, unttuntta ubbaa afana gakkanaw, unttunttu akeekibeykkino; taani, Asaa Na'ay, yiyaa wodii, hewaa mala gidanawaa." 
Matthew24:40 «He wode laau asatuu gaden ootsiyaawanttuppe ittuwaa afana; ittuu attanawaa. 
Matthew24:41 Laau mac'c'awanttu wos'aan gaac'c'iyaawanttuppe ittinno afana; ittinna attana. 
Matthew24:42 «Simmi hintte Goday ay gallassi yaanawentto hinttenttu erenna diraw, naagi uttite." 
Matthew24:43 Shin kayisuu k'ammaappe woyssa wodiyaan yaanentto golliyaa goday ereeddentto, bare gollii bookettenna mala, beegottiide naagi uttanawaa erite." 
Matthew24:44 Hewaa diraw, hinttenttukka giigi uttite; ayaw gooppe, taani, Asaa Na'ay, hinttenttu k'oppenna saatiyaan yaana." 
Matthew24:45 «Yaatina, bare soy asaw k'umaa koshshiyaa wodiyaan immana mala, Aa goday suntseedda ammanetteeda wozanaama k'oomay oonee?" 
Matthew24:46 I hewaadan ootsishshin, Aa goday yiide demmiyaa k'oomay anjjetteeddaawaa." 
Matthew24:47 Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; goday he k'oomaa barewaa ubbaa bolla suntsana. 
Matthew24:48 Shin k'oomay iita gidooppe, ‹Ta goday gam""iide yaanawaa› yaagiide bare wozanaan k'oppiide," 
Matthew24:49 bare laggetsaa k'oomatuwaa wad'aa doommooppe, matsottiyaawanttunna mooppenne ushooppe," 
Matthew24:50 he k'oomaa goday I k'oppibeenna gallassaaninne I eribeenna saatiyaan yaana. 
Matthew24:51 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Aa k'ans's'ereetsiide, lo""a malatiyaa iita asatuu de'iyaa saan wotsina; hewaan I yeekkananne achchaa d'ak'ana." 
Matthew25:1 «He wode saluwaa kawutetsay barenttu kuraaziyaa oyk'k'iide, machchatto akkiyaawaa mokkanaw kare keseedda tammu wodoratuwaa malatana." 
Matthew25:2 Unttunttuppe ichcheshatuu boozatuwaa; k'ay ichcheshatuu c'inc'c'a. 
Matthew25:3 Boozatuu barenttu kuraaziyaa oyk'k'eeddino; shin lambbaa oyk'k'ibeykkino. 
Matthew25:4 Shin c'inc'c'atuu barenttu kuraaziyaanne s'aaramusiyaan lambbaa oyk'k'eeddino. 
Matthew25:5 Machchatto akkiyaawe yeennaan gamina, he wodoratuu barentta gem""ishissina gisi aggeeddino." 
Matthew25:6 «Bilahe gideedda wode, ‹Be'ite, machchatto akkiyaawe gakkeedda; Aa mokkanaw kare kesite› yaagiyaa wolk'k'aama c'abbuu denddeedda." 
Matthew25:7 «He wode he wodoratuu ubbatuu beegottiide, barenttu kuraaziyaa giigisseeddino." 
Matthew25:8 Boozatuu c'inc'c'atuwaa, ‹Nu kuraazi to'ana haniyaa diraw, hinttenttu lambbaappe nuw immeerikkitee› yaageeddino." 
Matthew25:9 «Shin c'inc'c'atuu zaariide unttuntta, ‹Aggite, nuwunne hinttenttoo gidenna; hewaa diraa hinttew zal""iyaawanttukko biide shammi akkite› yaageeddino." 
Matthew25:10 Hewaappe guyye booza wodoratuu lambbaa shammanaw bidiggina, machchatto akkiyaawe puttu giina, giigi utteedda ichcheshu wodoratuu aanana ittippe bullachchaa golliyaa geleeddino; ifitsaykka gorddetti aggeedda." 
Matthew25:11 «Guyyeppe k'ay yekko wodoratuu yiide, ‹Godaw, godaw, nuw dooyaarikkii› yaageeddino." 
Matthew25:12 «Shin machchatto akkiyaawe zaariide, ‹Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; taani hinttentta erikke› yaageedda." 
Matthew25:13 «Simmi taani, Asaa Na'ay, yaana gallassaa woy saatiyaa hinttenttu erenna diraw, naagi uttite." 
Matthew25:14 «Ayaw gooppe, saluwaa kawutetsay bare k'oomatuwaa s'eesiide, barew de'iyaawaa unttunttoo sheed'd'iide, ogiyaa baana haniyaa bitaniyaa bessee." 
Matthew25:15 Unttunttu huup'iyaan huup'iyaan unttunttu wolk'k'aa keenaa ittoo ichcheshu shaa biraa, ittoo laa""u sha""a biraa, k'ay ittoo itti sha""a biraa immiide, bare ogiyaa beedda." 
Matthew25:16 Ichcheshu shaa biraa akkeedda k'oomay ellekka biide zaliide, hara ichcheshu sha""a biraa wod'iseedda." 
Matthew25:17 Hewaadankka, k'ay laa""u sha""a biraa akkeedda k'oomay hara laa""u sha""a biraa wod'iseedda." 
Matthew25:18 Shin itti shaa biraa akkeeddawe biide, ollaa bookkiide, bare godaa miishshaa moogi aggeedda." 
Matthew25:19 «Daro wodiyaappe guyyiyaan, he k'oomatuwaa goday yiide, bare miishshaa unttunttunna heetetteedda." 
Matthew25:20 Ichcheshu shaa biraa akkeedda k'oomay yiide, hara ichcheshu sha""a biraa sheed'd'iide, ‹Ta godaw, neeni taw ichcheshu sha""a biraa immaadda; be'a, hara ichcheshu sha""a biraa wod'isaad› yaageedda." 
Matthew25:21 Aa goday Aa, ‹Hayyanaashsho! Neeni lo""anne ammanettiyaa k'oomaa; neeni guutsaban ammanettaada. Taani neena darobaw kaappo ootsana; haa gelaade ne godaanna nashetta› yaageedda." 
Matthew25:22 «K'ay laau shaa biraa akkeeddawekka yiide, ‹Ta godaw, neeni taw laa""u sha""a biraa immaadda; be'a, taani hara laa""u sha""a biraa wod'isaad› yaageedda." 
Matthew25:23 Aa goday Aa, ‹Hayyanaashsho! Neeni lo""anne ammanettiyaa k'oomaa; neeni guutsaban ammanettaada. Taani neena darobaw kaappo ootsana; haa gelaade ne godaanna nashetta› yaageedda." 
Matthew25:24 «Itti shaa biraa akkeeddawe k'ay yiide, ‹Ta godaw, neeni zerabeennasaappe k'oyc'iyaa asaa gidiyaawaanne katsaa laalabeennasaappe mas'iyaa mek'etsi baynna asaa gidiyaawaa taani eray." 
Matthew25:25 Taani yayaad; yaataade baade ne biraa biittaan moogaad; be'a, ne biray haweku› yaageedda." 
Matthew25:26 «Aa goday zaariide, Aa hawaadan yaageedda; ‹Ha iita azalla k'oomaw, taani zerabeennasaappe k'oyc'iyaa asaa gidiyaawaanne katsaa laalabeennasaappe mas'iyaa asaa gidiyaawaa eraaddii?" 
Matthew25:27 Yaatina, neeni ta miishshaa wod'isiyaawanttu matan wotseeddawaa gidintto, taani simmiyaa wode ta miishshaa wod'iyaanna akkanawaashshin atteedda." 
Matthew25:28 Hewaa diraw, he miishshaa aappe wotsi akkiide, tammu sha""a biray de'iyaawoo immite." 
Matthew25:29 Ayaw gooppe, de'iyaa ubbaw haray gujettana; I barew gidiyaawaappe darissiide akkana; shin baynnawoo haray atto, he aw de'iyaa guutsaykka aappe aketanawaa." 
Matthew25:30 Goenna k'oomaa kare d'umaa kessi olite; hewaan I yeekkananne bare achchaa d'ak'ana› yaageedda. 
Matthew25:31 «Taani, Asaa Na'ay, kiitanchchatuwaa ubbatuwanna bonchchuwaan yiyaa wode, ta bonchcho kawutetsaa oydiyaan uttana." 
Matthew25:32 Sa'aan de'iyaa Asay ubbay ta sintsa shiik'anawantta; heemmiyaawe dorssatuwaa deeshshatuwaappe shaakkiyaawaadan, taani he asaa laa""u kessaade shaakkana." 
Matthew25:33 K'ay dorssatuwaa taappe ushechcha baggana essaade, deeshshatuwaa taappe haddirssa baggana essana." 
Matthew25:34 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan, taani kaatii taappe ushechcha baggana de'iyaawantta hawaadan yaagana; ‹Ta Aabbu anjjeeddawantto, haa yiide sa'ay med'ettoodeppe hachche gakkanaw, hinttenttoo giigeedda kawutetsaa laattite." 
Matthew25:35 Ayaw gooppe, taani koshattina mizeeddita; saamettina ushsheeddita; imatsaa gidaade biinakka mokkeeddita." 
Matthew25:36 Taani kallottina mayzzeeddita; harggina be'eeddita; k'ashettina taakko gakkiide oochcheeddita› yaagana. 
Matthew25:37 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan, s'illatuu zaariide, Aa hawaadan yaagana; ‹Godaw, neeni koshattina, awude be'iide mizeeddoo? Woy neeni saamettina, awude be'iide ushsheeddoo?" 
Matthew25:38 Neeni imatsaa gidaade yiina awude be'iide mokkeeddoo? Woy neeni kallottina awude mayzzeeddo? 
Matthew25:39 K'ay neeni harggina, woy k'ashettina neekko biide awude neena be'eeddoo?› yaaganawantta." 
Matthew25:40 Taani kaatii zaaraade, ‹Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; hinttenttu ha ta ishatuwaa ubbaappe haray atto, laafiyaa ittoo ootseeddawaa gidinttokka, hewaa taw ootseeddita› yaagana." 
Matthew25:41 «He wode, taappe haddirssa baggana de'iyaawantta taani yaagana; ‹Ha shek'etteeddawanttoo, ta matappe kichchite; biide s'alahiyaa kaappoonne Aa kiitanchchatoo giigeedda med'inaa tamaan gelite." 
Matthew25:42 Ayaw gooppe, taani koshattina, taana mizibeykkita; saamettina ushshibeykkita." 
Matthew25:43 Taani imatsaa gidaade biina, taana mokkibeykkita; kallottina mayzzibeykkita; k'ay harggina, k'ashettinakka taana be'ibeykkita› yaagana." 
Matthew25:44 «He wode unttunttu k'ay hawaadan yaagiide zaaranawantta; ‹Godaw, neeni koshattina woy saamettina, woy imatsaa gidaade biina woy kallottina, woy harggina woy k'ashettina, awude be'iide, neena maaddennaan is's'eeddoo?› yaaganawantta." 
Matthew25:45 «He wode taani kaatii zaaraade unttuntta, ‹Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; hinttenttu ha ubbaappe laafiyaa ittuwaa maaddennaan is's'eeddawe, taana maaddennaan is's'eeddawaa› yaagana." 
Matthew25:46 Hewanttu med'inaa muraw baana; shin s'illatuu med'inaa de'oo baana» yaageedda. 
Matthew26:1 Yesuusi ha timirttiyaa ubbaa wurisseedda wode, barena kaalliyaawantta," 
Matthew26:2 «Laau gallassaappe guyyiyaan, Paasigaa Baalaa bonchchiyaa gallassaa gidiyaawaa eriita. He gallassi Taana, Asaa Na'aa, Asay mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide kak'k'anaw aatsiide immana» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:3 He wode k'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne gadiyaa c'imatuu K'ayaafaa geetettiyaa k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa wogga golliyaan shiik'iide," 
Matthew26:4 asay erennaan Yesuusa oyk'k'iide, wod'anaw mak'k'eteeddino." 
Matthew26:5 Shin unttunttu, «Asay walassaa kessenna mala, Paasigaa bonchchiyaa gallassi hewaa ootsokko» yaageeddino." 
Matthew26:6 Yesuusi Biitaaniyaa katamaan oolluwaa harggiyaa Simoona soyin de'ishshin," 
Matthew26:7 itti mishiratta albbass's'iroosa geetettiyaa shuchchaappe oosetteedda albbass's'iroosa baareeta kumeedda darii alo shittuwaa akkaade yeeddawunna k'umaa I miina, he shittuwaa Yesuusa huup'iyaan c'ac'c'afaaddu." 
Matthew26:8 Shin Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu hewaa be'iide, «Ha shittuwaa c'oo bayizzussay ayaasee?" 
Matthew26:9 Ayaw gooppe, ha shittuwaa al""o gatiyaan zal""iide, miishshaa hiyyeesaw immanaw danddayettee» yaageeddino." 
Matthew26:10 Yesuusi unttunttu giyaawaa eriide, unttuntta hawaadan yaageedda; «Ha mishiratto ayaw waayissiitee? Iza taw lo""obaa ootsaaddu." 
Matthew26:11 Hiyyeesatuu ubbaa wode hinttenanna de'iino; shin taani hinttenanna ubbaa wode de'ikke; 
Matthew26:12 Iza ha shittuwaa ta bolla tigiyaawe taana mooganaw giigissanaassa. 
Matthew26:13 Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; sa'aa ubbaan ha wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaasan hak'aninne, Asay izo wozanaa aatsana mala, iza ootseeddawe odettanawaa» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:14 He wode tammanne laau Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttuppe ittuu Yihudaa Ask'k'orootu yaagettiyaawe k'eesatuwaa kaappatuwaakko 
Matthew26:15 biide, «Taani hinttenttoo Yesuusa oytsooppe, taw ayaa immanitee?» yaagina unttunttu aw hattamu biraa k'oppiide immeeddino." 
Matthew26:16 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yihuday Yesuusa aatsi immanaw injjetiyaa wodiyaa wochchee." 
Matthew26:17 Baalaa daabbuwaa miyaa gallassaa bonchchiyaa koyro gallassi, Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu aakko yiide, «Paasigaa bonchchiyaa gallassi neeni maana k'umaa hak'an giigissanee?» yaageeddino." 
Matthew26:18 Hewaappe guyye Yesuusi unttuntta, «Katamaa biide, itti bitaniyaa, ‹Tamaarissiyaawe neena, «Taw wodii gakkeedda; taani taana kaalliyaawanttunna Paasigaa bonchchiyaa gallassaa ne soyin aatsana» geedda› giite» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:19 Aa kaalliyaawanttu Yesuusi barentta azazowaadan ootsiide, Paasigaa bonchchiyaa gallassi maana k'umaa giigisseeddino." 
Matthew26:20 Sa'ay omarsseedda wode, Yesuusi tammanne laa""u Aa kaalliyaawanttunna k'umaa maanaw utteedda." 
Matthew26:21 Unttunttu miishshin, Yesuusi unttuntta, «Taani hinttenttoo tumuwaa oday; hintteppe itti uray taana aatsiide immanawaa» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:22 Unttunttu darii dagammiide, huup'iyaan huup'iyaan, «Godaw, tumu taaneeshsha?» guussaa doommeeddino." 
Matthew26:23 Yesuusi zaariide, «Bare kushiyaa taananna ittippe woc'iitiyaappe yeddiide tushiyaawe taana aatsi immana." 
Matthew26:24 Taani, Asaa Na'ay, S'oossaa Mas'aafay hayk'k'ana geeddawaadan hayk'k'ana; shin Taana, Asaa Na'aa, aatsi immiyaa uraw aayyero; he uray yelettennaan atteeddentto aw lo""a shshin» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:25 Aa aatsi immiyaa Yihuday zaariide, «Tamaarissiyaawoo, neeni giyaawe taanee?» yaageedda. Yesuusi zaariide Aa, «Neeni ne huup'iyaan gaadda» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:26 Unttunttu miishshin, Yesuusi daabbuwaa akkiide, S'oossaa galateedda; he daabbuwaa mentsereetsiide, barena kaalliyaawanttoo immiidde, «Heytte; miite; hawe ta ashuwaa» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:27 S'uu'aa akkiide, S'oossaa galateedda. Unttunttoo immiidde, «Ubbay hawaappe ushite;" 
Matthew26:28 ayaw gooppe, hawe daro asaa nagaray atto geetettana diraw gukkiyaa ta suutsaa; ta suutsay ooratsa c'aak'uwaa." 
Matthew26:29 Shin taani hinttenttoo oday; taani ta Aabbu kawutetsaan ooratsa woyniyaa eessaa hinttenttunna ushana gallassay gakkanaw, laa'entsuwaa ha woyniyaa eessaa ubbakka ushikke» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:30 Mazimuriyaa yes's'owaappe guyyiyaan, Debre Zayite geetettiyaa deriyaa beeddino." 
Matthew26:31 Yesuusi he wode unttuntta, «Hachche k'amma hinttenttu ubbay taana aggiide kichchana; ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, « ‹S'oossay dorssaa heemmiyaawaa wod'anawaa; hewaappe guyyiyaan dorssaa wudii laalettanawaa› yaagee." 
Matthew26:32 Shin taani hayk'uwaappe denddowaappe guyyiyaan, hintteppe kasetaade Galiilaa baana» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:33 P'es'iroosi zaariide, «Unttunttu ubbatuu neena aggiide kichchanawantta; taani neena ubbakka yeggaade kichchikke» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:34 Yesuusi P'es'iroosa, «Taani new tumuwaa oday; hachche k'amma kuttuu waassanaappe kase, neeni taana heezzu kaala kaadanaassa» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:35 P'es'iroosi zaariide, «Taani haray atto, neenanna ittippe hayk'k'inttokka, neena ubbakka kaddikke» yaageedda. K'ay Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu ubbatuukka hewaadan geeddino." 
Matthew26:36 Yesuusi he wode barena kaalliyaawanttunna Geetesemaaniyaa geetettiyaasaa biide unttuntta, «Taani hini baade S'oossaa woossishin, hinttenttu hawaan uttishshite» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:37 Hewaappe guyye P'es'iroosanne Zabddiyoosa naanaa laauwaa barenanna afiide, daro kayyuwaanne ugaa doommeedda." 
Matthew26:38 K'ay unttuntta, «Taani hayk'k'ana gakkanawukka kayyottay; hawaan beegottiide, taananna naagite» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:39 Laafaa sintsakko shiik'iide, sa'aan guufanniide, «Ta Aabboo, danddayettiyaawaa gidooppe, ha s'uu'aa taappe digga; shin neeni koyyiyaawaadan hanoppe attin, taani koyyiyaawaadan hanoppo» yaagiide S'oossaa woosseedda." 
Matthew26:40 Yesuusi barena kaalliyaawanttukko simmiide yeedda; gemishowantta demmiide P'es'iroosa, «Hinttenttu itti saatenttonnekka gem""ishennaan taananna naaganaw danddayibeykkitee?" 
Matthew26:41 Paac'iyaan hinttenttu gelenna mala, minnitenne S'oossaa woossite; ayyaanay giigi utteedda; shin asatetsaa eeshshay daaburanchchaa» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:42 Yesuusi k'ay laa'entsuwaa biide, «Ta Aabboo, taani ha wolk'k'aama metuwaa akkenaan de'ishshin s'uu'aa dentsanaw danddayettenawaa gidooppe, neeni giyaawe hano» yaagiide S'oossaa woosseedda." 
Matthew26:43 K'aykka simmi yiide, Aa kaalliyaawanttu ayfiyaa gem""ishuu goozi wotseedda diraw, gem""ishowantta demmeedda." 
Matthew26:44 K'aykka unttuntta yeggi biide, hezentsuwaa kase k'aalaa zaariide, S'oossaa woosseedda." 
Matthew26:45 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, barena kaalliyaawanttoo yiide, «Ha""i gakkanawukka gem""ishiiteenne shemppiitee? Be'ite, Taana, Asaa Na'aa, nagaranchcha asatoo aatsiide immiyaa wodii gakkeedda." 
Matthew26:46 Denddina boytte; be'ite, taana aatsi immiyaawe haweku gakkeedda» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:47 Yesuusi hewaa biro haasayishshin, tammanne laa""u Aa kaalliyaawanttuppe ittuu, Yihuday, gakki wod'd'eedda; k'ay k'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne gadiyaa c'imatuu kiittina, mashshaanne s'am""aa oyk'k'eedda c'ora Asay aanana ittippe yeedda." 
Matthew26:48 Yesuusa aatsi immiyaawe he c'ora asaa, «Taani yeriyaawe Aa; Aa oyk'k'ite» yaagiide mallaa odi wotseedda." 
Matthew26:49 Ellekka Yesuusakko shiik'iide, «Tamaarissiyaawoo, saro de'ay» yaagiide Aa yeri akkeedda." 
Matthew26:50 Yesuusi Yihudaa, «Ta laggew, neeni ootsanabaa ootsa agga» yaageedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, he c'ora Asay shiik'iide, Yesuusa loytsi oyk'k'eedda." 
Matthew26:51 Yesuusanna de'iyaawanttuppe ittuu bare mashshaa kessiide k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa k'oomaa haytsaa k'ans's'i oleedda. 
Matthew26:52 Yesuusi he wode Aa hawaadan yaageedda; «Ne mashshaa akkeeddasaani zaaraade wotsa; ayaw gooppe, mashshaa dentsiyaa ubbay mashshaan hayk'k'ana." 
Matthew26:53 Ta Aabbu daro shaa kiitanchchatuwaa itti kutsaan yeddiide, taana maaddana mala, taani Aa woossanaw danddayiyaawaa erikkii?" 
Matthew26:54 Yaatina, S'oossaa k'aalay hawaadan hananaw bessee yaageeddawe waaniide polettanaw danddayii?» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:55 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yesuusi hewaan shiik'eedda c'ora asaa hawaadan yaageedda; «Taana kayiso kessiide, kayisuwaa oyk'k'iyaawaadan oyk'k'anaw mashshaanne s'am""aa oyk'k'iide yeedditee? Taani Geeshsha Golliyaan tamaarissaadde, gallassan gallassan hinttenttunna ootsiyaa wode taana oyk'k'ibeykkita;" 
Matthew26:56 shin hawe ubbay haneeddawe nabatuu S'oossaa k'aalaan s'aafeeddawe polettanaassa» yaageedda. Yesuusa kaalliyaawanttu he wode ubbatuu Aa yeggi beeddino. 
Matthew26:57 Yesuusa oyk'k'eeddawanttu k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa K'ayaafaakko, higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttunne c'imatuu shiik'eeddasaa aakkiide beeddino." 
Matthew26:58 Shin P'es'iroosi k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa dirssaa giddo gakkanaw, haakuwaan Aa kaalleedda; yewuwaa wurssetsaa be'anaw dirssaa giddo geliide, naagiyaawanttunna utti aggeedda." 
Matthew26:59 K'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne shiik'eedda Asay ubbay Yesuusa wod'anaw Aa bolla wordduwaa markkaa demmanaw koyyeeddino. 
Matthew26:60 Shin haray atto c'ora Asay yiide, Aa bolla wordduwaan markkattinakka aappe ayinne demmibeykkino. Guyyeppe laa""atuu yiide," 
Matthew26:61 «Ha bitanii, ‹Taani S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa kolaade, heezzu gallassaan zaaraade kees's'anaw danddayay› geedda» yaageeddino." 
Matthew26:62 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu denddi ek'k'iide Yesuusa, «Hawanttu neena mootiyaa mootoo new zaariyaabay baawee?» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:63 Shin Yesuusi c'ou geedda; k'aykka k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu Aa, «Taani neena de'uwaa S'oossaa suntsaan c'allay; neeni S'oossaa Na'aa Kiristtoosa gidooppe nuw oda» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:64 Yesuusi zaariide, «Neeni ne huup'ewukka gaadda; shin taani hinttenttoo oday; hawaappe sintsaan, hinttenttu taana, Asaa Na'aa, wolk'k'aama S'oossaappe ushechcha baggana utteeddawaanne saluwaa shaariyaanna yiishshin be'ana» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:65 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu bare mayuwaa peed'i oliide, «Hawe boreedda; nuuna hawaappe sintsan ayaw hara markkaa koshshii? I ha""i boriyaawaa hinttenttu siseeddita." 
Matthew26:66 Hinttenttu k'ofay ayee?» yaageedda. Unttunttu, «Aw hayk'uu bessee» yaagiide zaareeddino." 
Matthew26:67 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, unttunttu Aa deemuwaan c'uchchiide, Aa dechcheeddino; haranttu k'ay Aa bak'k'iide," 
Matthew26:68 «Kiristtoosaa! Neeni neena nabe gaasashshin, neena shoc'eeddawe oonentto ane nuw oda!» yaageeddino." 
Matthew26:69 P'es'iroosi golliyaappe karenna dirssaa giddon utti de'ishshin, itti k'oomata aakko yaade, «Neenikka Galiilaa Yesuusanna ittippe de'aa» yaagaaddu." 
Matthew26:70 Shin I unttunttu ubbaa sintsaan he k'oomato, «Neeni giyaawe ayentto taani erikke» yaagiide kaadeedda." 
Matthew26:71 K'ay biide dirssaa penggiyaakko kesishshin, hara k'oomata Aa be'aade, hewaan de'iyaa asatoo, «Ha bitanii Naazireetiyaa Yesuusanna de'ee» yaagaaddu." 
Matthew26:72 P'es'iroosi laa'entsuwaa c'aak'k'iidde, «Taani hewaa bitaniyaa erikke» yaageedda." 
Matthew26:73 Laafaa gamishin, hewaan ek'k'eedda Asay P'es'iroosakko yiide, «Neenikka tuma unttunttunna ittippe de'aa; ayaw gooppe, neeni haasayiyaa haasayaykka neena erissee» yaageeddino." 
Matthew26:74 Hewaappe guyyiyaan P'es'iroosi, «Taani hewaa bitaniyaa erikke!» yaagiide, barena shek'aanne c'aak'uwaa doommeedda. He wode ellekka kuttuu waassi aggeedda." 
Matthew26:75 P'es'iroosi barena Yesuusi, «Neeni kuttuu waassanaappe kase heezzu kaala taana kaadanaassa» geeddawaa hassayiide, kare kesiide, seeletti yeekkeedda." 
Matthew27:1 Wontta guuraan k'eesatuwaa kaappatuu ubbatuunne gadiyaa c'imatuu Yesuusa wod'anaw mak'k'eteeddino; 
Matthew27:2 unttunttu Yesuusa k'achchi afiide, gadiyaa ayissiyaa P'ilaas'oosaw aatsi immeeddino." 
Matthew27:3 Yesuusa he wode oytseedda Yihuday P'ilaas'oosi Yesuusa bolla pirddeeddawaa be'iide, «Aayyeero! Oytsennaan aggaarikkitaa!» yaagiide, he man''iyaan hattamu biraa k'eesatuwaa kaappatoonne gadiyaa c'imatoo guyye zaariide," 
Matthew27:4 «Taani geeshsha asaa oytsaade nagaraa ootsaad» yaageedda. Shin unttunttu Aa, «Hewe nuw ayaa metee? Hewe ne shene» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:5 Yihuday biraa Geeshsha Golliyaan oli aggeedda; unttunttu matappe biide, suletti hayk'k'eedda." 
Matthew27:6 K'eesatuwaa kaappatuu biraa akkiide, «Ha biray suutsaa miishshaa gidishin, nuuni Geeshsha Golliyaa miishshaanna gatsiyaawe woga gidenna» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:7 Hewaappe guyye ittippe zorettiide, imatsaa asaw moogo gadiyaa ootsanaw urk'k'aappe miishshaa med'd'iyaawanttu gadiyaa shammeeddino." 
Matthew27:8 Hewaa diraw, he gadii hachche gakkanawukka, suutsaa gadiyaa geetettiide s'eesettee." 
Matthew27:9 Nabiyaa Ermaasi, «Unttunttu aw immanaw k'oppeedda hattamu shuchchaa biraa akkiide," 
Matthew27:10 Goday taana azazowaadan, urk'k'aappe miishshaa med'd'iyaawanttu gadiyaa shammanaw immeeddino» geetettowe he wode poletteedda geedda." 
Matthew27:11 Yesuusi gadiyaa ayissiyaawaa sintsa shiik'ina, gadiyaa ayissiyaawe Aa, «Neeni Ayihudatuwaa kaatee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Yesuusi Aa, «Neenikka gade'aa» yaageedda." 
Matthew27:12 K'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne gadiyaa c'imatuu Aa mootina, unttunttoo ayinne zaaruwaa immibeenna." 
Matthew27:13 He wode, P'ilaas'oosi Yesuusa, «Hawanttu neena mootiyaabaa ubbaa sisikkii?» yaageedda." 
Matthew27:14 Yesuusi haray atto, itti k'aalaakka zaarennaan is's'ina, gadiyaa ayissiyaawanttu darii maalaletteedda." 
Matthew27:15 Gadiyaa ayissiyaawe Paasigaa bonchchiyaa gallassaan, Asay koyyiyaa itti uraa k'ashuwaappe billiyaa wogay de'ee." 
Matthew27:16 He wode itti Barbbaana geetettiyaa Yesuusi daro eretteedda iita bitanii k'asho gollen de'ee. 
Matthew27:17 Hewaa diraw, c'ora Asay ittisaa shiik'eeddasaan P'ilaas'oosi, «Taani hinttenttoo Barbbaana giyaa Yesuusa billoo, woy Kiristtoosa geetettiyaa Yesuusa billoo?» yaagiide asaa oochcheedda." 
Matthew27:18 Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu k'anaatiide Yesuusa ootseeddawaa I eree." 
Matthew27:19 P'ilaas'oosi pirddaa gollen utti de'ishshin, Aa machchata aw, «He s'illo bitaniyaa ayinne ootsoppa; ayaw gooppe, taani hachche k'amma akumuwaan aabaan daro metootaad» yaagaade kiittaaddu." 
Matthew27:20 Shin k'eesatuwaa kaappatuunne gadiyaa c'imatuu P'ilaas'oosi Barbbaana billiide, Yesuusa wod'anaadan, shiik'eedda Asay Aa woosana mala, asaa c'immeeddino." 
Matthew27:21 P'ilaas'oosi zaariide unttuntta, «Taani unttunttu laa""atuwaappe hinttew oona billanaadan koyyiitee?» yaagina unttunttu, «Barbbaana billanaadan koyyeetto» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:22 P'ilaas'oosi, «Yaatina, Kiristtoosa geetettiyaa Yesuusa wootoo?» yaagiide unttuntta oochchina ubbay, «Mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishettiide kak'etto» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:23 P'ilaas'oosi asaa, «Ayaw? Ay iitabaa ootseedee?» yaageedda. Shin Asay kasewaappekka barenttu kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishettiide I kak'etto» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:24 Walassay denddanawaappe attin, ayinne hanennawaa P'ilaas'oosi be'iide, haatsaa akkiide, «Ha bitanii hayk'k'iyaawaan taani gelikke; hewaa hinttenttu erite» yaagiide shiik'eedda asaa sintsaan bare kushiyaa meec'etteedda." 
Matthew27:25 Shiik'eedda Asay ubbay zaariide, «Aa suutsaa gomii nuunanne nu naanaa gakko» yaageedda." 
Matthew27:26 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, P'ilaas'oosi Barbbaana unttunttoo billeedda; lissuwaan Yesuusa shoc'iide, mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide kak'k'anaw unttunttoo aatsiide immeedda." 
Matthew27:27 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, P'ilaas'oosa wotaadaratuu Yesuusa gadiyaa ayissiyaawaa beeruwaa afina, wotaadaratuu ubbay Aa miyyiyaan yuuyyi aad'd'iide ek'k'eeddino." 
Matthew27:28 Aa mayuwaa k'aari akkiide, zo'o mayuwaa Aa mayzzeeddino." 
Matthew27:29 K'ay aguntsaa kalachchaa giigissiide, Aa huup'iyaan wotseeddino; Aa ushechcha kushiyan mak'k'aa s'am""aa oytsiide, Aa sintsan gulbbatiide, «Ayihudatuwaa kaatew, saro de'ay!» yaagiide, Aa bolla k'iliic'eeddino." 
Matthew27:30 Aa bolla c'uchcheeddino; he mak'k'aa s'amaa akkiide, Aa huup'iyaa shoc'eeddino." 
Matthew27:31 Unttunttu Aa bolla k'iliic'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan, zo'o mayuwaa aappe k'aari akkiide, Aa mayuwaa Aa mayzzeeddino; k'ay mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide Aa kak'k'anaw afeeddino." 
Matthew27:32 Unttunttu kare kesiide, itti Simoona geetettiyaa K'ereena gade asaa demmiide, Yesuusa mask'k'aliyaa wolk'k'aan toosseeddino." 
Matthew27:33 Golggootaa geetettiyaasaa gakkeeddino. «Golggootaa» yaagettiyaawe «Huup'iyaasaa» giyaawaa. 
Matthew27:34 Hewaan unttunttu c'ammeedda woyniyaa eessaa Yesuusaw ushanaw immeeddino; I hewaa gans's'i s'eelliide, ushennaan is's'eedda." 
Matthew27:35 Unttunttu mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide Aa kak'k'owaappe guyyiyaan, Aa mayuwaa shaakkiide, saamaa yeggiide akkeeddino." 
Matthew27:36 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Aa naaganaw hewaan utti aggeeddino." 
Matthew27:37 K'ay, «Hawe Ayihudatuu Kaatiyaa Yesuusa» yaagiide mootuu s'aafettowaa Aa huup'e baggana wotseeddino." 
Matthew27:38 Yesuusanna he wode laau kayisatuwaa ittuwaa aappe ushechcha baggana, k'ay ittuwaa aappe haddirssa baggana, mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide kak'k'eeddino." 
Matthew27:39 Ogiyaanna aad'd'iyaa Asay Yesuusa kad'iide, barenttu huup'iyaa k'aatsiidde boreeddino." 
Matthew27:40 «Geeshsha Golliyaa kolaade heezzu gallassaa giddon kees's'iyaawoo, ne huup'iyaa ashsha; neeni S'oossaa Na'aa gidooppe, ane mask'k'aliyaa bollappe wod'd'a» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:41 Hewaadankka, k'eesatuwaa kaappatuu higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawanttunnanne c'imatuwaanna ittippe Yesuusa bolla k'iliic'iidde, hawaadan yaageeddino;" 
Matthew27:42 «Harantta ashsheeda; shin barena ashshanaw danddayenna. I Israa'eeliyaa kaatiyaa; ane mask'k'aliyaa bollappe hai wod'd'o; nuunikka k'ay aan ammanana. 
Matthew27:43 S'oossaan I ammanettee; S'oossay Aa ashshanaw koyyooppe ane ashsho; ayaw gooppe, I barena, ‹Taani S'oossaa Na'aa› gee» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:44 K'ay haray atto, aanana mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishettiide kak'etteedda kayisatuukka hewaadan giide, Aa bolla k'iliic'eeddino." 
Matthew27:45 Usuppun saatiyaappe doommiide, udduppu saatiyaa gakkanaw, biittay ubbay d'umeedda." 
Matthew27:46 Udduppu saate gidiyaa heeraan Yesuusi bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Elohee, Elohee, laamaa sabak'itaanii?» yaageedda. Hewaa guussay, «Ta S'oossaw, ta S'oossaw, taana ayaw c'o""u gaad?» guussaa." 
Matthew27:47 Hewaan ek'k'eedda asaappe ittuu hewaa sisiide, «Ha bitanii Eelaasa s'eesee» yaageedda." 
Matthew27:48 He man''iyaan unttunttuppe ittuu wos's'iidde, ispponjjiyaa akkiide, c'aala woyniyaa eessaa giddo yeggiide, hewaa mak'k'aa s'am""aa s'eeraan wotsiide, ushshanaw Aa doonaakko shiishsheedda." 
Matthew27:49 Shin yekkonttu, «Ane de'ashsha, Eelaas Aa ashshanaw yaanawentto be'ana» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:50 Yesuusi laa'entsuwaa bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsi waassiide, hayk'k'i aggeedda." 
Matthew27:51 Akeekite; Geeshsha Golliyaan kak'etteedda gaaridduu k'ommoppe duge gakkanaw, laa""u kesiide, pooshetti wod'd'eedda; sa'ay k'aas's'eedda. K'ay zaallaykka p'alk'k'etteedda;" 
Matthew27:52 c'ora duufuu dooyetteedda. S'oossaa asaappe c'oratuu hayk'k'eeddawanttu, hayk'uwaappe denddeeddino." 
Matthew27:53 Unttunttu duufuwaappe kesiide, Yesuusi hayk'uwaappe denddowaappe guyyiyaan, geeshsha katamaa beeddino; hewaan unttuntta c'ora Asay be'eedda." 
Matthew27:54 S'eetuwaa kaappuunne aanana Yesuusa naagiyaa wotaadaratuu sa'ay k'aas's'iyaawaanne hewaan haneeddawaa ubbaa be'eedda wode daro yayyeeddino; yashshaa gaasuwaan, «Tumu hawe S'oossaa Na'aa» yaageeddino." 
Matthew27:55 Hewaan c'ora mac'c'awanttu, Galiilaappe doommiide, Yesuusa maaddiidde kaalliyaawanttu, haakuwaan ek'k'iide s'eelliino." 
Matthew27:56 Unttunttu giddon Magdala geetettiyaa katamaappe yeedda Mayraama, Yaak'oobanne Yooseefo daaya Mayraamanne Zabddiyoosa naanaa daaya de'iino." 
Matthew27:57 Sa'ay omarssiyaa wode, Yooseefo geetettiyaa itti dure bitanii, Armmaatiyaasa katamaa bitanii yeedda; I bare huup'ewukka Yesuusa kaalliyaawaa." 
Matthew27:58 Yooseefo P'ilaas'oosakko biide, Yesuusa anhaa akkanaw woosseedda; P'ilaas'oosi Yooseefoo imettana mala azazeedda." 
Matthew27:59 Yesuusa anhaa akkiide, geeshsha mooguwaa mayuwaan"
