Romans2:16 Taani tamaarisseedda mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaadan, asaa wozanaan geemmeedda k'ofaa S'oossay Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana hawaadan pirddana." 
Romans2:17 Shin neeni neena Ayihuda gaasa; higgiyan zemppaade S'oossaan c'eek'ettaasa. 
Romans2:18 Neeni ootsana mala, S'oossay koyyiyaawe ayentto eraa; k'ay tuma gidiyaawaa dooranaw higgiyaappe tamaaraadda." 
Romans2:19 Neeni k'ook'atuwaa kaaletsiyaawaa, k'ay d'umaan de'iyaawanttookka poo'issiyaawaa, erennawantta erissiyaawaanne naanatuwaa tamaarissiyaawaa gidiyaawaa eraad; higgiyaappe neeni kumentsaa eratetsaanne tumatetsaa demmiyaawaa eraasa." 
Romans2:20  
Romans2:21 Yaatina, neeni haratuwaa tamaarissiyaawe neena ne huup'ew ayaw tamaarissikkii? Neeni, «Wuu""oppa» yaagaade k'aalaa odaasa. Shin neeni ne huup'ew wuu""ayiyye?" 
Romans2:22 Neeni, «Woshummoppa» yaaga. Shin neeni ne huup'ew woshummay? Neeni eek'aa sheneta. Shin eek'ay de'iyaa golliyaa bonk'k'ay?" 
Romans2:23 S'oossaa higgii new de'iyaa diraw, neeni c'eek'ettaasa; shin he higgiyaa mentsaade S'oossaa yeellayay?" 
Romans2:24 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Ayihuda asatoo, hintte gaasuwaan Ayihuda gidenna asatuwaa giddon S'oossaa suntsay bayee» yaagee." 
Romans2:25 Neeni higgew azazettooppe, ne k'as's'aray maaduwaanna de'ee; shin neeni higgiyaa mentsooppe, neeni k'as's'aretteeddawe k'as's'arettibeennawaadan paydettee." 
Romans2:26 Ayihuda gidenna Asay k'as's'arettennan higgii azaziyaawaa naagooppe, S'oossay Aa k'as's'aretteeddawaadan paydennee?" 
Romans2:27 Hinttenttu, Ayihuda asatuu, hinttenttoo s'aafetteedda higgii de'ooppekka k'ay hintte k'as's'arettooppekka, higgiyaa hintte mentsiyaa diraw, Ayihuda gidenna Asay bollaa k'as's'arettana d'ayooppekka, higgew azazettiide, hintte bolla pirddana." 
Romans2:28 Ayaw gooppe, Ayihuda asaa malatiyaa ubbay tumu Ayihuda asaa gidenna; k'ay Asay bare ashuwaa asatetsaa k'as's'aretteedda diraw, tumu Ayihuda asaa gidenna." 
Romans2:29 Shin tumu Ayihuda asaa giyaa uray garssa baggana Ayihuda asaa gideeddawaa; k'as's'arettiyaawaa S'oossaa Ayyaanan oosettiyaa wozanaa k'as's'araappe attin, s'aafetteedda higgiyaanna gidenna; he uray bare galataa S'oossaappe akkiyaawaappe attin, asaappe akkibeenna." 
Romans3:1 Yaatina, Ayihuda asatuu ayaan Ayihuda gidenna asaappe aad'd'iinoo? Woy k'as's'arettiyaawaan ay maaduu de'ii?" 
Romans3:2 Hawe Ayihudatuwaa ubbabaan loytsi maaddee; ubbabaappe kase S'oossay bare kiitaa hadaraa Ayihudatoo immeedda. 
Romans3:3 Yaatina unttunttuppe ittuu ittuu ammanettennawaa gidooppe, waanii? Hewaa diraw, S'oossay ammanettena yaagiyaawe?" 
Romans3:4 Hewaa gidenna; Asay ubbay worddanchchaa gidooppekka, S'oossay giyaawe tuma gidanaw bessee. S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Neeni haasayiyaa wode, neeni s'illo gidiyaawaa erissanaw koshshee; neeni mootettiyaa wode, shatimmanaw bessee» yaagee." 
Romans3:5 Shin nu bayizzuu S'oossaa s'illo oosuwaa erissintto, nuuni waaganee? Nu bolla hank'k'uwaa ahiyaa S'oossay bayizzanchchee? Taani Asay giyaawaadan gay." 
Romans3:6 Hewe waayyii hanana. Ayaw gooppe, hewaadan gidooppe, S'oossay ha alamiyaa bolla wooti pirddanee?" 
Romans3:7 Shin ta wordduwaan S'oossaa tumatetsay Aa bonchchoo darooppe, yaatina, hawaa gakkanaw ayaw ta bolla nagaranchchaadan pirddii?" 
Romans3:8 Yaatina nuuni, «Lo""uu yaanaadan, ane iitabaa ootsoytte» ayaw gookkoo? Itti itti Asay hawaa taana mootiidde boreeddino; unttunttu S'oossaappe bessiyaa pirddaa akkana." 
Romans3:9 Hewaa diraw, nuuni waaganee? Nuuni Ayihudatuu, Ayihuda gidenna asaappe dareettoo? Hewaa gidenna; ayaw gooppe, Ayihudatuukka Ayihuda gidenna asatuukka ubbay ittippe nagaraappe garssan de'iyaawaa taani kase hinttenttoo odaaddi." 
Romans3:10 S'oossaa Mas'aafay hawaadan yaagee; «S'illo Asay ittuunne baawa. 
Romans3:11 Akeekiyaa asaykka baawa; woy S'oossaa koyyiyaawekka baawa. 
Romans3:12 Asay ubbay ogiyaappe kare keseeddino; ubbay mulekka maaddennawaa gideedda. Loobaa ootsiyaa ooninne baawa; haray atto ittuunne baawa. 
Romans3:13 Unttunttu doonay dooyaa de'iyaa duufuwaa mala. Barenttu ins's'arssan worddoteeddino. Unttunttu doonaappe asaa wod'iyaa shooshshaa yishsha mala haasayay kesee. 
Romans3:14 Unttunttu doonaan shek'aynne c'amobay kumeedda. 
Romans3:15 Unttunttu suutsaa gussanaw, darii elleelliino." 
Romans3:16 Bayzzuunne koletsay, unttunttu beeddasaan hak'aninne d'ayenna." 
Romans3:17 Unttunttu sarotetsaa ogiyaakka erikkino. 
Romans3:18 K'ay S'oossaw yayyiyaabay, unttunttu k'ofaan baawa» yaagee." 
Romans3:19 Asaa ubbaa haasayaa diggana malanne kumentsaa sa'aa S'oossaa pirddaappe garssaw aatsana mala, higgiyaa giddon odetteedda ubbabay higgiyaappe garssan de'iyaa asaw haasayiyaawaa nuuni ereetto." 
Romans3:20 S'oossaa sintsan ooninne higgii azaziyaawaa ootsiyaawaan s'illenna; higgii itti Asay nagaraa ootseeddawaa eranaadan ootsee. 
Romans3:21 Shin S'oossay asaa s'illissiyaa ogii higgii baynnaan hai k'onc'c'eedda; higgiinne nabatuu he s'illotetsaabaa markkatteeddino. 
Romans3:22 S'oossay asaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa ammaniyaawaan s'illissee; S'oossay hewaa Aa ammaniyaa ubbaw ootsee; ay shaakotetsaynne baawa. 
Romans3:23 Ayaw gooppe, Asay ubbay nagaraa ootseedda; S'oossaa bonchchuukka unttunttoo guus's'eedda." 
Romans3:24 Shin unttunttu S'oossay immiyaa Aa aad'd'o keekatetsaan, barentta woziyaa Kiristtoosi Yesuusa baggana c'oo s'illeeddino." 
Romans3:25 Yesuusa suutsaan Asay Aa ammaniide, bare nagaraw maarotetsaa demmanaw, S'oossay Aa immeedda; S'oossay hewaa bare s'illotetsaa bessanaw ootseedda; I beni wodiyaan asaa nagaraa danddayiide, kad'i bashi aggeedda; shin" 
Romans3:26 ha wodiyaan bare s'illotetsaa bessanaw asaa nagaraa aggena; S'oossay hewaa ootsiyaawaan I bare huup'ew s'illo gidiyaawaanne Yesuusa ammaniyaa ubbaa s'illissiyaawaa bessee. 
Romans3:27 Yaatina, nuuni ayaw c'eek'ettanee? Ayinne baawa. Ayaa gaasuwaanee? Nuuni higgew eeno giyaawaanee? Gidenna; ammanuwaa higgiyaanappe attin." 
Romans3:28 Ayaw gooppe, Asay ammanuwaan s'illanaappe attin, higgii azaziyaawaa ootsiyaawaana gidenna yaagiide k'oppeetto." 
Romans3:29 Woy S'oossay Ayihudatuwaa s'alalaw S'oossee? Ayihuda gidenna asaw S'oossaa gidennee? Tuma, Ayihuda gidennawanttookka I k'ay S'oossaa." 
Romans3:30 Itti S'oossaa s'alalay de'ee; Ayihudatuwaa unttunttu ammanuwaan I s'illissana; k'ay Ayihuda gidennawanttakka unttunttu ammanuwaan s'illissana. 
Romans3:31 Yaatina, nuuni higgiyaa ammanuwaan gas'aa suganee? Gidenna; higgiyaa minisoytteppe attin." 
Romans4:1 Yaatina, nuuni nuw ashuwaan zare gidiyaa Abraahaamo ayaa demmeedda gaanee?" 
Romans4:2 Ayaw gooppe, Abraahaamo oosuwaan s'illeeddawaa gidooppe, aw c'eek'ettiyaabay de'ee; shin S'oossaa sintsan c'eek'ettana danddayenna." 
Romans4:3 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay waagii? «Abraahaamo S'oossaa ammaneedda; S'oossay hewaa aw s'illotetsaan paydeedda» yaagee." 
Romans4:4 Ootsiyaa uray akkiyaa miishshaa barew bessina akkeeppe attin, aw c'oo imettiyaawaadan paydettenna." 
Romans4:5 Shin oosuwaa ootsennaan, nagaranchchaa s'illissiyaa S'oossaa ammaniyaa uraa, S'oossay Aa ammanuwaan Aa s'illissee." 
Romans4:6 Hawaadankka, ay oosuunne baynnaan, S'oossay s'illuwaadan paydeedda asaa nashechchiyaabaa Daawite haasayeedda wode geeddawe hawaa." 
Romans4:7 «S'oossay unttunttu bayizzuwaa atto geeddawanttunne unttunttu nagaraa kammeeddawanttu anjjetteeddawantta. 
Romans4:8 Goday Aa nagaraa paydenna asay anjjetteeddawaa» yaagee. 
Romans4:9 Yaatina, ha Daawite haasayeedda anjjuu k'as's'aretteedda asaa s'alalaasseeyye? Woy k'ay k'as's'arettibeenna asatuwaassee? Ayaw gooppe nuuni, «S'oossaa Mas'aafay, ‹Abraahaamo S'oossaa ammaneedda; S'oossay hewaa aw s'illotetsaan paydeedda› yaagee» goytte." 
Romans4:10 Yaatina, hawe awude haneeddee? Abraahaamo k'as's'aretti simmineyye? Woy k'as's'arettanaappe kasennee? K'as's'arettanaappe kasennappe attin, k'as's'arettina gidenna." 
Romans4:11 Guyyeppe I k'as's'aretteedda; S'oossay Aa ammanuwaa diraw, I k'as's'arettanaappe kase Aa s'illo ootseeddawaa erissanaw, Aa k'as's'aray malla gideedda. Hewekka k'ay k'as's'arettennan S'oossaa ammaniyaa ubbatuwaa S'oossay s'illo ootsiide paydanaadan, unttunttoo Abraahaamo aawuwaa gidanaassa." 
Romans4:12 I k'as's'aretteeddawanttookka aawuwaa; gidooppekka, unttunttu k'as's'aretteedda diraassa gidenna; shin nu aawuwaa Abraahaamo k'as's'arettanaappe kase ammaniyaa ammanuwaa malaa kaalliyaawanttookka aawuwaa." 
Romans4:13 Abraahaamossinne Aa zeretsaw S'oossay, «Ha sa'aa taani hinttenttoo immana» yaageeddawe, Abraahaamo S'oossaa ammaniide s'illeedda diraassappe attin, higgew I azazetteedda diraassa gidenna." 
Romans4:14 Ayaw gooppe, higgew azazettiyaawanttu S'oossay immana geeddawaa laattiyaawantta gidooppe, asaa ammanuu maaddennabaa gideedda; S'oossay geeddawekka mela gideedda;" 
Romans4:15 higgii S'oossaa boshaa ahee; shin higgii baynnasaan higgiyaa mentsiyaabay baawa. 
Romans4:16 Hewaa diraw, higgiyaa naagiyaawanttu s'alalaw gidennaan, k'ay Abraahaamo ammaneeddawaadan, ammaniyaa Abraahaame zeretsaa ubbaw S'oossay immana geeddawe, woytaadan tumattanawe ammanuwaana. Abraahaamo nuw ubbaw aawuwaa. S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Taani neena c'ora kawutetsatoo aawo ootsaad» giyaawaadan, hayk'k'eeddawanttoo de'uwaa immiyaa, bare azazuwaan baynnabaa de'iyaabaadan ootsiide s'eesiyaa, I ammaneedda S'oossaa sintsan Abraahaamo nuw ubbaw aawuwaa." 
Romans4:17  
Romans4:18 S'oossaa Mas'aafay Abraahaamoo, «Ne zeretsay hawaa keena gidana» yaageeddawaadan, hawaa keena gidana giide, nashechchaan naaganaw danddayenna wode, Abraahaamo ammaniidenne sintsappe demmana giide, nashechchaan naagiide, c'ora zeretsaw aawuwaa gideedda." 
Romans4:19 He wode, Abraahaamo yelettoodeppe s'eetu laytsaa kumana haniyaa c'imaa; shin bare daaburanchcha asatetsaanne Saara na'aa yelanaw danddayennawaa k'oppeedda wode, I bare ammanuwaan daaburibeenna." 
Romans4:20 S'oossaa I bonchchiidde, aw immana geedda S'oossay k'ay polanaw danddayiyaawaa loytsi eriide bare ammanuwaan minneeddawaappe attin, ammanennaan is's'iide, S'oossay immana geeddawaa sid'ibeenna." 
Romans4:21  
Romans4:22 Hewaa diraw, S'oossay k'ay Aa ammanuwaa s'illotetsaan paydeedda." 
Romans4:23 «Aw s'illotetsaan paydeedda» giyaa k'aalay Aa s'alalaw s'aafettibeenna. 
Romans4:24 He k'aalay nu Godaa Yesuusa hayk'uwaappe dentseedda S'oossaa ammaniyaa nuwukka s'illotetsaan paydettana mala s'aafetteedda. 
Romans4:25 S'oossay Aa nu nagaraa diraw, hayk'oo aatsiide immina, I nuuna s'illissanaw hayk'uwaappe denddeedda." 
Romans5:1 Hewaa diraw, nuuni ammanuwaan S'illeeddawaan, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana nuw S'oossaanna sarotetsay de'ee;" 
Romans5:2 k'ay I nuuna hai nuuni de'iyaa S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa giddo ammanuwaan aheedda; yaatina, nuuni S'oossaa bonchchuwaa shaakkanaw nuw de'iyaa hidootaan c'eek'etteetto." 
Romans5:3 Hewaa s'alalaa gidenna; nuuni nu waayiyankka nashetteetto; ayaw gooppe, waayiyaappe danddayay, k'ay danddayaappe paac'iyaan minniyaawe, paac'iyaan minotaappe hidootay yiyaawaa nuuni ereetto." 
Romans5:4  
Romans5:5 S'oossay nuw immeedda Geeshsha Ayaanaa baggana bare siik'uwaa nu wozanaan gusseedda diraw, he nuuni demmanaw nashechchaan naagi utteeddawe nuuna yeellayenna." 
Romans5:6 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni biro wolk'k'ay baynnawantta gidiide de'ishshin, S'oossay dooreedda wodii gakkina, Kiristtoosi nagaranchchatuwaa diraw hayk'k'eedda." 
Romans5:7 S'illo uraa diraw, itti uray hayk'k'anawe daro metobaa; shin lo""o asaa diraw hayk'k'anaw, «Eeno» giyaa uray ooni eri beettenaan aggena." 
Romans5:8 Shin nuuni biro nagaranchcha gidiide de'ishshin, Kiristtoosi nu diraw hayk'k'eedda; hewe S'oossay nuuna ay keenaa siik'inttonne Aa siik'uwaa erissee." 
Romans5:9 Simmi nuuni hai Aa suutsaan s'illeeddawaa gidooppe, Aa baggana S'oossaa hank'k'uwaappe attana." 
Romans5:10 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni S'oossaanna kase morkke; shin Aa Na'aa hayk'uwaan aanana sigetteeddo. Hewaappe aatsiide, ha""i nuuni S'oossaanna sigetteeddawaappe guyyiyaan, I pas'a gidiyaa diraw nuuna ashshana." 
Romans5:11 Shin hewaa s'alalaa gidenna; hai nuuna S'oossaanna sigetseedda nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana nuuna S'oossaabay nashechchee. 
Romans5:12 Hewaa diraw, nagaray ha sa'aa itti asaa baggana geleedda; he nagaray barenanna hayk'uwaa aheedda; hewaa gaasuwaan, Asay ubbay Addaama baggana nagaraa ootseedda diraw, hayk'uu asaa zariyaa ubbaa gakkeedda." 
Romans5:13 Higgii imettanaappe kase, ha alamiyaan nagaray de'ee; shin higgii baynna wode nagaray paydettenna." 
Romans5:14 Shin Addaama wodiyaappe, Muse wodiyaa gakkanaw, hayk'uu asaa ubbaa mooddeedda; haray atto Addaami S'oossaa higgew azazettenan is's'eeddawaadan, nagaraa ootsibeennawanttakka hayk'uu mooddeedda. Ayaw gooppe, Addaami yaanawoo leemisuwaa." 
Romans5:15 Shin S'oossaa imotay Addaama nagaraa keena gidenna diraw, unttunttu itti mala gidikkino; itti bitaniyaa nagaraa diraw, c'ora Asay hayk'k'eeddawe tuma; shin S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaynne Aa imotay itti asaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa baggana, Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsaa baggana c'ora asaw dareedda." 
Romans5:16 S'oossaa imotay nagaraa ootseedda bitaniyaa baggana yeeddawaa mala gidenna; ayaw gooppe, Addaami itti nagaraa ootseeddawaappe guyyiyaan, S'oossay Aa bayizzeeddawaadan pirddeedda; shin Asay daro nagaraa ootseeddawaappe guyyiyaan S'oossay, «Hinttenttu bayizzibeykkita» giide, bare aad'd'o keekatetsaa unttuntta bessee." 
Romans5:17 Ayaw gooppe, itti bitaniyaa nagaraa gaasuwaan, Aa nagaraa baggana, hayk'uu kawuteeddawe tuma; shin itti uray, Yesuusi Kiristtoosi ootseeddabay ay keena daree; S'oossaa daro aad'd'o keekatetsaanne s'illotetsaa imotaa akkiyaa ubbay Kiristtoosa baggana s'ooniide de'ana." 
Romans5:18 Simmi itti uray nagaraa ootseedda gaasuwaan asaa ubbaa bolla bayizzeeddawaadan pirdday yeedda. Hewaadankka itti uray s'illobaa ootseedda gaasuwaan, S'oossay asaa ubbaa, «Bayzzibeykkita» giide unttunttoo de'uwaa immeedda." 
Romans5:19 Ayaw gooppe, itti uray azazettenan is's'eedda gaasuwaan, daro Asay nagaranchcha gideedda, hawaadankka k'ay ittuu eeno geeddawaan c'ora Asay s'illana." 
Romans5:20 Nagaraa darissanaw, higgii yeedda; shin nagaray dariyaa wode S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay loytsi dareedda." 
Romans5:21 Nagaray hayk'uwaa wolk'k'aan kawuteeddawaadan, hawaadankka k'ay S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay s'illotetsaa wolk'k'aan kawutiide, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana, nuuna med'inaa de'oo kaaletsee." 
Romans6:1 Yaatina, nuuni waaganee? S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay daranaadan, nagaraan minniide de'anee?" 
Romans6:2 Gidenna; nuuni nagaraa ootsenna mala hayk'k'idiggeeddo. Yaatina, nuuni hawaappe sintsaw wooti Aa giddon de'anee?" 
Romans6:3 Woy nuuni ubbatuu Kiristtoosa Yesuusanna ittippe gidanaw, s'ammak'etteedda wode, Aa hayk'uwaankka aanana ittippe gidanaw s'ammak'etteeddawaa erikkitee?" 
Romans6:4 Hewaa diraw, Kiristtoosi bare Aawuwaa bonchcho wolk'k'aan hayk'uwaappe denddowaadan, nuunikka ooratsa de'uwaa de'anaw, Aa hayk'uwaa aanana shaakkanaw s'ink'k'ataani aanana ittippe moogetteeddo." 
Romans6:5 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni I hayk'k'eeddawaadan hayk'k'iide, aanana ittuwaa gidooppe, hawaadankka, hayk'uwaappe I denddowaadan nuunikka denddiide, aanana ittuwaa gidana." 
Romans6:6 Nuuni hawaappe sintsaw nagaraw ayile gidenna mala, k'ay nu nagaranchcha asatetsaa wolk'k'ay d'ayana mala, nu ec'a asatetsaa Kiristtoosanna mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishetti kak'etteeddawaa ereetto." 
Romans6:7 Ayaw gooppe, itti uray hayk'k'iyaa wode nagaraa wolk'k'ay Aa mooddenna; shin" 
Romans6:8 nuuni Kiristtoosanna hayk'k'eeddawaa gidooppe, aanana k'ay de'anawaa ammaneetto." 
Romans6:9 Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosi hayk'uwaappe denddeeddawaa, k'ay laa'entsuwaa I hayk'k'ennawaanne hayk'uu sintsappe Aa mooddennawaa nuuni ereetto." 
Romans6:10 I itti kaallakka hayk'k'eedda; nagaraw Aa bolla wolk'k'ay baawa; shin I ha de'iyaa de'uwaa S'oossaw de'ee. 
Romans6:11 Hawaadan k'ay hintte nagaraa ootsennaadan, hinttentta hayk'k'eeddawaadan k'oppite; shin Godaa Kiristtoosa Yesuusa baggana S'oossaw hintte pas'a de'iyaawaadan, hinttentta k'oppite." 
Romans6:12 Hewaa diraw, hintte hinttenttu asatetsaa amoo azazettana mala, nagaray hayk'k'iyaa hintte asatetsaa mooddoppo." 
Romans6:13 K'ay hintte asatetsaappe itti saanne iita oosuwaa ootsanaw nagaraw immoppite; shin hayk'uwaappe denddeedda asaadan hinttentta S'oossaw immite; k'ay hintte kumentsaa asatetsaakka s'illo oosuwaa ootsanaw S'oossaw immite; 
Romans6:14 ayaw gooppe, nagaray hinttentta mooddanaw danddayenna; hintte S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa garssanna de'iitappe attin, higgiyaappe garssanna de'ikkita." 
Romans6:15 Yaatina, waananee? S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa garssanna de'iinoppe attin, higgiyaappe garssanna de'enna diraw, nagaraa ootsanee? Gidenna;" 
Romans6:16 hintte hinttentta itti uraw azazettanaw, ayiliyaadan ootsiide immiyaa wode, he hinttentta azaziyaawoo ayiletuwaa gidiyaawaa eriita; woy hintte hinttenttoo hayk'uwaa ahiyaa nagaraw eeno giita; woy hintte hinttentta s'illo ootsiyaa azazoo eeno giita." 
Romans6:17 Shin S'oossaw galatay gido; ayaw gooppe, nagaraw kase hintte ayile; shin guyyeppe hintte akkeedda timirttiyaa giddon de'iyaa tumatetsaw hintte kumentsaa wozanaappe azazetteeddita." 
Romans6:18 Hinttenttu nagaraa ayiletetsaappe kesiide, s'illotetsaw ayile gideeddita." 
Romans6:19 Hinttenttu med'etaan daaburanchcha gidiyaa diraw, taani oossikka geliyaa haasayaa haasayay; hintte kase hintte kumentsaa asatetsaa naak'uwaa ootsanaw, tunatetsawunne naak'oo ayile ootsiide immeeddita; ha""i hewaadankka hintte kumentsaa asatetsaa geeshshabaa ootsanaw, s'illotetsaw ayile ootsiide immite." 
Romans6:20 Hinttenttu nagaraw ayiletiide de'iyaa wode, s'illotetsay hinttenttoo godaa gidenna." 
Romans6:21 Hinttentta hai yeellayiyaa yewatuwaa he wode ootseeddawaappe ay maaduwaa demmeedditee? Ayaw gooppe, he yewatuwaa wurssetsay hayk'uwaa." 
Romans6:22 Shin nagaraa ayiletetsaappe hintte kesiide, S'oossaw eeno geeddita; k'ay hintte ootsiyaa ubbabaan hinttentta ubbakka aw aatsiide immeeddita. Hewe hinttenttoo wore; hewaa wurssetsay med'inaa de'uwaa." 
Romans6:23 Ayaw gooppe, nagaraa gatii hayk'uwaa. Shin S'oossay nu Godaa Kiristtoosa Yesuusa baggana immiyaa imotay med'inaa de'uwaa." 
Romans7:1 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hinttenttu ubbay higgiyaa eriyaa diraw, taani giyaawaa loytsi eriita; higgii itti Asay pas'a de'eedda wode s'alalaan Aa mooddee." 
Romans7:2 Ayaw gooppe, asinaa geleedda mishiratta izi asinay pas'a de'eedda keenan, higgiyan aanana k'ashetta uttaaddu; shin izi asinay hayk'k'ooppe, aanana c'aak'k'eedda higgii izo mooddenna." 
Romans7:3 Hewaa diraw, iza bare asinay pas'a de'ishshin, hara attumawaa gelooppe, Asay izo, «Woshummewunno» gaana. Shin izi asinay hayk'k'ooppe, higgii izo mooddenna; iza hara asinaa gelooppenne izo ooninne, «Woshummewunno» geena." 
Romans7:4 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hewaadan hinttenttu k'ay Kiristtoosa asatetsaappe itti bagga gidiyaa diraw, hinttenttu Aa bagganna hayk'k'eeddita. K'ay nuuni S'oossaa maaddiyaa oosuwaa ootsana mala, hinttenttu S'oossay hayk'uwaappe dentseedda Kiristtoosawantta." 
Romans7:5 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni nu asatetsay koyyeeddawaadan de'iyaa wode, higgii nuuni nagaraa ootsanaadan, nuuna dentsetsee; nu asatetsaa giddon iita amuu de'iyaa diraw, nuuni hayk'oo ayfiyaa ayfeeddo." 
Romans7:6 Shin hai nuuni nuuna k'achcheeddawoo hayk'k'eedda diraw, S'oossay nuuna higgiyaa k'ashuwaappe billeedda. Hewaa diraw, nuuni Geeshsha Ayyaanay giigisseedda ooratsa ogiyaan S'oossaw eeno gaanawaappe attin, s'aafetteedda higgii nuw giigisseedda ec'a ogiyaan eeno gookko." 
Romans7:7 Yaatina, nuuni waaganee? Higgii bare huup'ew nagaree? Hewaa gidenna; shin higgii nagaray ayentto taana erisseedda. Ayaw gooppe, taani higgii, «Asaabaa amottoppa» gibeennentto, asaabaa amottiyaawe ayentto erikke." 
Romans7:8 Shin nagaray taani ubbabaa amottana mala, azazuwaa baggana ta bolla ogiyaa demmeedda; ayaw gooppe, higgii baawentto, nagaraw wolk'k'ay baawa." 
Romans7:9 Kase higgii baynna wode taani pas'a; shin azazuu yeedda wode nagaray de'oo simmina," 
Romans7:10 taani k'ay hayk'k'aaddi; taana pas'a wotsanaw S'oossay k'oppeedda azazuu, taw hayk'uwaa aheedda." 
Romans7:11 Ayaw gooppe, nagaray azazuwaa baggana taana c'immiyaa ogiyaa demmiide, he azazuwaan taana wod'eedda." 
Romans7:12 Hewaa diraw, higgii geeshsha; azazuukka geeshsha, s'illanne lo""a." 
Romans7:13 Yaatina, lo""obay taw hayk'uwaa aheeddee? Hewaa gidenna; shin taw hewaa nagaray aheedda; Asay nagaray ayentto shaakkiide erana mala, nagaray lo""obaa baggana, taw hayk'uwaa aheedda. K'ay azazuu, «Ooninne nagaraa ootsanaw bessena» yaagiyaa diraw, nagaray kasewaappe aad'd'i iiteedda." 
Romans7:14 Nuuni higgii S'oossawaa gidiyaawaa ereetto; shin taani taana nagaraw zaleedda hayk'k'iyaa asaa; 
Romans7:15 taani ootsiyaawaa wozanaa aatsikke; ayaw gooppe, taani is's'iyaawaa ootsayppe attin, taani ootsanaw dosiyaawaa ootsikke." 
Romans7:16 Taani is's'iyaawaa ootsiyaawaa gidooppe, higgii lo""a gidiyaawaa markkattay." 
Romans7:17 Hewaa gidooppe, he yewuwaa ta bolla de'iyaa nagaray ootsiyaawaappe attin, ha""i taani ootsikke." 
Romans7:18 Taanan, hewenne ta asatetsaan lo""obay de'ennawaa taani eray; ayaw gooppe, lo""obaa ootsiyaa amuu ta bolla de'ooppekka, taani he lo""obaa ootsanaw danddaykke." 
Romans7:19 Taani is's'iyaa iitabaa ootsayppe attin, taani dosiyaa lo""obaa ootsikke." 
Romans7:20 Shin taani is's'iyaawaa ootsiyaawaa gidooppe, hewaa ta bolla de'iyaa nagaray ootsiyaawaappe attin, ha""i hewaa ootsiyaawe taana gidikke." 
Romans7:21 Simmi taani loobaa ootsanaw dosishshin, iitabaa ootsiyaawe taw higge gidiyaawaa demmaad." 
Romans7:22 Ayaw gooppe, taani ta wozanaa giddon S'oossaa higgiyan nashettay;" 
Romans7:23 shin ta bollaa giddon de'iyaa ta wozanaa k'ofaa higgiyaanna wad'ettiyaa dumma higgiyaa be'ay. He higgii ta bollaa giddon de'iyaa nagaraa oosissiyaa higgiyan taana k'ashissee. 
Romans7:24 Taani ayba nashechchi baynna asee! Taana hayk'oo afiyaa ha asatetsaappe ashshanawe oonee? 
Romans7:25 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana S'oossaw galatay gido. Simmi taani ta wozanaa k'ofaan S'oossaa higgew eeno gay. Shin ta asatetsaan taana nagaraa oosissiyaa higgew eeno gay. 
Romans8:1 Hewaa diraw, Kiristtoosa Yesuusanna de'iyaawanttu bollan pirdday ha""i baawa;" 
Romans8:2 ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosa Yesuusa baggana nuw de'uwaa immiyaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa higgii taana nagaraa higgiyaa ayiletetsaappenne hayk'uwaa higgiyaa ayiletetsaappe kesseedda." 
Romans8:3 Asaa asatetsay daaburanchcha gidiyaa diraw, higgii ootsanaw danddayibeennawaa S'oossay ootseedda; nagaranchchatuwaa asatetsaa mala asatetsaana de'iyaa bare Na'aa, Asay ootseedda nagaraw yarshshuwaa gidanaw S'oossay kiittiide, asaa asatetsaa giddon de'iyaa nagaraa pirddeedda." 
Romans8:4 Geeshsha Ayyaanay koyyiyaawaadan de'iyaawanttuppe attin, nu asatetsay koyyiyaawaadan de'anawanttu bolla, nu bolla, higgiyaa s'illo azazuu polettana mala, S'oossay hawaa ootseedda." 
Romans8:5 Barenttu asatetsay koyyiyaawaadan de'iyaawanttu barenttu asatetsaabaa k'oppiino; shin Geeshsha Ayyaanay koyyiyaawaadan de'iyaawanttu Geeshsha Ayaanaabaa k'ooppiino. 
Romans8:6 Asatetsaabaa k'ofussay hayk'uwaa ahee; shin Geeshsha Ayaanaabaa k'ofussay de'uwaanne sarotetsaa ahee. 
Romans8:7 Asatetsaabaa k'ofussay S'oossaw is'o; ayaw gooppe, asatetsay S'oossaa higgew eeno geena; k'ay eeno gaanawukka aw danddayettenna." 
Romans8:8 Barenttu asatetsaw eeno giyaawanttu S'oossaa nashechchanaw danddaykkino. 
Romans8:9 Shin S'oossaa Ayyaanay hinttenttun de'ooppe, Geeshsha Ayyaanay giyaawaadan de'iitappe attin, hintte asatetsay koyyiyaawaadan de'ikkita. Shin ooninne Kiristtoosa Ayyaanay baynnawaa gidooppe, he uray Kiristtoosawaa gidenna." 
Romans8:10 Shin Kiristtoosi hinttenttun de'ooppe, hintte asatetsay nagaraa gaasuwaan hayk'k'eeddawaa; shin hintte ayyaanay s'illotetsaa gaasuwaan hinttenttun pas'a de'ee." 
Romans8:11 Shin Yesuusa hayk'uwaappe dentseedda S'oossaa Ayyaanay hintte giddon de'ooppe, hayk'uwaappe Kiristtoosa dentseedda S'oossay k'ay hinttenttun de'iyaa bare Geeshsha Ayyaanaan, hayk'k'iyaa hintte asatetsawukka de'uwaa immana." 
Romans8:12 Simmi taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, nuuni ac'uwaana de'eetto; nu asatetsay koyyiyaawaadan de'anaw nuw bessena." 
Romans8:13 Ayaw gooppe, hintte hintte asatetsay giyaawaadan de'ooppe, hintte hayk'k'ana; shin hintte hintte nagaraa oosuwaa Geeshsha Ayyaanan wod'ooppe, pas'a de'ana." 
Romans8:14 S'oossaa Ayyaanay kaaletsiyaa ubbatuu S'oossaa naanaa. 
Romans8:15 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni nu kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, «Abbaa! Ta Aabboo» yaagiide s'eesiyaa, nuuna S'oossaa naanaa kessiyaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa S'oossaappe akkeeddoppe attin, laa'entsuwaa yayyanaw ayile kessiyaa ayaanaa akkibeykko." 
Romans8:16 S'oossaa Ayyaanay bare huup'ew nu ayyaanaanna gidiide, nuuni S'oossaa naanaa gidiyaawaa markkattee." 
Romans8:17 Nuuni Aa naanaa gidooppe, I bare asaw minjjeedda anjjuwaa laattana; k'ay nuuni S'oossay Kiristtoosaw minjjeeddawaakka aanana laattana; nuuni Kiristtoosa waayiyaa aanana shaakkooppe, Aa bonchchuwaakka aanana shaakkana." 
Romans8:18 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni ha""i waayettiyaa waayiyaa nuw sintsappe k'onc'c'ana bonchchuwaanna gatsanaw, ubbakka danddayettenna gaade taani k'oppay." 
Romans8:19 S'oossay med'd'eedda med'etaa ubbay S'oossaa naanay k'onc'c'anawaa loytsi laamoti utteedda. 
Romans8:20 Ayaw gooppe, med'etaa ubbay maaduu baynnabaa gidanaadan, S'oossay Aa bolla pirddeedda; sintsappe demmana giide nashechchaan naagi uttanaadan ootseedda S'oossay koyyeedda diraw haneeddappe attin, med'etaa ubbay bare huup'ew koyyeeddawaan gidenna." 
Romans8:21 Med'etaa ubbay bare huup'ew bashshaa ayiletetsaappe itti gallassi kesanawaa; k'ay he med'etatuu S'oossaa naanay ayiletetsaappe keseedda bonchcho kessaa shaakkana. 
Romans8:22 Ayaw gooppe, med'etaa ubbay ittippe hawaa gakkanaw, mac'c'a asaa yeluu oyk'k'ina ooliyaawaadan, sakuwaan ooliyaawaa nuuni ereetto." 
Romans8:23 K'ay hewaa s'alalaa gidenna; nuuni, Geeshsha Ayaanaa S'oossaa bayira imotaadan ootsiide akkeeddawanttu, nu huup'ew S'oossay nuuna bare naanaa ootsanaadaninne nu kumentsaa asatetsaa wozanaadan naagiidde, nu giddon ooleetto." 
Romans8:24 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni S'oossay immana geeddawaan atteeddo. Shin nuuni S'oossay immana geeddawaa be'ooppe, yaatina, hewe nashechchaan naagiyaawaa gidenna; ayaw gooppe, bare be'iyaawaa demmana giidde, nashechchaan naagiyaawe oonee?" 
Romans8:25 Shin nuuni be'ennawaa demmana giide, nashechchaan naagooppe, hewaa danddayiide naageetto." 
Romans8:26 Hawaadan k'ay Geeshsha Ayyaanay nu daaburaa maaddanaw yee; ayaw gooppe, nuuni S'oossaa wooti woossanaw bessintto erokko; shin Geeshsha Ayyaanay bare huup'ew k'aalaan k'onc'c'issanaw danddayettenna ooliyaan nuw gaannatee." 
Romans8:27 K'ay asaa wozanaa biddiyaa S'oossay, Geeshsha Ayyaanay I koyyiyaawaadan, S'oossaa naatoo gaannatiyaa diraw, Geeshsha Ayaanaa k'ofay ayentto eree." 
Romans8:28 S'oossay barena siik'iyaawanttoo, bare k'ofaadan s'eeseeddawanttoo, ubbaa yewuwaa lo""otetsaw ootsiyaawaa nuuni ereetto." 
Romans8:29 S'oossay bare Na'ay c'ora ishatuwaa giddon bayira gidanaadan, I kase ereeddawantta k'ay bare Na'aa malatanaadan, kasetiide k'ofaa k'achcheedda." 
Romans8:30 S'oossay kasetiide k'oppeeddawantta, unttuntta k'ay s'eeseedda; he s'eeseeddawanttakka geeshsheedda; he geeshsheeddawanttakka k'ay bonchcheedda." 
Romans8:31 Yaatina, nuuni hawaa ubbaa waaganee? S'oossay nu bagga gidooppe, nuuna ooni ek'ettanawe?" 
Romans8:32 I haray atto bare Na'aakka waayiyaappe guyye ashshibeenna; shin Aa nuw ubbaw aatsiide immi aggeedda. I bare Na'aa immeeddawe k'ay nuw ubbabaa c'oo immennee? 
Romans8:33 S'oossay dooreeddawantta oonee mootanawe? S'oossay bare huup'ew unttuntta s'illisseedda. 
Romans8:34 Yaatina, unttunttu bolla pirddanaw danddayiyaawe oonee? Hewaa gooppe, hayk'uwaappe denddiide, S'oossaappe ushechcha baggana utteedda, Kiristtoosi Yesuusa; I k'ay nuw gaannatee." 
Romans8:35 Simmi nuuna Kiristtoosa siik'uwaappe shaakkanawe oonee? Waayyii woy metuu woy yederssuu woy koshay woy kalluu woy yashshay woy olay nuuna shaakkanee? 
Romans8:36 S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Nuuni ne diraw, ubbaa gallassi hayk'k'eetto; shukaw afiyaa dorssaadan paydetteetto» yaagee." 
Romans8:37 Shin nuuni nuuna siik'eedda aan ha yewuwaa ubbaan nuuna s'ooniyaawanttuppe aad'd'eetto. 
Romans8:38 Ayaw gooppe, hayk'uwaa gidina, de'uwaa, kiitanchchatuwaa gidina, mooddiyaawantta, ha""i de'iyaawantta gidina, sintsappe yaanawaa, wolk'k'aamatuwaa gidina, bolla saluwaa gidina, garssa sa'aa, ay med'etaa gidinakka, nu Godaa Kiristtoosa Yesuusan de'iyaa S'oossaa siik'uwaappe nuuna shaakkanaw danddayennawaa taani eraad." 
Romans8:39  
Romans9:1 Taani tumuwaa haasayay; taani Kiristtoosassa; k'ay worddotikke. Geeshsha Ayyaanay mooddiyaa ta tilla wozanay taani worddotennawaa taw markkattee. 
Romans9:2 Taw ashuwaan zare gidiyaa taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, ta wozanaan daro k'aretaynne aggena k'ofay de'ee. Ayaw gooppe, taani ta huup'ew unttunttu diraw, S'oossaa shek'aappe garssanna de'aarikkitaashsha! K'ay Kiristtoosappekka shaakettaarikkitaashsha!" 
Romans9:3  
Romans9:4 Unttunttu Israa'eeliyaa asatuwaa; S'oossay unttuntta bare naanaa ootsiide, bare bonchchuwaa unttunttunna shaakkeedda. Unttunttunna k'aalaa geliide, higgiyaa unttunttoo immeedda. Unttunttu S'oossaw bessiyaa ogiyaan goyinniino; k'ay S'oossay immana geeddawaakka akkeeddino." 
Romans9:5 Unttunttu zeretsaan kase aawotuwaa zare; k'ay Kiristtoosikka ashuwaan unttunttu zare. I, ubbaappe bolla gidiide mooddiyaa, med'inaw galatetteeddawe S'oossaa. Amen""i." 
Romans9:6 Shin taani, «S'oossay immana geeddawe attana» yaagikke. Ayaw gooppe, Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbatuu S'oossay dooreeddawantta gidikkino." 
Romans9:7 K'ay Abraahaame zeretsatuu ubbatuu S'oossaa naanaa gidikkino. S'oossay Abraahaamoo, «Ne zeretsay Yisaak'a baggana s'eesettanawaa» yaageedda." 
Romans9:8 Hewaa guussay unttunttu S'oossay immana geedda ogiyaan yeletteedda naanay zariyaadan paydettana; shin asaa k'ofaadan yeletteeddawanttu S'oossaa naanaa gidikkino guussaa. 
Romans9:9 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay immana giide haasayeeddawe hawaa; «Taani ha geetetteeddawaadan he wode yaana; Saarakka attuma na'aa yelana» yaageedda." 
Romans9:10 Hewaa s'alalaakka gidenna; Irbbik'a yeleedda mantte naanaa aawuu ittuwaa; ikka nu aawuwaa Yisaak'a. 
Romans9:11 Shin itti na'aa dooreedda S'oossay bare huup'ew k'oppeeddawaa gidanaadan, S'oossay Irbbik'iw, «Bayiray teefaw azazettana» yaageedda; I hewaa unttunttu yelettanaappenne iitabaa woy lo""obaa ayinne ootsanaappe kasenna geedda. Hewaa diraw, S'oossaa dooruu Aa s'eeseeddawaadanippe attin, unttunttu ootseeddawaanna gidenna." 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13 S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Yaak'ooba siik'aaddi; shin Eesaa is's'aaddi» yaagee." 
Romans9:14 Yaatina, nuuni waaganee? S'oossay deshissiide pirddii? Hewaa gidenna." 
Romans9:15 Ayaw gooppe, Musew I, «Taani maaranaw koyyiyaawantta maarana; k'ay k'arettanaw koyyiyaawanttookka k'arettana» yaageedda." 
Romans9:16 Simmi S'oossay asaa maariyaawe I maaranaw koyyiyaa diraassappe attin, Asay koyyiyaa woy ootsiyaa diraassa gidenna." 
Romans9:17 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay Gibs'e kaatiyaw, «Taani ta wolk'k'aa neenan bessanawunne ta suntsay alamiyaa ubbaan odettanaw, hewoo taani neena kawutsaad» yaagee." 
Romans9:18 Simmi S'oossay maarana koyyiyaawaa maaree; k'ay wozanaa gorddana koyyiyaawaa wozanaa gorddee. 
Romans9:19 Simmi hintte taana, «Hewe tuma gidooppe, S'oossay asaa bayizzoo ayaw tooshii? S'oossay geeddawaa is's'aaddi gaanawe oonee?» yaaganaw danddayiita." 
Romans9:20 Shin ta laggew, S'oossaw zaaranaw neeni oonee? Urk'k'aappe med'etteedda miishshay guyye zaariide barena med'd'eeddawaa, «Taana hawaadan ayaw med'd'aaddii?» giide oochchanaw danddayii?" 
Romans9:21 Woy urk'k'aa med'd'iyaawe bare med'd'iyaa urk'k'aa bare koyyiyaawaadan ootsanawunne itti mala urk'k'aappe ittuwaa bonchcho miishshaa ootsiide, k'ay ittuwaa tooshetteedda oosuwaa ootsiyaa miishshaa ootsiide med'd'anaw aw maati baawee?" 
Romans9:22 S'oossay ootseeddawe hawaanna ittuwaa. I bare hank'k'uwaa bessanawunne bare wolk'k'aa erissanaw koyyeedda; I bare hank'k'uwaan pirddanawantta, bayizzanaw giigi utteeddawantta, daro genc'c'uwaan danddayeedda." 
Romans9:23 K'ay I maareeddawanttoo, bare bonchchuwaa akkanaw giigissi wotseeddawanttoo I ay keenaa bonchchettinttonne bessanaw koyyeedda." 
Romans9:24 Nuuni I s'eeseeddawantta; shin Ayihuda asaa s'alalaappe gidennaan, Ayihuda gidenna asaa giddoppekka s'eeseedda." 
Romans9:25 Hoose'a mas'aafan I giyaawe hawaa; «Ta asaa gidennawantta, ‹Ta asaa› gaade s'eesana. Taani siik'abeenna zariyaakka, ‹Ta siik'k'aatoo› gaade s'eesana." 
Romans9:26 ‹Hinttenttu ta asaa gidikkita› giyaawaa, unttunttu siseedda he sa'aan, unttunttu, ‹De'uwaa S'oossaa naanaa› geetettiide s'eesettanawantta» yaagee." 
Romans9:27 Isiyaasi Israa'eeliyaa asaabaa yaagiide haasayeedda; «Israa'eeliyaa Asay abbaa matan de'iyaa shafiyaa keena gidooppekka, unttunttuppe amareedawanttu s'alalay attana." 
Romans9:28 Ayaw gooppe, Goday sa'aa bollan de'iyaa asaa ubbaa bolla, ellekka pirddana» yaageedda." 
Romans9:29 Isiyaasi kasetiide, «Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Goday, nuw amareedda zeretsaa ashshenentto, nuuni, Sodoomaa katamaadaaninne, Gamoora katamaadan haneeddoshshin» yaagi haasayeedda." 
Romans9:30 Yaatina, nuuni waaganee? S'illotetsaa koyyibeenna Ayihuda gidenna Asay ammanuwaan s'illeedda;" 
Romans9:31 shin Israa'eeliyaa Asay barentta s'illissiyaa higgiyaa koyyeeddawanttu he higgiyaa demmibeykkino. 
Romans9:32 Ayaw demmibeykkinoo? Unttunttu oosuwaanappe attin, ammanuwaan s'illotetsaa koyyibeenna diraassa. Unttunttu S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Akeekite; taani S'iyoonen asaa d'ubbiyaa shuchchaa, unttunttu ogiyaan zaallaa wotsana. Shin aan ammaniyaa ooninne yeellatenna» yaagiide s'aafettowaadan d'ubbiyaa shuchchaan d'ubetteeddino." 
Romans9:33  
Romans10:1 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani Israa'eeliyaa asaw ta kumentsaa wozanaappe amottiyaawenne S'oossaa woossiyaawe unttunttu attanaassa;" 
Romans10:2 ayaw gooppe, unttunttu S'oossaw ootsanaw loytsi koyyiyaawaa taani markkattay; shin unttunttu S'oossaw ootsanaw loytsi koyyiyaa koshshay tumu eratetsaappe gidenna." 
Romans10:3 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay asaa s'illissiyaa ogiyaa unttunttu erennaan, barenttu huup'e s'illotetsaa essanaw koyyeeddino; k'ay barenttu huup'ew S'oossay asaa s'illissiyaa ogew eeno gibeykkino." 
Romans10:4 Ayaw gooppe, ammaneedda ubbay s'illanaadan, Kiristtoosi higgiyaa k'ofaa poleedda." 
Romans10:5 Asay higgew azazettiide s'illiyaabaw Muse, «Higgii azaziyaawaa ootsiyaa ooninne he higgiyan pas'a de'ana» yaagi s'aafeedda;" 
Romans10:6 shin ammanuwaan s'illiyaabaw geetetteeddawe hawaa; «Ne wozanaan, ‹Ooni saluwaa pude baanee?› gooppa. Hewe Kiristtoosa duge wotsanaassa;" 
Romans10:7 woy ‹Duge sa'aa garssa wod'd'anawe oonee?› gooppa. Hewe Kiristtoosa hayk'uwaappe dentsanaassa. 
Romans10:8 Shin I giyaawe hawaa; ‹S'oossaa k'aalay ne mataana; ne doonaaninne ne wozanaan de'ee› geetetteedda» yaagee. Hewekka nuuni hinttenttoo odiyaa ammanuwaa k'aalaa. 
Romans10:9 Neeni, «Yesuusi Godaa» gaade ne doonaan markkattooppe, k'ay S'oossay hayk'uwaappe Aa dentseeddawaa ne wozanaan ammanooppe, neeni attana." 
Romans10:10 Ayaw gooppe, Asay bare wozanaan ammaniide s'illee; bare doonaankka markkattiide attee." 
Romans10:11 S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Aan ammaniyaa ooninne yeellatenna» yaagee." 
Romans10:12 Ayihuda asaanne Ayihuda gidenna asaa giddon dummatetsay baawa. Itti S'oossay ubbaa Godaa; I barena s'eesiyaa ubbatoo daro keeka. 
Romans10:13 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Godaa suntsaa s'eesiyaa ooninne attana» yaagee." 
Romans10:14 Yaatina, unttunttu Aa ammanibeennawantta gidooppe, wooti Aa s'eesanaw danddayiinoo? K'ay k'aalaa sisibeennawanttu waan ammananaw danddayiinoo? K'aalaa odiyaawe d'ayooppe, unttunttu waan sisanaw danddayiinoo?" 
Romans10:15 K'ay k'aalaa odiyaawanttu kiitettennan aggooppe, oosuu wooti odettanaw danddayii? Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Nashechchiyaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaawanttu yuussay wooti lo""ii!» yaagee." 
Romans10:16 Shin unttunttu ubbay wonggalaw azazettibeykkino; ayaw gooppe Isiyaasi, «Ta Godaw, nuuni markkatteeddawaa ooni ammaneeddee?» yaageedda." 
Romans10:17 Simmi Asay k'aalaa sisiide ammanee; k'ay itti uray Kiristtoosa k'aalaa, odina sisee." 
Romans10:18 Shin unttunttu k'aalaa sisibeennawe tumee gaade taani oochchay. Tuma unttunttu siseeddino; S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Unttunttu haasayaa kooshshay sa'aa ubbaan laaletteedda; unttunttu k'aalaykka sa'aa gas'aa gakkeedda» yaageedda." 
Romans10:19 Shin Israa'eeliyaa asatuu eribeykkinoyee gaade taani oochchay. Muse kase, «Taani hinttentta asaa gidenna asatuwaan seelissana; k'ay eeyaa asatuwaan taani hinttentta hank'k'etsissana» yaageedda." 
Romans10:20 K'ay Isiyaasi daro s'aliide, «Taana koyyibeennawanttoo beettaad; taana oochchibeennawanttookka k'onc'c'aad» yaagee." 
Romans10:21 Shin Israa'eelatuwaabaa I haasayiidde, «Gallassaa ubbaa azazettenawanttoonne tawaa is's'iyaawanttoo ta kushiyaa mic'c'aad» yaagee." 
Romans11:1 Yaatina, S'oossay bare asaa is's'eedde gaade oochchoo? Hewaa gidenna; ayaw gooppe, taani ta huup'ew Israa'eeliyaa asaa; Abraahaame zare; Biiniyaama yaraa." 
Romans11:2 S'oossay koyro dooreedda bare asatuwaa is's'enna; S'oossaa Mas'aafay, Eelaasa taarikiyaa giddon, Eelaasi Israa'eelatuwaa S'oossaa sintsan wooti mootintto, hintte eriita." 
Romans11:3 «Godaw, unttunttu he suntsan nabatuwaa wod'eeddino; ne yarshshiyaa saakka koleeddino. Yaatina, taani ta s'alalay ataad. K'ay unttunttu taanakka wod'anaw koyyiino» yaageedda." 
Romans11:4 S'oossay aw waagi zaareeddee? «Taani Eek'aa Ba'aalaw gulbbatibeenna laappu shaa asaa taw ashshaad» yaageedda. 
Romans11:5 Hawaadankka k'ay ha wodiyaan, S'oossay bare aad'd'o keekatetsaan dooreedda amareeda asatuu de'iino." 
Romans11:6 Shin I bare aad'd'o keekatetsaan dooreeddappe attin, unttunttu oosuwaan unttuntta dooribeenna; hewe d'ayooppe, Aa aad'd'o keekatetsay tumu aad'd'o keekatetsaa gidenna." 
Romans11:7 Yaatina, ayee? Israa'eeliyaa asatuu barenttu koyyiyaawaa demmibeykkino; shin S'oossay dooreedda amareedawanttu demmeeddino. Yekkonttu wozanay minneedda." 
Romans11:8 Hawaadankka, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «S'oossay unttunttu barenttu ayfiyaan be'ennaadaaninne barenttu haytsaan sisennaadan, hawaa gakkanaw unttunttoo, azalla ayaanaa immeedda» yaageedda." 
Romans11:9 K'ay Daawite yaageedda; «Unttunttu miyaa gaytay unttuntta p'iriyaadan oyk'k'o; unttuntta guufantso; unttunttoo kushiyaa shiri c'iggo. 
Romans11:10 Unttunttu s'eellennaadan, unttunttu ayfii goozetto; ubbaa wode barenttu metuwaan k'uunniide de'iino» yaageedda." 
Romans11:11 Yaatina, Ayihudatuu d'ubetteedda wode, denddennaadan kunddeeddino? Hewaa gidenna; unttunttu nagaraa ootseedda diraw, atotetsay unttunttu Ayihuda gidenna asatuwaa k'anaatanaadan, Ayihuda gidenna asaw yeedda." 
Romans11:12 Shin Ayihudatuu nagaraa ootseedda diraw, alamew daro anjjuu yeedda; k'ay unttunttu kunddetsaykka Ayihuda gidenna asaw daro anjjuwaa aheedda. Yaatina, Ayihudatuu ubbay gujettiyaa wode, anjjuu woyssa keena daranddeeshsha!" 
Romans11:13 Shin taani hai hinttenttoo, Ayihuda gidenna asaw haasayay; taani Ayihuda gidenna asaw Yesuusi kiitteeddawaa gidiyaa diraw, ta oosuwaa bonchchana." 
Romans11:14 Taani ta zare gidiyaa asatuwaa k'anaatanchchatuwaa ootsooppe, ooni eri unttunttuppe amareedawantta ashshenaan aggikke." 
Romans11:15 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay unttuntta is's'eedda wode, ha alamii S'oossaanna sigetteedda. Yaatina S'oossay unttuntta shiishshi akkiyaa wode, hayk'k'eeddawe de'uwaa demmanaappe attin, ayee hananee?" 
Romans11:16 Koyro ayfe bagga munak'ay anjjetteeddawaa gidooppe, muume munak'aykka k'ay anjjetteeddawaa gidana; itti mitsaa s'ap'uu anjjetteeddawaa gidooppe, haytsay ubbaykka k'ay anjjetteeddawaa gidana." 
Romans11:17 Shin woraan doleedda wogaraa mitsaa k'ankkaappe ittuwaa ittuwaa kareeddasaan, neena woraan doleedda wogaraa mitsaa mallaa he wogaraanna gatsi k'achcheeddo; neeni k'ay zayitii kesiyaa wogaraa mitsaa s'ap'uwaanna ittippe de'aa." 
Romans11:18 Simmi neeni he karetti wod'd'eedda k'ankkatuwaa bollan otorettanaw bessena; shin neeni otorettiyaawaa gidooppekka, s'ap'uu neena tookkeeppe attin, neeni s'ap'uwaa tookkennawaa akeeka." 
Romans11:19 Hewaa diraw neeni, «Ee; shin k'ankkatuu taani unttunttu sa'aan gelanaaddan karetteeddino» yaagana." 
Romans11:20 Hewe tuma; unttunttu ammanibeenna diraw, karetteeddino; neeni ammaneedda diraw, he sa'aan ek'k'aadda. Shin yayyappe attin, otoro k'ofaa k'oppoppa." 
Romans11:21 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay med'etaa k'ankkaa malatiyaawanttoo, Ayihudatoo k'arettibeennawaa gidooppe, new k'arettiyaawaa malatii?" 
Romans11:22 Simmi S'oossaa keekatetsaanne s'alatetsaa be'a. Kunddeeddawanttoo I s'alaa; shin neeni Aa keekatetsaani minnaade de'ooppe, I new keeka; hewe d'ayooppe, neenikka k'ay k'ans's'ettana." 
Romans11:23 Ayihudatuukka k'ay ammanennaan is's'iyaawaa aggooppe, S'oossay kase unttunttu de'iyaa saan zaariide wotsana; ayaw gooppe, I unttuntta zaariide wotsanaw danddayee." 
Romans11:24 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay hinttentta woraan de'iyaa koyro med'etaa wogaraa mitsaappe k'ans's'iide, hinttenttu med'etaan woraan dolowanttudan gidennaan gaden tokkeedda wogaraa mitsaanna gatsi oytseeddawaa gidooppe, yaatina, he karetti wod'd'eedda koyro med'etaa k'ankkatuwaa zaaretsiide, unttuntta koyro med'etaan doleedda barenttu wogaraa mitsaanna gatsi k'achchanaw, Aa ayee s'oonanawe?" 
Romans11:25 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani hintte eranaadan koyyiyaa tumu s'uuraa yewuu de'ee; hewe hintte hinttentta hintterekka, nuuni aad'd'eedda eranchcha yaagiide k'oppiyaawaa diggee; Israa'eeliyaa asaappe baggay sisennaan is's'eedda; shin he sisennaan is's'iyaawe Ayihuda gidenna asaa kumentsaa payduu S'oossaakko gakkanaw gam""ana." 
Romans11:26 Hawaadankka, Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay attana; S'oossaa Mas'aafay hawaadan yaagee; «Ashshiyaawe S'iyoone geetettiyaa katamaappe yiide, nagaraa oosuwaa ubbaa Yaak'ooba zariyaappe diggana." 
Romans11:27 Taani unttunttu nagaraa atto yaagiyaa wode, unttunttunna gelana k'aalaa c'aak'uu hawaa» yaagee." 
Romans11:28 Ayihuda gidenna asatoo, Ayihudatuu wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa baggana hintte diraw, S'oossaanna morkke; shin S'oossaa dooruwaa baggana aawotuwaa diraw, unttunttu I siik'iyaawantta." 
Romans11:29 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay bare immeeddawaa guyye akkena; k'ay bare s'eeseeddawaa is's'aaddi geena." 
Romans11:30 Ayihuda gidennawanttoo, S'oossaw hintte kasenna azazettibeykkita; shin Ayihudatuu azazettenan is's'eedda diraw, S'oossaa maarotetsaa ha""i hintte akkeeddita." 
Romans11:31 Hawaadan, hintte akkeedda maarotetsaa diraw, Ayihudatuu k'ay S'oossaa maarotetsaa ha""i akkanaadan, S'oossaw azazettenan is's'eeddino." 
Romans11:32 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay asaa ubbaa maarana mala, Asay ubbay aw azazettenan is's'iyaa hanotaan k'achcheedda." 
Romans11:33 S'oossaa duretetsay woyssa keena daree? Aa aad'd'o eratetsaynne Aa eratetsay woyssa keena c'iimmee? Aa pirddaa odanawe oonee? I bare ootsiyaawaa ayaw ootsintto, oonee akeekiyaawe?" 
Romans11:34 Hewaa S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Godaa wozanaa eriyaawe oonee? Aa zoranaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
Romans11:35 Woy bare kushiyaa zaarana mala, aw ittibaa immeeddawe de'ii?» yaagee." 
Romans11:36 Ayaw gooppe, ubbabaa I med'd'eedda; k'ay ubbabaykka Aa maataaninne awunne de'ee; S'oossaw med'inaw bonchchuu gido. Amen""i." 
Romans12:1 Simmi taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hintte hintte oonatetsaa S'oossaa nashechchiyaa de'onne geeshsha yarshshuwaa ootsiide, S'oossaw shiishshanaadan, taani hinttentta S'oossaa maarotetsaan woossay; S'oossaw hintte goyinnanaw bessiyaa tumu ogii hewaa." 
Romans12:2 S'oossay hintte k'ofaa ubbaanna dummayiide, hinttentta laammooppe attin, ha alamiyaa asaa malatoppite. He wode hintte, S'oossaa shenii, lo""obay, Aa nashechchiyaabaynne k'ay polo gideeddabay ayentto eranita." 
Romans12:3 S'oossay taw immeedda aad'd'o keekatetsaan taani hinttenttoo oday. Hinttenttu k'oppanaw bessiyaawaappe aatsiide, otoruwaan k'oppoppite; hewaa aggiide, wozanaama asaadan k'oppite; S'oossay hinttenttoo huup'iyaan huup'iyaan immeedda ammanuwaa keenan hintte bolla pirddite." 
Romans12:4 Nu itti bollaa giddon, c'ora bollaa k'ommotuu de'iino; he k'ommotuwaa ubbawukka dumma dumma oosuu de'ee." 
Romans12:5 Hawaadan, nuuni c'ora asaa gidooppekka, Kiristtoosa baggana itti asaa. K'ay nuuni itti asatetsaa k'ommotuwaadan, ittuu ittuwaanna oyk'etti utteeddo." 
Romans12:6 S'oossay nuw immeedda aad'd'o keekatetsaan dumma dumma imotay de'ee. Nu imotay nabetetsaa gidooppe, nuw de'iyaa ammanuwaa keenaa odanaw bessee." 
Romans12:7 Haratuwaa maaddussaa gidooppe, he oosuwaan minnanaw bessee; tamaarissussaa gidooppe, he tamaarissuwaan minnanaw bessee." 
Romans12:8 Hara asatuwaa minisussaa gidooppe, he oosuwaan minnanaw bessee. Bare huup'ew de'iyaabaappe haratoo immiyaa ooninne wozanaappe immo. Maatay de'iyaa uray minisi ootsanaw bessee; haratoo keekiyaa uray nashechchaan keekanaw bessee." 
Romans12:9 Hinttenttu siik'uu asaa bessanaw siik'ettiyaawaa gidanaw bessena. Iitabaa is's'ite; loobaa minisiide oyk'k'ite. 
Romans12:10 Ittuu ittuwaanna ishatuwaadan siik'ettite; ittuu ittuwaa bonchchiyaawan nashettite. 
Romans12:11 Minniide ootsite; azalloppite; hintte kumentsaa wozanaappe Godaw ootsite. 
Romans12:12 S'oossay hinttenttoo immana geeddawaan nashettite; waayiyaan genc'c'ite. Ubbaa wode S'oossaa woossite; 
Romans12:13 S'oossaa asatuwaa koshshiyaaban maaddite; imatsaa mokkite. 
Romans12:14 Hinttentta yederssiyaawantta anjjite; unttuntta anjjiteppe attin, shek'k'oppite." 
Romans12:15 Nashettiyaawanttunna nashettite; yeekkiyaawanttunnakka yeekkite. 
Romans12:16 Asaa ubbaw itti mala k'ofaa k'oppite; ootsiyaaban ubbaan hinttentta toochchiide de'iteppe attin, otorettoppite; hinttentta hintterekka aad'd'o eranchcha giide k'oppoppite." 
Romans12:17 Ooninne hinttenttoo iitabaa ootsooppe, he uraw iitabaa ootsi zaaroppite; asaa ubbaw lo""obaa ootsanaw k'oppite." 
Romans12:18 Asaa ubbaanna sarotetsaan de'anaw, hintte baggana, hinttenttoo danddayetteeddabaa ubbaa ootsite." 
Romans12:19 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hintte hintte huup'ew asaw haluwaa kesoppite. S'oossay haluwaa kesanaadan, Aa bolla olite. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Goday, ‹Taani haluwaa kesana; taani kushiyaa c'iggana› gee» yaagee." 
Romans12:20 Shin S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Ne morkkii koshattooppe, miza. Saamettooppe, ushsha. Ayaw gooppe, neeni hewaa ootsiyaawaan, Aa darissa yeellayaasa» yaagee." 
Romans12:21 Iitabaa loobaan s'oonappe attin, iitabay neena s'oonoppo." 
Romans13:1 Asay ubbay gadiyaa ayissiyaawanttoo eeno gaanaw bessee; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay geenaan de'ishshin, gadiyaa ayissiyaawe de'anaw danddayenna. Ha""i de'iyaa ayissiyaawanttukka S'oossay wotseeddawantta." 
Romans13:2 Hewaa diraw, ha""i de'iyaa ayissiyaawantta is's'iyaa ooninne S'oossaa azazuwaa is's'ee; bare bolla pirddaa ahee." 
Romans13:3 Ayaw gooppe, ayissiyaawanttu iitabaa ootsiyaawantta yashshanawaappe attin, lo""obaa ootsiyaawantta yashshikkino. Ayissiyaawoo yayyenaan agganaw koyyay? Yaatooppe lo""obaa ootsa; I neena galatana." 
Romans13:4 Ayaw gooppe, I new lo""obaa ootsanaw, S'oossaw k'ooma. Shin neeni iitabaa ootsooppe, iitabaa ootseeddawaa I seeriyaa diraw, aw yayya; I S'oossaa k'oomaa. K'ay iitabaa ootsiyaawanttu bolla S'oossaa hank'k'uwaa I ahee." 
Romans13:5 Hewaa diraw, gadiyaa ayissiyaawanttoo eeno giyaawe S'oossaa muraa s'alalaassa gidennaan, hinttenttu wozanaa k'ofaa dirawukka eeno gaanaw bessee." 
Romans13:6 Ayaw gooppe, gadiyaa ayissiyaawanttu barenttu oosuwaa ootsiyaa wode, S'oossaw ootsiyaa diraw, hintte k'aras'aa k'ans's'iyaawe hewaassa." 
Romans13:7 Ubbaa asawukka bessiyaawaa immite. Giiraa giiranaw bessiyaawoo giirite; k'aras'aa k'ans's'anaw bessiyaawoo k'ans's'ite; yayyanaw bessiyaawoo yayyite; bonchchuu bessiyaawaa bonchchite. 
Romans13:8 Hinttenttu ittuu ittuwaanna siik'ettanaappe attin, hara ac'uu O bollaninne de'oppo. Ayaw gooppe, haraa siik'iyaa ooninne higgii giyaawaa poleedda." 
Romans13:9 «Woshummoppa; wod'oppa; wuuoppa; asaabaa amottoppa» giyaa azazatuunne hara azazatuu ubbatuu, «Ne shooruwaa ne huup'iyaadan siik'a» giyaa azazuwaan kumiino." 
Romans13:10 Bare shooruwaa siik'iyaa ooninne aw iitabaa ootsenna; hewaa diraw, shooruwaa siik'iyaawe higgiyaa ubbaw eeno giyaawaa." 
Romans13:11 Gemishuwaappe hintte beegottiyaa saatii hai gakkeedda diraw, ha wodiyaa akeekite. Ayaw gooppe, nuuni koyro ammaneedda wodiyaappe, nuuni attiyaa wodii ha""i nuukko matatteedda." 
Romans13:12 K'ammay aad'd'anaw hanee; gallassay matatteedda. Simmi nuuni d'umaa oosuwaa aggiide, poo'uwaan olettanaw, olaa miishshaa mayyoytte;" 
Romans13:13 gallassi poo'uwaan de'iyaa asaadan, ane maara de'oytte. Yetsaaninne matsuwaan gidoppo; woshummussaaninne woshummanaw kajjeelussaana gidoppo; palumaaninne k'anaatiyaan gidoppo." 
Romans13:14 Shin Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa, olaa miishshaa Aa mayyite; hintte nagaranchcha asatetsay bare wozanaa amuwaa polanaadan, aw k'oppoppite." 
Romans14:1 Ammanuwaan azalliyaa uraa shiishshi akkite. Shin I bare huup'ew k'oppiyaabaan aanana palumettoppite. 
Romans14:2 Itti uraa ammanuu I ayaa miinanne diggenna. Shin ammanuwaan azalliyaa uray gaden mokkeeddabaa s'alalaa mee. 
Romans14:3 Ubbabaa miyaa uray ubbabaa meenna uraa kad'oppo; ubbabaa meenna uraykka ubbabaa miyaa uraa bolla pirddoppo. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay Aa shiishshi akkeedda." 
Romans14:4 Hara asaa k'oomaa bolla pirddiyaawe neeni oonee? I kunddina woy denddina bare Godaassa; shin Goday Aa dentsanaw danddayiyaa diraw, I ek'k'ana." 
Romans14:5 Itti uray, «Hik'k'a gallassay hara gallassatuwaappe aad'd'ee» yaagiide k'oppiyaa wode, haray, «Ubbaa gallassatuukka itti mala» giide k'oppee. Asay ubbay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan hewaadan ayaw k'oppintto akeeko." 
Romans14:6 Itti gallassaa hara gallassatuwaappe aatsiide bonchchiyaa uray Godaa bonchchoo bonchchee; k'umaa miyaa uraykka Godaa bonchchoo mee. Ayaw gooppe, I he k'umaa diraw, S'oossaa galatee. K'umaa meennawekka Godaa bonchchoo meennaan aggeedda; k'ay S'oossaa galatee." 
Romans14:7 Ayaw gooppe, nuuppe ooninne bare huup'e s'alalaw de'enna; k'ay ooninne bare huup'e s'alalaw hayk'k'enna." 
Romans14:8 Nuuni pas'a de'ooppe, Godaw de'eetto; k'ay hayk'k'ooppekka, Godaw hayk'k'eetto. Simmi nuuni pas'a de'ooppe woy hayk'k'ooppekka Godaassa." 
Romans14:9 Hewaa diraw, Kiristtoosi pas'a de'iyaawanttoonne hayk'k'eeddawanttoo Godaa gidanaw hayk'k'iide, hayk'uwaappe denddeedda." 
Romans14:10 Yaatina, neeni ne ishaa bolla ayaw pirdday? Woy neeni ne ishaa ayaw kad'ay? Nuuni ubbaykka S'oossaa pirddaa oydiyaa sintsan ek'k'ana." 
Romans14:11 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, « ‹Taani Goday ta de'uwaan c'aak'k'ay; asay ubbay ta sintsan gulbbatana. K'ay taani S'oossaa gidiyaawaa, asay ubbay markkattana› yaagay» yaagee." 
Romans14:12 Simmi nuuni huup'iyaan huup'iyaan nubaa S'oossaw odana. 
Romans14:13 Hewaa diraw, nuuni ittuu ittuwaa bolla pirddiyaawaa hawaappe sintsaw ane aggoytte. Shin ubbaappe aatsiide, hintte ishaa d'ubbiyaabaa woy nagaraan oliyaabaa ootsennaadan k'ofaa k'achchite." 
Romans14:14 Taani Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosanna de'iyaawaan, bare huup'ew tuna gidiyaabay baynnawaa eraynne akeekay. Shin itti uray ittibaa tuna giide k'oppooppe, hewe aw tuna gidee." 
Romans14:15 Neeni miyaabaa diraw, ne ishaa k'ohooppe, simmi neeni siik'uwaan de'akka. Kiristtoosi Aa diraw hayk'k'eedda asaa ne miyaa k'umaan bayizzoppa." 
Romans14:16 Simmi neeni loobaa giyaawaa Asay kad'oppo. 
Romans14:17 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa kawutetsay Geeshsha Ayyaanay immiyaa s'illotetsaa, sarotetsaanne nashechchaa gidiyaawaappe attin, muussaanne ushshaa gidenna." 
Romans14:18 Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosaw hawaadan ootsiyaa uray ooninne S'oossaa nashechchee; asaykka Aa galatee." 
Romans14:19 Yaatooppe, ane nuuni sarotetsaa ahiyaabaanne nuuna ittuwaa ittuwaanna minisiyaabaa ubbaa koyyeetto." 
Romans14:20 S'oossaa oosuwaa k'umaa diraw bayizzoppa. K'umay ubbay geeshsha; shin hara uraa nagaraan yeggiyaawaa muussay iita. 
Romans14:21 Hewoo ashuwaa meennaan woy ushshaa ushennaan aggiyaawe woy ne ishaa d'ubbiyaabaa ayaanne ootsennaan aggiyaawe loa. 
Romans14:22 Ha yewuwaan ne ammanuwaa neeppenne S'oossaappe gidduwaan naaga. Itti uray loa giide I ammanetteedawaa ootsiyaa wode, «Taani lo""uwaa ootsaad» giide bare wozanaan ammanettooppe, he uray tumu anjjetteeddawaa." 
Romans14:23 Shin I he miyaabaan sid'ooppe, Aa muussay ammanuwaana gidenna diraw, S'oossay Aa bolla pirddee; k'ay ammanuu baynnaan ootseeddawe ayayneekka nagaraa." 
Romans15:1 Nuuni ammanuwaan minneeddawanttu daaburanchchatuwaa tookuwaa tookkanaw bessee; nuuni nu s'alalaa nashechchanaw bessena. 
Romans15:2 Nuuni huup'iyaan huup'iyaan nu ishaa maaddanaw, ammanuwaan Aa minisanawunne nashechchanaw bessee." 
Romans15:3 Ayaw gooppe, haray atto Kiristtoosikka barena nashechchibeenna. Shin S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Neena boreeddawanttu boreedda borii ta bolla wod'd'eedda» geeddawaadan haneedda." 
Romans15:4 S'oossaa Mas'aafay nuw immiyaa genc'c'aaninne minotaan nuuni demmana giide nashechchaan naagi utteeddawe de'ana mala, S'oossaa Mas'aafan s'aafetteedda ubbabay nuuna tamaarissanaw s'aafetteedda." 
Romans15:5 Hinttenttu ubbay itti wozana gidiide, itti k'aalaan S'oossaa, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa Aawuwaa, bonchchana mala, genc'c'uwaanne minotetsaa immiyaa S'oossay, hinttenttoo Kiristtoosi Yesuusi ootseeddawaadan, ittuu ittuwaanna ittippe de'iyaa itti k'ofaa immo." 
Romans15:6  
Romans15:7 Hewaa diraw, Kiristtoosi hinttentta mokkeeddawaadan, S'oossaa bonchchoo ittuu ittuwaa mokkite." 
Romans15:8 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay ammanetteedawaa gidiyaawaa erissanaw, S'oossay aawaatoo immana geeddawaa tumayanawunne Ayihuda gidenna Asay S'oossaa Aa maarotetsaa diraw bonchchanaw Kiristtoosi Ayihudatoo k'ooma gideeddawaa hinttenttoo oday. Hewaa S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Hewaa diraw, taani neena, Ayihuda gidenna asaa giddon galatana; ne suntsaakka sabbana» yaagee." 
Romans15:9  
Romans15:10 K'aykka, «Ayihuda gidenna asatoo, S'oossaa asatuwaana nashettite» yaagee." 
Romans15:11 K'aykka gujjiide, «Hinttenttoo, Ayihuda gidenna asatoo ubbatoo, Godaa galatite; asaw ubbaw, Aa galatite» yaagee." 
Romans15:12 K'aykka Isiyaasi, «Issey zeretsay yiide, Ayihuda gidenna asaa mooddanaw denddana. K'ay unttunttu Aa baggana demmana giide, nashechchaan naagana» yaagee." 
Romans15:13 Hinttenttu akkana giide nashechchaan naagiyaawe Geeshsha Ayaanaa wolk'k'aan dic'c'anaadan, hinttenttoo immana geedda S'oossay, hintte Aa ammaniyaa diraw, hinttenttoo nashechchaanne sarotetsaa kuntsiide immo." 
Romans15:14 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hinttenttun lo""otetsaynne eratetsay ubbay kumeeddawaanne k'ay ittuu ittuwaa zoranaw danddayiyaawaa taani ta huup'ew eraad." 
Romans15:15 Shin taani hinttentta ittibaa ittibaa gujja k'ofissanaw, ha dabddaabbiyaa giddon ayinne yayyenaan hinttenttoo s'aafaad. Taani Kiristtoosa Yesuusa k'ooma gidaade, Ayihuda gidenna asaw ootsanaadan, S'oossay taw aad'd'o keekatetsaa immeedda diraw, taani ayinne yayabeykke; Ayihuda gidenna Asay Geeshsha Ayaanaa baggana S'oossaw geeshsha gidiide, Aa nashechchiyaa yarshshuwaa gidanaadan, S'oossaa wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaawaan geeshshatetsaan ootsay." 
Romans15:16  
Romans15:17 Hewaa diraw, taani Kiristtoosa Yesuusan gidaade S'oossaw ootsiyaaban c'eek'ettanaw danddayay." 
Romans15:18 Ayihuda gidenna Asay S'oossaw azazettanaadan, Kiristtoosi ta baggana k'aalaan, oosuwaan, mallaan, malaataa wolk'k'aaninne Geeshsha Ayaanaa wolk'k'aan ootseeddawaa s'alalaa taani odanaappe attin, harabaa odanaw s'alikke. Hewaa diraw, Yerusaalameppe doommaade, Iliwaarik'oona geetettiyaa gadiyaa gakkanaw yuuyyaade, Kiristtoosa wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa wurssa odaaddi." 
Romans15:19  
Romans15:20 Hawaadankka, taani hara Asay doommeeddawaa bollan doommennaadan, Kiristtoosa suntsay s'eesettibeennasan wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odanaw amottaad." 
Romans15:21 Shin S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Aabay hawaa gakkanaw odettibeennawanttu Aa be'anawantta; k'ay aabaa sisibeennawanttu akeekanawantta» yaagee." 
Romans15:22 Hewaa diraw, taani c'ora wode hinttenttukko yaanaw koyyay; shin yaanaw danddayabeykke." 
Romans15:23 Shin taani hai ha heeraan ta oosuwaa wursseedda dirawunne c'ora laytsaappe doommaade hinttentta baade be'anaw laamoteedda diraw 
Romans15:24 haikka hinttenttukko baana gaade k'oppay; taani Isippeene geetettiyaa gadiyaa baadde hinttentta be'anaw koyyay; k'ay amareeda wodiyaa hinttentta be'aade nashettowaappe guyyiyaan, Isippeene biishshin, hintte taana maaddana mala koyyay." 
Romans15:25 Shin hai taani S'oossaa asatuwaa maaddanaw, Yerusaalamebay." 
Romans15:26 Ayaw gooppe, Mak'idooniyaanne Akaayiyaa geetettiyaa gadiyaan de'iyaa woosa golle asatuu Yerusaalamen de'iyaa hiyyeesatoo miishshaa immanaw koyyeeddino." 
Romans15:27 Unttunttu barenttu huup'ew hawaa ootsanaw k'ofaa k'achcheeddino. Unttunttu he hiyyeesatuwaa maaddanawe unttunttoo ac'uu de'ee; ayaw gooppe, Ayihudatuu barenttu ayaanaa anjjuwaa Ayihuda gidenna asatuwaana shaakkeeddawaa gidooppe, Ayihuda gidenna asatuukka k'ay barenttoo de'eeddabaan Ayihudatuwaa maaddanaw bessee." 
Romans15:28 Hewaa diraw, taani ha oosuwaa wursseeddawaappe guyyiyaaninne unttunttoo shiik'eedda miishshaa ubbaa immeeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Isippeene baadde hintte mataanna aad'd'ana." 
Romans15:29 Taani hinttenttukko biyaa wode, Kiristtoosa anjjuu taanan kumina baanawaa eray." 
Romans15:30 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taw S'oossaa hintte woossiidde, woosan hintte taananna minnanaadan, Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggannanne Geeshsha Ayyaanay immiyaa siik'otetsan taani hinttentta woossay." 
Romans15:31 Taani Yihudaan de'iyaa ammanennawanttuppe attanaadaaninne k'ay taani Yerusaalamen ootsiyaa oosuu yaan de'iyaa S'oossaa asatuwaa nashechchiyaawaa gidanaadan, S'oossaa woossite." 
Romans15:32 K'ay S'oossay gooppe, taani hinttenttukko nashechchaan baade, hintte matan shemppana." 
Romans15:33 Sarotetsaa S'oossay hinttenttunna ubbaanna gido. Ameni. 
Romans16:1 Kinkkiriyaa geetettiyaa katamaan de'iyaa ammaniyaa asaana ootsiyaa nu michchata Peeba loo mac'c'a asaa gidiyaawaa taani hinttentta erissay. 
Romans16:2 Hinttenttu izo geeshshatuu Godaa suntsan mokkiyaawaadan mokkite; k'ay iza hinttenttuppe koyyiyaawe ayaa gidooppekka, izo maaddite; ayaw gooppe, iza bare huup'ew c'ora asaa maaddaw; k'ay taana ta huup'ewukka darissa maaddaw." 
Romans16:3 Kiristtoosa Yesuusa oosuwaa taananna ittippe ootsiyaa P'irisk'k'illiwunne izi asinaa Ak'iilassi ta sarotowaa odite. 
Romans16:4 Unttunttu ta shemppuwaa diraw, barenttu shemppuwaa aatsi immeeddino. Unttuntta ta s'alalaa gidennaan, Ayihuda gidenna asaa ammaniyaa Asay ubbaykka galatee." 
Romans16:5 K'ay unttunttu golliyaa ammaniyaa Asay shiik'iyaasaa ootsiide gakettiyaa asaa ubbaa saro giite. Iisiyaa gadiyaan Kiristtoosa koyro ammaneedda ta siik'iyaa Eppanetoosaw, ta sarotowaa odite." 
Romans16:6 Hinttenttoo loytsa daabureedda Mayraamo sarotite. 
Romans16:7 Taananna k'asho gollen de'eedda ta dabbo gideedda Ayihudatuwaa, Anddironik'oosanne Yuuniyaasa sarotite. Yesuusi kiitteeddawanttu giddon unttunttu loytsi eretteeddawantta. K'ay unttunttu Kiristtoosa taappe kasenna ammaneeddino." 
Romans16:8 Godaanna ittippetetsaan de'iyaa ta siik'o laggiyaa Amppiliyaatoosaw ta sarotowaa odite. 
Romans16:9 Kiristtoosa oosuwaa nuunanna ittippe ootsiyaa Urbbaanoosanne taani siik'iyaa Iss's'aakusa sarotite. 
Romans16:10 Kiristtoosanna I de'iyaawe erettina paac'iyaa s'ooneedda Ap'eliisaw ta sarotowaa odite; Ariss's'obiloosa soy asawukka ta sarotowaa odite. 
Romans16:11 Ta dabbo gideedda Ayihudawiyaa Heeroodiyoonanne Kiristtoosa ammaniyaa Narssiisesa soy asaa sarotite. 
Romans16:12 Godaa oosuwaan daaburiyaa Tirufaynanne Tirufooso geetettiyaa mac'c'awantta sarotite; k'ay Godaw daro daaburaade ootsiyaa siik'iyaa Perssiiso sarotite. 
Romans16:13 Godaa oosuwaan loytsi eretteedda Rufoosayewunne taana bare na'aadan maaddeedda Aa daayiw ta sarotowaa odite. 
Romans16:14 Ta sarotowaa Asinkkiriitoosaw, Pileegoonaw, Hermeesaw, Patirobaasawunne unttunttunna de'iyaa ammaniyaa ishatuwaa ubbaw odite." 
Romans16:15 Pileegoona, Yuulo, Neeriyaa, Aa michchato, Olumppoosanne unttunttunna de'iyaa S'oossaa asatuwaa ubbaa sarotite." 
Romans16:16 Geeshsha asaw bessiyaa yeretaa yerettiidde, ittuu ittuwaa sarotite; Kiristtoosan ammaniyaawanttu ubbatuu hinttentta saro yaageeddino." 
Romans16:17 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, asaa giddon shaakotetsaa med'd'iyaawantta, asaa ammanoo d'ubo gidiyaawanttanne hintte tamaareedda timirttiyaanna gakettennawaa tamaarissiyaawantta akeekanaadan, taani hinttentta woossay. Unttunttukko shiik'oppite." 
Romans16:18 Ayaw gooppe, hewaa malabaa ootsiyaawanttu barenttu uloo ootsiinoppe attin, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosaw ootsikkino; barenttu labiyaa haasayaaninne k'id'iyaan iitabaa k'oppenna asaa wozanaa baletsiino." 
Romans16:19 Wonggalaw hintte azazetteeddawaa Asay ubbay siseedda. Hewaa diraw, taani hinttebaan nashettay; shin lo""otetsaw hintte aad'd'eedda eranchcha gidanaadaaninne k'ay iitabaw ashikke gidanaadan koyyay." 
Romans16:20 Sarotetsaa S'oossay Sees'aanaa hintte gediyaappe garssanna haakkenna mata wode gaac'c'ana. Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenttunna gido. 
Romans16:21 Taananna ootsiyaa S'imootoose hinttentta saro yaagee; k'ay hawaadankka, ta dabbattuu Luuk'iyoosi, Yaasooninne Sosiip'aas'iroosi hinttentta saro yaagiino." 
Romans16:22 Taani, S'ars's'iyoosi, ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafeeddawe, hinttenttoo Godaa suntsan sarotaa kiittay." 
Romans16:23 Ammaniyaa Asay ubbay Aa soyin shiik'iyaa ta siiraa Gaayoosi hinttentta saro yaagee; katamaa miishshaa oyk'k'iyaa Erass's'oosinne nu ishay K'uwars's'oosi hinttentta saro yaagiino. 
Romans16:24 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenttunna ubbaanna gido. Ameni. 
Romans16:25 Nuuni S'oossaa galateetto. Taani wonggalaa baggana Yesuusi Kiristtoosabaa odeeddawaadaninne daro wodiyaappe geemmiide, ha""i k'onc'c'eedda tumatetsaadan, hintte ammanuwaan hinttentta S'oossay minisanaw danddayee." 
Romans16:26 Shin hai nabatuu s'aafeeddawaa baggana tumatetsay k'onc'c'iyaan erettanaadan ootseedda; k'ay asaa ubbay S'oossaa ammaniide azazettanaadan, Med'inaa S'oossaa azazuwaan, ha alamiyaan de'iyaa asaa zeretsaa ubbaw k'onc'c'eedda." 
Romans16:27 Aad'd'eedda eratetsay Aa s'alalaw de'iyaa itti S'oossaw Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana med'inaw bonchchuu gido. Ameni. 
1Corinthians1:1 Taani, S'oossaa sheniyaan Yesuusi Kiristtoosi kiitteeddawaa gidanaw s'eesetteedda P'awuloosinne, nu ishaa Sostteniisi," 
1Corinthians1:2 K'oronttoosan de'iyaa S'oossaa ammaniyaa asatoo, Yesuusi Kiristtoosan geeyyeeddawanttussinne, nuw Godaa gidiyaa nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa suntsaa ubbaa sa'aan s'eesiyaa ubbatuwaanna geeshsha gidanaw s'eesetteeddawanttoo ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafeetto." 
1Corinthians1:3 S'oossay, nu Aawuunne nu Goday Yesuusi Kiristtoosi hinttenttoo aad'd'o keekatetsaanne sarotetsaa immo." 
1Corinthians1:4 S'oossay Kiristtoosa Yesuusa baggana hinttenttoo immeedda aad'd'o keekatetsaa diraw, taani ubbaa wode hinttenttoo S'oossaa galatay." 
1Corinthians1:5 Taani Kiristtoosaw markkattiyaawe hinttenttun minneedda diraw, hintte ubbabaan, haasayaa ubbaan eratetsaa ubbaan, aan duretteeddita." 
1Corinthians1:6  
1Corinthians1:7 Hawaadan hintte nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa yuussaa naagishin, ayaanaa imotaappe haray atto ittuunne hinttenttoo pac'c'enna." 
1Corinthians1:8 K'ay nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa gallassan hintte kad'ee baynnawantta gidanaadan, wurssetsay gakkanaw I hinttentta minisanawaa." 
1Corinthians1:9 Bare Na'aa nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa ittippetetsaw hinttentta s'eeseedda S'oossay ammanetteedawaa. 
1Corinthians1:10 Shin taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, itti wozanaaninne itti k'ofaan ittippe gidanaappe attin, shaakotetsay hintte giddon de'enna mala, hintte ubbay itti haasayaa haasayanaadan, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa suntsan taani hinttentta woossay." 
1Corinthians1:11 Ayaw gooppe, taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, K'aloo'a soy Asay hinttenttubaa, hintte giddon walassay de'iyaawaa, taw odeeddino." 
1Corinthians1:12 Taani giyaawe hawaa; hinttenttu huup'iyaan huup'iyaan, «Taani P'awuloosawaa. Taani Ap'iloosawaa. Taani Keefawaa. Taani Kiristtoosawaa» yaagiita." 
1Corinthians1:13 Kiristtoosi shaaketteeddee? Hinttenttu diraw, mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishettiide kak'etteeddawe P'awuloosi? Woy hintte P'awuloosaw gidanaw s'ammak'etteedditee?" 
1Corinthians1:14 Taani K'arisip'p'oosappenne Gaayoosappe attin, hinttenttuppe oonanne s'ammak'abeenna diraw, S'oossaa galatay." 
1Corinthians1:15 Hewaa diraw, ooninne hinttentta taw gidanaadan s'ammak'etteeddita gaanaw danddayenna." 
1Corinthians1:16 K'ay, Ee, Iss's'ifaanoosa soy asaakka taani s'ammak'aad. Shin haraa gujjaade s'ammak'aadditanttonne wozanaa aatsikke." 
1Corinthians1:17 Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosi taana mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odana mala kiitteeddappe attin, s'ammak'ana mala kiittibeenna; k'ay Kiristtoosi mask'k'aliyaa bolla hayk'k'eeddawe mela gidenna mala, taani asaa aad'd'eedda eratetsaa k'aalaan tamaarissikke." 
1Corinthians1:18 Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosi mask'k'aliyaa bolla hayk'k'eeddawaa odiyaa k'aalay d'ayiyaawanttoo eeyatetsaa. Shin nuw attiyaawanttoo S'oossaa wolk'k'aa." 
1Corinthians1:19 S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Taani eranchchatuwaa aad'd'eedda eratetsaa, bayizzana; k'ay akeekanchchatuwaa akeekaakka d'ayissana» yaagee." 
1Corinthians1:20 Aad'd'eedda eranchchay hak'an de'ii? Higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawe hak'an de'ii? Woy ha alamiyaa s'oonanaw palumettiyaawanttu waananddinooshsha? S'oossay ha sa'aa aad'd'o eratetsay eeyatetsaa gidiyaawaa besseedda! 
1Corinthians1:21 Ayaw gooppe, Asay bare huup'e aad'd'o eratetsaan barena S'oossaa erenna mala, S'oossay bare aad'd'o eratetsaan diggiide, nuuni odiyaa eeyaa k'aalaan ammaniyaawantta ashshanaw k'oppeedda." 
1Corinthians1:22 Ayihudatuu malaataa oochchiino. K'ay Giriike asatuu aad'd'o eratetsaa wolk'k'aama koshshaa koyyiino. 
1Corinthians1:23 Shin nuuni mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishettiide kak'etteedda Kiristtoosabaa odeetto. Hewe Ayihudatoo d'ubo; k'ay Ayihuda gidennawanttoo eeyatetsaa. 
1Corinthians1:24 Shin S'oossay s'eeseeddawanttoo Ayihudatookka Giriikatookka nuuni odiyaa S'oossaa wolk'k'aynne Aa aad'd'o eratetsay Kiristtoosa. 
1Corinthians1:25 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa eeyatetsay asaa aad'd'eedda eratetsaappe aad'd'ee; k'ay Aa laafatetsaa geetettiyaawekka asaa minotetsaappe minnee." 
1Corinthians1:26 Simmi taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, S'oossay hinttentta s'eesiyaa wode hintte woyssa mala asentto k'oppite. Asaa k'ofaan hintte giddon aad'd'o eranchchatuu, wolk'k'aamatuunne d'ok'k'a sheeshshatuu dara gidikkino." 
1Corinthians1:27 Shin S'oossay aad'd'eedda eranchchatuwaa yeellayanaw, alamiyaan de'iyaa eeyatuwaa dooreedda; k'ay minatuwaa yeellayanaw, alamiyaan de'iyaa laafatuwaa dooreedda." 
1Corinthians1:28 S'oossay ha alamiyaan wolk'k'aamabaa giide k'oppiyaawaa d'ayissanaw, ha alamiyaa maaddennabaa kad'ettobaanne hanibeennabaa dooreedda." 
1Corinthians1:29 Hewaa diraw, ooninne S'oossaa sintsan c'eek'ettanaw bessena." 
1Corinthians1:30 Shin S'oossay hinttenttoo Kiristtoosi Yesuusa de'uwaa ootsi immeedda. Kiristtoosi nuw aad'd'o eratetsaa, s'illotetsaa, geeshshatetsaanne atotetsaa gideedda." 
1Corinthians1:31 Hewaa diraw, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «C'eek'ettiyaa uray ooninne, Goday ootseeddawaan c'eek'etto» yaagee." 
1Corinthians2:1 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani S'oossaa tumatetsaa s'uuraa hinttenttoo odanaw hinttenttukko yeedda wode, d'ok'k'a k'aalaaninne aad'd'eedda eratetsaan odanaw yabeykke." 
1Corinthians2:2 Ayaw gooppe, taani hinttenttunna de'aadde, Yesuusi Kiristtoosappenne k'ay mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishettiide I kak'etteeddawaappe attin, harabaa erennaadan, ta k'ofaa k'achchaad." 
1Corinthians2:3 Taani daaburaaninne yashshaan daro kokkorssaan hinttenttunna de'aaddi. 
1Corinthians2:4 Taani tamaarissiyaawaanne odiyaawaa S'oossaa Ayyaanaaninne wolk'k'aan k'onc'c'issayppe attin, c'iimma gidiide aad'd'eedda eratetsaa k'aalaanna gidenna." 
1Corinthians2:5 Hewaa diraw, hintte ammanuu S'oossaa wolk'k'aanappe attin, asaa aad'd'o eratetsaan zemppibeenna." 
1Corinthians2:6 Nuuni ayyaanan wozanaamatuwaa giddon aad'd'o eratetsaa haasayeetto. Shin hewekka ha alamiyaa aad'd'o eratetsaa gidenna; woy ha alamiyaa mooddiyaa d'ayiyaawanttu aad'd'o eratetsaa gidenna. 
1Corinthians2:7 Shin nuuni odiyaa aad'd'o eratetsay, S'oossay kasetiide, c'ora wodiyaappe kase nu bonchchoo dooreedda asaappe geemmeedda Aa s'uuraa aad'd'o eratetsaa." 
1Corinthians2:8 Ha alamiyaa mooddiyaawanttuppe ooninne ha aad'd'o eratetsaa eribeenna. Unttunttu ereeddawaa gidintto, bonchcho Godaa mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide kak'k'ikkino." 
1Corinthians2:9 Shin S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Ooninne ayfiyaan be'ibeennawe, haytsankka sisibeennawe, k'ay ooninne bare wozanaan k'oppibeennawe S'oossay barena siik'iyaawanttoo giigisseeddawaa» giyaawaadan nuuni haasayeetto." 
1Corinthians2:10 S'oossay bare S'uura yewuwaa bare Ayyaanaan nuuna erisseedda; ayaw gooppe, Geeshsha Ayyaanay S'oossaabaa haray atto geemmeedda yewuwaa ubbaa biddee." 
1Corinthians2:11 Ayaw gooppe, asaan de'iyaa asaa ayyaanaappe attin, asaabaa eriyaawe oonee? Hawaadankka, k'ay S'oossaabaa S'oossaa Ayyaanaappe attin, ooninne erenna." 
1Corinthians2:12 Nuuni S'oossay nuw immeeddabaa ubbaa eranaw I nuw yeddeedda Ayaanaa akkeeddoppe attin, alamiyaa ayaanaa akkibeykko." 
1Corinthians2:13 Nuuni ayaanaa yewuwaa ayaanaa yewuwaanna gatsiide, Geeshsha Ayyaanay nuuna tamaarisseedda k'aalaan hawaa haasayeettoppe attin, asaa aad'd'o eratetsay nuuna tamaarisseedda k'aalaan haasayokko." 
1Corinthians2:14 Shin Geeshsha Ayyaanay baynna Asay S'oossaa Ayaanaa yewuwaa akkena; ayaw gooppe, hewe aw eeyatetsaa. Yewuu Geeshsha Ayyaanan paac'ettiyaa diraw, I eranaw danddayenna." 
1Corinthians2:15 Shin Geeshsha Ayyaanay de'iyaa Asay ubbabaa shaakkee; shin I bare huup'ew oonaninne shaakettenna. 
1Corinthians2:16 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa mas'aafay, «Godaa wozanaa eriyaawe oonee? Aa zoranaw danddayiyaawe oonee?» yaagee. Shin nuw Kiristtoosa wozanay de'ee." 
1Corinthians3:1 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani Geeshsha Ayyaanay de'iyaa asaw haasayiyaawaadan, hinttenttoo haasayanaw danddayabeykke. Shin ha alamiyaa asaw haasayiyaawaadaaninne ammanuwaan minnibeenna Kiristtoosan de'iyaa guutsa naanaa mala asaw haasayiyaawaadan haasayaaddi." 
1Corinthians3:2 Hinttenttu biro mino k'umaa maanaw danddaybbeenna diraw, taani hinttentta maatsaa pakaad; haray atto, ha""ikka danddaybeykkita." 
1Corinthians3:3 Ayaw gooppe, hintte ha""ikka ha alamiyaa asaadan de'iita. Hinttenttu ha alamiyaa asaa gidiyaawaa hintte giddon de'iyaa k'anaatiinne palumay erissennee? K'ay ha alamiyaa asaadan simerettiita." 
1Corinthians3:4 Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttuppe ittuu, «Taani P'awuloosawaa» gooppe, haray k'ay, «Taani Ap'iloosawaa» gooppe, ha alamiyaa asaa mala gidikkitee?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Yaatina, Ap'iloosi oonee? P'awuloosi oonee? Nuuni hinttentta ammantseedda S'oossaa kaalliyaawantta. S'oossay nuw huup'iyaan huup'iyaan immeedda oosuwaa ootseetto." 
1Corinthians3:6 Taani puutiyaa tokkaad; Ap'iloosi haatsaa ushsheedda; shin S'oossay puutiyaa dichcheedda. 
1Corinthians3:7 Hewaa diraw, dichchiyaa S'oossaappe attin, tokkiyaawekka haatsaa ushshiyaawekka ayaanne gidenna." 
1Corinthians3:8 Tokkiyaawenne haatsaa ushshiyaawe itti mala; shin S'oossay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan Aa daaburaa keenaa aw woytana. 
1Corinthians3:9 Nuuni S'oossaw ittippe ootsiyaa Aa oosanchchatuwaa gidiyaa diraw, hintte Aa oosuwaa sa'aa. K'aykka hintte S'oossaa golliyaa." 
1Corinthians3:10 S'oossay taw immeedda aad'd'o keekatetsaan eranchcha anaas'iyaadan, golliyaa baasuwaa baasaad. Hara uray Aa bolla kees's'ee. Shin Aa bolla kees's'iyaa ooninne wooti kees's'intto, bare huup'ew naagetto." 
1Corinthians3:11 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay Yesuusi Kiristtoosa s'alalaa baaso ootsiide wotseedda. Aappe hara baasuwaa baasanaw ooninne danddayenna." 
1Corinthians3:12 Shin ha baasuwaa bolla ooninne work'k'aan gidina, biraan gidina, al""o shuchchaan gidina, mitsaan gidina, gattan woy mak'aan kees's'ooppe," 
1Corinthians3:13 asaa ubbaa oosuu k'onc'c'iyaa kesanawaa. Ayaw gooppe, tamaan k'onc'c'ana diraw, he gallassay asaa ubbaa oosuwaa bessana. Asay ubbay bare oosuwaa wooti ootseeddenttonne tamay paac'c'ana." 
1Corinthians3:14 Ooninne baasuwaa bolla kees's'eedda oosuu minniide attooppe, I woytaa akkanawaa." 
1Corinthians3:15 O oosuunne guudettooppe, he uray k'ohettana. I bare huup'ew attana; shin tamaa giddoppe kessi akkowaadan attana." 
1Corinthians3:16 Hinttenttu S'oossay ak'iyaa geeshsha golliyaa gidiyaawaanne S'oossaa Ayyaanay hinttenttun de'iyaawaa erikkitee? 
1Corinthians3:17 Ooninne S'oossaa geeshsha golliyaa kolooppe, S'oossay Aa kolana. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay ak'iyaa geeshsha gollii geeshsha; he geeshsha golliikka hinttentta." 
1Corinthians3:18 Ooninne bare huup'iyaa c'immoppo. Hinttenttuppe ooninne barena ha alamiyaan aad'd'o eranchcha yaagiide k'oppooppe, aad'd'o eranchcha gidanaw, eeyaa gido." 
1Corinthians3:19 Ayaw gooppe, ha alamiyaa aad'd'o eratetsay S'oossaa sintsan eeyatetsaa. S'oossaa mas'aafay, «S'oossay aad'd'o eranchchatuwaa, unttuntta unttunttu geniyaan oyk'k'ee» yaagee." 
1Corinthians3:20 K'ay, «Aad'd'eedda eranchchatuwaa k'ofaykka, maaduu baynnawaa gidiyaawaa Goday eree» yaagee." 
1Corinthians3:21 Hewaa diraw, ooninne asaan c'eek'ettoppo. Ayaw gooppe, ubbabaykka hinttewaa." 
1Corinthians3:22 P'awuloosikka, Ap'iloosikka, Keefaykka, ha alamiikka, de'uukka, hayk'uukka, ha""i de'iyaawekka, sintsappe yaanawekka, ubbaykka hinttewaa." 
1Corinthians3:23 Hinttenttu Kiristtoosawantta; Kiristtoosikka S'oossawaa. 
1Corinthians4:1 Asay nuuna Kiristtoosaw ootsiyaawanttudaninne S'oossaa gollen de'iyaa S'uuraa naagiyaa asaadan k'oppo. 
1Corinthians4:2 Yaatiide he asatuu barenttu Godaw ammanetteedawantta gidiide, beettanaw koshshee." 
1Corinthians4:3 Shin hintte woy haray ta bolla pirddooppe, ayinne gidenna. Haray atto, taanikka ta huup'iyaan pirddikke." 
1Corinthians4:4 Ayaw gooppe, taani ta huup'iyaan ayaanneekka eriyaabay baawa; shin taana hewe s'illissenna. Taana pirddiyaawe Godaa." 
1Corinthians4:5 Hewaa diraw, Goday d'umaan geemmeeddabaa poo'uwaa kessiyaawe, wozanaa k'ofaa k'onc'c'issiyaawe yaana wodii gakkanaw O bollaninne oonanne pirddoppite. He wode, Asay ubbay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan S'oossaappe sabaa demmanawaa." 
1Corinthians4:6 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hinttenttuppe ooninne ittuu tamaarissiyaawaa sabbiide, haray tamaarissiyaawaa borenna mala, «S'oossaa mas'aafan s'aafetteeddawaa bonchcha» yaagiyaawaa hintte nuunanna tamaarana mala, hintte diraw, tabaanne Ap'iloosabaa leemisuwaadan odaaddi." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ayaw gooppe, haratuwaappe neena oonee d'ok'k'isseeddawe? Neeni S'oossaappe akkabeenabay new ayee de'iyaawe? Yaatina, neeni akkeeddawaa gidooppe, ayaw akkabeenawaadan c'eek'ettay?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Hai hintte kalleeddita. Hai duretteeddita. Nuuni baynnaan hintterekka kawuteeddita. Nuunikka hinttenttunna kaatetanaadan, hintte kawuteedditentto lo""a shin." 
1Corinthians4:9 Ayaw gooppe, taw malatiyaawaadan, nuuni ha sa'aw, kiitanchchatoonne asaw kaassaa gideedda diraw, S'oossay nuuna Yesuusi kiitteeddawantta hayk'oo pirddetteedda asaadan, ubbaappe wurssetsaa ootseedda." 
1Corinthians4:10 Nuuni Kiristtoosa diraw eeyaa, shin hintte Kiristtoosan aad'd'eedda eranchcha. Nuuni daaburanchcha, shin hintte mina. Hinttenttu bonchchetteeddawantta, shin nuuni tooshetteeddawantta." 
1Corinthians4:11 Ha wodii gakkanaw, nuuni koshatteetto; saametteetto; kallotteetto; deshetteetto. K'ay de'iyaa sa'aa d'ayiide yuuyyeetto." 
1Corinthians4:12 Nuuni nu kushiyan ootsiide daabureetto. Nuuna Asay shek'k'iyaa wode, anjjeetto. Nuuna yederssi yuuyyiyaa wodekka danddayeetto." 
1Corinthians4:13 Nu bolla iitabaa haasayiyaa wode, nuuni lo""o k'aalaa zaareetto. Nuuni hawaa gakkanaassikka, ha sa'aa pituwaanne ubbabaa buuraa gideeddo." 
1Corinthians4:14 Taani ta siik'iyaa naanaadan, hinttentta seeranaw hawaa s'aafaaddippe attin, yeellayanaw s'aafabeykke." 
1Corinthians4:15 Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosan hinttentta dichchiyaa tammu sha""a Asay hinttenttoo de'ooppekka, hinttenttoo itti aawuwaappe haray baawa. Ayaw gooppe, taani mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa hinttenttoo aheeddawaadan, Kiristtoosa Yesuusan hinttenttoo aawuwaa gidaaddi." 
1Corinthians4:16 Simmi taanaadan hanite yaagaade hinttentta woossay. 
1Corinthians4:17 Hewaa diraw, Godan ammanetteeda ta siik'iyaa ta na'aa S'imootoosa hinttenttukko kiittaad. I ubbaa sa'aan de'iyaa ammaniyaa asaa ubbaw taani tamaarissiyaa Kiristtoosa Yesuusan de'iyaa ta ogiyaa hinttentta hassayissanawaa." 
1Corinthians4:18 Taani hinttentta be'anaw hinttenttukko yeennabaa malatina, otorettiyaa itti itti asatuu de'iino." 
1Corinthians4:19 Shin Goday gooppe, taani hinttenttukko ellekka baade he otorettiyaa asatoo haasayaa gidennaan, unttunttu wolk'k'aa erana." 
1Corinthians4:20 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa kawutetsay S'oossaa wolk'k'aanappe attin, haasayaana gidenna." 
1Corinthians4:21 Taani hinttenttukko muriyaa s'amaanna yooyye woy siik'uwaannanne ashikke ayyaanaanna yoo? Hak'awaa dooriitee? 
1Corinthians5:1 Hinttenttu giddon pokko woshumma oosuu de'iyaawe zigirettee; hewaa mala pokko woshumma oosuu haray atto, S'oossaa ammanenna asaa giddoninne baawa. Ayaw gooppe, bare aawuwaa machchatto akkeedda Asay de'ee." 
1Corinthians5:2 Hinttenttukka otoretteeddita. Hewaappe hintte kayyottanaw bessennee? Hewaa mala pokko oosuwaa ootseedda bitanii hintte giddoppe kichchanaw bessee. 
1Corinthians5:3 Ayaa gidinakka taani ta asatetsaan hinttenttunna de'ennaan d'ayooppekka, ayyaanan hinttenttunna de'ay. Ha""i hinttenttunna de'iyaawaadan hanaade, hewaa mala oosuwaa ootseedda bitaniyaa bolla nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa suntsan pirddadiggaaddi. Hinttenttunne ta ayyaanay nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa wolk'k'aanna ittippe shiik'iide," 
1Corinthians5:4  
1Corinthians5:5 he bitaniyaa ayyaanay Godaa Yesuusi pirddaw yiyaa gallassan attana mala, nagaraan kumeedda Aa bollaa kolanaadan Sees'aanaw hintte immanaadan, taani pirddaaddi." 
1Corinthians5:6 Hinttenttu c'eek'uu loa gidenna. Guutsa irshshuu munak'aa ubbaa dentsiyaawaa erikkitee? 
1Corinthians5:7 Hinttenttu ooratsa gidana mala, nagaraa irshshuu c'aaleeddawaa kessite. Hinttenttu irshshuu baynna munak'aa mala. Ayaw gooppe, nu Paasigaa dorssay, Kiristtoosi yarshshetteedda." 
1Corinthians5:8 Hewaa diraw, nuuni Ukitsaa Baalaa suuretetsaaninne tumatetsaan bonchchanaappe attin, c'aala irshshuwaan, iitatetsaa irshshuwaaninne geellatetsaa irshshuwaan bonchchokko." 
1Corinthians5:9 Woshummanaw k'oppiyaawanttunna hintte ittippe gaytenna mala, hinttenttoo dabddaabbiyaa s'aafaad." 
1Corinthians5:10 Taani giyaawe ha alamiyaan de'iyaa woshummanaw k'oppiyaawanttuppe woy yorattiyaawanttuppe, kayisotiyaawanttupenne woy eek'aw goyinniyaawanttuppe ubbakka shaakettana mala gidenna. Hewaa gidooppe, ha alamiyaappe hintte shaaketti baanaw bessee guussaa." 
1Corinthians5:11 Shin ishatuwaa hai geetettiyaawanttuppe ittuunne woshummanaw k'oppiyaawanttu woy miishshaw yorattiyaawanttu woy eek'aw goyinniyaawanttu woy asaa suntsaa bayzziyaawanttu woy matsottiyaawanttu woy wuuiyaawanttunna hinttenttu ittippetetsaa ootsenna mala, taani hinttenttoo s'aafaad. Hewanttu malaanna haray atto, k'umaakka ittippe mooppite." 
1Corinthians5:12 Ayaw gooppe, woosa golleppe karenna de'iyaawanttu bolla pirddanaw taana ayee gatsii? Hinttenttu giddon woosa gollen de'iyaawanttu bollan hintte pirddikkiteeyye?" 
1Corinthians5:13 Shin karenna de'iyaawanttu bollan S'oossay pirddana. He iitabaa ootsiyaa uraa hintte giddoppe kessi diggite. 
1Corinthians6:1 Hinttenttuppe itti uraw bare ishaanna mootuu de'iyaabaa gidooppe, ammaniyaawanttu bolla pirddettanawaa bashiide, ammanennawanttu bolla pirddettanaw waan s'aliide beedda?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Ammaniyaawanttu alamiyaa bolla pirddanawaa erikkitee? Yaatina, alamiyaa bolla hintte pirddanawantta gidooppe, ubbabaappe guus's'iyaawaa pirddanaw danddaykkitee?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Ha de'uwaabay atto shin, ammaniyaawanttu kiitanchchatuwaa bolla pirddanawaa erikkitee?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Yaatina, hinttentta ha alamiyaa de'uwaabaw pirddaa golle buussay koshshooppe, ammaniyaa Asay kad'eedda asaan pirddissanaw afiitee?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Taani hinttentta yeellayanaw hawaa gay; hawaa gidanaw bessii? Hinttenttu giddon ishatuwaa sigetsanaw danddayiyaa loo eranchcha Asay ittuunne baawee? 
1Corinthians6:6 Shin itti ishay yekko ishaa pirddaa gollen mootiidde, he yewuwaa ammanenna asaan pirddissii?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Simmi ittuu ittuwaa mootiyaawe hintte giddon de'ooppe, hewe hintte kunddeeddawaa bessee. Hewaappe hintte naak'ettiyaawenne c'imettiyaawe lo""ennee?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Shin hintte hintte huup'ew ittuu ittuwaa haray atto, hintte ishatuwaakka naak'k'iitanne c'immiitta."
