1Corinthians6:9 Woy makkalanchchatuu S'oossaa kawutetsaa laattennawaa erikkitee? Baloppite. Woshummanaw k'oppiyaawanttu woy eek'aw goyinniyaawanttu woy woshummiyaawanttu woy attumawaa gidiide, attumawaana gisiyaawanttu," 
1Corinthians6:10 woy kayisatuu woy miishshaw yorattiyaawanttu woy matsottiyaawanttu woy asaa suntsaa bayzziyaawanttu woy bonk'k'iyaawanttu S'oossaa kawutetsaa laattikkino. 
1Corinthians6:11 Hinttenttuppekka itti itti Asay hewanttu mala. Shin Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa suntsaaninne nu S'oossaa Ayyaanaan hintte meec'ettiide geeyyeeddita; k'ay s'illeeddita. 
1Corinthians6:12 Itti uray, «Taani koyyeeddabaa ubbaa ootsanaw danddayay» gaana danddayee. Shin ubbaykka taana maaddenna. Taani koyyeeddabaa ubbaa ootsanaw danddayay. Shin ayeenneekka taana mooddenna." 
1Corinthians6:13 K'ay haraykka, «K'umay uluwaassa; uluukka k'umaassa» gee. Shin S'oossay uluwaakka k'umaakka d'ayissana. Asaa asatetsay Godaa Yesuusassappe attin, woshummaassa gidenna. Godaa Yesuusikka asaa asatetsaassa." 
1Corinthians6:14 S'oossay Godaa Yesuusa hayk'uwaappe dentseedda; k'ay nuunakka hayk'uwaappe bare wolk'k'aan dentsana. 
1Corinthians6:15 Hinttenttu asatetsay Kiristtoosa asatetsaana ittuwaa gidiyaawaa hintte erikkitee? Yaatina, taani Kiristtoosa asatetsaana ittuwaa gideeddawaa afaade, c'aaratti asatetsaana ittuwaa ootsanaw bessii? Bessena!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Woy c'aarattinna ittipetetsaa med'd'iyaa uray izinna itti asatetsaa gidiyaawaa erikkitee? Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa mas'aafay, «Unttunttu laa""atuu itti asho gidana» yaagee." 
1Corinthians6:17 Shin Godaanna ittipetetsaa med'd'iyaa uray ayyaanan aanana ittuwaa gidee. 
1Corinthians6:18 Woshummaappe haakkite. Itti uray ootsiyaa hara nagaraa ubbay Aa asatetsaappe karenna de'ee; shin woshummiyaawe bare bollan nagaraa ootsee. 
1Corinthians6:19 Woy hintte bollay S'oossay hinttenttoo immeedda hinttenttun de'iyaa Geeshsha Ayyaanay ak'iyaa geeshsha golliyaa gidiyaawaa erikkitee? K'ay hintte hintte huup'iyaassa gidikkita. 
1Corinthians6:20 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay hinttentta gatiyaan shammeedda. Hewaa diraw, hintte asatetsaan Aa bonchchite." 
1Corinthians7:1 Hinttenttu taw s'aafeedda yewoo attuma Asay mac'c'awuno bochchennentto loa. 
1Corinthians7:2 Shin woshumma gaasuwaa diraw, attuma asaw huup'iyaan huup'iyaan machchata de'uu. K'ay mac'c'a asawukka huup'iyaan huup'iyaan asinay de'o." 
1Corinthians7:3 Asinay bare machchattiw asinatetsaan bessiyaabaa ootso; k'ay hewaadan, machchattakka bare asinaw machchetetsaan bessiyaabaa ootsu." 
1Corinthians7:4 Machchata bare asatetsaw goda gidukku; shin izi asinay goda. Hawaadankka, k'ay asinay bare asatetsaw godaa gidenna; shin Aa machchata goda." 
1Corinthians7:5 Hinttenttu hintte giddon S'oossaa woosaan genc'c'anaw he wodiyaw zoretan digettanaappe attin, ittuu ittuwaa diggoppite. Hinttenttu hinttentta naagenna diraw, Sees'aanay hinttentta paac'c'ennaadan, ittippe de'ite." 
1Corinthians7:6 Shin taani hinttentta hewaa hintte dosowaadan hanite gayippe attin, azazikke." 
1Corinthians7:7 Taani Asay ubbay taanaadan hanintto dosay. Shin S'oossay asaw huup'iyaan huup'iyaan dumma dumma imotaa immi wotseedda; ittoo hawaadan, k'ay yekkoo hewaadan immi wotseedda." 
1Corinthians7:8 Hewaa diraw, taani machchatto akkibeennawanttunne asinay hayk'k'o mac'c'awanttu taanaadan c'oo de'iinontto, unttunttoo lo""a gay." 
1Corinthians7:9 Shin amuwaan guudettiyaawaappe akkiyaawenne geliyaawe loa gidiyaa diraw, unttunttu barentta naaganaw danddayana d'ayooppe, akkinonne gelino." 
1Corinthians7:10 Machchata bare asinaappe shaakettuppu. Shin shaakettooppenne gelennaan de'uu; woy bare asinaana sigettu. Asinaykka bare machchatto yeddoppo yaagaade, akkeeddawanttanne geleeddawantta azazay. Shin hawaa azaziyaawe Godaappe attin, taana gidikke." 
1Corinthians7:11  
1Corinthians7:12 Taani haratuwaa hawaadan gay; Godaa gidenna. Ammanenna machchata de'iyaa ammaniyaa Asay ooninne de'ooppe, Aa machchata aanana ittippe de'iyaawaa I dosooppe, izo yeddoppo." 
1Corinthians7:13 K'ay ammanenna asinay de'iyaa ammaniyaa machchata de'ooppe, izi asinay izinna ittippe de'iyaawaa iza dosooppe, aappe shaakettuppu." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ayaw gooppe, ammanenna asinay bare ammaniyaa machchattinna de'iide geeyyeedda. K'ay ammanenna machchata bare ammaniyaa asinaana de'aade geeyyaaddu. Hewe baawentto, hinttenttu naanay tunaa; shin ha""i unttunttu geeshsha." 
1Corinthians7:15 Shin ammanennawe shaakettana koyyooppe shaaketto. Ammaniyaa machchatto gidina, woy asinaa gidina, hawaa mala yewuwaan k'ashettikkino. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay nuuna sarotetsaan de'anaw s'eeseedda." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ammaniyaa machchattee, neeni ne asinaa ashshaninttonne O eri? Woy ammaniyaa asinaw neeni ne machchatto ashshaninttonne O eri?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Gidooppenne, Asay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan Goday aw immeeddawaadaaninne k'ay S'oossay barena s'eeseeddawaadan de'o. Hewe ammaniyaa asaa ubbaa taani tamaarisseedda higgiyaa." 
1Corinthians7:18 Ooninne k'as's'aretti uttiide, S'oossaa ammaneeddawaa gidooppe, bare k'as's'araa mallaa diggoppo. K'ay ooninne k'as's'arettennan de'iidde, s'oossaa ammaneeddawaa gidooppe k'as's'arettoppo." 
1Corinthians7:19 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa azazuwaa naaganaappe attin, k'as's'arettina k'as's'arettana d'ayina allaallii baawa." 
1Corinthians7:20 Asay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan S'oossay barena s'eesiyaa wode de'iyaawaadan de'o. 
1Corinthians7:21 S'oossay neena s'eesiyaa wode neeni ayile? Ayinne baawa; shin neeni ayiletetsaappe kesanaw danddayooppe kesa. 
1Corinthians7:22 Ayaw gooppe, ayile gidi utteedda asaa Goday s'eesooppe, I Goday ayiletetsaappe kesseedda asaa. Hawaadankka, ayile gidenna asaa Kiristtoosi s'eesooppe, I Kiristtoosa ayile." 
1Corinthians7:23 S'oossay hinttentta gatiyaan shammeedda. Asaa ayile gidoppite. 
1Corinthians7:24 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, Asay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan S'oossay Aa s'eesiyaa wode de'iyaa de'uwaadan, S'oossaanna de'o." 
1Corinthians7:25 Wodoratoo Goday taana azazeeddabay baawa. Shin taani Godaw ammanetteedawaa gideedda diraw, aappe maarotetsaa akkeeddawaadan, hinttentta zoray." 
1Corinthians7:26 Simmi hai metoo taw hawe loa malatee; Asay hawaadan haniide de'ooppe loa. 
1Corinthians7:27 Neeni machchatto akka diggeeddawaa gidooppe, izo yeddanaw koyyoppa. Machchatto akkabeenawaa gidooppe, akkanaw koyyoppa." 
1Corinthians7:28 Shin neeni machchatto akkooppe, nagaraa ootsabeykka. Wodorattaakka asinaa gelooppe, nagaraa ootsabeykku. Shin akettiyaawanttoonne gelettiyaawanttoo unttunttu de'uwaan wolk'k'aama metuu de'ee. Taani hinttentta he metuwaappe ashshanaw koyyay." 
1Corinthians7:29 Shin taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani giyaawe hawaa; wodii wureedda. Hawaappe sintsaw akkeedda asatuu, akkibeenna asaadan hanino." 
1Corinthians7:30 Yeekkiyaawanttu yeekkennawaadan, nashettiyaawanttu nashettennawaadan, shammiyaawanttukka shammiide ayinne baynnawaadan," 
1Corinthians7:31 ha alamiyaa de'uwaan maadettiyaawanttu ubbakka maadettennawaadan hanino. Ayaw gooppe, ha alamiyaa de'uu attiyaawaa." 
1Corinthians7:32 Hinttenttu hirggennan de'anawaa taani dosay. Akkibeennawe Godaa nashechchanaw koyyiyaa diraw, Aa oosuwaabaa k'oppee." 
1Corinthians7:33 Shin akkeeddawe bare machchatto nashechchanaw koyyiyaa diraw, sa'aabaa k'oppee." 
1Corinthians7:34 Aa k'ofay shaaketteedda. Asinaa gelabeenna gellayatta bare ashuwaaninne bare shemppuwaan geeyyanaw koyyiyaa diraw, Godaa oosuwaabaa k'oppaw. Shin asinaa geleeddawunna bare asinaa nashechchanaw koyyiyaa diraw, sa'aabaa k'oppaw." 
1Corinthians7:35 Taani hawaa hinttentta maaddana mala gayippe attin, hinttentta d'ubbanaw giikke. Shin hintte bessiyaawaadan de'iidde, Godaa oosuwaa hinttena immiide ootsana mala koyyay." 
1Corinthians7:36 Ooninne bare giigisseedda wodoratto akkiyaa wodii gakkina, barena naaganaw aw danddayettennaan is's'ooppe, izo akko. I izo akkooppe, hewaan nagaray baawa." 
1Corinthians7:37 Shin I bare wozanaan minnooppe, akkenaan gam""ana danddayee. K'ay barena naagiide, bare giigisseedda wodoratto akkenaan gam""ana gooppe, ooninne wolk'k'antsennaan bare wozanaan k'ofaa k'achcheeddawaa gidooppe loytseedda." 
1Corinthians7:38 Hewaa diraw, wodoratto akkiyaa uray loytseedda; k'ay akkenawe ubbaa aatsi loytseedda." 
1Corinthians7:39 Asinaa geleedda mishiratta bare asinay de'eedda keenan aanana ittippe de'anaadan k'ashetta uttaaddu. Shin I hayk'k'ooppe, Godaa ammaniyaa asaa oonanne gidooppe, bare doseedda asinaa gelanaw danddayaw." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ta k'ofaa gidooppe, gelennaan de'antto, iza nashechchaan de'ana. K'ay taanan S'oossaa Ayyaanay de'iyaawaa taani eray." 
1Corinthians8:1 Eek'aw yarshsheedda k'umaabaa gidooppe, nuuni ubbaykka ereetto. Eray otorssee; shin siik'uu ammanuwaan dichchee." 
1Corinthians8:2 Ooninne barew ittibaa eriyaawaa malatooppe, I biro eranaw bessiyaawaa eribeenna." 
1Corinthians8:3 Shin ooninne S'oossaa siik'ooppe, S'oossay Aa eree." 
1Corinthians8:4 Hewaa diraw, eek'aw yarshsheedda k'umaa muussaabaa gidooppe, eek'aa ubbay alamiyaan ayaanne gidennawaanne, itti S'oossaappe attin, haray baynnawaa nuuni ereetto." 
1Corinthians8:5 Ayaw gooppe, c'ora s'oossatuunne c'ora godatuu de'iino. Shin haray atto, saluwaan gidina sa'aan gidina, s'oossatuwaa geetettiyaawanttu de'ooppekka," 
1Corinthians8:6 ubbabaa med'd'eeddawe nuuni aw de'iyaawe, itti S'oossay, Aawuu, nuw de'ee. K'ay ubbabay aan med'etteeddawenne nuuni aan de'iyaawe itti Goday, Yesuusi Kiristtoosikka nuw de'ee." 
1Corinthians8:7 Shin ha eray asaa ubbaw de'enna. Itti itti asatuu eek'aa dooyeedda diraw, ha""i gakkanawukka, «Eek'aw yarshsheedda k'umaa» yaagiidde miino. K'ay unttunttu wozanay shuga gideeddawaan, unttunttoo ha k'umaan tuneeddawaa malatee." 
1Corinthians8:8 Shin k'umay nuuna S'oossaakko shiik'anaadan maaddenna. Nuuni maana d'ayinttokka nuw ayinne pac'c'enna; mooppenne nuw ayinne gujettenna. 
1Corinthians8:9 Shin hawe hintte hintte dosowaadan haniyaawe shugo ammanuwaanna de'iyaawantta nagaraan yeggenna mala naagettite. 
1Corinthians8:10 Ayaw gooppe, neeni eranchchay eek'aw yarshsheedda k'umaa maanaw eek'aa golliyaan utteedda wode, shugo ammanuwaanna de'iyaa itti Asay neena be'ooppe, eek'aw yarshsheedda k'umaa I maanaw Aa wozanay k'oppenneeyee?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Hewaa gidooppe ha shugo ammanuwaanna de'iyaa ne ishay, Kiristtoosi Aa diraw hayk'k'eeddawe, ne eraan bayee." 
1Corinthians8:12 Hawaadankka, hintte hintte ishatuwaa naak'k'iyaawaaninne unttunttu shugo wozanaa maytsiyaawaan Kiristtoosa naak'k'iita." 
1Corinthians8:13 Hewaa diraw, k'umay ammaniyaa ta ishaa d'ubbiyaawaa gidooppe, Aa d'ubbenna mala, ta de'iyaa laytsaan mulekka ashuwaa miikke." 
1Corinthians9:1 Taani ayiletetsay baynna asaa gidikkitaa? Yesuusi kiitteeddawaa gidikkitaa? Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa be'abeykkitaa? Hinttenttu taani Godaw ootseedda ta oosuwaappe beetteeddawantta gidikkiteeyee? 
1Corinthians9:2 Taani haranttoo Yesuusi kiitteeddawaa gidana d'ayooppekka, hinttenttoo Yesuusi kiitteeddawaa gidiyaawe eretteeddawaa; ayaw gooppe, taani Godan Yesuusi kiitteeddawaa gidiyaawoo hintte markka." 
1Corinthians9:3 Taana boriyaawanttoo taani immiyaa zaaruu hawaa. 
1Corinthians9:4 Maanawunne ushanaw nuw maati baawee? 
1Corinthians9:5 Yesuusi kiitteedda haratuwaadaaninne Godaa ishatuwaadan, P'es'iroosawaadan, eeno giyaa machchatto ittippe akkiide baanaw nuw maatay baawee?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Woy nu de'oo ootsiidde baas'etanaw bessiyaawe taananne Barnaabaasa s'alalee? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ay wodenne bare miishshaa miidde, wotaadaratetsaa ootsiyaawe oonee? Woy woyniyaa turaa tokkiide, Aa ayfiyaa meennawe oonee? Woy miizza wudiyaa heemmiidde, he miizza wudiyaappe maatsaa ushennawe oonee?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Taani hawaa asaa k'ofaa s'alalaan gaytaa? Woy higgii k'ay hawaa geennee? 
1Corinthians9:9 Ayaw gooppe, Muse Higgiyan, «Katsaa yed'd'iyaa mehiyaa doonaa k'achchoppa» geetettiide s'aafetteedda. S'oossay mehiyaabaa k'oppiide hawaa gii?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Woy I hewaa giyaawe mulekka nu diraassa gidennee? Tumakka nu diraw s'aafetteedda; goshiyaa bitaniikka katsaa bukkiyaa bitaniikka, «Taana gakkiyaawaa akkana» yaagiidde ootsanaw bessee." 
1Corinthians9:11 Nuuni hintte giddon ayaanaa yewuwaa zereeddawantta gidiide, nu ashoo maado gidiyaawaa hinttenttuppe c'akkooppe darobee?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Haratuu hewaa hinttenttuppe akkanaw unttunttoo maatay de'ooppe, nuw unttunttuwaappe aad'd'iyaa maatay baawee? Shin nuuni Kiristtoosa mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaw d'ubo gidennaadan, ubbabaa genc'c'iyaawaappe attin, he maataan go""ettibeykko." 
1Corinthians9:13 Geeshsha Golliyaan ootsiyaa asatuu barenttu k'umaa Geeshsha Golliyaappe akkiyaawaa erikkitee? K'ay yarshshiyaasaan ootsiyaawanttu yarshshuwaappe akkiyaawaa erikkitee? 
1Corinthians9:14 Hawaadankka, k'ay mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odiyaawanttu barenttu de'oo koshshiyaabaa aappe demmanaadan, Goday azazeedda." 
1Corinthians9:15 Shin taani ha maataa ubbaan ayinne goettabeykke. Taani hawaa s'aafeeddawe hewaa mala maatay taw de'anaw bessee yaagiyaawaana gidenna. Ayaw gooppe, ta c'eek'uwaa ooninne mela kessiyaawaappe hayk'k'iyaawe taw lo""a." 
1Corinthians9:16 Mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odanaw taani azazetta utteedda diraw, Aa odooppekka taw c'eek'ettiyaabay baawa. Mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odennaan aggooppe, taw aayyero." 
1Corinthians9:17 Ayaw gooppe, taani hawaa dosaade ootsooppe, taw woytay de'ee. Shin taani dosennaan is's'ooppekka, mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa diraw hadaraa S'oossay taw immeedda." 
1Corinthians9:18 Yaatina, ta woytay ayee? Mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odaadde, taw wonggalaan de'iyaa kumentsaa maataan go""ettennan, mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa c'oo odiyaawaa." 
1Corinthians9:19 Taani oossinne ayile gidikke shin, c'oratuwaa zaaranaw taana ubbaw ayile kessaad." 
1Corinthians9:20 Taani Ayihudatuwaa zaaranaw unttunttunna unttuntta gidaade de'aaddi. Ta huup'ew higgiyaappe garssanna de'ikke. Shin higgiyaappe garssanna de'iyaawantta zaaranaw higgiyaappe garssanna de'iyaa asaa mala gidaaddi. 
1Corinthians9:21 Taani higgii baynna asatuwaana de'aadde, higgii baynna asaadan hanaad. S'oossaa higgii d'ayina gidenna. Shin higgii baynnawantta zaaranaw, Kiristtoosa higgiyaappe garssanna de'aaddi." 
1Corinthians9:22 Taani ammanuwaan daaburiyaawantta zaaranaw, unttunttu mala gidaaddi. Taani ay ogiyaaninne amareeda asatuwaa ashshanaw, ubbaa asatuwaana ubbabaan unttunttu mala gidaaddi." 
1Corinthians9:23 Taani mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa anjjuwaa shaakkanaw, mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa diraw, ubbabaa ootsay." 
1Corinthians9:24 Wotsaan s'oonana giide wos's'iyaa ubbay ittippe wos's'ee. Shin ittuwaa s'alalay woytaa akkiyaawaa erikkitee? Hawaadan hinttenttukka woytaa akkanaw wos's'ite. 
1Corinthians9:25 Kaassaw barena giigissiyaa ooninne ubbabaan barena naagee. Asay hewaa daaburiyaawe s'ooneeddawoo imettiyaa bayiyaa kalachchaa demmanaassa. Shin nuuni daaburiyaawe med'inaw de'iyaawaanne bayenna kalachchaa demmanaassa. 
1Corinthians9:26 Hewaa diraw, taani k'ofi baynnaan wos's'iyaawaadan wos's'ikke. C'arkkuwaa yimppiyaa asaadankka c'oo olettikke." 
1Corinthians9:27 Shin taani haranttoo odeeddawaappe guyyiyaan, ta huup'ew woytaappe attena mala, ta asatetsaa naagettanaadan ootsay." 
1Corinthians10:1 Hewaa bollan taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani hintte hawaa erana mala koyyay. Nu aawotuu ubbay shaariyaappe garssanna de'eeddino; ubbaykka abbaa giddonna pinneeddino." 
1Corinthians10:2 Unttunttu ubbay Mussenna ittippe gidanaw, shaariyaaninne abbaan s'ammak'etteeddino." 
1Corinthians10:3 Unttunttu ubbay he itti ayaanaa k'umaa meeddino. 
1Corinthians10:4 K'ay ubbaykka he itti ayaanaa ushshaa usheeddino. Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barentta kaaletsiyaa ayaanaa zaallaappe pulttowaa usheeddino; he zaallaykka Kiristtoosa." 
1Corinthians10:5 Shin S'oossay unttunttuppe dariyaa baggatuwaan nashettibeenna diraw, unttunttu anhay Asay baynna saan laaletteedda." 
1Corinthians10:6 Unttunttu iitabaa amotteeddawaadan, nu wozanay k'ay iitabaa amuwaappe naagettanaadan, hewe ubbay nuw timirtte gideedda." 
1Corinthians10:7 S'oossaa mas'aafay, «Asay maanawunne ushanaw utteeddino; k'ay duroo denddi ek'k'eeddino» yaagiyaawaadan, unttunttuppe ittuu ittuu eek'aw goyinneeddawaadan, hintte goyinnoppite." 
1Corinthians10:8 Unttunttuppe ittuu ittuu woshummeeddawaadan, nuuni woshummanaw bessena. Hewaa gaasuwaan unttunttuppe itti gallassi laatamanne heezzu sha""ay hayk'k'eedda." 
1Corinthians10:9 Unttunttuppe ittuu ittuu Godaa paac'c'iide, shooshshaan duketti hayk'k'eeddawaadan, nuuni Kiristtoosa paac'c'anaw bessena." 
1Corinthians10:10 Unttunttuppe ittuu ittuu zuuzummina, wod'iyaa kiitanchchaan unttuntta d'ayisseeddawaadan zuuzummoppite." 
1Corinthians10:11 Hawe ubbay haratoo timirtte gidanaadan unttunttu bolla gakkeedda. K'ay nuuna wodiyaa wurssetsay gakkana mateeddawantta seeranaw s'aafetteedda. 
1Corinthians10:12 Hewaa diraw, minna ek'k'aad giide k'oppiyaa uray ooninne kunddennaadan, barena naago." 
1Corinthians10:13 Hinttentta gakkiyaa paac'ii, asaa ubbaa gakkiyaa paac'iyaa malappe attin, ayinne dummatenna. Hinttenttu wolk'k'ay danddayiyaawaappe aad'd'iyaa paac'iyaan hintte paac'ettanaw koyyenna S'oossay ammanetteedawaa. Shin hinttentta paac'ii gakkiyaa wode, he paac'iyaa I hinttentta danddayissana. K'ay he paac'iyaappe hinttenttu kesiyaa ogiyaakka I immana." 
1Corinthians10:14 Hewaa diraw, ta dosiyaawanttoo, eek'aw goyinnoppite." 
1Corinthians10:15 Hinttenttu wozanaama asaa gideedda diraw, taani hinttenttoo oday. Taani giyaawaa hintte pirddite." 
1Corinthians10:16 Nuuni S'oossaa galatiide shaakkiyaa anjjuwaa s'uu'ay Kiristtoosa suutsaanna ittippetetsay de'iyaawaa gidennee? K'ay nuuni mentsiyaa ukitsay Kiristtoosa ashuwaana ittippetetsay de'iyaawaa gidennee? 
1Corinthians10:17 Itti ukitsay de'iyaa diraw, nuuni c'ora gidooppekka, itti asatetsaa. Ayaw gooppe, nuuni ubbaykka he itti ukitsaa shaaketteetto." 
1Corinthians10:18 Israa'eeliyaa asaa s'eellite. Yarshshuwaa miyaawanttu yarshshiyaasaanna ittippetetsay de'iyaawantta gidikkinoo? 
1Corinthians10:19 Simmi taani waagaytaa? Eek'aw yarshshetteedda k'umay maaddii woy eek'ay maaddii? 
1Corinthians10:20 Maaddenna; shin taani giyaawe S'oossaa ammanenna asatuu iita ayyaanatoo yarshshiyaawaappe attin, S'oossaw yarshshikkino. Iita ayyaanatuwaana hintte ittippe zuppetana mala, taani koyyikke." 
1Corinthians10:21 Godaa s'uu'aappe ushiidde k'ay iita ayyaanatuwaa s'uu'aappe ushanaw hintte danddaykkita. Godaa gaytaappe hintte gishettiidde k'ay iita ayyaanatuwaa gaytaappe maanaw danddaykkita. 
1Corinthians10:22 Hewaa ootsiide nuuni Godaanna s'iinottanaw koshshii? Nuuni aappe minneettoo? 
1Corinthians10:23 Hintteppe ittuu ittuu, «Ubbabaa ootsanaw taana diggiyaabay baawa»; shin ubbabay maaddenna. «Ubbabaa ootsanaw diggiyaabay baawa; shin ubbabay geeshshenna» yaagiino." 
1Corinthians10:24 Ooninne hara asaa maaddiyaabaa k'oppooppe attin, haray atto ittuunne barena maaddiyaabaa k'oppoppo." 
1Corinthians10:25 Geyaan as'aare taraan zalettiyaa ashuwaa hintte wozanaa k'ofaan, ayinne sid'ennaan miite." 
1Corinthians10:26 Ayaw gooppe, alamiinne aan de'iyaabay ubbay Godaabaa." 
1Corinthians10:27 Itti ammanenna Asay hinttentta imatsa ootsi shoobbanaw s'eesina baanaw koyyooppe, hintte wozanaa k'ofaan, ayinne sid'ennaan hintte sintsa I aatsiyaabaa ubbaa miite." 
1Corinthians10:28 Shin itti uray hinttenttoo, «Hawe eek'aw yarshsheeddawaa» gooppe, he hinttenttoo odeedda bitaniyaa dirawunne k'ay hintte wozanaa k'ofaa diraw, he k'umaa mooppite." 
1Corinthians10:29 Taani giyaawe ne wozanaa k'ofaa diraassa gidenna; shin yekko bitaniyaa wozanaa k'ofaa diraassa. Taani ta hananaw danddayiyaa ta hanotaa hara asaa wozanay ayaw pirddii? 
1Corinthians10:30 Taani S'oossaa galataade k'umaa mooppe, S'oossaa galataade meedda k'umaw ayaw borettaytaa?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Simmi hintte ayaanne mooppe, woy ayaanne ushooppe, woy hintte ayaanne ootsooppe, ubbabaa S'oossaa bonchchoo ootsite." 
1Corinthians10:32 Hinttenttu Ayihuda asatoo woy Giriike asatoo woy S'oossaa ammaniyaawanttoo d'ubo gidoppite. 
1Corinthians10:33 Taani k'ay c'oratuu attana mala, unttunttu ubbaa maaddanaadaanippe attin, ta huup'ew maaduwaa koyyennaan, asaa ubbaa ubbabaan nashechchiyaawaadan, hinttenttukka hewaada ootsite." 
1Corinthians11:1 Taani Kiristtoosa leemisuwaa kaalliyaawaadan, hinttenttukka tawaa kaallite." 
1Corinthians11:2 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hintte ubbabaan taana hassayiyaa dirawunne, wogaa taani hinttenttoo immeeddawaadan, hintte minisiide naagiyaa diraw, hinttentta galatay." 
1Corinthians11:3 Shin Kiristtoosi attumawaa ubbaw huup'e gidiyaawaa, attuma Asay mac'c'a asaw huup'e gidiyaawaanne k'ay S'oossay Kiristtoosaw huup'e gidiyaawaa hintte erana mala koyyay." 
1Corinthians11:4 S'oossaa woossiidde, woy timbbitiyaa odiidde, bare huup'iyaa gooziyaa attuma Asay ubbay Kiristtoosa toochchee." 
1Corinthians11:5 K'ay S'oossaa woossaade woy timbbitiyaa odaadde, bare huup'iyaa goozenna mac'c'awunna bare asinaa toochchaw; ayaw gooppe, iza bare huup'iyaa meedetta diggooninna itti mala." 
1Corinthians11:6 Mac'c'awunna bare huup'iyaa goozana d'ayooppe, k'ans's'issu. Shin iza bare huup'iyaa k'ans's'issanawe woy meedissanawe pokkooppe, bare huup'iyaa goozu." 
1Corinthians11:7 Attumawe S'oossaa leemisuwaanne bonchchuwaa gidiyaa diraw, bare huup'iyaa goozanaw bessena; shin mac'c'awunna attumawoo bonchcho." 
1Corinthians11:8 Ayaw gooppe, mac'c'awunna attumawaappe beettaadduppe attin, attumawe mac'c'awunippe beettibeenna." 
1Corinthians11:9 Ayaw gooppe, mac'c'awunna attumawaa diraw med'ettaadduppe attin, attumawe mac'c'awuni diraw med'ettibeenna." 
1Corinthians11:10 Hewaa diraw, mac'c'awunna bare asinaa ayissuwaappe garssanna de'iyaawaa erissanawunne kiitanchchatuwaa diraw, izi huup'iyaan gooziyaabay de'anaw bessee." 
1Corinthians11:11 Shin Godaan mac'c'awunna attumawe baynnaan de'ukku; attumawekka mac'c'awunna baynnaan de'enna. 
1Corinthians11:12 Ayaw gooppe, mac'c'awunna attumawaappe med'etteeddawaadan, k'ay attumawekka mac'c'awunippe yeletteedda. K'ay ubbabaykka S'oossaappe yee." 
1Corinthians11:13 Hinttenttu hintte huup'ew pirddite. Mac'c'awunna bare huup'iyaa goozennaan S'oossaa woossanaw bessii? 
1Corinthians11:14 Attumawe bare huup'iyaa dichchooppe, aw pokko. Shin mac'c'awunna bare huup'iyaa dichchooppe, iziw bonchcho gidiyaawaa haray atto, med'etenttonne hinttentta tamaarissennee? Ayaw gooppe, mac'c'awuni huup'ii izo kammanaw iziw imetteedda." 
1Corinthians11:15  
1Corinthians11:16 Shin ooninne ha yewuwaan palumettanaw koyyooppe, nuw gidina woy S'oossaa ammaniyaawanttoo gidinakka, hawaappe hara wogay baawa." 
1Corinthians11:17 Hintte shiik'iyaawe iitabaassappe attin, lo""obaassa gidenna diraw, taani ha azazuwaa immaadde hinttentta galatikke." 
1Corinthians11:18 Shin hintte woosa gollen shiik'iyaa wode, hintte giddon p'alk'k'etsay de'iyaawaa taani sisay. K'ay hewe itti baggana tuma gidiyaawaa ammanay." 
1Corinthians11:19 Ayaw gooppe, hintte matan ammanetteedawanttu k'onc'c'i erettana mala, hintte giddonkka k'ay shaakuu de'anaw bessee." 
1Corinthians11:20 Hewaa diraw, hintte ittippe shiik'iyaa wode, hintte shiik'uu Godaa kawuwaa maanaassa gidenna." 
1Corinthians11:21 Ayaw gooppe, hintte k'umaa miyaa wode, ubbay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan barewaa barewaa miyaa diraw, ittuu koshattee; ittuu k'ay matsottee." 
1Corinthians11:22 Maanawunne ushanaw hinttenttoo gollii baawee? Woy S'oossaa woosa golliyaa kad'iitee? K'ay ayinne baynnawantta yeellayiitee? Taani hinttentta waagoo? Ha yewuwaan taani hinttentta galatoo? Galatikke. 
1Corinthians11:23 Ayaw gooppe, taani k'ay hinttenttoo immeedda timirttiyaa Godaappe akkaad. Godaa Yesuusi unttunttu Aa aatsiide immeedda k'amma daabbuwaa akkiide," 
1Corinthians11:24 S'oossaa galateedda; daabbuwaa mentsiide, «Heytte; miite. Hawe hintte gishshataw barena immeedda ta ashuwaa. Hawaan taana k'oppite» yaageedda." 
1Corinthians11:25 Hawaadankka, kawuwaa miide simmina, s'uu'aa k'ay akkiide, «Hawe s'uu'ay ta suutsaan taani c'aak'k'eedda ooratsa c'aak'uwaa. Hinttenttu aappe usheedda wode ubbaan hewaan taana k'oppite» yaageedda." 
1Corinthians11:26 Ayaw gooppe, hintte ha daabbuwaa meedda wode ubbaaninne ha s'uu'aappe usheedda wode ubbaan Goday yaana gakkanawukka, Aa hayk'uwaa odiita." 
1Corinthians11:27 Hewaa diraw, bessenaan de'iidde Godaa daabbuwaa miyaawe, woy Godaa s'uu'aappe ushiyaawe ooninne Aa ashuwaanne Aa suutsaa ac'otee." 
1Corinthians11:28 Shin Asay bare huup'iyaa paac'c'o. Yaatiide daabbuwaa mo. S'uu'aappekka usho. 
1Corinthians11:29 Ayaw gooppe, Godaa ashuwaa shaakkiide erennaan daabbuwaa miyaawenne s'uu'aappekka ushiyaawe bare huup'ewaa pirddaa meennee ushee." 
1Corinthians11:30 Hewaa diraw, hintte giddon c'oratuu daaburanchchanne hargganchcha gideeddino; k'ay unddenneeddawanttu hayk'k'eeddino." 
1Corinthians11:31 Shin nuuni nu huup'iyaa tumu paac'c'eeddentto, S'oossay nuuna pirddenna." 
1Corinthians11:32 Nuuni pirddettiyaa wode, ha alamiyaanna ittippe pirddettenna mala, Goday nuuna seeree." 
1Corinthians11:33 Hewaa diraw, taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, Godaa kawuwaa maanaw hintte shiik'iyaa wode, ittuu ittuwaa naagite." 
1Corinthians11:34 Ooninne koshatteeddawaa gidooppe, ittippe shiik'iyaa wode S'oossaa pirddan hintte gelenna mala, bare soyin mo. Atteeddawaa taani yaa baade giigissana." 
1Corinthians12:1 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, Geeshsha Ayaanaa imotaabaa hintte eranaw koyyay." 
1Corinthians12:2 Hinttenttu S'oossaa ammanenna wode, ubbaa wode kaalliyaawaadankka, haasayenna eek'atuwaakko hintte beeddawaa eriita." 
1Corinthians12:3 Hewaa diraw, S'oossaa Ayyaanay kaaletsiyaa Asay ooninne, «Yesuusi shek'etto» yaagiide haasayennawaanne k'ay Geeshsha Ayyaanay kaaletsooppeppe attin, haray atto itti asaynne, «Yesuusi Godaa» gaanaw danddayennawaa taani hinttentta erissay." 
1Corinthians12:4 Ayaanaa imotay dumma dumma; shin immiyaa Ayyaanay ittuwaa. 
1Corinthians12:5 K'ay ootsiyaa oosuu dumma dumma; shin Goday ittuwaa. 
1Corinthians12:6 Oosuwaa ootsanaw dumma dumma ogii de'ishshin, he ootsiyaa ogiyaa ubbaa asaa ubbaw k'onc'c'issiyaa S'oossay ittuwaa." 
1Corinthians12:7 Shin asaa ubbaa maaddanaw, Geeshsha Ayaanaa k'onc'c'issiyaa wolk'k'ay ubbaw huup'iyaan huup'iyaan imetteedda." 
1Corinthians12:8 Ayaw gooppe, Geeshsha Ayyaanay ittoo aad'o eratetsaa haasayaa immeedda; k'ay ittoo eratetsaa haasayaa immeedda." 
1Corinthians12:9 He Geeshsha Ayyaanay ittoo ammanuwaa immiide, yekkoo hargganchchaa patsiyaa wolk'k'aa immeedda." 
1Corinthians12:10 Geeshsha Ayyaanay ittoo malaataa ootsiyaa wolk'k'aa immiide, ittoo timbbitiyaa odiyaa wolk'k'aa immeedda. Ittoo ayyaanatuwaa gidduwaan de'iyaa dummatetsaa eriyaa wolk'k'aa immiide, ittoo dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaa wolk'k'aa immeedda. K'ay ittoo dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayeeddawaa billiyaa wolk'k'aa immeedda" 
1Corinthians12:11 Shin ha ubbabaa ootsiyaawe he itti Geeshsha Ayaanaa. Asaa ubbaw I bare koyyiyaawaadan, dumma dumma imotaa shaakki shaakkiide immeedda." 
1Corinthians12:12 Kiristtoosi c'ora asatetsatuu de'iyaa itti bollaa mala. Bollay c'ora asatetsatuwaappe med'etteeddawaa gidooppekka, itti bollaa." 
1Corinthians12:13 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni Ayihuda asaa gidooppenne woy Giriike asaa gidooppe, woy ayile gidooppenne woy womaanno gidooppe, ubbay itti Geeshsha Ayyaanaan itti bollaa gidanaw s'ammak'etteeddo. K'ay nuuni ubbay itti Geeshsha Ayaanaa usheeddo." 
1Corinthians12:14 Ayaw gooppe, bollaw asatetsay c'ora gidiyaawaappe attin, ittuwaa gidenna." 
1Corinthians12:15 Gedii, «Taani kushiyaa gidenna diraw, bollaa k'ommo gidikke» gooppe, I hewaa giyaawe bollaa k'ommo gidiyaawaa digganee?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Haytsaykka, «Taani ayfiyaa gidenna diraw, bollaa k'ommo gidikke» gooppe, I hewaa giyaawe bollaa k'ommo gidiyaawaa digganee?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Bollay ubbay ayfiyaa s'alalaa gidintto, wootiide sisanaw danddayii? K'ay bollay ubbay haytsaa s'alalaa gidintto, wootiide singganaw danddayii?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Shin S'oossay bare koyyeeddawaadan, bollaa asatetsatuwaa ittuwaa ittuwaa bollan wotseedda." 
1Corinthians12:19 Ubbay itti k'ommo gidintto, bollay hak'an de'anee?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Shin asatetsatuu c'ora gidooppekka, bollay ittuwaa." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ayifii kushiyaa, «Neeni taana koshshakka» gaanaw danddayenna. Woy k'ay huup'ii gedatuwaa, «Hinttenttu taana koshshikkita» gaanaw danddayenna." 
1Corinthians12:22 Shin laafa malatiyaa bollaa asatetsatuu loytsi koshshiyaawantta. 
1Corinthians12:23 Bollaa asatetsatuwaappe bonchchettennawantta nuw malatiyaawantta nuuni loytsi bonchcheetto. K'ay nuuna yeellayiyaa bollaa asatetsatuwaakka loytsi bonchcheetto. 
1Corinthians12:24 Nu bollaappe beettiyaa baggaw mayuu koshshenna; shin pokkiyaa bagga asatetsatuwaa loytsi mayzzanaadan, S'oossay asatetsaa ittippe gatseedda." 
1Corinthians12:25 Bollaa asatetsatuu ittuu ittoo itti mala k'ofaa k'oppanaappe attin, bollaan dummatetsay de'anaw bessena." 
1Corinthians12:26 Bollaa asatetsatuwaappe ittuu seelettooppe, bollaa asatetsatuu ubbaykka aanana seelettiino; bollaa asatetsatuwaappe ittuu bonchchettooppe, bollaa asatetsatuu ubbay aanana nashettiino." 
1Corinthians12:27 Hinttenttu ubbay Kiristtoosa bollaa; k'ay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan hintte ubbaykka Aa bollaa asatetsatuwaa. 
1Corinthians12:28 S'oossay woosa gollen itti itti asatuwaa, koyruwaan Yesuusi kiitteeddawantta, laa'entsuwaan nabatuwaa, heezzentsuwaan tamaarissiyaawantta, hewaappe guyyiyaan, malaataa ootsiyaawantta, hewaappe guyyiyaan, patsiyaa wolk'k'ay de'iyaawantta, maaddiyaawantta, woosa golliyaa ayissiyaawantta dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaawantta ootseedda." 
1Corinthians12:29 Ubbatuu Yesuusi kiitteeddawanttee? Ubbatuu nabatee? Ubbatuu tamaarissiyaawanttee? Ubbatuu malaataa ootsiinoo? 
1Corinthians12:30 Ubbaw patsiyaa wolk'k'ay de'ii? Ubbatuu dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiinoo? K'ay dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayeeddawaa ubbatuu billiinoo? 
1Corinthians12:31 Shin ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa imotaa loytsi koyyite. K'ay ubbaappe loytsi aad'd'iyaa ogiyaa taani hinttentta bessana. 
1Corinthians13:1 Taani asaa k'aalaaninne kiitanchchaa k'aalaan haasayooppekka taw siik'uu d'ayooppe, ta haasayay c'oo waassiyaa dawalaa mala; woy k'olc'c'akattiyaa s'inaas'iliyaa mala." 
1Corinthians13:2 Nabetetsaa imotay taw de'ooppekka, taani geemmeedda yewuwaa ubbaanne eratetsaa ubbaa erinttokka, k'ay deriyaa dentsi diggiyaa ammanuu taw de'ooppekka, siik'uu d'ayooppe, taani ayaanne gidikke." 
1Corinthians13:3 Taw de'iyaawaa ubbaa hiyyeesatuwaa mizanaw imminttokka haray atto, ta bollaa tamaan guuddanaw aatsa imminttokka siik'uu d'ayooppe, taana ayinne maaddenna." 
1Corinthians13:4 Siik'uu danddayanchchaa. Siik'uu keekee. Siik'uu k'anaatenna. C'eek'ettenna; k'ay otorettenna. 
1Corinthians13:5 Siik'uu barew bessenawaa ootsenna; Uuzeetenna; Yilotenna; Siik'uu naak'etteeddawaakka paydenna. 
1Corinthians13:6 Siik'uu tumatetsaan nashettiyaawaappe attin, wordduwaan nashettenna." 
1Corinthians13:7 Siik'uu ubbabaa danddayee. Ubbabaykka hananawaa giide, nashechchaan naagee. Ubbabaan genc'c'ee." 
1Corinthians13:8 Siik'uu mulekka d'ayenna. Shin nabetetsaykka attana. Dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaawekka attana. Eratetsaykka d'ayana. 
1Corinthians13:9 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni eratetsaappe pac'aa ereetto; timbbitiyaappekka pac'aa odeetto." 
1Corinthians13:10 Shin kumentsaa gideeddawe yiyaa wode, pac'ay d'ayana." 
1Corinthians13:11 Taani na'atetsaan de'iyaa wode, na'aadan haasayay. Na'aadan k'oppay. K'ay na'aadankka akeekay. Wodalla gideedda wode, na'atetsaa hanuwaa aggaad." 
1Corinthians13:12 Nuuni hai be'iyaawe masttootiyan be'iyaa lemi lemiyaa malaa mala; shin he wode nuuni nu ayfiyaan k'onc'c'iyaan be'ana. Hai taani eratetsaappe pac'aa eray; shin S'oossay taana wurssiide eriyaawaadan, he wode taanikka wurssa erana." 
1Corinthians13:13 Shin hewaa gidooppe, ammanuu, hananawaa giide nashechchaan naagiyaawenne siik'uu, hawanttu heezzatuu minniide de'iino. Hawanttuppe aad'd'iyaawe siik'uwaa." 
1Corinthians14:1 Siik'uwaa kaallite. Ayaanaa imotaakka loytsi koyyite. Shin ubbaappe aatsiide, nabetetsaa koyyite." 
1Corinthians14:2 Ayaw gooppe, dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaa uray S'oossaw haasayeeppe attin, asaw haasayenna. Ayaw gooppe, I haasayiyaawaa ooninne akeekena. Shin asaw k'onc'c'ibeenna yewuwaa Ayaanaa wolk'k'aan haasayee." 
1Corinthians14:3 Shin nabii asaa maaddanaw, zoranawunne minisanaw asaw haasayee." 
1Corinthians14:4 Dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaa uray barena maaddee. Shin nabii woosa golliyaa maaddee. 
1Corinthians14:5 Hinttenttu ubbay dumma dumma k'aalaan hasayaanawaa taani dosay. Shin nabetetsaa hewaappe aatsaade dosay. Ayaw gooppe, dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaawe he haasayeeddawaa woosa golliyaa maaddanaw billiyaa Asay d'ayooppe, dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaawaappe nabetetsay aad'd'ee." 
1Corinthians14:6 Shin taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, ha""i taani hinttenttukko baade, dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayaadde, sas'aan woy eratetsaan woy nabetetsaan woy tamaarissiyaawaan hinttenttoo odana d'ayooppe, taani hinttentta ayaa maaddaytaa?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Haray atto, shemppuu baynnabay suusulliyaa gidina woy diitsaa gidina kaa'iidde, bare kaassaa dummatetsaa erissana d'ayooppe, suusulliyaa punnooppenne, woy diitsaa diis's'ooppe, Asay wootiide eranee?" 
1Corinthians14:8 K'ay s'urumbbaa waasuu loytsi erettana d'ayooppe, olaw oonee giigettanawee?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Hawaadankka, k'ay dumma dumma k'aalaan hintte haasaayiyaawe k'onc'c'e gidennaan d'ayooppe, hintte haasayiyaawaa Asay wooti akeekanee? Ayaw gooppe, c'arkkoo hintte haasayiita." 
1Corinthians14:10 Ha alamiyaan c'ora k'aalay de'ee; shin biletsay baynna k'aalay ittuunne baawa. 
1Corinthians14:11 Shin itti Asay haasayiyaa k'aalaa taani erana d'ayooppe, he haasayiyaawe taw imatsaa gidee; taanikka aw imatsaa giday." 
1Corinthians14:12 Hawaadankka, k'ay Geeshsha Ayaanaa imotaa hintte akkanaw loytsi koyyiyaawantta gidiyaa diraw, woosa golliyaa dichchanaw maaddawaa ubbabaappe aatsiide koyyite." 
1Corinthians14:13 Hewaa diraw, dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaawe bare haasayeeddawaa billanaw danddayana mala, S'oossaa woosso." 
1Corinthians14:14 Ayaw gooppe, taani dumma dumma k'aalaan S'oossaa woossooppe, ta ayyaanaykka woossee; shin ta garssa k'ofay ayinne go""ettenna." 
1Corinthians14:15 Yaatina, taani wootoo? Taani ta ayyaanan S'oossaa woosana; k'ay ta k'ofankka S'oossaa woosana. Ta ayyaanan yes's'ana; k'ay ta k'ofankka yes's'ana." 
1Corinthians14:16 Hewaa gidana d'ayooppe, neeni ne ayaanaa s'alalaan S'oossaa galatiyaawaa gidooppe, he sa'aan neeni giyaawaa erenna Asay neeni S'oossaa galatiyaawaa erennaan, neeni galateeddawaan wootiide, «Amen""i» gaanee?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Neeni S'oossaa galatiyaawe loa; shin hewe yekko bitaniyaa maaddenna. 
1Corinthians14:18 Taani dumma dumma k'aalaan hintte ubbaappe aatsaade haasayiyaa diraw, S'oossaa galatay." 
1Corinthians14:19 Shin taani woosa gollen haratuwaa tamaarissanaw dumma dumma k'aalaan tammu shaa k'aalatuwaa haasayiyaawaappe ichcheshu k'aalatuwaa ta wozanaa k'ofaan haasayanaw dosay. 
1Corinthians14:20 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hintte iita yewuwaan guutsa naanaa mala gidanaappe attin, k'ofaan guutsa naanaa mala gidoppite; hintte garssa k'ofaan wozanaamatuwaa gidite." 
1Corinthians14:21 S'oossaa Mas'aafan, «Goday, ‹Taani ha asaw, dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaa asaaninne, imatsatuwaa doonaan haasayana. Shin hewankka, taani giyaawaa unttunttu sisikkino› yaagee» geetettiide s'aafetteedda." 
1Corinthians14:22 Simmi dumma dumma k'aalaan haasaayiyaawe ammanennawanttoo malaataa gidiyaawaappe attin, ammaniyaawanttoo malaataa gidenna. K'ay nabatuwaappe haasayettiyaawe ammaniyaawanttoo malaataa gidiyaawaappe attin, ammanennawanttoo malaataa gidenna." 
1Corinthians14:23 Hewaa diraw, ammaniyaa Asay ubbay ittippe shiik'iide, k'ay ubbaykka dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayooppe, tamaaribeenna Asay woy ammanenna Asay geliide, hinttentta ubbaa, «Gooyiita» geennee?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Shin tamaaribeenna Asay woy ammanenna Asay woosa golle geliyaa wode, Asay ubbay timbbitiyaa odooppe, I bare sisiyaawaan bare nagaraa akeekee. K'ay he siseeddabaa ubbankka I pirddettana." 
1Corinthians14:25 Aa wozanaan geemmeedda k'ofaykka k'onc'c'ana. Hawaadankka k'ay, «S'oossay tumu hintte giddon de'ee» yaagiide markkattiidde, guufanniide S'oossaw goyinnana." 
1Corinthians14:26 Simmi taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, ayee? Hinttenttu ittippe shiik'iyaa wode, huup'iyaan huup'iyaan, ittoo mazimurii de'ee; ittoo tamaarissiyaawe de'ee; ittoo sas'ay de'ee; k'ay ittoo dumma dumma k'aalaan haasaayiyaawe de'ee; ittoo billiyaawe de'ee. Ubbaykka woosa golliyaa maaddiyaawaa gidanaw bessee." 
1Corinthians14:27 Ooninne dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayooppe, laa""u gidiide, woy darooppe heezzu gidiide, kaallaan kaallaan haasayanaw bessee. K'ay hara ittuu unttunttu haasayeeddawaa billo." 
1Corinthians14:28 Shin billiyaa Asay d'ayooppe, dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaawe woosa golliyaan c'o""u go. Bare huup'ewunne S'oossaw haasayo." 
1Corinthians14:29 Nabatuukka laau gidiide woy heezzu gidiide haasayino. K'ay haranttu unttunttu giyaawaa shaakkino. 
1Corinthians14:30 Shin S'oossay he sa'aan utteedda haraw ittibaa k'onc'c'issooppe, kasenna haasayiyaawe c'o""u go." 
1Corinthians14:31 Ayaw gooppe, ubbay tamaarana malanne ubbay minnana mala, kaallaan kaallaan timbbitiyaa odanaw danddayiita." 
1Corinthians14:32 Timbbitiyaa odiyaawanttu imotay unttunttoo azazettee. 
1Corinthians14:33 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay sarotetsaa S'oossaappe attin, c'abbuwaa S'oossaa gidenna. Geeshshatuu woosa golletuwaa ubbaan," 
1Corinthians14:34 mac'c'awanttu shiik'uwaa garssan c'ou giino. Ayaw gooppe, Ayihudatuwaa higgii giyaawaadankka unttunttu moodettanaappe attin, shiik'uwaa garssan haasayanaw unttunttoo maati baawa." 
1Corinthians14:35 Mac'c'awanttu shiik'uwaa garssan haasaayiyaawe pokko gidiyaa diraw, ayentto eranaw koyyooppenne soyin barenttu asinaa oochchino." 
1Corinthians14:36 S'oossaa k'aalay koyro hintteppe yeeddee? Woy hintte s'alalaakko yeeddee? 
1Corinthians14:37 Ooninne barena nabiyaa woy S'oossaa Ayyaanay de'iyaa asaa yaagiide k'oppooppe, taani hinttenttoo s'aafiyaawe Godaa azazuwaa gidiyaawaa akeeko." 
1Corinthians14:38 Shin ooninne akeekana d'ayooppe, akeekoppo bashi aggo." 
1Corinthians14:39 Hewaa diraw, taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, timbbitiyaa odanaw loytsi amottite. K'ay dumma dumma k'aalaan haasayiyaawaakka diggoppite." 
1Corinthians14:40 Shin ubbabaykka wogaaninne maaran hano. 
1Corinthians15:1 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani hinttenttoo odeedda mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa hintte akkeeddawaanne k'ay hintte ammanuu aan ek'k'eeddawaa hinttentta k'ofetsay." 
1Corinthians15:2 Hinttenttu ammanuu mela gidana d'ayooppe, k'ay taani hinttenttoo odeedda k'aalaa loytsi oyk'k'ooppe, hintte he mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaan atteeddita." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ayaw gooppe, taani k'ay akkeeddawaa ubbabaappe aad'd'iide koshshiyaawaa kasetaade hinttenttoo immaaddi. Hewe ayee gooppe, S'oossaa mas'aafay giyaawaadan, Kiristtoosi nu nagaraa diraw" 
1Corinthians15:4 hayk'k'iide moogetteedda. S'oossaa Mas'aafay giyaawaadankka, heezzentsiyaa gallassi hayk'uwaappe" 
1Corinthians15:5 denddiide, P'es'iroosaw k'onc'c'eedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, bare kiitteedda tammanne laa""atoo k'onc'c'eedda." 
1Corinthians15:6 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, ichcheshu s'eetuwaappe dariyaa barena kaalliyaa asaw itti kaala k'onc'c'eedda. Unttunttuppe dariyaa baggay hanno gakkanaassikka pas'a de'iino; shin amareedawanttu hayk'k'eeddino." 
1Corinthians15:7 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Yaak'oobaw k'onc'c'eedda; guyyeppe bare kiitteedda ubbatoo k'onc'c'eedda." 
1Corinthians15:8 K'ay ubbaappe wurssetsaan, wodii gakkennaan yeletteedda tawukka k'onc'c'eedda." 
1Corinthians15:9 Ayaw gooppe, Yesuusi kiitteedda ubbaappe taani laafa; taani S'oossaa woosa golliyaa waayisseedda diraw, Yesuusi kiitteeddawaa geetettaade s'eesettanawukka bessikke." 
1Corinthians15:10 Shin S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaan taani taanakka. K'ay taw I immeedda aad'd'o keekatetsay mela gidibeenna; shin taani unttuntta ubbaappe aatsaade ootsaad. Shin taananna de'iyaa S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay ootseeddappe attin, taana gidikke." 
1Corinthians15:11 Simmi taana gidooppekka, woy unttuntta gidooppekka, nuuni ubbay odiyaawe hawaa; hinttenttukka hawaa ammaneeddita." 
1Corinthians15:12 Kiristtoosi hayk'uwaappe denddeeddawaa odiyaawaa gidooppe, hinttenttuppe itti itti asatuu yaatina wootiide, «Hayk'k'eedda Asay hayk'uwaappe denddenna» yaagiinoo?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Hayk'k'eedda uray hayk'uwaappe denddibeennawaa gidooppe, yaatina hekko Kiristtoosikka hayk'uwaappe denddibeenna giyaawaa." 
1Corinthians15:14 Kiristtoosi hayk'uwaappe denddibeennawaa gidooppe, yaatina nuuni odiyaawekka mela; k'ay hintte ammanuukka mela." 
1Corinthians15:15 K'ay nuuni, «Kiristtoosa hayk'uwaappe dentseedda» yaagiide S'oossaabaa markkatteedda diraw, Aa worddo markkatuwaa gidiide beetteeddo. Shin hayk'k'eeddawantta hayk'uwaappe I dentsibeennawaa gidooppe, Kiristtoosakka dentsibeenna." 
1Corinthians15:16 Ayaw gooppe, hayk'k'eeddawanttu hayk'uwaappe denddennawaa gidooppe, simmi Kiristtoosikka denddibeenna." 
1Corinthians15:17 Kiristtoosi hayk'uwaappe denddibeennawaa gidooppe, hintte ammanuukka mela; k'ay hintte hawaa gakkanawukka nagaraanna de'iita." 
1Corinthians15:18 Simmi Kiristtoosa ammaniide hayk'k'eeddawanttukka k'ay d'ayeeddino giyaawaa. 
1Corinthians15:19 Nuuni ha de'uwaa s'alalaw Kiristtoosan hidooteedda gidooppe, ha alamiyaan de'iyaa asaa ubbaappekka nubay lo""enna." 
1Corinthians15:20 Shin Kiristtoosi hayk'k'eeddawanttu denddoo bayira gidiide, hayk'uwaappe denddeeddawe tuma." 
1Corinthians15:21 Ayaw gooppe, hayk'uu itti asaa baggana ha alamiyaa yeedda, hayk'k'eeddawanttu dendduukka k'ay itti asaa baggana yeedda." 
1Corinthians15:22 Ayaw gooppe, Asay ubbay Addaamana ittippetetsaa med'd'eedda diraw hayk'k'eeddawaadan, Kiristtoosanna ittippetetsaa med'd'eedda diraw, ubbay de'oo denddana." 
1Corinthians15:23 Shin ubbaykka bare kaallaan kaallaan denddana. Kiristtoosi ubbaappe kasetiide denddeedda; hewaappe guyyiyaan, Kiristtoosawanttu Kiristtoosi yiyaa wode denddana." 
1Corinthians15:24 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Kiristtoosi maataa ubbaa, godatetsaa ubbaanne wolk'k'aa ubbaa d'ayissiide, S'oossaw bare Aabboo kawutetsaa immiyaa wode, wodiyaa wurssetsay yaanawaa." 
1Corinthians15:25 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay Aa morkkatuwaa ubbaa Aa gediyaappe garssanna wotsana gakkanaw, Kiristtoosi mooddanaw bessee." 
1Corinthians15:26 Ubbaappe wurssetsaan d'ayiidde de'iyaa morkkii hayk'uwaa. 
1Corinthians15:27 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «S'oossay ubbabaa Aa gediyaappe garssanna wotsiide moodisseedda» yaagee. Shin ubbabaa Aa gediyaappe garssanna wotsiide moodisseedda giyaa wode, ubbabaa ootseedda S'oossaappe attin, yekko ubbay moodetteedda giyaawe k'onc'c'e." 
1Corinthians15:28 Shin ubbabay Kiristtoosaw moodetteeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Kiristtoosi k'ay bare huup'ew ubbabaa barena moodisseedda S'oossaw moodetana. S'oossay k'ay ubbabaa wurssiide mooddana." 
1Corinthians15:29 Hewaa gidana d'ayooppe, hayk'k'eeddawanttu kotaa s'ammak'ettiyaawanttu ayaa ootsiinoo? Hayk'k'eeddawanttu ubbakka denddennawaa gidooppe, Asay hayk'k'eeddawanttu kotaa ayaw s'ammak'ettii?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Yaatina, nuuni ubbaa wode ayaw hassayenna metuwaan geleettoo?" 
1Corinthians15:31 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani nu Godaa Kiristtoosa Yesuusan taw de'iyaa hinttenan c'eek'ettaadde, gallassaan gallassaan hayk'k'ay." 
1Corinthians15:32 Taani Efesoonen asaa k'ofaadan du'aanna baas'eteeddawe taana ayaa maaddii? Shin hayk'k'eeddawanttu hayk'uwaappe denddennawaa gidooppe, «Simmi moyttenne ushoytte; ayaw gooppe, nuuni wontti hayk'k'ana» giyaawaa mala." 
1Corinthians15:33 C'imettoppite; iita laggetetsay loo hanotaa bayizzee. 
1Corinthians15:34 S'illotetsaakko simmite. Nagaraa ootsoppite. Hinttenttuppe itti itti Asay S'oossaa erenna; taani hawaa hinttentta yeellayanaw gay. 
1Corinthians15:35 Shin itti asay, «Hayk'k'eedda Asay waaniide denddanee? Unttunttu ayaa mala bollaanna yaannee?» yaagennaan aggena." 
1Corinthians15:36 Neenoo eeyaw, neeni gadiyaan zeriyaa zeretsay hayk'k'ennan mokkenna." 
1Corinthians15:37 Neeni zeriyaawe zarggaa gidina woy hara k'ommo katsaa gidina, ayfiyaa s'alalaappe attin, lammi doliide kesiyaawaa gidenna." 
1Corinthians15:38 Shin S'oossay zeretsaw bare doseedda bollaa immee; k'ay zeretsaa ubbawukka huup'iyaan huup'iyaan unttunttu bollaa immee. 
1Corinthians15:39 Med'etaa ubbaa ashuu ittuwaa gidenna. Shin asaa ashuu ittuwaa; mehiyaa ashuu dumma; kafatuwaa ashuukka dumma; k'ay moliyaa ashuukka dumma. 
1Corinthians15:40 K'ay saluwaa asatetsatuunne sa'aa asatetsatuu de'iino. Shin saluwaa bollaa bonchchuu dumma; k'ay sa'aa bollaa bonchchuu dumma. 
1Corinthians15:41 Awayfiyaw Aa huup'e bonchchuu de'ee. Agenawukka Aa huup'e bonchchuu de'ee. K'ay s'oolinttatookka dumma bonchchuu de'ee; ayaw gooppe, itti s'oolinttii yekko s'oolinttiyaappe bonchchuwaan dummatee." 
1Corinthians15:42 K'ay hayk'k'eeddawanttu hayk'uwaappe denddiyaa wode hewaadan hanana; hayk'k'iyaa bollay moogettiide, hayk'k'enna bollaa gidiide denddana." 
1Corinthians15:43 Bollay tooshiyaan moogettiide, bonchchuwaan denddana. K'ay daaburaan moogettiide, wolk'k'aan denddana." 
1Corinthians15:44 Med'etaa bollay moogettiide, Geeshsha Ayyaanan kaalesettiyaa bollaa gidiide denddana. Med'etaa bollay de'ooppe, k'ay Geeshsha Ayyaanaan kaalesettiyaa bollaykka de'ee." 
1Corinthians15:45 Hawaadankka, k'ay S'oossaa Mas'aafan, «Koyro bitanii, Addaami, pas'a de'iyaa asaa gidiide med'etteedda» yaagee. Shin wurssetsaa Addaami de'uwaa immiyaa asaa gideedda." 
1Corinthians15:46 Shin med'etaa Asay koyro yiina, geeddoppe ayaanaa Asay yeeddappe attin, ayyaanaawe koyro yibeenna." 
1Corinthians15:47 Koyro Addaami biittaappe med'etteedda; I biittaappe med'etteeddawaa. Laa'entsuwaa Addaami saluwaappe yeedda. 
1Corinthians15:48 Ha sa'aa asatuu biittaappe med'etteeddawaa malatiino. K'ay saluwaa asatuu saluwaappe yeeddawaa malatiino. 
1Corinthians15:49 Nuuni biittaappe med'etteeddawaa malaa mayyeeddawaadan, saluwaappe yeeddawaa malaakka k'ay mayyana." 
1Corinthians15:50 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani giyaawe hawaa; ashuunne suutsay S'oossaa kawutetsaa laattana danddayenna. K'ay wook'k'iyaawe wook'k'ennawaa laattenna." 
1Corinthians15:51 Sisite! Taani hinttenttoo ittibaa s'uuray. Nuuni ubbay hayk'k'okko. Shin wurssetsaa s'urumbbay punettiyaa wode, lip'eedda ayfii s'eellanaw wozanaa aatsenan laamettana. Ayaw gooppe, s'urumbbay punettiyaa wode, hayk'k'eedda Asay wook'k'enna asaa gidiide denddana; nuunikka laamettana." 
1Corinthians15:52  
1Corinthians15:53 Ayaw gooppe, hawe wook'k'iyaawe wook'k'ennawaa mayyanaw bessee; k'ay hawe hayk'k'iyaawe hayk'k'ennawaa mayyanaw bessee." 
1Corinthians15:54 Shin hawe wook'k'iyaawe wook'k'ennawaa mayiyaa wode, k'ay hawe hayk'k'iyaawe hayk'k'ennawaa mayiyaa wode, he wode, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Hayk'uu s'oonettiide mitetteedda." 
1Corinthians15:55 Hayk'oo, ne yishshay hak'anee? Hayk'oo, ne s'oonuu hak'anee?» geedda k'aalay polettana." 
1Corinthians15:56 Hayk'uu dukkiyaa wolk'k'aa nagaraappe demmee; k'ay nagaray wolk'k'aa higgiyaappe demmee. 
1Corinthians15:57 Shin nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana nuuna s'oonissiyaa S'oossaa galatay gakko. 
1Corinthians15:58 Taani siik'iyaa taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, hewaa diraw, k'aas's'ennaan min ek'k'ite. Hinttenttu daaburay Godaa baggana mela gidennawaa eriide, ubbaa wode Godaa oosuwaa azallenan ootsite." 
1Corinthians16:1 S'oossaa asatoo miishshaa shiishshanaw Galaatiyaan de'iyaa ammaniyaa asatoo taani k'aalaa geleeddawaadan, hinttenttukka k'ay hewaadan ootsite." 
1Corinthians16:2 Hinttenttu taani yaa biyaa wode, miishshaa shiishshenna mala, hintte ubbay Wogaa gallassi gallassi, hintte demmiyaa keenaappe hintte gollen dagayite." 
1Corinthians16:3 Taani yaa gakkiyaa wode, hintte ammaniyaa asaa oona gidooppenne, hintte immeeddawaa gatsana mala, dabddaabbiyaanna unttuntta Yerusaalame kiittana." 
1Corinthians16:4 K'ay taani unttunttunna baanaw koshshooppe, unttunttu taananna ittippe baanawantta." 
1Corinthians16:5 Taani Mak'idooniyaanna aad'd'aadde, hinttenttukko baana; ayaw gooppe, taani Mak'idooniyaanna aad'd'ay." 
1Corinthians16:6 Taani biyaasaa hak'a gidooppenne, ta buussan hintte taana maaddana mala, hintte matan amareeda wodiyaa gam""ennaan aggikke. Woy balgguwaakka hintte matan shaac'c'ennan waayya aggana." 
1Corinthians16:7 Ayaw gooppe, taani ha""i yaanna aad'd'aadde he ogiyaanna hinttentta be'anaw koyyikke. Goday gooppe, hintte matan amareeda wodiyaa takkanaw k'oppay." 
1Corinthians16:8 Shin taani P'ens's'ek'ostte giyaa gallassay gakkanaw Efesoonen gamana. 
1Corinthians16:9 Taw oosuu kumeedda aako penggiikka yaan dooyetteedda. K'ay taw c'ora morkketuu de'iino. 
1Corinthians16:10 S'imootoose hinttenttukko yooppe, hintte matan I yayyenaan de'anaadan, Aa loytsi oyk'k'ite. Ayaw gooppe, ikka k'ay Godaa oosuwaa ootsee." 
1Corinthians16:11 Hewaa diraw, ooninne Aa kad'oppo. Shin I taakko saro simmana mala, Aa maaddiide sarotetsaan moyzzite. Ayaw gooppe, taani I ishatuwaanna simmanawaa naaga uttaad." 
1Corinthians16:12 Shin nu ishaa Ap'iloosi yekko ishatuwaanna hinttenttukko baana mala, taani Aa minisa woossaad. Shin ha""i hinttenttukko baanaw koyyibeenna; I barew miikkiyaa wode hinttenttukko baanawaa." 
1Corinthians16:13 Beegottite. Ammanuwaan min ek'k'ite. S'alite. Goobite. 
1Corinthians16:14 Oosuwaa ubbaa siik'uwaan ootsite. 
1Corinthians16:15 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, Iss's'ifaanoosinne Aa soy Asay Giriiken koyro ammaneeddawantta gidiyaawaanne S'oossaa asatoo ootsanaw barentta immeeddawaa hintte eriita. Hinttenttukka unttunttu mala asawunne, unttunttunna ootsiyaa ubbaw daaburiyaa ubbaw eeno gaanaadan, taani hinttentta woossay." 
1Corinthians16:16  
1Corinthians16:17 Iss's'ifaanoosi, Parddonaas'isinne Akayk'oosi hintte baynnasaan taana boorasissibeenna diraw, unttunttu yuussaan taani nashettay." 
1Corinthians16:18 Unttunttu hinttentta ayyaanan miniseeddawaadan, taanakka ayyaanan miniseedda diraw, hewanttu mala asatuwaa dogoppite." 
1Corinthians16:19 Iisiyaan de'iyaa ammaniyaa Asay hinttentta, «Saree, lo""ee» giino. Ak'iilaynne P'irisk'k'illa barenttu soyin shiik'iyaa woosa golle asaanakka hinttenttoo Godaa sarotaa wozanaappe kiittiino." 
1Corinthians16:20 Ishatuu ubbay hinttenttoo sarotaa kiittiino. Ittuu ittuwaanna geeshsha yeretaa yerettiidde sarotettite. 
1Corinthians16:21 Taani P'awuloosi ha sarotaa ta kushiyan s'aafaad. 
1Corinthians16:22 Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa siik'enna Asay de'ooppe, I shek'etteeddawaa gido. Nu Godaw, haaya." 
1Corinthians16:23 Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenttunna gido. 
1Corinthians16:24 Kiristtoosa Yesuusan de'iyaa hinttenttu ubbaanna ta siik'uu gido. Ameni. 
2Corinthians1:1 Taani P'awuloosi, S'oossaa sheniyaan, Kiristtoosi Yesuusi kiitteeddawenne nu ishay S'imootoosi S'oossaw goyinniyaa K'oronttoosa katamaan de'iyaa ammaniyaawanttoonne Akaayiyaan de'iyaa S'oossaa naanaatoo ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafeetto." 
2Corinthians1:2 S'oossaa nu Aawuwaappenne Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosappe, aad'd'o keekatetsaynne sarotetsay hinttenttoo gido." 
2Corinthians1:3 S'oossaa nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa Aawuwaa, maarotetsaa Aawuwaanne mentsetsuwaa ubbaa S'oossaa galatay gakko;" 
2Corinthians1:4 S'oossay nuuna nu huup'ew mentsetseedda mentsetsuwaadan, daro waayiyaa waayettiyaawantta nuunikka mentsetsanaadan, nu waayiyaa ubbaan I nuuna mentsetsee." 
2Corinthians1:5 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni Kiristtoosa baggana daro waayiyaa waayettiyaawaadan, hewaadankka, k'ay nuuna Aa baggana daro mentsetsuwaan mentsetsee." 
2Corinthians1:6 Nuuni waayettooppe, hewe hinttena mentsetsanaassanne hinttena ashshanaassa; k'ay nuuni minettooppe, nuuni danddayeedda waayiyaa malaa hinttekka genc'c'iide danddayana mala, S'oossay hinttewukka k'ay mentsetsuwaanne danddayaa immanaassa." 
2Corinthians1:7 Hintte demmana giide, hidootaan naagi utteeddawe daro mina; ayaw gooppe, hintte nuunanna waayetteeddawaadan, hewaadan mentsetsuwaakka nuunanna akkanawaa nuuni ereetto." 
2Corinthians1:8 Nu nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nuuni Iisiyaa gadiyaan waayetteedda waayiyaa hinttena hassayissanaw koyyeetto; nu waayyii nu wolk'k'aappe darina, nuuna wod'ee giide, hirggana gakkanaw, nuuna wogay bayinnawaa dees's'eedda." 
2Corinthians1:9 Nuuni nu bolla hayk'uwaa pirdday pirddetteedda yaagiide k'oppeeddo; shin hewe haneeddawe hayk'k'eedda asaa hayk'uwaappe dentsiyaa S'oossaan nuuni ammanettanappe attin, nu huup'iyaan ammanettennaadaana." 
2Corinthians1:10 S'oossay hawaa mala iita hayk'uwaappe nuuna ashsheeda; I nuuna ashshana; sintsappekka I nuuna ashshanawaa giide, hidootaan naagi utteeddo." 
2Corinthians1:11 Hintte woosseedda daro woosan nuw anjjuu simmeedda diraw, daro Asay nu diraw S'oossaa galatana mala, hinttekka k'ay nuuna woosan maaddana koshshee." 
2Corinthians1:12 Nuuni c'eek'ettiyaawe hawaa; ha sa'aan nuuni de'iyaa de'uu, ubbaa k'ay hinttenanna nuw de'iyaa ittippetetsay S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaanappe attin, asaa aad'd'eedda eratetsaanna gidennawaa, k'ay S'oossay immeedda geeshshatetsaaninne suuretetsaan nuuni de'iyaawaa wozanaa k'ofay nuw markkattee." 
2Corinthians1:13 Ayaw gooppe, hintte nabbabanawunne akeekanaw danddayiyaawaa s'alalaa hinttenttoo s'aafiyaawaappe attin, nuuni harabaa hinttenttoo s'aafokko. Nu Godaa Yesuusa gallassi nuuni hinttenan c'eek'ettanawaadan, hinttekka nuunan c'eek'ettana mala, hintte ha""i wurssi akeekena yewuwaa gidini wurssi akeekana gaade k'oppay." 
2Corinthians1:14  
2Corinthians1:15 Hewaa taani loytsa ereedda diraw, hintte laa""u gede go""ettana mala, ubbaappe kasetaade hinttekko baanaw k'ofaa k'achchaad." 
2Corinthians1:16 Taani Mak'idooniyaa baadde hinttenanna gakettanawaanne k'ay yaappe simmaadde hintte mataanna Yihudaa aad'd'ishshin, hintte taana maaddanawaa k'oppa uttaad." 
2Corinthians1:17 Hewaa diraw, taani hewaa k'oppaadde taanan ammanettibeykkita? Taani ta k'ofaa k'achchiyaa wode, sa'aa asaadan itti kutsaan, «Ee, Ee» woy, «Gidenna, gidenna» gaanaw giiga uttaadditaa?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Shin S'oossay ammanetteedawaa gidiyaawe tuma gidiyaawaadan, nuuni hinttenttoo odiyaa k'aalay «Ee» giyaawaanne «Gidenna» giyaawaa gidenna." 
2Corinthians1:19 Ayaw gooppe, taani, Sillaasenne S'imootoosi hintte giddon odeedda S'oossaa Na'ay, Yesuusi Kiristtoosi «Ee» giyaawaappe attin, «Gidenna» giyaawaa gidenna. Shin S'oossaa baggana I ubbaa wodekka «Ee»." 
2Corinthians1:20 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay immana geeddabaw ubbaw eeno geeddawe Kiristtoosa baggana polettana; hewaa diraw, nuuni Kiristtoosa baggana S'oossaa bonchchoo, amen""i geetto." 
2Corinthians1:21 S'oossay Kiristtoosa baggana nuunanne hinttena mentsetseenne okkee. 
2Corinthians1:22 Nuuni aawaa gidiyaawaa erissiyaa maatafaa I nu bolla wotsiide, bare Geeshsha Ayaanaa waasiyaadan, nu wozanaa giddon wotseedda." 
2Corinthians1:23 K'ay taani K'oronttoosa beennaan aggeeddawe hinttena K'ohennaadaana. Hewe worddo gidooppe taana muranaw ta shemppuwaan S'oossay markka. 
2Corinthians1:24 Nuuni hinttena nashechchanaw hinttenanna ittippe ootsiyaawanttappe attin, hintte ammaniyaawaan hinttena godetanaw koyyiyaawantta gidokko; ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu hintte ammanussan minniide de'iita." 
2Corinthians2:1 Taani laa'entsuwaa hinttena kayyoyenna mala, hinttekko beennaadan, ta k'ofaa k'achchaad." 
2Corinthians2:2 Ayaw gooppe, taani hinttena kayyoyiyaawaa gidooppe, ha taani kayyoyeedda hintte taana nashechchanaappe attin, oonee taana nashechchanawe?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Taani hinttenttoo he dabddaabbiyaa s'aafeeddawe, taana nashechchanaw bessiyaa asatuwaan taani kayyottanaw hinttekko baanaw koyabeennawaassa; taani nashettiyaa wode, hintte ubbaykka k'ay nashettanawaa hintte ubbaan ammanettay." 
2Corinthians2:4 Ayaw gooppe, taani hinttenttoo daro waayiyaaninne tuggaan k'ay daro afotsaana s'aafeeddawe, hinttena kayyoyanaassa gidenna; shin taani hinttena ubbatuwaa ay keenaa siik'aytantto hintte eranaadaana." 
2Corinthians2:5 Shin itti uray haraa kayyoyeeddawaa gidooppe, taani Aa yewuwaa darissanaw koyyikke; I hinttena ubbatuwaa kayyoyeeddappe attin, ta s'alalaa kayyoyibeenna." 
2Corinthians2:6 Hintteppe dariyaa bagga Asay he bitaniyaa mala asaa hewaadan murooppe, he muray aw gidanawaa." 
2Corinthians2:7 Hewaa diraw, he bitanii loytsi kayyottenna mala, hintte aw atto gaanawunne Aa mentsetsanaw bessee." 
2Corinthians2:8 Hewaa diraw, hintte Aa minisiide siik'iyaawaa I erana mala, taani hinttena woossay." 
2Corinthians2:9 Ayaw gooppe, hintte taw azazettanaw ubbaa wode giigi utteedditenttonne k'ay paac'iyaa hintte danddayintto eranaw, he dabddaabbiyaa hinttenttoo s'aafaad." 
2Corinthians2:10 Itti uray naak'k'eeddawaa hintte atto giyaa wode, taanikka k'ay atto gay; taani atto geeddawaa gidooppe, atto geeddawaa ayaanne Kiristtoosa sintsan hintte diraw, atto gaad." 
2Corinthians2:11 Sees'aanay nuukko yiide, nuuna c'immenna mala, taani aatto gaad; ayaw gooppe, nuuni Aa k'ofaa ereetto." 
2Corinthians2:12 Taani Kiristtoosa mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odanaw S'iro'aadaa beedda wode, Goday yaan taw penggiyaa dooyyi wotseedda." 
2Corinthians2:13 Taani ta ishaa Tiita yaan demmabeenna diraw, taw ayyaanay shemppibeenna. Hewaa diraw, yaan de'iyaa asaa, «Saro de'ite» gaade Mak'idooniyaa baad." 
2Corinthians2:14 Shin Kiristtoosa baggana ubbaa wode nuuna s'oonoo kaaletsiyaa S'oossaa, k'ay Kiristtoosa timirttiyaa nu baggana shittuwaadan, ubbasaa gatsiyaawaa galatay gakko." 
2Corinthians2:15 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni attiyaa asaa gidduwaaninne d'ayiyaa asaa giddon Kiristtoosi S'oossaw yarshshiyaa sawuwaa toshikku giyaa shittuwaa mala." 
2Corinthians2:16 Nuuni d'ayiyaawanttoo zeeiyaa hayk'uwaa; k'ay attiyaawanttoo de'uwaa immiyaa sawiyaa shittuwaa; yaatina, hewaa ootsanaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Nuuni S'oossaa k'aalaa gelobaadan, walakkiide zal""iyaa hara c'ora asatuwaa mala gidokko; shin S'oossay nuuna kiittina, ammanettiide S'oossaa sintsan Kiristtoosa baggana k'aalaa odeetto." 
2Corinthians3:1 Nuuni shirettiide, nu huup'iyaa sabbanaw doommeeddoyee? Woy hara asatuwaawaadan, sabaa dabddaabbiyaa hinttenttoo yeddanaw woy hintteppe akkanaw koyyeettoo?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Hinttenttu hintte huup'iyaan Asay ubbay eranaadaaninne nabbabanaadan, nu wozanaan s'aafetti utteedda nu dabddaabbiyaa." 
2Corinthians3:3 Ha dabddaabbiyaa Kiristtoosi bare huup'iyaan s'aafiide, nu bolla kiitteeddawe tuma; ha dabddaabbii de'uwaa S'oossaa Geeshsha Ayyaanan asaa wozanaan s'aafetteeddawaappe attin, shuchchaa bolla k'alamiyaan s'aafettibeenna." 
2Corinthians3:4 Nuw Kiristtoosa baggana S'oossaan hawaa mala ammanuu de'ee. 
2Corinthians3:5 Nu danddayay S'oossaappe yiyaawaappe attin, ha oosuwaa nuuni nu huup'iyaan ootsanaw danddayeetto giyaawe nuw ayaynne baawa." 
2Corinthians3:6 Nuuni Ooratsa C'aak'k'oo ootsana mala, S'oossay nuuna danddayisseedda; he Ooratsa C'aak'uu Geeshsha Ayyaanawaappe attin, s'aafetteedda higgiyaawaa gidenna. S'aafetteedda higgii hayk'uwaa ahee; shin Geeshsha Ayyaanay de'uwaa ahee." 
2Corinthians3:7 Shuchchaa wooc'iide s'aafeedda higgii imettiyaa wode, S'oossaa bonchchuu beetteedda; Muse som""iyaan de'iyaa p'ooletsay d'ayiyaawaa gidooppekka, he p'ooletsay daro wolk'k'aama gidiyaa diraw, Israa'eeliyaa Asay Aa som""iyaa tishshi ootsi s'eellanaw danddayibeenna. Hayk'uwaa ahiyaa higgii ootsiyaa oosuu hawaa mala bonchchuwaanna yiyaawaa gidooppe," 
2Corinthians3:8 Geeshsha Ayyaanay ootsiyaa oosuwaa bonchchuu ay keenaa daranee? 
2Corinthians3:9 Ayaw gooppe, Asay pirddaa akkiyaa oosuu bonchcho gidooppe, Asay s'illiyaa oosuwaa bonchchuu waaniide daranddeeshsha?" 
2Corinthians3:10 Ayaw gooppe, kase bonchchuu ha""i bareppe loytsi aad'd'iyaa bonchchuwaa gaasuwaan bonchchuwaa d'ayeeddawe tuma." 
2Corinthians3:11 Ayaw gooppe, he d'ayeeddawan bonchchuu de'iyaawaa gidooppe, med'inaw de'iyaawaan ay keenaa wolk'k'aama bonchchuu de'anddeeshsha?" 
2Corinthians3:12 Nuuni hidootaan naagiyaa hawaa malabay nuw de'iyaa diraw, k'onc'c'iyaan s'aliide haasayeetto." 
2Corinthians3:13 Israa'eeliyaa Asay d'ayiyaa bonchchuwaa wurssetsaa be'enna mala, bare som""iyaa nas'alaan kammeedda Muse mala gidokko." 
2Corinthians3:14 Shin unttunttu wozanay donc'c'illeedda; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu Ec'a C'aak'uwaa nabbabiyaa wode, hachche gakkanawukka, he nas'alay unttunttu wozanaa kammi wotseedda; ooninne Kiristtoosanna gakettiyaa wode s'alalaan he nas'alay kichchee." 
2Corinthians3:15 Shin unttunttu Muse mas'aafaa nabbabiyaa wode ubbaan hachche gakkanawukka, he nas'alay unttunttu wozanaa kammi wotseedda." 
2Corinthians3:16 Shin S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Ooninne Godaakko simmiyaa wode, awudenne he nas'alay k'aarettee» yaagee." 
2Corinthians3:17 Goday Geeshsha Ayaana. Godaa Ayyaanay de'iyaa saan ayiletetsay baawa. 
2Corinthians3:18 Nuuni ubbaykka nas'alaan kamettibeenna somiyaan Godaa bonchchuwaa be'ana k'ay Geeshsha Ayaana gidiyaa Godaappe yiyaa he bonchchuu nuuna barena malatissiide, bonchchuwaappe bonchchoo laammana." 
2Corinthians4:1 Simmi S'oossay nuw ha oosuwaa bare maarotetsaan ootsanaadan immeedda diraw, nuuni salettokko." 
2Corinthians4:2 Nuuni geeman ootsiyaa yeellayiyaa oosuwaa ubbaa aggoytte; k'ay geniyaa oosuwaakka ootsokko; woy S'oossaa k'aalaa wordduwaanna walakkokko. Hewaadankka, tumuwaa k'onc'c'iyaan haasayiide, S'oossaa sintsan suure wozanaw nuuna shiishshoytte." 
2Corinthians4:3 Nuuni odiyaa wonggalaa mishiraachchuu geemmeeddawaa gidooppekka, d'ayiyaa asatuwaa s'alalaw geemmeedda." 
2Corinthians4:4 Ha sa'aa s'oossay ammanenna asatuwaa k'ofaa jollisseedda; Kiristtoosa bonchchuwaa, wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa poo'uwaa barenttoo poo'iyaawaa, S'oossaa malatiyaawaa unttunttu be'enna mala, unttuntta diggeedda." 
2Corinthians4:5 Ayaw gooppe, Yesuusi Kiristtoosi Godaa gidiyaawaanne Aa diraw nuuni nu huup'iyaan hinttenttoo k'ooma gidiyaawaa odettooppe attin, nubaa odokko." 
2Corinthians4:6 Ayaw gooppe, «D'umaappe poo'uu poo'ana» geedda S'oossay nu wozanaan bare poo'uwaa poo'isseedda; k'ay I bare bonchcho eratetsaa poo'uwaa Kiristtoosa sintsan poo'iyaawaa nuw immanaw poo'isseedda." 
2Corinthians4:7 Shin ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa wolk'k'ay S'oossawaappe attin, nuussa gidennawaa bessanaw nuw ha minjjay urk'k'aappe med'etteedda miishshaa gideedda nu giddon de'ee." 
2Corinthians4:8 Nuuni ubbaa bagganakka unetteeddo; shin me'erettibeykko; k'ay itti itti wode sid'eetto; shin nu ubbaannakka aggibeykko. 
2Corinthians4:9 Nuuni yederssetteeddo; shin S'oossay nuuna olibeenna; k'ay nu morkketuu nuuna oli aggeeddino; shin nuuni d'ayibeykko. 
2Corinthians4:10 K'ay Yesuusa de'uu nu asatetsan beettana mala, nuuni ubbaa wode Aa hayk'uwaa nu asatetsan tookki yuuyyeetto." 
2Corinthians4:11 Ayaw gooppe, hayk'k'iyaa nu asatetsaa bolla Yesuusa de'uu beettana mala, pas'a de'iyaa nuuni Aa diraw, ubbaa wode hayk'k'eetto." 
2Corinthians4:12 Hewaa diraw, hayk'uu nu giddon ootsee; shin de'uu k'ay hintte giddon ootsee." 
2Corinthians4:13 S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Taani ammaneedda diraw haasayaaddi» yaagee; he ammanuwaa ayyaanay nuwukka de'iyaa diraw, nuunikka ammaneetto; hewaa diraw, haasayeetto." 
2Corinthians4:14 S'oossay, Godaa Yesuusa hayk'uwaappe dentseeddawe, nuunakka k'ay Yesuusanna hayk'uwaappe dentsiide, hinttenanna ittippe bare sintsa shiishshanawaa ereetto." 
2Corinthians4:15 Hawe ubbay hintte diraassa; S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay daro asaa gakkiyaa wode, Asay S'oossaa bonchchoo daro galataa immana." 
2Corinthians4:16 Hewaa diraw, nuuni salettokko; nuw haray atto, bolla bagga asatetsay wook'k'inttokka, garssa bagga asatetsay gallassan gallassan ooras's'ee." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ayaw gooppe, ha""iw waayettiyaa ha guutsa waayyii, ubbaappe loytsi dariyaa med'inaa bonchchuwaa nuw beetissana." 
2Corinthians4:18 Nuuni beettenawaa s'eelleettoppe attin, beettiyaawaa s'eellokko; ayaw gooppe, beettiyaabay ha""issa; shin beettenawe med'inaw de'iyaawaa." 
2Corinthians5:1 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni de'iyaa ha sa'aa dunkkaanii kolettooppe, nuw Asay kees's'ibeenna gollii, S'oossay kees's'eeddawe, saluwaan med'inaw de'iyaawaa nuuni ereetto." 
2Corinthians5:2 Nuuni ha alamiyaan de'iidde daro ooleettonne saluwaan de'ana nu golliyaa mayyanaw loytsi amotteetto. 
2Corinthians5:3 Nuuni hewaa mayyiide, kallottokko;" 
2Corinthians5:4 nuuni ha sa'aa dunkkaaniyaan de'iidde, dees'ettiide ooleetto; ayaw gooppe, hayk'k'iyaa asatetsay de'uwaan mitettana mala, nuuni mayyanaw koyeettoppe attin, kallottanaw koyyokko." 
2Corinthians5:5 Nuuna hawoo giigisseeddawe S'oossaa; k'ay I bare Geeshsha Ayaanaa waase ootsiide, immeeddawe Aa." 
2Corinthians5:6 Hewaa diraw, nuuni ubbaa wode ammanetteeto; k'ay nuuni nu gollen ha asatetsan de'eedda keenan, Godaappe shaakettiide de'iyaawaakka ereetto." 
2Corinthians5:7 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni ammanuwaan de'eettoppe attin, be'iyaawaan de'okko." 
2Corinthians5:8 Nuuna ammantsee; k'ay ha asatetsan nu golliyaa aggi golle biide Godaanna ittippe de'iyaawe nuuna nashechchee. 
2Corinthians5:9 Hewaa diraw, nuuni k'ay ashuwaan de'ina de'ana d'ayina, nu k'ofay Aa nashechchanaassa." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni huup'iyaan huup'iyaan ootseedda oosuu lo""a gidina, woy iita gidina, nuw bessiyaawaa akkanaw, Kiristtoosa pirddaa oydiyaa sintsan ubbaykka shiik'anaw bessee." 
2Corinthians5:11 Hewaa diraw, nuuni S'oossaw yayyussay ayentto eriide, hewaadan k'ay asaakka ammantseetto; S'oossay nuuna ubbaanna eree; k'ay hinttekka hintte wozanaa k'ofaan nuuna eriita yaagaade k'oppay." 
2Corinthians5:12 Beettiyaaban c'eek'ettiyaawanttuppe attin, wozanaan de'iyaawan c'eek'ettenna asatoo hintte odi zaariyaabay de'ana mala, hintte nuunan c'eek'ettanaadan, nuuni hinttenttoo gaasuwaa gidanaw koyyiyaawaappe attin, nuuna galatanaw koyyokko." 
2Corinthians5:13 Nuuni gooyiyaawaa gidooppe, S'oossaa bonchchuwaassa; woy k'ay wozanaanna de'iyaawaa gidooppekka, hinttena go""anaassa." 
2Corinthians5:14 Kiristtoosa siik'uu nuuna giddee; ayaw gooppe, itti Asay asaa ubbaw hayk'k'eeddawaa nuuni akeekeeddo; hewaa gidooppe Asay ubbay aanana hayk'k'eedda." 
2Corinthians5:15 Pas'a de'iyaawanttu barenttu diraw hayk'k'eeddawoonne k'ay hayk'uwaappe denddeeddawoo de'anaappe attin, sintsappe barenttu huup'ew de'enna mala, I asaa ubbaa diraw hayk'k'eedda." 
2Corinthians5:16 Hewaa diraw, nuuni hawaappe sintsaw oonanne asaa k'ofaan pirddokko; haray atto, nuuni Kiristtoosa kase asaa k'ofaan pirddeeddawaa gidooppekka, simmi sintsappe hewaadan pirddokko." 
2Corinthians5:17 Hewaa diraw, ooninne Kiristtoosanna de'ooppe, ooratsa med'etaa; c'imay aad'd'eedda; be'ite, ubbabaykka ooras's'eedda." 
2Corinthians5:18 Kiristtoosa baggana nuuna barenanna sigetseedda S'oossay ubbabaakka ootseedda; k'ay I nuw haratuwaa barenanna sigetsiyaa oosuwaa immeedda. 
2Corinthians5:19 S'oossay Kiristtoosa baggana asaa ubbaa barenanna sigetsee; asaa nagaraakka asaa bolla paydenna; k'ay asaa barenanna sigetsiyaa kiitaakka nuw immeedda. 
2Corinthians5:20 Simmi S'oossay nu baggana hinttenttoo haasayiyaawaadan, nuunikka Kiristtoosa diraw haasayiyaa I kiitteeddawantta; k'ay nuuni hinttena, «S'oossaanna sigettite» giide, Kiristtoosa diraw woosseetto." 
2Corinthians5:21 Nuuni S'oossaa s'illotetsaa Kiristtoosa baggana akkana mala, nagaraa erenna Kiristtoosa nu diraw, S'oossay nagaranchcha ootseedda." 
2Corinthians6:1 Hintte nuunanna S'oossaa oosuwaa ootsiidde, Aa aad'd'o keekatetsaa akkiide hanenna ogiyaan go""ettenna mala, nuuni hinttena woosseetto." 
2Corinthians6:2 Ayaw gooppe S'oossay, «Taani injje wodiyaan, neeni giyaawaa sisaad; k'ay atotetsaa gallassi, neena maaddaaddi» yaagee. Be'ite, injje wodii ha""a. Be'ite, atotetsaa gallassay hachcha." 
2Corinthians6:3 Nuuni nu oosuwaa ooninne boranawaa koyyokko; k'ay oonanne d'ubbanawaa koyyokko. 
2Corinthians6:4 Shin ubbabaan nuuni S'oossaa oosanchchatuwaa gidiyaawaa nu huup'iyaan besseeddo; daro genc'c'an, waayiyaan, metuwaan, wolk'k'aama tuggaan," 
2Corinthians6:5 lissuwaan shoc'ettiyaawaan, k'ashuwaan, shabbirettussaan, daaburaan, gem""ishuwaa d'ayiyaawan, s'oomaan," 
2Corinthians6:6 geeshshatetsaan, eratetsan, danddayan, keekatetsan, Geeshsha Ayyaanan, tumu siik'uwaan," 
2Corinthians6:7 tumuwaa haasayiyaawan, S'oossaa wolk'k'an nuuni S'oossaa oosanchchatuwaa gidiyaawaa nu huup'iyaan besseeddo; k'ay s'illotetsaa tooraa ushechcha kushiyan, gonddalliyaa haddirssa kushiyan oyk'k'ana." 
2Corinthians6:8 Nuuni bonchchetteeddonne tooshetteeddo; boretteeddonne galatetteeddo. K'ay tumuwaa haasayeetto; shin Asay nuuna wordduwaa giide k'oppee. 
2Corinthians6:9 Nuuni Asay erenna asaa mala; shin Asay ubbay nuuna eree; nuuni hayk'k'eedda asaa mala; shin hintte be'iyaawaadankka de'eetto; muretteedda asaa mala; shin hayk'k'ibeykko. 
2Corinthians6:10 Nuuni kayyottiyaawantta gidooppekka, ubbaa wode nashetteetto. Hiyyeesaa malateetto; shin daro asaa dureyeetto; k'ay ayaynne baynna asaa malateetto; shin ubbabaykka nuwaa." 
2Corinthians6:11 K'oronttoosan de'iyaa asaw, nuuni hinttenttoo k'onc'c'iyaan odeeddo; nu uluwaakka hinttena besseeddo;" 
2Corinthians6:12 Nuuni hinttenttoo d'ibibeykko; d'ibeeddawanttu hinttena. Nuuni nu uluwaa hinttenttoo gentsibeykko; shin hintte uluwaa nuw gentseeddawanttu hinttena. 
2Corinthians6:13 Hai taani ta naanaw haasayiyaawaadan, hinttenttoo haasayay; nuuni hinttena nu uluwaa besseeddawaadan, hinttekka nuuna hintte uluwaa aassi dooyyiide bessite." 
2Corinthians6:14 Ammanenna asatuwaana zuppetiide, giigenna oosuwaa ootsoppite. Ayaw gooppe, s'illotetsawunne nagaraw ayaan gaketsay de'ii? Poo'oonne d'umaw ayaan ittippetetsay de'ii?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Kiristtoosanne Daabiloosa ittippe gatsiyaabay ayee? K'ay ammaniyaawenne ammanennawe kos's'iyaawe ayee de'ii? 
2Corinthians6:16 S'oossaa Geeshsha Gollewunne eek'aw aybe zuppetetsay de'ii? Ayaw gooppe S'oossay, «Taani unttunttu giddon de'ananne unttunttu giddon hamettana. Taani unttunttu S'oossaa gidana; k'ay unttunttukka ta asatuwaa gidana» geeddawaadan, nuuni de'uwaa S'oossaa geeshsha golliyaa." 
2Corinthians6:17 Hewaadankka, k'ay Goday, «Unttunttu giddoppe kesite; unttunttuppe shaakettite. Tunabaakka bochchoppite. Taani hinttena mokka akkana." 
2Corinthians6:18 K'ay taani hinttenttoo aawuwaa gidana; hinttekka taw attuma naanatuwaanne, mac'c'a naanatuwaa gidanita. Taani Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Goday, hawaa oday» yaageedda." 
2Corinthians7:1 Hewaa diraw, ta siik'atoo, S'oossay ha ubbabaa nuw immana geeddawaappe hini baggan, nu ashuwaanne nu shemppuwaa tunissiyaa ubbabaappe nu huup'iyaa ane geeshshoytte; k'ay S'oossaw yayyiyaawaan ubbaanna geeyyiide de'eetto." 
2Corinthians7:2 Hintte uluwaa nuuna bessite; nuuni oonanne naak'k'ibeykko; oonanne k'ohibeyikko; k'ay oonanne c'immibeykko. 
2Corinthians7:3 Taani hewaa hintte bolla pirddanaw giikke; ayaw gooppe, taani kase hinttenttoo geeddawaadankka, hinttenttu nu wozanaan de'iita; nuuni de'inakka hayk'k'inakka, ittippe de'eetto." 
2Corinthians7:4 Taani haasayiyaawaa hintteppe k'osikke; taani hinttenan c'eek'ettay; nu waayiyaa ubbaan taani loytsa minnaynne nashettay. 
2Corinthians7:5 Ayaw gooppe, haray atto nuuni Mak'idooniyaa beedda wode, ubbaa baggankka waayetteeddoppe attin, shemppibeykko; hara asaana walassay de'ee; nu wozanaankka yashshay de'ee." 
2Corinthians7:6 Shin kawusheeddawantta mentsetsiyaa S'oossay, Tiito yuussaan nuuna mentsetseedda." 
2Corinthians7:7 Nuuna kasewaappe aatsi nashechchiyaawe, Tiito yuussaa s'alalaa gidenna; shin hintte Aa mentsetseeddawe, hintte taana be'anaw amotteeddawaanne taw k'aretteeddawaa k'ay hintte taana maaddanaw giigetteeddawaa I nuw odeedda." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ayaw gooppe, ta dabddaabbii hinttena kayyoyeeddawaa gidooppekka, ayaw s'aafaadditaashsha giikke; ayaw s'aafaadditaashsha gooppekka, ta dabddaabbii hinttena guutsaa wodiyaa kayyoyeeddawaa be'ay." 
2Corinthians7:9 Hai taana nashechchiyaawe taani hinttena kayyoyeedda diraassa gidenna; shin hintte kayyuu hinttena nagaraappe zaareeddawaa diraassa; ayaw gooppe, nuuni hinttena ayaaninne k'ohennaadan, S'oossay bare koyyeeddawaadan, hinttena kayyoyeedda." 
2Corinthians7:10 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay koyyiyaa kayyuu nagaraappe zaariide atotetsaakko ahee; hewekka taani bayizzaaddi geena wozanaa; shin alamiyaa kayyuu hayk'uwaa ahee." 
2Corinthians7:11 S'oossay he hintte kayyuwaan ay ayifiyaa immeeddentto be'ite. Hinttena ay keenaa dentsetseeddenttonne hintte geeshshatetsaa tumayanaw hinttena ay keenaa zaaruwaa imisseeddentto, ay keenaa hank'k'etseeddenttonne ay keenaa taw yashisseeddentto, ay keenaa seelisseeddentto, ayaa keenaa taana laamotisseeddenttonne naak'o oosuwaa ootsawantta muranaw ay keenaa giigisseeddentto paac'c'i be'ite; hintte hintte huup'iyaan geeshsha gideeddawaa ubbabankka erisseeddita." 
2Corinthians7:12 Hewaa diraw, taani he dabddaabbiyaa hinttenttoo s'aafeeddawaa gidooppekka, naak'k'eedda uraa woy naak'etteedda uraa diraassa gidenna; shin hintte nuw woyissaa k'oppinttonne S'oossaa sintsan hinttenttoo k'onc'c'issanaw taani s'aafaad." 
2Corinthians7:13 Nuuni minneeddawe hewaa diraassa; he nu minotaa bolla, Tiito nashetteeddawoo nuuni ubbaappe dariyaa nashechchaa nashetteeddo. Ayaw gooppe, hintte ubbay Aa hirggaappe shemppisseeddita." 
2Corinthians7:14 Taani hinttewaa sabbaade aw odina, hintte taana yeellayibeykkita; shin nuuni hinttenttoo ubbaa wode tumuwaa haasayeeddo; hewaadankka, nuuni Tiito sintsan hinttewaa sabbeeddawe tuma gideedda." 
2Corinthians7:15 Hewaa diraw, hintte ubbay aw yayyiide kokkoriidde, Aa wooti mokkeedditenttonne k'ay aw ay keenaa azazetteedditentto I hassayiyaa wode, hinttena loytsi siik'ee." 
2Corinthians7:16 Taani ubbabaan hinttena ammaniyaa diraw nashettay. 
2Corinthians8:1 Nuwaadan S'oossaa asatoo, S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay Mak'idooniyaa ammaniyaawanttu giddon ootseeddawaa hinttena erissanaw koyyeetto." 
2Corinthians8:2 Unttunttu aad'd'eedda waayiyaan wolk'k'aama paac'iyaa paac'etteeddino; shin unttunttu hiyyeesaa gidooppekka, barenttu immiyaawan daro keekinonne k'ay wolk'k'aama nashechchaa nashettiino." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barenttu wolk'k'aa keenaa k'ay haray atto barenttu wolk'k'aappekka dariyaawaa dosiide immeeddawoo taani markka." 
2Corinthians8:4 Unttunttu S'oossaa asatuwaa maaddiyaa loo oosuwaa nuunanna ootsanaw nuuna daro woosseeddino. 
2Corinthians8:5 Unttunttu nuuni k'oppeeddawaappe aatsiide ootseeddino; kasetiide unttunttu barenttu huup'iyaa Godaw immeeddawaappe guyyiyaan, S'oossaa sheniyaadan, nuwukka barenttu huup'iyaa immeeddino." 
2Corinthians8:6 Hewaa diraw, nuuni ha lo""o oosuwaa doommeedda Tiito gujji ootsanaadaninne hinttena maaddiide, he oosuwaa polissanaadan Aa woosseeddo." 
2Corinthians8:7 Shin hintte ubbabaan, ammanuwaan, haasayan, eratetsan, wolk'k'aama lo""o amuwaan, nuuna siik'iyaawankka duretteeddawaadan, ha lo""o oosuwaankka hinttenttu keeka gidanawaa nuuni koyyeetto." 
2Corinthians8:8 Taani hewaa azazanaw giikke; shin haratuwaa wolk'k'aama loo amuwaa baggana hintte siik'uu ay keenaa tumentto eranaw gay. 
2Corinthians8:9 Ayaw gooppe, hintte nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsaa eriita; Kiristtoosi dure gidi de'iide, hintte Aa hiyyeesatetsan durettanaadan, hintte diraw hiyyeeseedda." 
2Corinthians8:10 Taani ha yewuwaa hinttena zoriyaawe hawaa; zillaytsi hintte doommeeddawaa hai wurssiyaawe hinttenttoo loa; hintte ooso s'alalaw gidennaan, ootsana k'ofawukka kaseteeddawantta." 
2Corinthians8:11 Hintte ootsanaw loytsi amotteeddawe ootsiide poleeddawaanna giiga gidana mala, hinttenttoo danddayetteeddawaadankka oosuwaa polite." 
2Corinthians8:12 Ayaw gooppe, itti uray immanaw loytsi koyyooppe, I barew de'eedda keenaa immanaappe attin, aw baynnawaa aappe akkena." 
2Corinthians8:13 Ayaw gooppe, taani haranttu waayiyaappe shemppina, hintte waayettite giikke; hintte ubbaykka k'araa de'anaadanappe attin." 
2Corinthians8:14 Unttunttu palahay hintte pac'aa kuntsana mala, hinttenttoo ha wodiyaan de'iyaa palahay unttunttu pac'aa kuntsana koshshee; laa""uukka hewan k'araan go""ettiino." 
2Corinthians8:15 S'oossaa Mas'aafan, «Darissiide shiishsheeddawoo palahibeenna; k'ay guutsaa shiishsheeddawookka pac'c'ibeenna» geetettiide s'aafetteedda." 
2Corinthians8:16 Shin nuuni hinttenttoo k'oppiyaawaa mala, wolk'k'aama k'ofaa Tiita k'ofisseedda S'oossaa galatay gakko." 
2Corinthians8:17 Tiito hinttekko baanaw bare k'ofaa k'achcheeddawe, bare huup'iyaan hinttena maaddanaw daro amotteedda gishshaappe attin, nu zoriyaa s'alalaa akkeeddawaana gidenna." 
2Corinthians8:18 Mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odiyaa bare oosuwaan ammanettiyaa ammaniyaawanttu sintsa ubbaan daro bonchchetteedda ishaa nuuni aanana ittippe kiitteetto. 
2Corinthians8:19 Hewaa bollan k'ay, ha nuuni ootsiyaa lo""o oosuwaa I nuunanna ittippe ootsanawunne Godaa bonchchoo nuuni haratuwaa maaddanaw loytsi amottiyaawaa bessanaw ammaniyaa asatuu Aa dooriide suntseeddino." 
2Corinthians8:20 Nuuni ootsiyaa ha keeka imotaa diraw, ooninne nuuna zigirenna mala naagetteetto." 
2Corinthians8:21 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni Godaa sintsaan lo""obaa ootsanawaa s'alalaa gidenna; shin asaa sintsankka lo""obaa ootsanaw k'oppeetto." 
2Corinthians8:22 Nuuni daro gede paac'c'i be'eedda nu ishaa, ubbaa wode hinttena maaddanaw daro amottiyaawaa, ha asatuwaana hinttekko kiitteetto; k'ay ha""i I hinttena daro ammaniyaa diraw, hinttena maaddanaw kasewaappe aatsiide loytsi amottee." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tiitowaa gidooppe, I hinttena maaddanaw taananna ittippe ootsiyaa ta laggiyaa; yekko ishatuwaabaa gidooppe, unttunttu ammaniyaa asatuu kiitteeddawanttanne unttunttu de'uu Kiristtoosa bonchchissiyaawaa." 
2Corinthians8:24 Simmi ammaniyaawanttu ubbatuu hintte siik'uu tuma gidiyaawaa erana mala, k'ay nuuni hinttewaa sabbiyaawe likke gidiyaawaa erana mala, hintte siik'uwaa unttuntta bessite." 
2Corinthians9:1 Yihudaan de'iyaa geeshsha asatuwaa maaddanaw yeddiyaabaw taani hinttenttoo s'aafanaw koshshenna. 
2Corinthians9:2 Hintte maaddanaw loytsi amottiyaawaa taani eriyaa diraw, Mak'idooniyaan de'iyaa asaw hinttewaa sabbaad. Taani unttunttoo, «Akaayiyaan de'iyaa ishatuu zillaytsippe doommiide, maaddanaw giigetteeddino» yaagaade odaaddi; k'ay hintte wolk'k'aama amuukka unttunttuppe dariyaa bagga dentsetseedda." 
2Corinthians9:3 Shin taani unttunttoo geeddawaadankka nuuni ha yewuwaa hinttenan c'eek'ettiyaawe mela gidenna mala, hintte giigetteeddawantta gidanaadan, ha ishatuwaa hinttekko kiittay." 
2Corinthians9:4 Mak'idooniyaa asatuu taananna yiide, hintte giigettennan de'ishshin, hinttena demmooppe, nu s'alalaa gidennaadan, hintte nuuppe aad'uwaa yeellatanita; shin nuuni hinttena loytsi ammaniide c'eek'etteeddawaassa." 
2Corinthians9:5 Hewaa diraw, taani ha ishatuu taappe sintsati hinttekko biide, hintte immana geedda imotaa kasetiide giigissana mala, unttuntta woossanaw koshshiyaawaa akeekaad. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, he imotay taani gakkiyaa wode giigi uttanawaa; hewe k'ay wolk'k'aan hintte immiyaawaa gidennaan, dosiide immiyaawaa erissee." 
2Corinthians9:6 Hawaa akeekite; guutsa zeretsaa zeriyaa uray guutsa katsaa c'akkana; daro zeretsaa zeriyaa uray k'ay daro katsaa c'akkana. 
2Corinthians9:7 S'oossay nashechchan immiyaa uraa siik'iyaa diraw, k'arettiidde woy dosennan immiyaawaa gidennaan, immiyaa uray huup'iyaan huup'iyaan bare wozanaan k'oppeeddawaa immo." 
2Corinthians9:8 S'oossay hinttenttoo gidiyaawe ubbaa wode de'anaadaaninne k'ay haratookka hintte immanaw gidiyaawe de'anaadan hinttena koshshiyaa ubbabaa hinttenttoo immanaw danddayee. 
2Corinthians9:9 S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «I hiyyeesaa asaw darissiide immee; k'ay Aa s'illotetsay med'inaw de'anawaa» yaagee." 
2Corinthians9:10 S'oossay, zeriyaawoo zeretsaanne maanaw k'umaa immiyaawe, hinttena koshshiyaa zeretsaa ubbaa hinttenttoo immana; k'ay hintte s'illotetsaappe daro ayfiyaa ayifissanaw he zeretsaa dichchanawaa." 
2Corinthians9:11 Daro Asay hintte immiyaa imotaa nuuppe akkiide, S'oossaa galatanaadan, hintte ubbaa wode darissiide immiyaawantta gidana mala, S'oossay hinttena ubbaa baggana dureyana." 
2Corinthians9:12 Ayaw gooppe, ha hintte ootsiyaa oosuu S'oossaa naanaw koshshiyaawaa kuntsi immiyaawaa s'alalaa gidenna; shin S'oossaw daro galataa immiyaawan kumiide goggee." 
2Corinthians9:13 Ha hintte oosuu hintte ammanuwaa erissiyaa diraw, daro Asay Kiristtoosa wonggalaa hintte ammaniide markkattiyaawoonne hintte maaduwaa unttunttunnanne haraa ubbatuwaanna shaakkiide, darssi immiyaawoo S'oossaa bonchchana." 
2Corinthians9:14 Unttunttu hinttenttoo S'oossaa woossiidde, hinttenan de'iyaa S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay zaway bayinnawaa diraw, hinttena laamoteetto." 
2Corinthians9:15 Zaway bayinna S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa diraw, S'oossaa galatay gakko." 
2Corinthians10:1 Taani P'awuloosi, hintte, «I nuunanna de'iyaa wode ashikke» giyaawe, k'ay, «Nuuppe haakki de'iyaa wode nu bolla s'alee» giyaawe, lo""anne ashikke gideedda Kiristtoosa baggana hinttena woossay." 
2Corinthians10:2 Nuuna ha sa'aa dooyaadan de'iino giide k'oppiyaa itti itti asatuwaa bolla taani s'alanawaa eray; shin taani hinttekko biyaa wode hintte taana s'alissenna mala, hinttena woossay."
