Colossians1:7 Hinttenttu hewaa nuunanna ittippe k'ooma gideedda siik'o Eppaafiraappe tamaareeddita; I nu diraw Kiristtoosaw ammanettiide ootsiyaawe," 
Colossians1:8 S'oossaa Ayyaanan haratuwaa hinttenttu siik'iyaawaa nuw odeedda. 
Colossians1:9 Hewaa diraw, nuuni k'ay hewaa siseedda gallassaappe doommiide, S'oossay hinttenttoo bare sheniyaa eriyaa eratetsaa, S'oossaa Ayyaanay immiyaa aad'd'eedda eratetsaannanne akeekaana ittippe kuntsiide immanaadan, ubbaa wode balenaan S'oossaa woosseetto." 
Colossians1:10 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Goday koyyiyaawaadan hinttenttu de'anawunne, ubbaa wode Aa nashechchiyaabaa ootsanaw danddayana; hinttenttu ootsiyaa lo""o oosuwaa ubbaan hinttenttu de'uu go""ana de'iyaawaa gidanawaa; k'ay S'oossaa eriyaawan dic'c'i dic'c'i baanita." 
Colossians1:11 Hinttenttu ubbabaan nashechchan genc'c'anaadaaninne danddayanaadan, S'oossay bare bonchchuwaa gitatetsaadan immiyaa wolk'k'aa ubbaan minnite." 
Colossians1:12 K'ay S'oossaa naanaatoo giigeedda poo'o kawutetsaa laattanaw, nuuna danddayisseedda S'oossaa Aawuwaa galatite." 
Colossians1:13 I nuuna d'umaa wolk'k'aappe ashshiide, bare siik'iyaa Na'aa kawutetsaakko pintseedda." 
Colossians1:14 K'ay I bare Na'aan nuuna woziide, nu nagaraa atto geedda." 
Colossians1:15 Kiristtoosi beettena S'oossaa k'onc'c'issiyaawaa; I med'etteeddawaa ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa bayira Na'aa. 
Colossians1:16 Ayaw gooppe, ubbabaykka aan med'etteedda; beettiyaawanttu, beettenawanttu, ayyaanatuwaappe beettiyaa wolk'k'aynne godatetsay, d'ok'k'atetsaynne maatay, saluwaaninne sa'aan de'iyaa ubbabaykka Aaninne Aw med'etteedda." 
Colossians1:17 I ubbabaappe kase de'eedda; ubbabaykka Aan bare sa'aa sa'aa oyk'k'iide de'ee. 
Colossians1:18 I bare huup'ew, woosa gollew huup'enne de'o; I ubbaappe bolla gidana mala, kasetiide hayk'uwaappe denddeedda Bayira Na'aa gideedda." 
Colossians1:19 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay koyyeeddawaadan, Aan S'oossatetsaa kumentsay de'ee." 
Colossians1:20 Yaatina S'oossay Kiristtoosa baggana ubbabaa barenanna sigetsanaw yewuwaa k'achcheedda; bare Na'ay mask'k'aliyaa bollan gusseedda suutsan saluwaaninne sa'aan de'iyaa ubbabaa barenanna sigetseedda. 
Colossians1:21 Hawaappe kase, hinttenttu iitabaa k'oppeedda dirawunne ootseedda diraw, S'oossaappe shaakettiide, Aanana morkketteeddita." 
Colossians1:22 Shin S'oossay hai hinttentta pokkobay bayinnawanttanne k'ay geeshshatuwaa ootsiide, bare sintsa shiishshanaw, bare Na'aa hayk'k'eeddawaa asatetsan barenanna hinttentta sigetseedda." 
Colossians1:23 Hewe hinttenttu tumu ammanuwaan min ek'k'iide, mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa sisiide, sintsaappe akkana geeddawaappe k'aas's'ennan minniide de'ooppe hanana; he wonggalaa mishiraachchuu sa'aan de'iyaa med'etaa ubbaa matan odetteedda. Taani P'awuloosikka mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odiyaawaa gidaaddi." 
Colossians1:24 Taani hinttenttoo waayetteedda diraw, ha""i nashettay; Kiristtoosi bare huup'ew, hewaa giyaawe woosa gollew, waayettishin pac'c'eeddawaa taani ta bollaa sakuwaan kuntsay." 
Colossians1:25 S'oossay taana hinttentta maaddiyaawaanne Aa k'aalaa polaade odiyaa k'oomatetsaa kiitaa taw immeedda. 
Colossians1:26 Ha k'aalay hawaappe kase bagga ubbaan, asaa ubbaw erettennaan geemmiide de'ee; shin barena ammaniyaawanttoo S'oossay ha""i k'onc'c'isseedda." 
Colossians1:27 S'oossay Ayihuda gidenna asaw wotseedda ha asaw k'onc'c'ibeenna bonchchuwaanne dure yewuu ayentto geeshshatuwaa erissanaw koyyeedda; ha asaw hai k'onc'c'eeddawe ayee gooppe, Kiristtoosi hinttenttun de'iyaawaa; hewaa giyaawe S'oossaa bonchchuwaa aanana hinttenttu akkanawaa." 
Colossians1:28 Hewaa diraw, nuuni asaa ubbaw Kiristtoosawaa odeetto; asaa ubbaa Kiristtoosan kumentsaa asaa ootsiide, S'oossaakko shiishshana mala, nuw aad'd'eedda eratetsaa ubbaan hinttentta seerettonne tamaarisseetto." 
Colossians1:29 Taani hawaa polanaw, taanan ootsiyaa Kiristtoosi taw immiyaa wolk'k'an baas'etaynne daaburay." 
Colossians2:1 Taani hinttenttoonne Lodook'iyaa giyaa katamaan de'iyaa asatoonne k'ay taana be'ibeenna ammaniyaawanttoo ubbatoo ay keenaa baas'etaadditantto hinttenttu erana mala koyyay. 
Colossians2:2 Unttunttu wozanay minnana mala, siik'uwaan ittippe gidiide, tumu akeekan beettiyaa duretetsaa ubbaa unttunttu akkana malanne k'ay unttunttu S'oossay asaw k'onc'c'issibeennawaa, Kiristtoosa Aa huup'ew erana mala, taani daaburay." 
Colossians2:3 Geeman S'oossay minjjeedda eraynne aad'd'eedda eratetsay ubbay Aan de'ee. 
Colossians2:4 Ooninne hinttentta c'immiyaa k'aalaan baletsena mala, taani hinttentta hassayissay." 
Colossians2:5 Ayaw gooppe, taani hinttenttu matappe haakkaade de'ooppekka, ayyaanan hinttenttunna de'ay; hinttenttu de'iyaa maaraanne Kiristtoosa hinttenttu minniide ammaniyaawaa be'aade nashettay." 
Colossians2:6 Simmi hinttenttu Godaa Kiristtoosi Yesuusa akkeeddawaadan, Aan de'ite." 
Colossians2:7 Aan s'ap'uwaa yeddiide dic'c'ite; hinttenttu tamaareeddawaadan ammanuwaan minnite; S'oossaa ubbaa wode galatite. 
Colossians2:8 Kiristtoosappe gidenna timirttiyaan, ha sa'aa mooddiyaa ayyaanatuwaa timirttiyaaninne, asaappe yeedda eratetsan, k'ay mela c'imuwaan hinttentta ooninne omoodenna mala naagettite." 
Colossians2:9 Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosa asatetsaa bollan S'oossatetsaa med'etaa kumentsay de'ee." 
Colossians2:10 K'ay ubbaa ayyaanatuwaa kaappotetsawunne godatetsaw ubbaw huup'e gidiyaa Kiristtoosappe kumentsaa de'uwaa demmeeddita. 
Colossians2:11 Hinttenttu Kiristtoosanna itti asaa mala gidiide, asaa k'as's'araa mala gidennaan, hinttenttu nagaranchcha med'etaa diggiyaa k'as's'araa, hawekka ashuwaa k'as's'araa gidennaan Kiristtoosi ootseeddawaa." 
Colossians2:12 Hinttenttu s'ammak'etteedda wode, Kiristtoosanna moogettiide, Kiristtoosa hayk'uwaappe dentseedda S'oossaa wolk'k'aa ammaneedda diraw, ooratsa de'oo s'ink'k'atan Kiristtoosanna ittippe denddeeddita." 
Colossians2:13 Hinttenttu hinttenttu naak'uwaaninne hinttenttu ec'a asatetsaa k'as's'arettennan aggeeddawan hayk'k'iide de'iyaa wode, S'oossay hinttenttu naak'uwaa atto giide, Kiristtoosanna hinttentta pas'a wotseedda." 
Colossians2:14 Nuuna is's'iyaa, ac'uwaa paramaa Aa c'aak'uwaanna ittippe S'oossay daakkeedda; mask'k'aliyaa bollan d'ishiide, ogiyaappe diggeedda." 
Colossians2:15 Kiristtoosi he mask'k'aliyan kaappatuwaappenne godatuwaappe wolk'k'aa wotsi akkiide, bare s'oonuwaanne omoodetteeddawantta k'onc'c'iyaan besseedda." 
Colossians2:16 Hewaa diraw, muussaan woy ushshaan, baalaa gallassaa woy agenay s'eeriyaa wodiyaa bonchchiyaawan, woy Sambbataa bonchchiyaawan, ooninne hinttenttu bolla pirddoppo." 
Colossians2:17 Hawanttu sintsaappe yaana yewatoo eeshuwaa; shin tumatetsay Kiristtoosawaa. 
Colossians2:18 Wordduwaa ashikke malatanawunne kiitanchchaw goyinnanaw koyyiyaawe, be'ibeennawaa sas'aan be'aaddi giide otorettiyaawe, asatetsaa k'ofaan c'oo ayyiyaawe, ooninne hinttenttu bolla pirddoppo." 
Colossians2:19 Hewaa mala Asay huup'e gidiyaa Kiristtoosa minisi oyk'k'eeddawaa leppissee. Bollaa ubbay he huup'iyaappe wolk'k'aa demmiide, bollan de'iyaa kuriyaannanne s'ap'uwaanna ittippe oyk'k'ettiide, S'oossay dichchiyaa dishuwaadan dic'c'ee." 
Colossians2:20 Hinttenttu ha sa'aa mooddiyaa ayyaanatuwaappe haakkiide, Kiristtoosanna hayk'k'eeddita; yaatina, ayaw ha sa'aa wogaan de'iyaa asaadan de'iitee? «Oyk'k'oppa; baara be'oppa; bochchoppa» yaagiyaa higgetoo ayaw azazettiitee?" 
Colossians2:21  
Colossians2:22 Ha ubbabaykka Asay med'd'eedda higgenne timirtte gidiyaa diraw, wodiyaappe guyyiyaan d'ayana." 
Colossians2:23 Unttunttu kiitanchchaw goyinniyaawaaninne wordduwaa ashikke malatiyaawaan k'ay barenttu asatetsaa gilk'k'issiyaawan aad'd'eedda eranchcha malatiino; shin ashuwaa amuwaa digganaw goenna. 
Colossians3:1 Simmi hinttenttu Kiristtoosanna hayk'uwaappe denddeeddawaa gidooppe, S'oossaappe ushechcha baggana utteedda Kiristtoosi de'iyaa saan saluwaan de'iyaawaa minisi koyyite." 
Colossians3:2 Saluwaan de'iyaawaa hinttenttu k'oppanaappe attin, sa'aan de'iyaawaa k'oppoppite." 
Colossians3:3 Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu hayk'k'eeddita; k'ay hinttenttu shemppuu S'oossaan Kiristtoosanna geemmeedda." 
Colossians3:4 Hinttew de'o gideedda Kiristtoosi k'onc'c'iyaa wode, he wode hinttekka aanana bonchchuwaan k'onc'c'ana." 
Colossians3:5 Hewaa diraw, hinttenttun de'iyaa ha sa'aa amotuwaa wod'ite; hewanttukka woshummiyaawaa, tunatetsaa, woshummanaw koyiyaawaa, iita amuwaa, miishshaa amottiyaawaa. Yoranchchaa gidussay eek'aw goyinniyaawaappe dummatenna." 
Colossians3:6 Hawanttu gaasuwaan, S'oossay azazettena asatuwaa hank'k'ettanawaa." 
Colossians3:7 Kase hinttenttu ha iita k'ofatuwaan de'iyaa wode unttunttun moodetteeddita. 
Colossians3:8 Shin hai hinttenttu k'ay hank'k'uwaa, yiluwaa, is'uwaa, hinttenttu doonaappe kesiyaa c'ashshaanne yeellayiyaa haasayaa hawantta ubbaa hintteppe d'ayissite." 
Colossians3:9 Ittuu ittoo worddotoppite; ayaw gooppe, nagaranchcha med'etaa Aa oosuwaanna hintteppe d'ayissi diggiide," 
Colossians3:10 S'oossay, Aa med'd'eeddawe, barena malatissanawunne barew de'iyaa eratetsaa ubbaa immanaw, ubbaa wode ooratsiyaa ooratsa med'etaa mayyeeddita." 
Colossians3:11 Ha ooratsa med'etaan, Giriike asaa woy Ayihuda asaa, k'as's'aretteeddawaa woy k'as's'arettibeennawaa, imatsatuwaanne ayinne tamaaribeennawaa, ayiliyaa woy womaannuwaa giide shaakkiyaabay baawa; huup'e allaallii Kiristtoosa; I ubbankka de'ee." 
Colossians3:12 Hewaa diraw, S'oossay dooreeddawanttudan, geeshshanne siik'iyaawantta gidiide, maarotetsaa, k'aretaa, keekatetsaa, hinttenttu huup'iyaa kawushshiyaawaa, ashikketetsaanne danddayaa mayyite." 
Colossians3:13 Ittuu ittuwaawaa danddayite; ooninne bare laggiyaa bolla hank'k'etteeddawe de'ooppe, ittuu ittoo atto yaago. Kiristtoosi hinttenttoo atto geeddawaadan, hinttekka atto giite." 
Colossians3:14 Hewaa ubbaa bolla, ubbabaa ittippe shiishshi k'achchiyaa siik'uwaa mayyite." 
Colossians3:15 Kiristtoosi immiyaa sarotetsay hinttentta mooddo; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay hinttentta itti asaa ootsiide, he sarotetsaw s'eeseedda S'oossaa galatite." 
Colossians3:16 Kiristtoosa k'aalay hinttenttu wozanaan kumiide de'o; hinttenttoo de'iyaa aad'd'eedda eratetsaa ubbaan ittuu ittuwaa tamaarissitenne zorite; hinttenttu wozanaan S'oossaa galatiidde, woosaanne mazimuriyaa, S'oossaa suntsaa d'ok'k'u ootsiyaa yetsaa yes's'ite." 
Colossians3:17 Hintte ay haasayiyaawaa woy ay ootsiyaawaa gidooppekka, Aawuwaa S'oossaa Yesuusa baggana galatiidde, ootsiyaawaa ubbaa Godaa Yesuusa suntsan ootsite." 
Colossians3:18 Machchetoo, ammaniyaa asaw bessiyaawaadan, hinttenttu asinaw moodettite." 
Colossians3:19 Attuma asatoo, hinttenttu mac'c'a asaa siik'ite; unttunttunna woppu giide de'ite." 
Colossians3:20 Naatoo, hinttentta yeleeddawanttoo ubbabaan azazettite. Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu unttunttoo azazettiyaawe S'oossaa daro nashechchee." 
Colossians3:21 Aawotoo, hinttenttu naanay wozanaa bayenna mala, unttuntta yiloyoppite." 
Colossians3:22 Ayiletoo, sa'aan hinttenttoo godaa gidiyaawanttoo ubbabaan azazettite; Godaw yayyiide, suure wozanaan ootsiteppe attin, asaa nashechchanawunne Asay be'o giyaawaan azazettiyaawantta gidoppite." 
Colossians3:23 Hintte ootsiyaa oosuu ubbaa asaw gidennaan Godaw ootsiyaawaadan, wozanaappe ootsite." 
Colossians3:24 Godaa Kiristtoosaw hinttenttu ootsiyaa diraw, I barewanttoo immanaw giigissi wotseeddawaa hinttenttu laattanawaa akeekite." 
Colossians3:25 Balabaa ootseedda uray ooninne, bare ootseedda balaadan woytaa akkana; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay pirddiidde, oonanne maaddenna." 
Colossians4:1 Godatoo, hinttewukka saluwaan Goday de'iyaawaa eriide, hinttenttu ayiletoo s'illotetsaaninne suuretetsaan koshshiyaawaa ootsite." 
Colossians4:2 S'oossaa aggenaan woossite; k'ay woossiidde azallenan, Aa galatiidde woossite." 
Colossians4:3 K'ay hinttenttu woossiyaa wode ubbaan, kaseedeppe asaw k'onc'c'ibeennawaa, Kiristtoosawaa nuuni odana mala, S'oossay nuw injjeyanaadan, nuwukka S'oossaa woossite; ayaw gooppe, ha""i taani k'asho golliyaan de'iyaawe hewaassa." 
Colossians4:4 K'aykka taani bessiyaawaa keenaa k'onc'c'issaade ha yewuwaa odana mala, taw S'oossaa woossite." 
Colossians4:5 Hinttew de'iyaa wodiyaa goi bayinnasaan d'ayissennan, ammanennawanttu matan c'inc'c'atetsaan de'ite." 
Colossians4:6 Hinttenttu asaa ubbaw wooti zaaranaw bessintto erana mala, hinttenttu haasayay ubbaa wode, sisanaw lo""iyaawaanne nashechchiyaawaa gidanaw bessee." 
Colossians4:7 Nu siik'o ishay Tikik'oosi, taananna ittippe Godaa oosuwaan k'oomaa gideedda ammanettiyaa oosanchchay, ta de'uwaabaa hinttentta erissana." 
Colossians4:8 Taani Aa hinttekko kiittiyaawe, nuuni waan de'intto hinttenttoo I odiide, hinttentta mentsetsana diraassa." 
Colossians4:9 Anaasimoosi, ammanettiyaa siik'o ishay, hinttenttu gadewe, aanana ittippe hinttekko bee; unttunttu hawaan haniyaa ubbabaa hinttentta erissana." 
Colossians4:10 Taananna k'ashuwaan de'iyaa Ariss's'irokoosinne Barnnaabaasaw aawuwaa gideedda Mark'k'oossi hinttentta sarotiino; taani hinttentta kase azazeeddawaadan, Mark'k'oossi hinttekko booppe, wozanaappe Aa mokkite." 
Colossians4:10 Taananna k'ashuwaan de'iyaa Ariss's'irokoosinne Barnnaabaasaw aawuwaa gideedda Mark'k'oossi hinttentta sarotiino; taani hinttentta kase azazeeddawaadan, Mark'k'oossi hinttekko booppe, wozanaappe Aa mokkite." 
Colossians4:11 Yoss's'oosa giyaa Yesuusikka hinttentta saro saro gee; Ayihuda asatuwaappe taananna S'oossaa kawutetsaw ootsiyaawe, ha heezzu asatuwaappe haray baawa; hawanttu taana daro maaddeeddino." 
Colossians4:12 Eppaafiri, hinttenttu gadewe, Kiristtoosi Yesuusa k'oomay, hinttentta saro saro gee. I hinttenttu S'oossaan minniide ek'k'anaadaaninne S'oossay koyyiyaawe ubbay ayentto eriide, poli ammananaadan, ubbaa wode S'oossaa minisi woossee." 
Colossians4:13 Ayaw gooppe, I hinttenttoo, Lodook'iyaa asawunne Hirapoliisa giyaa katamaa asaw daro daaburiyaawaa taani markkattay." 
Colossians4:14 Nu siik'o dottorii Luk'aasinne Deemaasi hinttentta saro de'iitee yaagiino. 
Colossians4:15 Lodook'iyaan de'iyaa nu ishatoonne Nimppiw k'ay izi golliyaan shiik'iyaa ammaniyaa asatoo nu sarotaa odite. 
Colossians4:16 Ha dabddaabbiyaa hinttenttu nabbabeeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Lodook'iyaa ammaniyaawanttookka nabbabissite; hinttekka Lodook'iyaa ammaniyaawanttukka hinttenttoo yeddiyaa dabddaabbiyaa nabbabite." 
Colossians4:17 K'ay Arkkipoosaw, «Goday new immeedda oosuwaa polanawaa dogoppa» yaagiide odite." 
Colossians4:18 Taani P'awuloosi, ta kushiyan sarotaa s'aafeeddawaa hawaa be'ite; taani k'ashuwaan de'iyaawaa dogoppite. S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenttunna gido." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Nuuni P'awuloosi, Sillaasenne S'imootoosi Teselonk'k'en de'iyaa ammaniyaa asatoo ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafeetto; hewanttu S'oossaa nu Aabbuwanttoonne Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosawanttoo, aad'd'o keekatetsaynne sarotetsay gido." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Nuuni woosaan S'oossaa galatiidde, ubbaa wode hinttena ubbatuwaa hassayeetto." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Nuuni nu S'oossaa, nu Aawuwaa sintsan ammanuwaan hinttenttu ootseedda oosuwaanne, siik'uwaan hinttenttu daabureedda daaburaa, k'ay nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosan hinttew de'iyaa hidootaan genc'c'iyaa genc'c'uwaa ubbaa wode hassayeetto." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, S'oossay hinttena siik'iyaawaanne hinttena barew naanaa ootsanaw dooreeddawaa nuuni ereetto." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni wonggalaa, wolk'k'aan, Geeshsha Ayyaanaaninne he wonggelii tuma gideeddawaa wurssi ammaniyaawaan hinttenttoo aheeddawaappe attin, asaa k'aalaa s'alalaan ahibeykko. Nuuni hinttenanna de'iyaa wode, hinttenttu diraw waan de'eeddentto, hinttenttu eriita." 
1Thessalonians1:6 K'ay hinttenttu daro waayettooppekka, Geeshsha Ayyaanay immeedda nashechchaan kiitaa akkeeddita; hewan nu leemisuwaanne Godaawaa kaalleeddita." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Hewaa diraw, Mak'idooniyaaninne Akaayiyaa giyaa gadiyaan de'iyaa ammaniyaa ubbatoo leemisuwaa gideeddita." 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ayaw gooppe, Godaa k'aalay hintteppe kesiide, Mak'idooniyaaninne Akaayiyaa s'alalaan sisettibeenna; shin S'oossaa hinttenttu ammaniyaawe ubba saan sisetteedda. Simmi nuuni haasayanaw koshshishshin attowe ayinne baawa." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni hinttekko beedda wode, hinttenttu nuuna wooti mokkeeddenttonne k'ay hinttenttu hinttenttu eek'aw ootsiyaawaa aggiide, worddotenna de'uwaa S'oossaw ootsanaw waan S'oossaakko simmeedditentto, unttunttu barenttu huup'iyaan haasayiino." 
1Thessalonians1:10 K'ay S'oossaa Na'ay Yesuusi, S'oossay hayk'uwaappe dentseeddawe, nuuna sintsaappe yaana S'oossaa hank'k'uwaappe ashshiyaawe saluwaappe yaanawaa hinttenttu naagiyaawaa unttunttu haasayiino." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nuuni hinttekko beeddawe mela gidennawaa hinttenttu hinttenttu huup'ew eriita." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Shin nuuni hinttekko yaanaappe kase Pilip'p'isiyoosa giyaa katamaan waayetteeddawaanne boretteeddawaa hinttenttu eriita; daro p'alk'k'etsay de'ooppekka, hinttenttoo Aa mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odana mala, S'oossay nuw minotetsaa immeedda." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Nuuni hinttena woossiyaawe baliide woy tunatetsaan woy geniyaan gidenna. 
1Thessalonians2:4 Shin S'oossay wonggalaa hadaraa akkanaw nuuni ammanettiyaawantta gidina, nuw he hadaraa immeedda; he immeeddawaadankka nuuni haasayeetto. K'ay nuuni nu wozanaa s'omoosiyaa S'oossaa nashechchiyaawaadan haasayeettoppe attin, asaa nashechchiyaawaadan haasayokko." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Nuuni hinttekko c'immiyaa haasayaanna, woy nuuni yoraa gentsiyaa hanotaan yibeennawaa hinttenttu loytsi eriita; S'oossaykka nuw markka." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Nuuni asaappe, woy hintteppe, woy haranttu ooppennekka bonchchuwaa akkanaw koyyibeykko." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Nuuni Kiristtoosi kiitteeddawantta gidiidde, bonchchuwaa hinttenttuppe oochchanaw danddayeetto. Shin aata bare naanatuwaa siik'uwaan dichchiyaawaadan, hinttenttu giddon ashikke gideeddo." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Hinttenttu nuw daro alo gideedda diraw, S'oossaa wonggalaa hinttenttoo immanawaa s'alalaa gidennaan, nu de'uwaakka hinttenttoo immanaw giigi utteeddo; ayaw gooppe, hinttena nuuni loytsi siik'eeddo." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nu oosuwaanne nu daaburaa hinttenttu akeekiita; hinttenttoo S'oossaa mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odiidde, hinttena ayinne waayissenna mala, k'ammanne gallassi nuuni ootseeddo." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nu de'uu hinttenttu matan, ammaniyaawanttu matan, geeshsha, s'illonne borettennawaa gidiyaawoo hinttenne S'oossay markka." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Nuuni hinttenttoo huup'iyaan huup'iyaan aawuu bare naanaw haniyaawaadan haneeddawaa eriita. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Nuuni hinttena zoreeddo; mentsetseeddonne hinttenttoo markkatteeddo. Hewenneekka hinttena s'eeseedda S'oossaa nashechchiyaa de'uwaa hinttenttu de'anaadananne Aa kawutetsaanne Aa bonchchuwaa gelanaaddaana. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Hintte nuuppe S'oossaa k'aalaa tuma gideeddawaadan akkeedda wode, S'oossaa kiitaadan akkeeddawaappe attin, asaa kiitaadan akkibeenna diraw, S'oossaa k'aalay ammaniyaa hinttenan ootsee; he gaasuwaan nuuni S'oossaa ubbaa wode galateetto." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ayaw gooppe, nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, Kiristtoosi Yesuusan ittuwaa gideedda Yihudaa giyaa gadiyaan de'iyaa ammaniyaawantta, hinttenttu leemisettiita; hewanttu S'oossaa ammaniyaawantta. Ayihudatuu unttuntta waayisseeddawaadan, hinttenttu biittaa asaykka hinttena waayisseedda." 
1Thessalonians2:15 He Ayihudatuu Godaa Yesuusanne nabatuwaa wod'eeddino; k'ay nuuna yedersseeddino. Unttunttu S'oossaa nashechchikkino; asaa ubbaakka is's'iino. 
1Thessalonians2:16 Ayihuda gidenna Asay attana mala, nuuni unttunttoo k'aalaa odiyaawaa diggiino. K'ay unttunttu nagaraykka ubbaa wode dari dari bee. Shin wurssetsaan S'oossaa hank'k'uu unttunttu bolla wod'd'eedda." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nuuni nu k'ofaan gidennaadan, asatetsaa s'alalaan hintteppe guutsaa wodew shaaketteedda wode, hinttena daro laamotiide, ayfiyaan be'anaw loytsi koyyeeddo." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni hinttekko simmiide baanaw koyyeeddo. Ubbaa taani P'awuloosi zaara zaaraade hinttekko baanaw mala be'aaddi; shin Sees'aanay nuuna diggeedda." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ayaw gooppe, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosi yiyaa wode, nuuni be'ana giide nashechchan naagiyaawe, woy nu nashechchay, woy nuuni c'eek'ettiyaa kalachchay oonee? Hinttena gidikkiteeyee?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu nu bonchchuwaanne nu nashechchaa." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Hewaa diraw, nuw genc'c'anaw danddayettennan is's'eedda wode, Ateenaa giyaa katamaan nuurekka attanaw k'ofaa k'achcheeddo." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Hinttena zoranaadaaninne hinttenttu ammanuwaan hinttena minisanaadan, S'oossaw ootsiyaa nu ishaa, nuunanna ittippe Kiristtoosa mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa odiyaa S'imootoosa hinttekko kiitteeddo." 
1Thessalonians3:3 Ha waayiyaa gaasuwaan hintteppe ooninne guyye simmenna mala, Aa kiitteeddo. Nuuni hewoo dooretteeddawaa hinttenttu hinttenttu huup'ew eriita." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni hinttenanna de'iidde, nuuni waayettanawaa kasetiide hinttenttoo odeeddo; k'ay hinttenttu eriyaawaadankka kase hewaadan haneedda." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Hewaa diraw, k'ay genc'c'anaw taw danddayettennan is's'eedda wode, «Ooni eri s'alahiyaa kaappuu hinttena paac'c'ennan aggena. Nu daaburaykka mela gidennaan aggena» yaagaade hinttenttu ammanuwaa eranaw S'imootoosa hinttekko kiittaad." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Shin hai S'imootoosi hinttenttu matappe nuukko yiide, hinttenttu ammanuwaabaanne hinttenttu siik'uwaabaa hinttenttoo mishiraachchu giide nuw odeedda. K'ay nuuni hinttena be'anaw laamotiyaawaadan hinttekka nuuna be'anaw laamotiidde, ubbaa wode nuw lo""obaa k'oppiyaawaa I odeedda." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Hewaa diraw, nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nu waayiyaaninne nu tuggaan ubbaan hinttenttu ammanuwaa baggana hinttewaan nu minetteeddo." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Godan minniide hinttenttu de'ooppe, nuunikka ha""i de'eetto." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni hinttebaw S'oossaa galateetto. Nuuni nu S'oossaa sintsan hinttenttu diraw de'iyaa nashechchaa ubbaw Aa daro galateetto." 
1Thessalonians3:10 Nuuni hinttena be'anawunne hinttenttu ammanoo pac'c'eeddawaa kuntsanaw, k'ammanne gallassi nu kumentsaa wozanaappe S'oossaa woosseetto." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Nu Aawuu, nu S'oossay bare huup'ew, k'ay nu Goday Yesuusi Kiristtoosi nuuni hinttekko biyaa ogiyaa nuw giigisso." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Nuuni hinttena loytsi siik'iyaawaadan, Goday hinttenttu ittuu ittuwaa siik'iyaa siik'uwaanne k'ay asaa ubbaa siik'iyaa siik'uwaa hinttenttoo darissonne gujjo." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Nu Goday Yesuusi bare geeshshatuwaa ubbaanna yiyaa wode, nu S'oossaa, nu aawuwaa sintsan hintte wozanay geeshshanne pokkuu baynnawaa ootsiide, hinttena I mentsetso." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Simmi wurssetsaan, nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, S'oossaa nashechchanaw hinttenttu waan de'anaw bessintto, nuuppe tamaareeddita. Hewe hinttenttu kaseedeppe de'iyaa maaraa; shin ha""i hinttenttu kasewaappe loytsiide ootsanaadan, Godaa Yesuusa suntsan hinttena woosseettonne zoreetto." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni Godaa Yesuusa maataa baggana hinttenttoo immeedda azazuu hak'awentto, hinttenttu eriita." 
1Thessalonians4:3 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay hintteppe koyyiyaawe ayee gooppe, hinttenttu geeshsha gidanawaanne woshummiyaawaa ubbaanna agganawaa koyyee." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Hinttenttu huup'iyaan huup'iyaan geeshshatetsaaninne bonchchuwaan hinttenttu machchiyaanna wooti de'anentto eranaw besseeppe attin," 
1Thessalonians4:5 S'oossaa erenna ammanenna asatuwaadan, loytsi amottiyaawaan akkanaw bessena." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Nuuni k'ay kase hinttenttoo odeeddawaadaninne hinttena minisi zoreeddawaadan, Goday hawaa malaban ubbaan haluwaa kesiyaawaa gidiyaa diraw, ooninne ha yewuwaan bare ishaa naak'k'anawunne c'immanaw bessena." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay nuuna geeshshatetsaan de'anaw s'eeseeddawaappe attin, tunatetsaan de'anaw s'eesibeenna." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Hewaa diraw, ha timirttiyaa is's'iyaa ooninne hinttenttoo bare Geeshsha Ayaanaa immiyaa S'oossaa is's'eeppe attin, asaa is's'enna." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Hintte hinttenttu huup'iyaan ittuu ittuwaa siik'anaadan, S'oossay hinttena tamaarisseedda diraw, hinttenttu hinttenttu ishatuwaa wooti siik'anaw bessintto, nuuni s'aafanaw koshshenna." 
1Thessalonians4:10 K'ay Mak'idooniyaa biittaa ubbaan de'iyaa ishatuwaa ubbatuwaa tumu hinttenttu siik'iita. Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hinttenttu hewaappe gujji gujjiide unttuntta siik'ana mala, hinttena woosseetto." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Nuuni kase hinttenttoo odeeddawaadan, woppu geedda de'uwaa de'ite. K'ay hinttena koshshiyaawaa demmanaw, hintte kushiyan ootsite." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Hewaa gidooppe, ammanennawanttu matan hinttenttu bonchchettananne k'ay hinttena koshshiyaabaw oonanne awuddashikkita." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hinttenttu hidootay baynna asatuwaadan kayyottenna mala, hayk'k'eedda asatuwaabaa hinttenttu erana mala koyeetto." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Nuuni Yesuusi hayk'k'eeddawaanne k'ay hayk'uwaappe I denddeeddawaa ammaneetto; hewaadankka, S'oossay Yesuusa ammaniide hayk'k'eeddawantta Yesuusanna ahanawaa ammaneetto." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni hinttenttoo odiyaa Godaa k'aalay hawaa; nuuni, Godaa laa'entsuwaa yuussaa gallassay gakkanaw hawaan pas'a de'iyaawanttu, hayk'k'eeddawanttuppe kasetokko." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Ayaw gooppe, Goday bare huup'iyaan azazuwaana, kiitanchchatuwaa kaappuwaa kooshshaanna, S'oossaa malakataa giiretsaanna saluwaappe wod'd'ana. Kiristtoosa ammaniide hayk'k'eeddawanttu kasetiide hayk'uwaappe denddana." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, nuuni he wode pas'a de'iyaawanttu, Godaanna c'arkkuwaa giddon gakkettanaw unttunttunna ittippe shaariyaan denddana. Hewaa diraw nuuni Godaanna ittippe ubbaa wode de'ana." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Hewoo, ha k'aalaan ittuu ittuwaa mentsetsite." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, ha yewatuu awude hananentto, wodiyaanne agenaa hinttenttoo s'aafanaw koshshenna." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Ayaw gooppe, Godaa gallassay kayisuu k'amma yiyaawaadan yaanawaa hinttenttu loytsi eriita." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Asay, «Ubbabay sara; ayaykka hanenna» giishshin, mac'c'a asaa yeluu oyk'k'iyaawaadan, bashshay unttunttu k'oppennaan unttunttu bolla yaana. Unttunttu mulekka kessi akkikkino." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, he gallassay hinttenttoo kayisuu yiyaawaadan yaanaw hinttenttu d'umaan de'ikkita." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Hintte ubbay poo'uwaa asanne gallassaa asaa; nuuni k'ammaa asaa woy d'umaa asaa gidokko. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Hewaa diraw, nuuni haratuu gem""ishiyaawaadan gem""ishshanaw bessena. Nuuni beegottanawunne wogaan de'anaw bessee." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Ayaw gooppe, gem""ishiyaawanttu k'amma gem""ishiino; matsottiyaawanttukka k'amma matsottiino." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Shin nuuni gallassaa asaa gidiyaawanttu wogaan de'anaw bessee. Nuuni ammanuwaanne siik'uwaa tiraan wotsiyaa olaa miishshaadan oyk'k'iide, nuuni hidootaan naagiyaa atotetsaa, birataa k'oobiyaadan, huup'iyaan wotsanaw bessee." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay nuuna nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana atotetsaa demmanaw dooreeddawaappe attin, Aa hank'k'uwaa akkanaw dooribeenna." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Nuuni pas'a gidina woy hayk'k'eeddawantta gidina, Kiristtoosanna ittippe de'ana mala, Kiristtoosi nu diraw hayk'k'eedda." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Hewaa diraw, hinttenttu k'ay ha""i ootsiyaawaadan, haratuwaa mentsetsitenne ittuu ittuwaa dichchite." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hinttenttu giddon ootsiyaawantta, hinttena ammanuwaa ogiyaan kaaletsiyaawanttanne zoriyaawantta, hinttenttu bonchchana mala, hinttena woosseetto." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Unttunttu ootsiyaa oosuwaa diraw, unttuntta loytsi bonchchitenne siik'ite. Ittuu ittuwaanna sarotetsaan de'ite." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nuuni hinttena zoreetto; maaray bayinna de'uwaa de'iyaawantta seerite. Yayyiyaawantta mentsetsite. Wolk'k'i baynnawantta maaddite. Asaa ubbaa danddayite." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Ooninne iitaa diraw iitaa zaarenna mala naagettite; shin ubbaa wode, ittuu ittoonne k'ay asaa ubbaw lo""obaa ootsanaw minnite." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Ubbaa wode nashettite. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Ubbaa wode k'ans's'ennaan S'oossaa woossite. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Ubbabaan galatite. Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosa Yesuusa baggana S'oossay hintteppe koyyiyaawe hewaa." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Geeshsha Ayaanaa tamaa toyissoppite. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Timbbitiyaa k'aalaa kad'oppite. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Ubbabaakka paac'c'ite. Loobaa oyk'k'ite. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Iita oosuwaa ubbaappe haakkite. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Sarotetsaa S'oossay bare huup'ew hinttena ubbabaan polo geeshsho; k'ay nu Goday Yesuusi Kiristtoosi yiyaa wode, S'oossay hinttenttu ayaanaa, shemppuwaanne asatetsaa ittippe borettennawaanne polo ootsiide naago." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Hinttena s'eesiyaawe ammanetteedawaa; k'ay hewaa I polana. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nuw S'oossaa woossite." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Ishatuwaa ubbaa geeshsha yeruwaa yeriide sarotite. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Hintte ha dabddaabbiyaa geeshsha ishatuwaa ubbaw nabbabanaadan, Godaa suntsan hinttena woossay." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ittippe gido. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Nuuni P'awuloosi, Sillaasenne S'imootoosi, Teselonk'k'en de'iyaa ammaniyaa asatoo ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafeetto. Hewanttu S'oossaa nu Aabbuwanttanne Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosawantta." 
2Thessalonians1:2 S'oossaa nu Aawuwaappenne Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosappe, aad'd'o keekatetsaynne sarotetsay hinttenttoo gido." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hinttenttu ammanuu loytsi dic'c'iyaa dirawunne, hinttenttu ittuu ittuwaa siik'iyaa siik'uu dariyaa diraw, nuuni hinttenttoo bessiyaawaadan, S'oossaa ubbaa wode galatanaw bessee." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Hewaa diraw, hinttentta yedesaynne waayiyaa ubbay gakkinakka hinttenttu genc'c'iyaawaanne ammaniyaawaa nuuni nu huup'ew S'oossaa ammaniyaawanttoo odiidde, hinttewaan c'eek'etteetto." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Hinttenttu waayettiyaa S'oossaa kawutetsaw bessiyaawantta gidiide paydettana mala, S'oossay pirddiyaa s'illo pirddaa bessiyaa mallaa." 
2Thessalonians1:6 S'oossay tumu pirddaa pirddana. Goday Yesuusi bare wolk'k'aama kiitanchchatuwaanna tamaa lac'uwaa giddon saluwaappe yiyaa wode, S'oossay hinttentta waayissiyaawanttu bolla waayiyaa ahana. K'ay waayettiyaa hinttenanne nuuna shemppissana." 
2Thessalonians1:7  
2Thessalonians1:8 K'ay S'oossay barena erennawanttanne nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa wonggalaa mishiraachchoo azazettenawantta murana. 
2Thessalonians1:9 He gallassi I bare geeshshatuwaan bonchchettanawunne k'ay barena ammaniyaa ubbatuwaan sabettanaw yiyaa wode, unttunttu Godaa sintsappenne Aa wolk'k'aa bonchchuwaappe shaakettiide, med'inaa bashshaan murettana. Gaasuunnekka, nuuni hinttenttoo odeedda kiitay ammanetteeda." 
2Thessalonians1:10  
2Thessalonians1:11 Nuuni hinttenttoo ubbaa wode S'oossaa woossiyaawe hewaassa. Nu S'oossay s'eeseedda de'oo hinttentta bessiyaawantta giide paydanaadan, nuuni Aa woosseetto; hinttenttu lo""obaa ubbaa amottiyaawaanne hinttenttu ammanuwaa oosuwaa I bare wolk'k'an polo." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Hewaan nu S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaaninne k'ay nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsan, Godaa Yesuusa suntsaa hinttenttu bonchchana; hinttenakka I bonchchana." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Hai nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa yuussaabawunne nuuni aanana de'anaw aakko shiik'anabaw," 
2Thessalonians2:2 timbbitiyaa Asay hinttenttoo odiyaawaan woy hara asaappe siseedda k'aalaan, woy ooninne nuuppe yeedda kiitaadan haasayiyaawan, «Godaa gallassay gakkeedda» giide hinttenttu ellekka dagammennaadaaninne wozanaa bayennaadan, nuuni hinttentta woosseetto." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Hinttentta ooninne ay ogiyaaninne baletsoppo. Ayaw gooppe, kasetiide makkaliyaawenne k'ay nagaranchchay, bashshaa na'ay k'onc'c'ennaan de'ishshin, he gallassay gakkenna." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Asay goyinniyaa ubbabaanne Asay S'oossaa giyaa ubbabaa I is's'ana. I barena unttunttu ubbaappe d'ok'k'u ootsana. K'ay haray atto S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa geli uttiidekka, «Taani S'oossaa» gaana." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Hinttenttu hassaykkitee? Taani hewaa hinttenttoo hinttenanna de'aadde odaaddi. 
2Thessalonians2:6 I bare wodiyaan yaanaappe attin, ha""i yaanawaa ayay Aa tek'k'intto, hinttenttu eriita." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ayaw gooppe, s'uuraa gideedda makkalay ha""i ootsee; shin he te""iyaawe ogiyaappe kichchana gakkanaw, I k'onc'c'enna." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, he makkalanchchay k'onc'c'ina, Goday Yesuusi bare doonaa peenuwaan Aa wod'ana. K'ay Yesuusi bare laa'entso bonchcho yuussaan Aa mulekka d'ayissana." 
2Thessalonians2:9 He makkalanchchay Sees'aanaa oosuwaan yiide, daro wolk'k'aan worddo malaataanne maalalissiyaawaa ootsana." 
2Thessalonians2:10 Hewaadankka, k'ay d'ayiyaa asatuwaa dumma dumma iita c'imuwaan baletsana. D'ayiyaawanttu attanaw tumatetsaa siik'iide akkibeenna diraw d'ayana." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Hewaa diraw, tumatetsaa ammanibeenna ubbaa asatuu, nagaraa ootsiyaawaan nashettiyaawanttu ubbay pirddettanaadaaninne worddo gidiyaabaa ammananaadan, S'oossay wolk'k'aama balaa unttunttu giddo yeddana." 
2Thessalonians2:12  
2Thessalonians2:13 Shin Goday siik'iyaa nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nuuni S'oossaa hinttenttu diraw, ubbaa wode galatanaw bessee. Ayaw gooppe, Geeshsha Ayaanaa wolk'k'aaninne tumatetsaa hinttenttu ammaniyaawaan hinttentta ashshanaw, S'oossay hinttena bayiraadan dooreedda." 
2Thessalonians2:14 S'oossay hinttentta nuuni hinttenttoo odeedda nu mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa baggana s'eeseeddawe, hinttenttu nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosanna ittippe bonchchettanaassa." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Simmi nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, minniide ek'k'ite; nuuni hinttena nu doonaan gidina, woy nu dabddaabbiyaan gidina, tamaarisseedda wogaa oyk'k'ite." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosi bare huup'iyaan k'ay S'oossay, nu Aawuu nuuna siik'iide, bare aad'd'o keekatetsan nuw med'inaa danddayaanne lo""o hidootaa immeeddawe, k'ay hinttenttu lo""obaa ubbaa ootsanaadaninne haasayanaadan, hinttenttu wozanaa minisonne mentsetso." 
2Thessalonians2:17  
2Thessalonians3:1 Wurssetsaan nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, Godaa K'aalay hinttenttu giddon, ellekka aakkanaadaaninne bonchchettanaadan, nuw S'oossaa woossite." 
2Thessalonians3:2 K'ay Asay ubbay ammanenna diraw, S'oossay nuuna nagaranchcha asatuwaappenne iita asatuwaappe ashshana mala, nuw woossite." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Shin Goday ammantsiyaawaa; I hinttena mentsetsananne k'ay iitaappekka naagana. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Nuuni hinttena azaziyaawaa hinttenttu hai ootsiyaawaanne k'ay sintsappekka ootsanawaa Goday nuuna hinttewaan ammantsee. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Goday hinttenttu wozanaa S'oossaa siik'uwaakkonne Kiristtoosi immiyaa danddayaakko kaaletso. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hinttenttu nuuppe akkeedda wogaa kaallennaan azalla de'uwaa de'iyaa ishaa ubbaappe hinttenttu shaakettanaadan, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa suntsan hinttena azazeetto." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni hinttenanna de'iyaa wode azallibeena diraw, hinttenttu nuwaadan haniide de'anaw bessiyaawaa hinttenttu hinttenttu huup'iyaan eriita." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Nuuni hintteppe oossinne tookuwaa gidenna mala, k'ammanne gallassi daaburiiddenne jaamiidde ootsiide de'eeddawaappe attin, ooppenne k'umaa c'oo mibookko." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Nuuni hewaa ootseeddawe hinttenttu nuwaadan haniide de'anaadan, nuuni hinttenttoo leemisuwaa gidanaadappe attin, hewaa hinttena oochchanaw nuw maatay d'ayina gidenna." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni haray atto hinttenanna de'iiddekka, «Ootsanaw koyyenna uray ooninne mooppo» yaagiide hinttena azazeeddo." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Ayaw gooppe, asaa yewuwaan geliyaawaappe attin, ayinne ootsenawanttu, azalla de'uwaa de'iyaa amareeda asatuu hinttenttu giddon de'iyaawaa nuuni siseeddo." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Nuuni hewanttu mala asatuu maara de'uwaa de'anaadaaninne ootsiide k'umaa maanaadan, Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa suntsan azazeettonne zoreetto." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Shin hinttenttu nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, lo""o oosuwaa ootsanaw azalloppite." 
2Thessalonians3:14 K'ay nuuni ha dabddaabbiyaan kiitteedda kiitaw azazettena uray ooninne de'ooppe, he uraa akeekite. I yeellatana mala, aappe shaakettite." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Shin ishaadan Aa seeriteppe attin, morkkiyaadan s'eelloppite." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Sarotetsaa Goday bare huup'iyaan hinttenttoo ubbaa wodenne ubbaa baggana sarotetsaa immo. Goday hinttenanna ubbaanna gido. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Taani P'awuloosi, ha sarotaa ta kushiyan s'aafaad; ta dabddaabbiyaa ubbaw hawe ta firmaa. Hawe taani s'aafiyaa ogiyaa." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna gido. 
1Timothy1:1 Nuuna ashshiyaa S'oossaynne nuuni be'ana giide nashechchan naagiyaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosi azazeedda azazuwaadan, Yesuusi Kiristtoosi kiitteeddawaa gideedda taani P'awuloosi," 
1Timothy1:2 ammanuwaa baggana ta tumu na'aw, S'imootoosaw ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafay. S'oossaa nu Aawuwaappenne nu Godaa Kiristtoosa Yesuusappe aad'd'o keekatetsay, maarotetsaynne sarotetsay new gido." 
1Timothy1:3 Taani Mak'idooniyaa baade new geeddawaadan, neeni Efesoonen gam""ana mala koyaad. Itti itti asatuu wordduwaa timirttiyaa tamaarissiino; hewanttu tamaarissenna mala, aggite gaade oda." 
1Timothy1:4 Unttunttu tossaa odiyaawaanne barenttu zariyaa gayriyaawaa agganaadan oda. Ayaw gooppe, hewaa malabay palumaa kaaletsee; k'ay S'oossaa k'ofaa ammanuwaan erettiyaawaa ootsikkino." 
1Timothy1:5 Ha azazoo waanna k'ofay geeshsha wozanaappe, lo""o suure wozanaappe, Asay be'o giyaabay baynna ammanuwaappe beettiyaa siik'uwaa dentsetsanaassa." 
1Timothy1:6 Itti itti asatuu hawaa aggiide, maaddenna haasayaakko simmeeddino." 
1Timothy1:7 Unttunttu ayaa haasayinttonne woy barenttun ammanettiide odiyaabay ayentto erikkino; shin S'oossaa higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawantta gidanaw koyyiino. 
1Timothy1:8 Asay bessiyaawaadan higgiyan goettooppe, higgii lo""a gidiyaawaa nuuni ereetto." 
1Timothy1:9 Ittibaa akeekanaw koshshee. Higgii loo asaw med'ettibeenna. Shin higgiyaa mentsiyaawanttoo, azazettenawanttoo, makkalanchchatoo, nagaranchchatoo, geeshshatetsay baynnawanttoo, tunatoo, barenttu daayo woy aabba wod'iyaawanttoo, shemppuwaa wod'iyaawanttoo," 
1Timothy1:10 woshummanaw kajjeeliyaawanttoo, attuma Asay attuma asaana woshummiyaawanttoo, asaa zal""iyaawanttoo, worddanchchatoonne wordduwaan c'aak'k'iyaawanttoo, woy tumu timirttiyaanna gakettenna ay oosuwaa gidinakka ootsiyaawanttoo keseedda." 
1Timothy1:11 He tumo timirttii anjjetteedda S'oossay taani awaayana mala, taw hadaraa immeedda bonchcho wonggalaa gidduwaan de'ee." 
1Timothy1:12 Taani ootsiyaa kiitaan taw wolk'k'aa immeedda nu Godaa Kiristtoosa Yesuusa galatay. Taana bare oosanchchaa suntsiide, taana he oosoo bessiyaa ammanettowaa giide paydeedda dirawukka Aa galatay." 
1Timothy1:13 Taani hawaappe kase Aa boriyaawaa, Aa yederssiyaawaanne tuggayiyaawaa gidooppenne, taw hawaa I ootseedda. Shin taani erennaan ootseedda dirawunne ammanabeenna diraw, S'oossay taana maareedda." 
1Timothy1:14 K'ay nu Goday zaway baynna bare aad'd'o keekatetsaa ta bollan gussiide, Kiristtoosa Yesuusa baggana nubaa gideedda ammanuwaanne siik'uwaa taw immeedda." 
1Timothy1:15 Kiristtoosa Yesuusi nagaranchchatuwaa ashshanaw ha sa'aa yeedda giyaa haasayay ammanetteedawaanne Asay ubbay tuma giide akkanaw bessiyaawaa. Ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa nagaranchchay taana. 
1Timothy1:16 Shin med'inaa de'uwaa akkanaw Aan ammananaw bessiyaa asaw taani leemisuwaa gidanaadan, ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa nagaranchchaw taw Yesuusi Kiristtoosa daro danddayaadan, S'oossay taana maareedda." 
1Timothy1:17 Ayfiyaan beettena med'inaa S'oossaw Ittoo, med'inaa Kaatew, med'inaappe med'inaa gakkanaw galataynne bonchchuu gido. Amen""i!" 
1Timothy1:18 Ta na'aa S'imootoosaa, kase nebaa timbbitiyaa odeeddawaadan, he odeeddawaadan lo""o olaa neeni olettana mala, ha azazuwaa new hadaraa immay." 
1Timothy1:19 Ammanuunne loo suure wozanay new de'o. Ittuu ittuu barenttu suure wozanaa yeggi aggiide, laaggiyaawe baynna markkabii bayiyaawaadan, barenttu ammanuwaa bayizzeeddinno." 
1Timothy1:20 S'oossaa boriyaawaa aggana mala, hewaa tamaaranaw taani Sees'aanaw aatsa immeedda Hemeneyoosinne Iskkinddiri unttunttu giddon de'iino." 
1Timothy2:1 Nuuni S'oossaa malatiyaawaan, geeshshatetsaa ubbaan, sarotetsaaninne ashikketetsan de'ana mala, asaa ubbaw, kaatetoonne suntsatetsay de'iyaa ubbatoo, S'oossaa oochchanaw, woossanaw, gaannatanawunne galatanaw bessiyaawaa ubbabaappe kasetaade taani neena erissay." 
1Timothy2:2  
1Timothy2:3 Asay ubbay attanaadaaninne tumatetsaa eranaadan koyyiyaa nuuna ashshiyaa S'oossaa sintsan hawe loiyaabaanne nashechchiyaawaa. 
1Timothy2:4  
1Timothy2:5 Ayaw gooppe, itti S'oossay de'ee; S'oossaappenne asaappe gidduwaan gidiide gaannatiyaa ittuu de'ee. Hewekka Kiristtoosi Yesuusa giyaa asaa." 
1Timothy2:6 I asaa ubbaa wozanaw barena ubbaw immeedda. S'oossay bare wodiyaan asaa ubbaa wozanaw koyiyaawaa bessiyaa markkay hawaa. 
1Timothy2:7 Taani S'oossaa k'aalaa odiyaawaa, Yesuusi kiitteeddawaanne k'ay ammanuwaaninne tumatetsaan Ayihuda gidenna asaa tamaarissiyaawaa gidaade suntseteeddawe hawaassa. Taani worddotikke; tumuwaa haasayay." 
1Timothy2:8 Hewaa diraw, ubba saan de'iyaa attuma Asay hank'k'uunne palumii baynnaan, bare geeshsha kushiyaa pude dentsiide, S'oossaa woossanaadan, taani koyyay." 
1Timothy2:9 Hewaadan k'ay mac'c'awanttukka bessiyaa mayuwaa yashshatetsaaninne barentta mooddiyaawaan mayyino. S'oossaw yayyay giyaa mac'c'a asaa bessiyaawaadan, lo""obaa ootsiyaawaanappe attin, huup'iyaa shurubbaa daddiyaawaan, work'k'aan woy ink'k'uwaan, woy daro al""o afilaan barena alleek'k'issoppino." 
1Timothy2:10  
1Timothy2:11 Mac'c'awunna ubbabaan moodettaadde, c'o""u gaade tamaaru." 
1Timothy2:12 Taani mac'c'awunna c'ou gaade de'uu gayippe attin, attuma asaa tamaarissunne woy unttunttu bolla aawotuu giikke." 
1Timothy2:13 Ayaw gooppe, Addaami koyro med'etteedda; Hewaana guyyeppe med'ettaaddu." 
1Timothy2:14 Hewaana c'imettaade S'oossaa higgiyaa mentsaadduppe attin, Addaami c'imettibeenna." 
1Timothy2:15 Shin mac'c'awunna ammanuwaan, siik'uwaan, geeshshatetsaaninne barena mooddaade de'ooppe, naanaa yeliyaawaan attana." 
1Timothy3:1 Ooninne woosa golliyaa kaaletsiyaawaa gidanaw koyyooppe, lo""obaa amotteedda giyaa haasayay tuma." 
1Timothy3:2 Woosa golliyaa kaaletsiyaa uray borissennawaa, itti machchatti s'alalay de'iyaawaa, barena mooddiyaawaa, barena naagiyaawaa, barew bessiyaawaa ootsiyaawaa, imatsaa mokkiyaawaa, tamaarissanaw danddayiyaawaa," 
1Timothy3:3 matsottennawaa, ashikketetsaappe attin walak'ettennawaa, palumettennawaa, shaluwaa siik'ennawaa," 
1Timothy3:4 naanay aw azazettiyaawaanne bonchchiyaawaa, k'ay bare golliyaa ayissanaw danddayiyaawaa gidanaw bessee." 
1Timothy3:5 Ayaw gooppe, itti uray bare golliyaa ayissanaw danddayennawaa gidooppe, S'oossaa ammaniyaawantta wooti ayissanaw danddayii?" 
1Timothy3:6 Otoruwaan sugettiid, s'alahiyaa kaappuu S'oossaa pirddan kunddeeddawaadan kunddenna mala, ooratsa ammaneedda asaa gidanaw bessena." 
1Timothy3:7 S'alahiyaa kaappuwaa boriyaaninne p'iriyaan gelenna mala, he uray woosa golliyaappe karenna de'iyaa asaan nashettiyaawaa gidanaw bessee." 
1Timothy3:8 Hewaadan k'ay woosa golliyaa maaddiyaawanttu Asay bonchchiyaawantta, laa""u doonaa haasayennawantta, daro woyniyaa eessaa ushennawantta, miishshaw yaaretennawantta," 
1Timothy3:9 ammanuwaa s'uuraa geeshsha wozanaa k'ofaan naagiyaawantta gidanaw bessee. 
1Timothy3:10 Hewanttu kasetiide paac'ettanaw koshshee. Paac'iyaa aad'd'owaappe guyyiyaan, woosa gollen ootsiyaawantta gidiide ootsino." 
1Timothy3:11 Hewaadankka k'ay unttunttu machchatuu Asay bonchchiyaawantta, zigirennawantta, barena mooddiyaawantta, ubbabaan ammanettiyaawantta gidanaw bessee." 
1Timothy3:12 Woosa golliyaa maaddiyaawe itti machchatti s'alalay de'iyaawaanne k'ay bare naanaanne bare golliyaa loytsi ayissiyaawaa gidanaw bessee. 
1Timothy3:13 Ayaw gooppe, woosa golliyaa maaddiyaawantta gidiide, lo""o oosuwaa ootsiyaawanttu barenttu huup'ew wolk'k'aama bonchchuwaa demmiino; k'ay Kiristtoosa Yesuusan barenttoo de'iyaa ammanuwaa loytsi s'aliide haasayanaw danddayiino." 
1Timothy3:14 Taani neekko ellekka baana gaade hawaa new s'aafay. 
1Timothy3:15 Shin taani beennaan gamooppe, S'oossaa gollen neeni woota de'anaw bessintto erana mala s'aafay. He gollii tumatetsaw tuussaanne baaso gidiyaa de'uwaa S'oossaa woosa golliyaa." 
1Timothy3:16 Nu ammanuwaa s'uuray wolk'k'aama gidiyaawaa ooninne sid'anaw danddayenna. Kiristtoosi ashuwaan k'onc'c'eedda; I s'illuwaa gidiyaawaa Geeshsha Ayyaanay markkatteedda. Kiitanchchatuukka Aa be'eeddino; Ayihuda gidenna Asay aabaa odina siseedda. Sa'aan de'iyaa Asay Aa ammaneedda; bonchchuwaan I saluwaa beedda. 
1Timothy4:1 Itti itti Asay wurssetsaa wodiyaan ammanuwaa agganawaa Geeshsha Ayyaanay k'onc'c'iyaan odeedda. Unttunttu worddo ayyaanatoo azazettana; k'ay s'alahatuwaa timirttiyaa kaallana. 
1Timothy4:2 Hawaa mala timirttii, tilla wozanaa tamaan bonk'k'eedda birataan guuddeeddawaadan donc'c'illeedda worddo asatuwaa baggana yeedda." 
1Timothy4:3 Hawanttu mala asatuu akkiyaawaanne geliyaawaa k'ay itti itti k'ommo katsaa miyaawaa diggiino. Shin ammaniyaawanttunne tumatetsaa eriyaawanttu S'oossaa galateeddawaappe guyyiyaan maana mala, S'oossay katsaa med'd'eedda." 
1Timothy4:4 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay med'd'eeddabay ubbabaykka lo""a. S'oossaa galatiide akkooppe, olettiyaawe ayaynne baawa." 
1Timothy4:5 Ayaw gooppe, he ubbabay S'oossaa k'aalaaninne woosan anjjetteeddawaa." 
1Timothy4:6 Hewaa diraw, neeni ishatuwaa hewaa hassayissiyaawaa gidooppe, ammanuwaanne neeni kaalleedda lo""o timirttiyaa k'aalaan ek'ooppe neeni Kiristtoosi Yesuusaw lo""o oosanchcha gidanaassa." 
1Timothy4:7 Shin ammaniyaa asaw loenna haasayaappenne k'ay c'ima mac'c'a asaa tossaappe bak'ata. K'ay S'oossaa malatiyaawaan neena loohissa. 
1Timothy4:8 Ayaw gooppe, Asay bare bollaa minisiyaawe laafa go""ee. Shin S'oossaa malatiyaawaan loohissiyaawe ha""ikka sintsappekka de'uwaa immana giyaa diraw, ubbabawukka go""ee." 
1Timothy4:9 Ha haasayay Asay ubbay akkanaw bessiyaa tumu haasaya. 
1Timothy4:10 Nuuni hewaa demmanaw daabureettonne loytsi ootseetto; hewoo nuuni hidootaa wotseeddawe asaa ubbaa, ubbaappe aatsiide, ammaniyaawantta ashshiyaa de'uwaa S'oossaa." 
1Timothy4:11 Hawaa azazanne tamaarissa. 
1Timothy4:12 Neeni yalaga gidiyaa diraw, neena ooninne kad'oppo. Shin ammaniyaawanttoo ne haasayan, hanotetsan, siik'uwaan, ammanuwaaninne geeshshatetsaan leemisuwaa gida." 
1Timothy4:13 Taani yaana gakkanaw asaw S'oossaa mas'aafaa nabbabiyaawaani, S'oossaa k'aalaa odiyaawaaninne tamaarissiyaawaan minna." 
1Timothy4:14 Timbbitiyaa odiyaawanttu haasayinanne c'imatuu barenttu kushiyaa ne bolla wotsina, neeni akkeedda, neenan de'iyaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa imuwaa toochchoppa." 
1Timothy4:15 Ne dichchay asaa ubbaw k'onc'c'ana mala, hewaa minisa k'oppa. Hawaa ubbaa wode ootsa." 
1Timothy4:16 Ne huup'iyaanne ne timirttiyaa naaga. Neeni hewaa ootsooppe, neenanne neeni giyaawaa sisiyaawantta ashshiyaa diraw, aggenaan ootsa." 
1Timothy5:1 C'ima asaa ne aabba bonchchiyaawaadan bonchchappe attin, toochchoppa. Yalagatuwaa ne ishaadan," 
1Timothy5:2 k'ay c'ima mac'c'a asaa ne aattiidan, yalaga mac'c'a asaa ne michchatiidan, kumentsaa geeshshatetsaan bonchcha." 
1Timothy5:3 Bare s'alalaa gideedda tumu ametuwaa bonchcha. 
1Timothy5:4 Shin amattiw naanay woy naanaa naanay de'ooppe, he naanay S'oossaa malatiyaawaa barenttu soy asaa bessiyaawaaninne k'ay hewaa ootsiyaawaan barentta yeleeddawanttu kushiyaa zaariyaawaa tamaarino. Ayaw gooppe, hewe S'oossaa nashechchiyaawaa." 
1Timothy5:5 Ayaa maaduukka baynna bare de'iyaa tumu amatta S'oossay immana gaade nashechchan naaga uttaaddu. K'ay gallassinne k'amma S'oossay izo maaddana mala, woossawunne oochchaw." 
1Timothy5:6 Shin barena ishalissiyaa amatta pas'a de'ooppekka, iza hayk'k'adiggaaddu." 
1Timothy5:7 K'ay ooninne unttuntta borenna mala, ha azazuwaa imma." 
1Timothy5:8 Shin barenttuwoo k'ay ubbaappe aatsiide, bare soy asaw k'oppenna uray oonanne gidooppe, hewe bare ammanuwaa kaddeeddawaa. Ammanenna asaappekka aad'd'iide aw iita." 
1Timothy5:9 Usuppun tammu laytsay kumibeenna amatti suntsaa maziggobiyaan s'aafoppa. Hewaa bollan k'ay iza itti asinaappe haraa gelabeennawunno gidanaw koshshee. 
1Timothy5:10 Naanaa dichchiyaawan, imatsaa mokkiyaawaan, geeshshatuwaa gediyaa meec'c'iyaawaan, waayetteedda asaa maaddiyaawaan, lo""o oosuwaa ubbaa kaalliyaawan, ha lo""o kiitaa kiitettiyaawaan eretteeddawunno gidanaw bessee." 
1Timothy5:11 Shin yalaga ametuwaa yekkonttu suntsaanna gatsa s'aafoppa. Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barentta, asinaa gela gela giyaa wode, Kiristtoosa agganawantta." 
1Timothy5:12 Koyro ammanuwaa kad'eedda diraw, unttunttu pirddettana." 
1Timothy5:13 Hewe baynnaan oosuwaa d'ayiide itti golliyaappe hara golliyaa yuuyyiidde, hamettiyaawaa salalaa gidennaan, barenttoo bessenabaa haasayiidde, zigirssaanne yewuwaan c'oo geliyaawaa tamaariino." 
1Timothy5:14 Hewaa diraw, nu morkketuu nu bolla haasayiyaa iitabaa demmenna mala, yalaga am""atuu asinaa geliide, na'aa yeliide, barenttu golliyaa ayissana mala zoray." 
1Timothy5:15 Ayaw gooppe, hawaappe kase amareeda am""atuu Sees'aanaa kaallanaw aggiide guyye simmeeddino." 
1Timothy5:16 Ammaniyaa mishirattiw hak'ankka dabbo amatuu de'ooppe, iza unttuntta maaddanaw bessee. Ammaniyaa asatuu maaduu bessiyaa tumu am""etuwaa maaddana mala, unttunttu ammaniyaawanttoo tooko gidoppino." 
1Timothy5:17 Loytsi heemmiyaa c'imatuu, k'ay ubbaappe aatsiide, k'aalaa odiyaawaaninne tamaarissiyaawaan daaburiyaawanttu, dakko bonchchuwaa akkanaw bessiino." 
1Timothy5:18 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Uddumaan katsaa yed'd'iyaa booraa doonaa k'achchoppa» k'ay, «Oosanchchay bare dirgguwaa akkanaw bessee» yaagee." 
1Timothy5:19 Laau woy heezzu markkay baynnaan, woosa golliyaa c'imaa mootiyaawaa sisoppa." 
1Timothy5:20 Haratuu yayana mala, nagaraa ootsiyaa ubbatuwaa asaa ubbaa sintsan seera." 
1Timothy5:21 Neeni ayinne asaa deemuwaa s'eellennan, ittuwaa ittuwaappe dummayennan ha azazuwaa naagana mala, S'oossaaninne Yesuusi Kiristtoosan dooretteedda kiitanchchatuwaa sintsan neena taani zoray." 
1Timothy5:22 O bollaaninne elleellaade ne kushiyaa wotsoppa. Haratuwaa nagaraan geloppa. Neena geeshshatetsaan naaga. 
1Timothy5:23 Neeni ubbaa wode sakettiyaa dirawunne ne uluwaa diraw, guutsa woyniyaa eessaa ushappe attin, haatsaa s'alalaa ushoppa." 
1Timothy5:24 Itti itti asatuwaa nagaray be'anaw k'onc'c'e; unttunttu nagaray unttuntta pirddanaw unttunttuppe sintsaw aad'd'ee. Shin haratuu nagaray guyyeppe k'onc'c'ee. 
1Timothy5:25 Hewaadankka, lo""o oosuukka k'onc'c'ee. K'onc'c'ibeennabaa gidooppenne, geemmanaw danddayenna." 
1Timothy6:1 S'oossaa suntsaynne nu timirttii borettenna mala, ayiletetsaa morgge mitsaa giddon de'iyaawanttu barena mooddiyaa godatoo bonchchuu bessiyaawaa erino." 
1Timothy6:2 Ammaniyaa asaa ayiliyaa gideeddawanttoo unttunttu godatuu unttunttoo ishaa gidiyaa diraw, unttuntta kad'oppino. Shin barenttu kiitaan go""ettiyaawanttu unttunttu siik'iyaa ammaniyaawantta gidiyaa diraw, unttunttu kasewaappe aatsiide ootsanaw bessee. Neeni ha yewatuwaa tamaarissanawunne odanaw bessee." 
1Timothy6:3 Ooninne dumma timirttiyaa tamaarissiyaawaa gidooppe, k'ay nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa tumu k'aalaananne nu ammanuwaa timirttiyaanna gakettenna uray daro otorettee; ayinne erenna. K'ay k'aalaa bollan palumettanawunne walak'ettanaw unttunttoo giigenna k'ofay de'ee. Hewe k'anaatiyaa, palumaa, boriyaa, iita sid'iyaa kaaletsee." 
1Timothy6:4  
1Timothy6:5 K'ay unttunttu huup'ii ootsenna. Tumatetsay baynna asatuwaanakka palumaa kaaletsee. Unttunttu S'oossaa malatiyaawaan durettana giide k'oppiino. Neeni he asatuwaappe shaaketta. 
1Timothy6:6 Shin taw de'iyaabay taw gidana giyaa uraa S'oossaa malatiyaawe dureyee. 
1Timothy6:7 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni ha alamiyaa ayinne ahibeykko; k'ay aappe ayinne afokko." 
1Timothy6:8 Shin miyaabaynne mayiyaabay de'ooppe, hewe nuw gidanawaa." 
1Timothy6:9 Shin durettanaw koyyiyaawanttu paac'iyaaninne p'iriyaan geliino; k'ay daro asaa bashshawunne d'ayoo goochchi afiyaa daro eeyanne k'ohiyaa amuwaan kunddiino. 
1Timothy6:10 Ayaw gooppe, shaluwaa siik'iyaawe iitatetsaa ubbaw pulttuwaa. Ittuu ittuu hewaa amottiide, ammanuwaappe balettiide, daro metuwaan barentta k'oheeddino." 
1Timothy6:11 Shin neenoo, S'oossaa asaw, hewaappe bak'ata. S'illotetsaa, S'oossaa malatiyaawaa, ammanuwaa, siik'uwaa, danddayaanne ashikketetsaa kaala." 
1Timothy6:12 Ammanuwaa baas'iyaa loytsa baas'eta. Daro asaa sintsan loo markkaa markkattaade, neena S'oossay s'eeseedda med'inaa de'uwaa oyk'k'a." 
1Timothy6:13 Ubbabaw de'uwaa immiyaa S'oossaa sintsaaninne, k'ay P'ens's'eenaawiyaa P'ilaas'oosa geetettiyaa gadiyaa mooddiyaawaa sintsan lo""o markkaa markkatteedda Kiristtoosi Yesuusa sintsan taani neena hawaa azazay." 
1Timothy6:14 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosi k'onc'c'ana gakkanaw, k'itay bayinnaaninne borii baynnaan he azazuwaa naaga." 
1Timothy6:15 Aa k'onc'c'etsaa, Itti suntsay de'iyaa anjjetteedda S'oossay, kaatatuwaa Kaatii, godatuwaa Goday, bare bessiyaa wodiyaan bessana." 
1Timothy6:16 Hayk'k'ennawe itti Aa s'alalaa. Ooninne Aakko shiik'anaw danddayenna poo'uwaan de'ee. Ooninne Aa be'ibeenna; k'ay be'anawukka danddayenna. Bonchchuunne med'inaa wolk'k'ay aw gido. Ameni. 
1Timothy6:17 Hai ha wodiyaan dure gidiyaawanttu otorettennaadaaninne k'ay nuuni nashettanaadan, ubbabaa palahissiide Nuw immiyaa de'uwaa S'oossaan ammanettanawaappe attin, aad'd'iyaa duretetsaan unttunttu ammanettennaadan, unttuntta azaza." 
1Timothy6:18 Unttunttu loobaa ootsanaadan, lo""o kiitaan durettanaadan, keekiyaawanttanne haratuwaanna shaakki akkiyaawantta gidanaadan azaza." 
1Timothy6:19 Hewaa yaatiyaawaan unttunttu sintsaw barenttoo mino baaso gidiyaa shaluwaa barenttoo shiishshino. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, unttunttu tumu de'uwaa akkana." 
1Timothy6:20 S'imootoosaa, itti itti Asay balaan eratetsaa giyaa eeyaa palumiyaappenne mela haasayaappe bak'ataadde, new imetteedda hadaraa naaga." 
1Timothy6:21 Ayaw gooppe, ittuu ittuu nuw eratetsay de'ee yaagiidde, ammanuwaa baleeddino. S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna gido." 
2Timothy1:1 Taani P'awuloosi, S'oossay immana geedda Kiristtoosi Yesuusanna nuw de'iyaa de'uwaabaa odanaw, S'oossay geeddawaadan, Kiristtoosi Yesuusi kiitteeddawe," 
2Timothy1:2 ta siik'o na'aa S'imootoosaw ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafay. S'oossaa Aawuwaappenne nu Godaa Kiristtoosi Yesuusappe, aad'd'o keekatetsay, maarotetsaynne sarotetsay new gido." 
2Timothy1:3 Ta zaratuu ootseeddawaadan, taanikka taana zoriyaa geeshsha wozanaappe ootsiyaa S'oossaa k'ammanne gallassi woossiyaa woosaan ubbaa wode neena hassayiyaa diraw, Aa galatay." 
2Timothy1:4 Taani ne afotsaa hassaya hassayaade nashettana mala, neena be'anaw daro laamotay." 
2Timothy1:5 Neenan de'iyaa worddo baynna ammanuwaa hassayay. He ammanuu beni ne daay daay Loydininne ne daay Ewuniik'in de'iyaa ammanuwaa mala; k'ay neenankka hewe de'iyaawaa eraad. 
2Timothy1:6 Hewaa diraw, taani ta kushiyaa laa""uwaa ne bolla wotseedda wode, S'oossay new immeedda imuwaa neeni doshissenna mala, neena hassayissay." 
2Timothy1:7 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay nuw wolk'k'aa, siik'uwaanne nu huup'iyaa naagiyaawaa immiyaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa immeeddappe attin, yashshaa ayaanaa immibeenna." 
2Timothy1:8 Simmi, nu Godaw markkattiyaawaan woy Aa diraw k'ashuwaan de'iyaa tawaankka yeellatoppa. Shin S'oossay new immiyaa wolk'k'aa keenaan taananna mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaw waayetta." 
2Timothy1:9 S'oossay bare k'ofaaninne bare aad'd'o keekatetsan nuuna ashshiide, bare asaa ootsanaw s'eesowaappe attin, nuuni ootseedda oosuwaa diraw gidenna. I ha aad'd'o keekatetsaa Kiristtoosi Yesuusa baggana wodii doomettanaappe kase nuw immeedda." 
2Timothy1:10 Shin hai ha aad'd'o keekatetsay nuuna ashshiyaa Kiristtoosi Yesuusa yuussaan nuw k'onc'c'eedda. K'ay hayk'uwaa wolk'k'aakka I d'ayisseedda. Wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa baggana bayenna de'uwaa nuw k'onc'c'isseedda. 
2Timothy1:11 Taani Yesuusi kiitteeddawaanne Ayihuda gidenna asaa tamaarissiyaawaa gidaade, wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odana mala, S'oossay taana dooreedda." 
2Timothy1:12 K'ay taani ha metuwaa akkiyaawe hewaa diraassa. Shin taani ammaneeddawaa eriyaa diraw, yeellatikke. K'ay I taw immeedda hadaraa he gallassay gakkanaw, I naaganaw danddayiyaawaa eray." 
2Timothy1:13 Taani neena tamaarisseedda tumu k'aalaa leemisuwaa uda oyk'k'aade, Kiristtoosi Yesuusan nuw de'iyaa ammanuwaaninne siik'uwaan de'a." 
2Timothy1:14 Nu giddon de'iyaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa baggana new hadaraa immeedda loobaa naaga. 
2Timothy1:15 Iisiyaa giyaa biittaan de'iyaa ubbatuu taappe bak'ateeddawaa eraasa; unttunttu giddon Pigeluusinne Hermogeneesi de'iino. 
2Timothy1:16 Henesifooru taana daro wode mentsetseedda diraw, Goday Aa soy asaw maarotetsaa immo. K'ay taani k'asho gollen de'iyaawaa I yeellatibeenna." 
2Timothy1:17 Shin Roome giyaa katamaa gakkeeddasaanna taana loytsi koyyiide demmeedda. 
2Timothy1:18 He gallassi Godaappe maarotetsaa demmanaadan, Goday aw immo. K'ay Efesoona giyaa katamaan I taana ay keenaa maaddeeddenttonne neeni loytsa eraasa." 
2Timothy2:1 Simmi ta na'aw, Kiristtoosi Yesuusan de'iyaa aad'd'o keekatetsan minna." 
2Timothy2:2 K'ay daro markkatuu de'iyaa saan taappe neeni siseedda yewatuwaa haratuwaa tamaarissanaw danddayiyaa ammanetteeda asatoo hadaraa imma. 
2Timothy2:3 Kiristtoosa Yesuusaw ammanetteeda wotaadaraadan, taananna waayetta." 
2Timothy2:4 Olaa biyaa wotaadaray bare kaappuwaa nashechchanaw, wotaadara gidenna Asay ootsiyaa kiitaan walakettenna." 
2Timothy2:5 K'ay wotsaan keesetiyaa uraykka wogaadan wos's'ana d'ayooppe, woytaa akkena." 
2Timothy2:6 Daro daaburiide ootseedda biittaa goshiyaa bitanii shiik'eedda katsaappe barena gakkiyaawaa koyro akkanaw bessee. 
2Timothy2:7 Neeni ubbabaa akeekanaadan, Goday neena danddayissana diraw, taani giyaawaa k'oppa." 
2Timothy2:8 Taani wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaawaadan, hayk'uwaappe denddeedda Daawite zariyaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa k'oppa." 
2Timothy2:9 Taani wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaa diraw, iitabaa ootseeddawaadan, haray atto k'ashettana gakkanaw waayettay. Shin S'oossaa k'aalay k'ashettenna." 
2Timothy2:10 Hewaa diraw, taani S'oossay dooreedda asatuukka Kiristtoosi Yesuusan de'iyaa atotetsaa med'inaa bonchchuwaanna demmanaadan, unttunttu diraw, taani ubbabaan waayettay." 
2Timothy2:11 Hawe, «Nuuni aanana ittippe hayk'k'eeddawaa gidooppe, aanana ittippe de'ana." 
2Timothy2:12 Nuuni genc'c'ooppe, aanana ittippe kaatetana. Nuuni Aa kaddooppe, ikka nuuna kaddana." 
2Timothy2:13 Nuuni ammanettennaan aggooppekka, I ammanettiyaawaa gidiide de'anawaa. Ayaw gooppe, I barena bare huup'ew erikke gaanaw danddayenna» giyaawe tumu haasaya." 
2Timothy2:14 Neeni ne asaa hawaa hassayissa; unttunttu k'aalaan palumettenna mala, S'oossaa sintsan zora. Hewe sisiyaa asaa bayizziyaawaappe attin, ayinne go""enna." 
2Timothy2:15 Neeni S'oossaa tumatetsaa k'aalaa suuretetsaan odiyaawaanne k'ay Aa oosoo yeellatenna oosanchcha gidaade, S'oossay sabbiyaa asaadan, ne huup'iyaa S'oossaw immanaw minna." 
2Timothy2:16 Shin ha sa'aw injjetiyaa maaddenna haasayaappe neena naaga. Ayaw gooppe, hewe S'oossaappe asaa haassee." 
2Timothy2:17 K'ay unttunttu tamaarissiyaawe bollaa c'ittuwaadan ubbasaa gakkanaassa. He tamaarissiyaawanttuppe laaatuu Hemeneyoosanne Piliis'oosa. 
2Timothy2:18 Unttunttu tumuwaa ogiyaa aggiide, «Hayk'uwaappe denddiyaawe kase aad'd'idiggeedda» yaagiide amareeda ammaniyaa asatuwaa ammanuwaa bayizziino." 
2Timothy2:19 Gidooppekka, S'oossay esseedda mino tuussay k'aas's'ana danddayenna. K'ay Aa bollan, «Goday barewantta eree»; k'ay «Godaawaa gidiyaa ooninne iita oosuwaa aggo» yaagiyaa K'aalatuu s'aafetteeddino." 
2Timothy2:20 Itti wolk'k'aama gollen work'k'aappenne biraappe med'etteedda miishshaa s'alalaa gidennaan, mitsaappenne urk'k'aappe med'etteedda miishshatuukka de'iino. Hewanttuppe baggatuu bonchcho oosuwaa unttunttun ootsanaw, k'ay baggatuu tooshettiyaabaa unttunttun ootsanaw med'etteeddino." 
2Timothy2:21 Hewaa diraw, ooninne ha iitabaa ubbaappe barena geeshshooppe, I bare Godaa go""iyaa oosuwaa ootsanaw barena immeedda diraw, bonchcho oosuwaa ootsiyaa miishshaa gidanawaa. K'ay lo""o oosuwaa ubbaa ootsanaw giigetteeddawaa gidanawaa." 
2Timothy2:22 Shin neeni iita wodallatetsaa amuwaappe bak'ata. Barentta maaddanaw geeshsha wozanaappe Godaa s'eesisiyaawanttunna ittippe, s'illotetsaa, ammanuwaa, siik'otetsaanne sarotetsaa minisaade kaala." 
2Timothy2:23 Shin eeyatuwaa palumiinne ayinne erennawanttu palumii walassaa kaaletsiyaawaa eraade aappe bak'ata. 
2Timothy2:24 Godaa k'oomay ubbaw keekiyaawaa, loytsi tamaarissiyaawaanne danddayanchcha gidanaw besseeppe attin, walak'ettanaw bessena." 
2Timothy2:25 K'ay I barena is's'iyaawantta ashikketetsan seeriyaawaa gidanaw bessee. Unttunttu barenttu nagaraappe simmiide, tumatetsaa eranaadan S'oossay ootsanentto, ooni eri." 
2Timothy2:26 K'ay unttunttu barenttu wozanaa k'ofaw simmiide, unttuntta bare koyyeeddabaw azazettana mala oyk'k'eedda s'alahiyaa kaappuwaa dabaappe kessi akkana." 
2Timothy3:1 Shin wurssetsa gallassi waayissiyaa wodii yaanawaa akeeka. 
2Timothy3:2 Ayaw gooppe, Asay barena siik'iyaawantta, shaluwaa siik'iyaawantta, c'eek'ettiyaawantta, ayyiyaawantta, boriyaawantta, barena yeleeddawanttoo azazettenawantta, galatennawantta, geeshshatetsay baynnawantta," 
2Timothy3:3 siik'uu baynnawantta, sigettennawantta, zigirssanchchatuwaa, barena naagennawantta, keekennawantta, lo""obaa dosennawantta," 
2Timothy3:4 ubbaa erikke giyaawantta, dirbbiyaawantta, otoruwaan sugettiyaawantta, k'ay S'oossaappe aatsiide, ishaluwaa dosiyaawantta gidana." 
2Timothy3:5 Unttunttu S'oossaw goyinniyaawaa malatiino; shin Aa wolk'k'aa kaddeeddino. Hewanttu mala asatuwaakko shiik'oppa. 
2Timothy3:6 Ayaw gooppe, unttunttuppe ittuu ittuu asaa golliyaa geliide, nagaray dees'eeddawantta, dumma dumma amuwaan sugettiyaawantta, ubbaa wode tamaariide, tumatetsaa era akkanaw mule danddayibeenna daaburanchcha mac'c'awantta baletsiino." 
2Timothy3:7  
2Timothy3:8 Yaaneesinne Yambbareesi Muse yewuwaa p'alk'k'owaadan, hewaadan k'ay hawanttu, suure k'ofay baynnawantta ammanuwaan kunddeeddawanttu, tumatetsaabaa p'alk'k'iino." 
2Timothy3:9 Shin Yaaneesa eeyatetsaynne Yambbareesa eeyatetsay k'ay k'onc'c'eeddawaadan, unttunttu eeyatetsaykka asaa ubbaw k'onc'c'ana diraw, unttunttu kasewaappe aad'd'iide dic'c'ikkino." 
2Timothy3:10 Shin neeni ta timirttiyaa, ta hanotaanne ta k'ofaa, ta ammanuwaanne ta danddayaa, ta siik'uwaanne ta genc'c'uwaa," 
2Timothy3:11 ta yedesaanne ta waayiyaa be'aadda. Ans's'ookiyaanne, Ik'ooniyoonenne Liss's'iraa giyaa katamatuwaan taana gakkeeddabaanne taani danddayeedda yedesaa eraasa. Goday taana he ubbaappe ashsheeda." 
2Timothy3:12 Tumatetsaan Kiristtoosi Yesuusan S'oossaa malatiide de'anaw dosiyaa ubbay yederssettana. 
2Timothy3:13 Shin iita asatuunne baletsiyaawanttu haratuwaa baletsiiddenne barenttu huup'ew baliidde, kaseppe iiti iiti biino." 
2Timothy3:14 Shin neeni he tumatetsaa ooppe tamaareeddenttonne eraade, neeni tamaareeddawaaninne ereeddawaan minnaade de'a." 
2Timothy3:15 Neeni guutsa na'atetsaappe doommaade Kiristtoosi Yesuusa ammanaade, atotetsay beettiyaa aad'd'eedda eraa immanaw danddayiyaa Geeshsha Mas'aafatuwaa eraadda." 
2Timothy3:16 S'oossaa Mas'aafaa ubbaan S'oossaa Ayyaanay de'ee. K'ay he mas'aafatuu S'oossaw ootsiyaa Asay kumentsanne loo oosuwaa ubbaw giigeeddawaa gidana mala, tumatetsaa tamaarissanaw, balaa seeranaw, bayizzuwaa suurissanawunne s'illotetsaa de'oo zoriyaa immanaw maaddiino." 
2Timothy3:17  
2Timothy4:1 Taani neena S'oossaa sintsaaninne, de'uwaan de'iyaa asaanne hayk'k'eedda asaa pirddanaw de'iyaa Kiristtoosi Yesuusa sintsan, k'ay Aa yuussaaninne Aa kawutetsaan neena zoray." 
2Timothy4:2 K'aalaa oda. Wodii injjetina injjetana d'ayina, minnaade oda. Daro danddayan asaa tamaarissaadde suurissa, seeranne zora." 
2Timothy4:3 Ayaw gooppe, Asay tumu timirttiyaa sisennaan is's'iyaa wodii yaanawaa. Shin Asay barenttu amuwaa kaalliide, sisanaw nashechchiyaawaa odiyaa tamaarissiyaawantta gujji gujji shiishshana." 
2Timothy4:4 Unttunttu tumu yewuwaa sisiyaawaa aggiide, tossaa sisanaw barenttu haytsaa wora zaarana." 
2Timothy4:5 Shin neeni ubbabaan ne huup'iyaa naaganaw bessee. Waayiyaa danddaya. Wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaawe ootsiyaa oosuwaa ootsa. S'oossaa k'oomaadan, ne ootsiyaa oosuwaa ubbaa pola." 
2Timothy4:6 Taana gidooppe, ta suutsay gukkiide yarshshettiyaa wodiinne k'ay ha de'uwaa aggaade biyaa wodii gakkeedda." 
2Timothy4:7 Taani loo baas'iyaa baas'etaaddi; wotsaa wos's'aadde wurssaad; ammanuwaakka naagaad. 
2Timothy4:8 Sintsappe taw s'illotetsaa kalachchay giigi utteedda. Hewaa s'illo pirddaa pirddiyaa Goday he gallassi taw immana. K'ay Kiristtoosi k'onc'c'anawaa dosiyaa ubba saappe attin, ta s'alalaassa gidenna." 
2Timothy4:9 Taakko ellekka yaanaw minna. 
2Timothy4:10 Ayaw gooppe, Deemaasi ha alamiyaa dosiide, taana aggiide, Teselonk'k'e giyaa katamaa beedda. K'erk'k'iisi Galaatiyaa giyaa gadiyaa biina, k'ay Tiito Dilmaas'iyaa giyaa gadiyaa beedda." 
2Timothy4:11 Luk'aasa s'alalay taananna de'ee. Mark'k'oossi taana kiitaan loytsi maaddanaw danddayiyaa diraw, Aa demmaade neenanna akkaade ya." 
2Timothy4:11 Luk'aasa s'alalay taananna de'ee. Mark'k'oossi taana kiitaan loytsi maaddanaw danddayiyaa diraw, Aa demmaade neenanna akkaade ya." 
2Timothy4:12 Shin taani Tikik'oosa Efesoona giyaa katamaa kiittaad. 
2Timothy4:13 Neeni yaadde, S'iro'aadaa giyaa katamaan Karppoosawan taani yeggaade yeedda ta gaabiyaanne k'ay mas'aafatuwaa taw akkaade ya. Shin dummayaade galbbaan s'aafetteedda mas'aafatuwaa ayaa giddoppenne, akkenaan yooppa." 
2Timothy4:14 Birataa k'os's'iyaa Iskkinddiri taana daro k'oheedda; Goday aw Aa oosuwaadan zaarana. 
2Timothy4:15 I nuuni odiyaawaa loytsi p'alk'k'iyaa diraw, neeni aappe neena naaga." 
2Timothy4:16 Koyro taana mootiyaa wode, ubbaykka aggeeddawaappe attin, taana ooninne maaddibeenna. S'oossay hewaa unttunttoo paydoppo." 
2Timothy4:17 Shin taani kumentsaa kiitaa Ayihuda gidenna Asay ubbay sisanaw odana mala, Goday ta matan ek'k'iide, taw wolk'k'aa immeedda. K'ay gaammuwaa doonaappekka taana ashsheeda." 
2Timothy4:18 Goday taana iitabaa ubbaappe ashshiide, bare saluwaa kawutetsaa sarotetsaan afana; aw med'i med'inaw bonchchuu gido. Amen""i." 
2Timothy4:19 P'irisk'k'illiw, Ak'iilassinne Henesifooru soy asaw ta sarotaa oda." 
2Timothy4:20 Erass's'oosi K'oronttoosa giyaa katamaan atteedda. Shin S'irofiimoosi saketteedda diraw, Miliis'e giyaa katamaan Aa wotsaad." 
2Timothy4:21 Balgguu wod'd'anaappe kase yaanaw minna. Ewubuluusi, P'udeesi, Liinoosinne K'ilawude k'ay hara ishatuu ubbaykka neena saro saro giino." 
2Timothy4:22 Goday ne ayyaanaanna gido. Aad'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna gido. Ameni. 
Titus1:1 Yesuusi Kiristtoosi kiitteedda taani P'awuloosi, S'oossaa ayili, ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafay. S'oossay dooreedda asaw ammanuu de'anaadaaninne S'oossaa tumatetsaa eraakko unttuntta kaaletsanaadan taani doorettaade kiitettaad." 
Titus1:2 Worddotenna S'oossay nuw ha med'inaa de'uwaa daro wodiyaappe kase immana geedda. 
Titus1:3 S'oossay nuuna ashshiyaawe likke wodiyaan bare k'aalaan hawaa k'onc'c'isseedda; I hadariide taana azazeeddawaadan, taani Aa k'aalaa oday." 
Titus1:4 Ammanuwaa ittippetetsaan ta tumu na'aa new Tiitoo, S'oossaa Aawuwaappenne nuuna ashshiyaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosappe, aad'd'o keekatetsay, maarotetsaynne sarotetsay gido." 
Titus1:5 Taani neena K'ars's'eesan aggaade yeeddawe, neeni attowaa giigissanaassanne, taani azazeeddawaadan, katamaa ubbaan woosa golliyaa c'imatuwaa dooranaassa." 
Titus1:6 C'imay borettennawaanne itti machchatti s'alalay de'iyaawaanne ammaniyaa naanay de'iyaawaa gidanaw bessee; Aa naanay shaluwaa bayizziyaabaaninne woy azazettenaan is's'iyaaban Asay amaassalenawantta gidanaw bessee. 
Titus1:7 Ayaw gooppe, he c'imay S'oossaa oosuwaa azaziyaa kaappuwaa gidiidde, pokkissennawaa, otorettennawaanne elle hank'k'ettennawaa gidanaw bessee; k'ay matsottennawaa, sugennawaanne yorattennawaa gidanaw bessee." 
Titus1:8 Shin imatsaa mokkiyaawaanne loobaa dosiyaawaa gidanaw bessee; k'ay akeekanchchaa, s'illuwaa, geeshshaanne barena naagiyaawaa gidanaw bessee." 
Titus1:9 Ammanettiyaa de'uu beettiyaa timirttiyaanna giigiyaa k'aalaa I loytsi oyk'k'o. Yaatooppe haratuwaa tumu ammanuwaa tamaarissiyaawaan mentsetsanawunne k'ay hewaa is's'iyaawanttakka zoranaw danddayanawaa. 
Titus1:10 Ayaw gooppe, azazettenawanttu, maaddennawaa haasayiyaawanttu, haratuwaa c'immiyaawanttunne k'as's'aretteedda Ayihuda ammaniyaawanttu bagga gideedda daro asatuu de'iino." 
Titus1:11 Unttunttu tamaarissanaw bessena pokkiyaa ogiyaan miishshaa demmanaw tamaarissiyaawaan golliyaa ubbaa bayzziyaa diraw, unttunttu haasayaa te""ana bessee." 
Titus1:12 Unttunttu giddoppe ittuu, timbbitiyaa odiyaawe unttunttoo, «K'aris's'eese Asay ubbaa wode, worddatuwaa, iita du'atuwaanne yoranchchaa; k'ay azalla asaa» yaageedda." 
Titus1:13 I markkattowe tuma; hewaa diraw, neeni unttunttoo mino ammanuu de'anaadaaninne k'ay Ayihudatuwaa tossaanne tumuwaa is's'eedda asatuwaa azazuwaa unttunttu sisennaadan, unttuntta minisaade seeranaw bessee." 
Titus1:14  
Titus1:15 Barenttu huup'ew geeshsha gideeddawanttoo ubbabaykka geeshsha; shin tunatoonne ammanennawanttoo unttunttu wozanaa k'ofaynne unttuntta suure wozanay tuneedda diraw, unttunttoo ayaynne geeshsha gidenna." 
Titus1:16 Unttunttu barenttu S'oossaa eriyaawaa k'onc'c'iyaan odiino; shin unttunttu sheneyiyaawantta, azazettenawanttanne oosuwaa ubbawukka giigennawantta gidiyaa diraw, barenttu kiitaan Aa erokko giino." 
Titus2:1 Shin neeni de'uwaa demmanaw giigiyaa timirttiyaa tamaarissanaw bessee. 
Titus2:2 C'ima attuma Asay ammanuwaan, siik'uwaaninne danddayan mino gidanaadan, k'ay matsottennawaa, bonchchettiyaawaanne barenakka naagiyaawaa gidanaadan zora." 
Titus2:3 Hewaadankka c'ima mac'c'a Asay geeshsha de'uwaa de'iyaawantta, zigirennawantta, woyniyaa eessaw moodettennawanttanne lo""obaa tamaarissiyaawantta gidanaw bessee." 
Titus2:4 Unttunttu S'oossaa k'aalay borettenna mala, barenttu asinatuwaanne barenttu naanaa siik'iyaawantta, barenttakka naagiyaawantta, geeshshatuwaa, barenttu gollen ootsiyaawantta, keekatuwaanne barenttu asinatookka azazettiyaawantta gidana mala, yalaga mac'c'awantta tamaarissa." 
Titus2:5  
Titus2:6 Hewaadankka yalaga attuma asatuu barentta naagana mala zora. 
Titus2:7 Neeni ne huup'ewukka loo oosuwaa ubbaan unttunttoo leemiso gida; neeni tamaarissiyaawankka ammanettiyaawaanne bonchchettiyaawaa gida. 
Titus2:8 Ne morkketuu nuuna zigiriyaabay unttunttoo d'ayiyaa wode unttunttu yeellatana mala, neeni borettenna lo""o haasayaa haasaya." 
Titus2:9 Ayiletuu barenttu godatoo azazettana malanne, unttunttunna palumettennan ubbabaan unttuntta nashechchana mala zora." 
Titus2:10 Unttunttu barenttu godatuwaappe wuuenna mala, k'ay nuuna ashshiyaa S'oossawaa tamaarissiyaawaa ubbabaan galatissanaw, barenttu ootsiyaa kiitaan ubbaa wode lo""anne ammanettiyaawantta gidiyaawaa bessana mala, unttuntta zora." 
Titus2:11 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay asaa ubbaa ashshiyaa bare aad'd'o keekatetsaa k'onc'c'isseedda." 
Titus2:12 He aad'd'o keekatetsay nagaraa oosuwaanne ha alamiyaa amuwaa nuuni agganaadaaninne nu huup'iyaa naagiide, S'oossaa malatiide, s'illotetsan de'anaadan, nuuna tamaarissee." 
Titus2:13 Nuuni nu wolk'k'aama S'oossay, nuuna ashshiyaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosi beettana geedda anjjetteedda bonchcho gallassaa naageetto." 
Titus2:14 Iita oosuwaa ubbaappe I nuuna wozanawunne loobaa ootsanaw amottiyaa bare geeshsha asaa kessanaw, nu diraw, bare huup'iyaa immeedda." 
Titus2:15 Neeni hawaa tamaarissa, ne kumentsaa maattaani zoranne seera; ooninne neena kad'oppo." 
Titus3:1 Unttunttu mooddiyaawanttoonne maatay de'iyaawanttoo moodettanaw, azazettanawunne lo""o oosuwaa ubbaa ootsanaw giigettanaadan unttuntta hassayissa; k'ay unttunttu O bollaninne iita k'aalaa haasayenna mala, oonannanne walak'ettenna mala, asaa ubbaa ashikketetsaanne sigatetsaa bessiyaawantta gidanaadan zora." 
Titus3:2  
Titus3:3 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni kase nu huup'ewukka eeyatuwaa, azazettenawantta, baliyaawanttanne amoonne dumma dumma nashechchaw ayiliyaadan moodettiyaawantta; k'ay iitatetsaaninne k'anaatiyaan de'iyaawantta; asaan is'ettiyaawanttanne ittuu ittuwaakka is's'iyaawantta." 
Titus3:4 Shin nuuna ashshiyaa S'oossaa keekatetsaynne asaa I siik'iyaa siik'uu k'onc'c'eedda wode," 
Titus3:5 I bare maarotetsaadankka, ooratsa yelettussaan haneedda geeyyussaaninne Geeshsha Ayyaanan ooras's'eeddawan nuuna ashsheeddawaappe attin, nuuni s'illo oosuwaa ootseeddawaanna gidenna." 
Titus3:6 S'oossay bare aad'd'o keekatetsan nuuni s'illanaadaaninne, I immana geedda med'inaa de'uwaa laattanaadan, nuuna ashshiyaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana Geeshsha Ayaanaa nu bolla darissiide tigeedda." 
Titus3:7  
Titus3:8 Ha haasayay ammanetteedawaa; S'oossaa asatuu loo oosuwaa ootsanaw giiganaadan, ha yewuwaa unttunttoo neeni minisaade odanaw koyyay; hawanttu asaw lo""anne go""iyaawantta." 
Titus3:9 Shin eeyatetsaa palumaappe, zariyaa paydiyaawaappe, walassaappenne higgiyaaban walak'ettiyaawaappe naagetta. Ayaw gooppe, hewanttu go""ennawanttanne maaddennawantta." 
Titus3:10 Shaakotetsaa med'd'iyaa uray geella asaa gidiyaawaanne bare huup'iyaan pirddiide nagaraa ootsiyaawaa eraade, itti gede woy laa""u gede Aa seereeddawaappe guyyiyaan, hewaa malatiyaa asaappe shaaketta." 
Titus3:11  
Titus3:12 Taani Ars's'emaasa woy Tikik'oosa neekko kiittiyaa wode, neeni taakko Nik'oop'iliyoona yaanaw minna. Ayaw gooppe, taani balgguwaa yaan shaac'c'anaw k'ofaa k'achchaad." 
Titus3:13 Higgiyaa eriyaa Zeenaasinne Ap'iloosi ogiyaa biyaa wode, unttunttoo ayaynne pac'c'enna mala, unttuntta loytsa maadda." 
Titus3:14 Nu asaykka maaddenna asaa gidiide attena mala, barentta loytsi koshshiyaawaa demmanaw, lo""o oosuwaa minniide ootsiyaawaa tamaarino." 
Titus3:15 Taananna de'iyaa ubbatuu neena saro saro geeddino. Nuuna ammanuwaan siik'iyaawantta saro saro ga. S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna ittippe gido. Ameni. 
Philemon1:1 Taani P'awuloosi, Yesuusi Kiristtoosa diraw k'ashuwaan de'iyaawenne nu ishaa S'imootoosi, nuunanna ootsiyaa nuuni siik'iyaa Pilimoonaw," 
Philemon1:2 ne gollen shiik'iyaa ammaniyaawanttoo, nu michchati Afibissinne nuunanna ittippe de'iyaa Kiristtoosa wotaadaraa Arkkipoosaw ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafeetto." 
Philemon1:3 S'oossaa nu Aawuwaappenne nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosappe aad'd'o keekatetsaynne sarotetsay hinttenttoo gido. 
Philemon1:4 Neeni S'oossaa asatuwaa siik'iyaawaanne Godaa Yesuusa ammaniyaawaa taani sisiyaa diraw, S'oossaa woossaade neena hassayiyaa wode ubbaan, ta S'oossaa galatay." 
Philemon1:5  
Philemon1:6 Neeni ne ammanuwaa haratuwaanna shaakkiyaawe nuw Kiristtoosi Yesuusa baggana yiyaa loobaa ubbaa erissana mala, taani S'oossaa woossay." 
Philemon1:7 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa asatuwaa wozanay ne kiitaan minneedda diraw, ta ishaw, taani ne siik'uwaan daro nashechchaanne mentsetsuwaa demmaad." 
Philemon1:8 Hewaa diraw, neeni ootsanaw bessiyaawaa ootsana mala, taani neena azazanaw Kiristtoosa baggana s'alooppekka," 
Philemon1:9 Taani P'awuloosi c'imeeddawe, Kiristtoosi Yesuusaw ha""ikka k'ashuwaan de'iyaawe, siik'uwaa diraw, neena woossay." 
Philemon1:10 Taani k'ashuwaan de'aadde aw aawuwaa gideedda ta na'aa Anaasimoosa diraw, neena woossay." 
Philemon1:11 I kase neena goenna; shin hai neenakka taanakka tumu goee. 
Philemon1:12 Taani wozanaappe dosiyaa Anaasimoosa neekko yeddowe ta wozanaa yeddowaa. Taani wonggalaa diraw k'ashetta utta de'ishshin, neena kochchiide, taana maaddana mala, ta matan Aa ashshanaw koyyay." 
Philemon1:13  
Philemon1:14 Shin neeni ne sheniyaadan ootsanaawaa koyyayippe attin, neenanna zorettennan wolk'k'an ayinne ootsanaw koyyikke." 
Philemon1:15 Anaasimoosi guutsa wodiyaa neeppe shaaketteeddawe, ooni eri simmiide, ubbaa wodekka neenanna de'anaassenttonne." 
Philemon1:16 Simmi hawaappe sintsaw Anaasimoosi ayiliyaa gidenna; shin ayiliyaappe I loytsi aad'd'ee; I taw ay keena siik'o ishee! K'ay I new asaa baggaanakka Godaa baggaanakka ay keena aad'd'eedda ishaa gidanddeeshsha! 
Philemon1:17 Simmi neeni taana ne laggetsaa giyaawaa gidooppe, taana mokkiyaawaadan, Aa mokka." 
Philemon1:18 I new bayizzeeddabay woy Aa bolla new ac'uu de'ooppe, taappe c'igaa akka." 
Philemon1:19 He ac'uwaa taani c'iggana gaade, taani P'awuloosi ta kushiyan s'aafay. Neeni taw ne shemppuwaa ac'ota utteeddawaa taani neena hassayissanaw koshshenna." 
Philemon1:20 Ee, ta ishaw, Godaa baggana neeppe maaduwaa demmanaw koyyay. Kiristtoosa baggana taana mentsetsa." 
Philemon1:21 Taani geeddawaappe daruwaa neeni ootsanaawaa eraade, k'ay ne taw azazettanawaakka ammanaade, hawaa new s'aafay." 
Philemon1:22 K'ay hinttenttu ellekka taw imatsay shemppiyaa golliyaa giigissite. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay hinttenttu woosan taana hinttenttoo guyye zaariide immana gaade k'oppay." 
Philemon1:23 Kiristtoosi Yesuusa diraw, taananna k'ashuwaan de'iyaa Eppaafiri neena saro saro gee." 
Philemon1:24 K'ay taananna ittippe ootsiyaa Mark'k'oossi, Ariss's'irokoosi, Deemaasinne Luk'aasi neena saro saro giino." 
Philemon1:24 K'ay taananna ittippe ootsiyaa Mark'k'oossi, Ariss's'irokoosi, Deemaasinne Luk'aasi neena saro saro giino." 
Philemon1:25 Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenttu ayyaanaanna gido. 
Hebrews1:1 S'oossay beni wode, nu aawotuu nabatuwaa baggana dumma dumma ogiyaaninne daro wodiyaan haasayeedda." 
Hebrews1:2 Shin ha wurssetsa wodiyaan, ubbabaa Aa laatissiide, yeletaa Aa baggana med'd'eedda bare Na'aa baggana nuw haasayeedda." 
Hebrews1:3 Na'ay S'oossaa bonchcho poo'uwaa p'oolee; k'ay kumentsaa S'oossaa eeshshaa akkiide, bare wolk'k'aama k'aalaan ha sa'aa naagee; yaatiide asaa nagaraappe geeshshiide, Ubbaappe Bolla S'oossaappe ushechcha baggana saluwaan utteedda." 
Hebrews1:4 S'oossay aw immeedda suntsatetsay kiitanchchatuwaappe d'ok'k'a gidiyaawaadankka, unttunttuppe Aa loytsi d'ok'k'u ootseedda." 
Hebrews1:5 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay bare kiitanchchatuwaappe oona, «Neeni ta Na'aa; taani hachche new aawuwaa gidaaddi» geeddee? Woy k'ay oona, «Taani aw aawuwaa gidana; ikka taw na'aa gidana» geeddee?" 
Hebrews1:6 K'ay S'oossay bare bayira Na'aa ha sa'aa yeddana haniidde, «Ta kiitanchchatuwaa ubbatuukka aw goyinnino» yaageedda." 
Hebrews1:7 S'essay kiitanchchatuwaabaa haasayiidde, «Taani ta kiitanchchatuwaa c'arkkuwaa kessay; k'ay ta oosanchchatuwaakka tamaa lac'uwaa kessay» yaagee." 
Hebrews1:8 Shin bare Na'aawaa haasayiidde, «S'oossaw, ne kawutetsaa oydii, med'i med'inaw de'ee. Ne kawutetsaa s'illotetsaan ahaassa." 
Hebrews1:9 Neeni s'illotetsaa siik'aade; naak'uwaa is's'aadda. S'oossay, ne S'oossay neena, ne laggetuwaappe aatsiide, nashechchaan ililissiyaa zayitiyaa okkeeddawe hawaassa» yaagee." 
Hebrews1:10 S'oossay hawaadan yaagee; «Godaw, koyro neeni sa'aa med'd'aadda; saluwaakka ne kushiyan med'd'aadda." 
Hebrews1:11 Hewanttu ubbay d'ayana; shin neeni de'ana. Unttunttu ubbaykka afilaadan wurana. 
Hebrews1:12 Neeni unttuntta gaabiyaadan dakkoyana; k'ay unttunttu afilaadan laamettanawantta. Shin neeni neenakka; ne laytsay ubbaakka wurenna» yaagee. 
Hebrews1:13 Shin S'oossay bare kiitanchchatuwaappe ittuwaanne, «Taani ne morkkatuwaa neeni gediyaan yed'd'iyaawaa ootsana gakkanaw, hawaan taappe ushechcha baggan utta» gibeenna." 
Hebrews1:14 Kiitanchchatuu ubbay S'oossaw ootsanawunne atotetsaa demmana asatuwaa maaddanaw S'oossay kiitteedda ayyaanatuwaa gidikkinooyee? 
Hebrews2:1 Hewaa diraw, nuuni siseedda tumu yewuwaappe sugetti wora beenna mala, he yewuwaa loytsi oyk'k'anaw bessee." 
Hebrews2:2 Ayaw gooppe, kiitanchchatuu odeedda k'aalay tuma gidiyaa diraw, naak'k'iyaa woy azazettena Asay ubbay muretteeddawaa gidooppe," 
Hebrews2:3 Yaatina, nuuni ha wolk'k'aama atotetsaa sheneko gooppe, waaniide attanee? Goday koyro bare huup'ew ha atotetsaa odeedda; k'ay I odeeddawaa siseeddawanttu nuw geeshshiide odeeddino." 
Hebrews2:4 He siseeddawanttu markkatteeddawe bolla S'oossaykka mallaa, ooratsabaanne dumma dumma malaataa kiitettiyaawaan gujji markkatteedda; k'ay Geeshsha Ayaanaa imuwaakka bare koyyeeddawaadan, gishi gatseedda." 
Hebrews2:5 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay nuuni haasayiyaa sintsaappe yaana alamiyaa, kiitanchchatuwaa moodissibeenna."
