Hebrews2:6 Shin S'oossaa Mas'aafay ittisaan hawaadan yaagee; «S'oossaw, neeni asaawaa k'oppanaw Asay ayee? Woy neeni aw hirgganaw I ayee?" 
Hebrews2:7 Neeni kiitanchchatuwaappe, amareeda wodiyaa Aa guutsaadda. Aa huup'iyankka bonchchuwaanne, sabaa kalachchaa wotsaadda." 
Hebrews2:8 K'ay ubbabaa Aa gediyaappe garssanna wotsaade moodissaadda» yaagee. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay ubbabaakka Aa moodisseeddawaadan aan moodettibeennawe ayaynne baawa; shin ha""i ubbabay aw moodettiyaawe nuw beettena." 
Hebrews2:9 Shin nuuni Yesuusa be'eetto; Yesuusi S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa baggana asaa ubbaw hayk'k'ana mala, amareeda wodiyaa kiitanchchatuwaappe garssa gideedda. K'ay hayk'uwaa waayiyaa I waayetteedda diraw, poo'iyaa bonchchuwaanne sabaa kalachchaa wotseeddawaa ha""i nuuni be'eetto." 
Hebrews2:10 S'oossay ubbabaa med'd'eeddawe, ubbabaakka naagiyawe, Yesuusi daro naanaa ahiide, barenanna bonchchissana mala, waayiyaa baggana Yesuusa balay baynnawaa ootseeddawaa bessee; ayaw gooppe, he naanaa atotetsaw kaaletsiyaawe Yesuusa." 
Hebrews2:11 Ayaw gooppe, asaa geeshshiyaa Yesuusawukka k'ay he geeyyeedda asaa ubbawukka Aawuu ittuwaa. Yesuusi unttuntta, «Ta ishatuwaa» giide yeellatennaan s'eesiyaawe hawaassa." 
Hebrews2:12 Yesuusi, «Taani ne suntsaa ta ishatoo awaayana. Maabaraa shiik'uwaankka neena galatana» yaagee." 
Hebrews2:13 K'ay I, «Taani ta ammanuwaa S'oossaan wotsana» k'aykka, «S'oossay taw immeedda naanatuwaanna taani hawaan de'ay» yaagee." 
Hebrews2:14 Naanaa giide I s'eesiyaawanttu, ashuwaappenne suutsaappe med'etteedda asatuwaa gidiyaa diraw, Yesuusi bare huup'ew unttuntta malatiide, unttunttu med'etaa akkeedda; k'ay I hewaa ootseeddawe, s'alahiyaa kaappuwaa hayk'uwaa bolla maatay de'iyaawaa bare hayk'uwaan d'ayissanaassa." 
Hebrews2:15 K'ay barenttu de'uwaa ubbaan hayk'oo yayyiide, hayk'oo ayiletiide de'iyaawantta ubbatuwaa ayiletetsaappe kesseedda." 
Hebrews2:16 Ayaw gooppe, Abraahaama zariyaa I maaddiyaawaappe attin, kiitanchchatuwaa maaddennawe eretteedda." 
Hebrews2:17 Hewaa diraw, asaa nagaray atto geetettana mala, S'oossaa kiitaan ammanetteeda maariyaa k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa gidana mala, ubbabaan I bare ishatuwaa malatanaw bessee." 
Hebrews2:18 Ayaw gooppe, I bare huup'ew paac'etteedda dirawunne waayetteedda diraw, paac'ettiyaawantta maaddanaw danddayee." 
Hebrews3:1 Hewaa diraw, S'oossay s'eeseedda geeshsha ishatoo, nu markkatetsaa S'oossay kiitteeddawaa k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa, Yesuusi Kiristtoosa k'oppite." 
Hebrews3:2 Muse bare kiitaan S'oossaa golliyaa ubbaan ammanetteedawaa gideeddawaadan, Yesuusikka barena dooriide, ha oosoo yeddeedda S'oossaw ammanetteedawaa." 
Hebrews3:3 Ayaw gooppe, kees'ettiyaa golliyaappe kees's'iyaa bitanii bonchchettiyaawaadan, Musewaappe aad'd'iyaa bonchchuwaa I akkanaw bessiyaawe eretteeddawaa." 
Hebrews3:4 Ayaw gooppe, golliyaa ubbaa kees's'eeddawe itti asaa; shin ubbabaa kees's'eeddawe S'oossaa." 
Hebrews3:5 Muse S'oossaa golliyaa ubbaan ammanetteeda oosanchchaa gidiide, S'oossay sintsaappe gaanawaa markkatteedda." 
Hebrews3:6 Shin Kiristtoosi S'oossaa gollen na'aadan ammanetteedawaa; nuuni akkana giide nashechchaan naagiyaawaa s'alatetsaaninne ammanuwaan naagooppe, S'oossaw golliyaa gideetto." 
Hebrews3:7 Hewaa diraw, Geeshsha Ayyaanay hawaadan yaagee; «S'oossaa k'aalaa hinttenttu hachche sisiyaabaa gidooppe," 
Hebrews3:8 hinttenttu aawotuu taw is's'i makkaliide, oytamu laytsaa ta oosuwaa be'eedda bazzuwaa paac'iyaa gallassaadan, hinttenttukka zoriyaa akkenaan is's'oppite." 
Hebrews3:9  
Hebrews3:10 Hewaa diraw, taani, he asaa hank'k'ettaade, ‹Unttunttu ubbaa wode barenttu wozanaan baliino. Ta ogiyaakka eribeykkino› yaagaad." 
Hebrews3:11 Hewaadankka k'ay, taani hank'k'etta c'aak'k'aade, ‹Taani shemppiyaa sa'aa unttunttu, ubbakka gelikkino› yaagaad» yaagee." 
Hebrews3:12 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, de'uwaa S'oossaappe hinttentta shaakkiyaa iita ammanenna wozanay hinttenan oonaninne de'enna mala naagettite." 
Hebrews3:13 Shin S'oossay hinttentta ubbaa gallassi hachche giide s'eesishin, hintteppe oonanne nagaray baletsina, zoriyaa akkenaan is's'enna mala, ittuu ittuwaa zorite." 
Hebrews3:14 Ayaw gooppe, nuuni koyro nuw de'iyaa ammanuwaa wurssetsay gakkanaw loytsi naagooppe, Kiristtoosanna ittippe shaakkana." 
Hebrews3:15 S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «S'oossaa k'aalaa hinttenttu, hachche sisiyaawaa gidooppe, he wode unttunttu is's'i makkaleeddawaadan, zoriyaa akkenaan is's'oppite» yaageedda." 
Hebrews3:16 S'oossay giyaawaa sisiide, aw makkaleedda asatuu oonee? Muse Gibs'eppe kaaletsina keseedda ubbatuwaa gidikkinooyee?" 
Hebrews3:17 S'oossay oytamu laytsaa oonan hank'k'etteeddee? Anhay woraan atteedda asatuwaa, nagaraa ootseeddawantta gidikkinooyee?" 
Hebrews3:18 K'ay S'oossay barew azazettenan is's'eeddawanttu I shemppiyaa sa'aa ubbaakka gelenna mala, unttunttoo c'aak'k'eeddawaappe attin, oossi c'aak'k'eeddee?" 
Hebrews3:19 Unttunttu ammanibeenna diraw, shemppiyaa sa'aa gelanaw danddayibeennawaa nuuni be'eetto." 
Hebrews4:1 Simmi S'oossay nuuna bare shemppiyaa saa, «Gelissana» geeddawe biraa gidooppe, hintteppe ooninne he shemppiyaa sa'aa gelennaan attena mala naagetto." 
Hebrews4:2 Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa siseeddawaadan, nuunikka siseeddo; unttunttu siseeddino, shin ammaniide akkibeenna diraw, ayinne unttuntta go""ibeenna." 
Hebrews4:3 Gidooppekka, S'oossaa kiitay sa'ay med'ettoodeppe doommina poletteeddawaa gidooppenne, S'oossay, «Taani hank'k'etta c'aak'k'aade, ‹Unttunttu taani shemppiyaa saa ubbaakka gelikkino› yaagaad» geeddawaadan, nuuni ammaneeddawanttu I shemppiyaa sa'aa gelana." 
Hebrews4:4 Ayaw gooppe, laappuntsa gallassaabaa ittisaan S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «S'oossay laappuntsa gallassan bare oosuwaa ubbaappe shemppeedda» yaageedda." 
Hebrews4:5 K'ay he sa'aan, «Unttunttu taani shemppiyaa sa'aa ubbakka gelikkino» yaageedda." 
Hebrews4:6 Wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa koyro siseeddawanttu azazettibeena diraw, shemppuwaa sa'aa gelibeykkino; itti itti asatuu yaa gelanawanttu de'iino." 
Hebrews4:7 S'oossay daro wodiyaappe guyyiyaan, Daawita baggana laa'entsuwaa itti gallassaa, «Hachche» giyaa k'aalaan keeriide, «S'oossaa k'aalaa hinttenttu hachche sisiyaawaa gidooppe, zoriyaa akkenaan is's'oppite» yaageedda." 
Hebrews4:8 S'oossay shemppiyaa sa'aa asaa afiide Iyyaasu shemppisseeddawaa gidintto, S'oossay hara gallassaawaa guyye keerenna." 
Hebrews4:9 Hewaa diraw, S'oossaa asaw Sambbataa shemppuu naagetti utteedda." 
Hebrews4:10 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay shemppiyaa sa'aa geliyaa ooninne, S'oossay bare oosuwaappe shemppeeddawaadan, ikka bare oosuwaappe shemppana." 
Hebrews4:11 Simmi Israa'eeliyaa Asay azazettenan is's'iide, S'oossaanna ittippe shemppiyaa sa'aa gelennaan atteeddawaadan, nuuppe ooninne hewaa mala eeno geenan is'uwaan yaa gelennaan attena mala minnoytte." 
Hebrews4:12 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa k'aalay med'inaw de'iyaawaannee ootsiyaawaa; laa""u baggana leefetteedda mashshaappekka aad'd'iide kuusee. He k'aalay shemppuunne ayyaanay, kuriinne kolzzii ittippe gakettiyaasaa shaakkana gakkanaw c'addee. K'ay asaa wozanaan de'iyaa koshaanne k'ofaa I shaakkee." 
Hebrews4:13 Nuuni ootsiyaawaa wochchiyaa S'oossaa sintsan ubbabaykka beettiyaawaappenne k'onc'c'iyaan de'iyaawaappe attin, Aa ayfiyaan geemmiyaa med'etay ayaynne baawa." 
Hebrews4:14 Simmi saluwaa beedda, k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa wolk'k'aama kaappuu, S'oossaa Na'ay Yesuusi, nuw de'iyaa diraw, nu ammanuwaa loytsi naageetto." 
Hebrews4:15 Ayaw gooppe, nu k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu nuuni daaburiyaa wode nuw k'arettanaw danddayee; nagaraa I ootsibeennaawaappe attin, nuunaadan ubbabankka paac'etteedda." 
Hebrews4:16 Simmi nuuna koshshiyaa wode maaddiyaa maarotetsaa akkanawunne aad'd'o keekatetsaa demmanaw, aad'd'o keekatetsay de'iyaa sa'aa S'oossaa araataakko, yayyenaan shiik'oytte." 
Hebrews5:1 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappatuu huup'iyaan huup'iyaan bare asaa giddoppe doorettiide, he asaa gishshataw S'oossaw ootsanaw, imuwaa immanawunne nagaraa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw suntsetteeddino." 
Hebrews5:2 I bare huup'ew daaburanchcha gidiyaa diraw, tamaaribeennawanttoonne baliyaawanttoo k'arettanaw danddayee." 
Hebrews5:3 Hewaa diraw, he k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu asaa diraw yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaawaadan, bare huup'e nagaraa dirawukka yarshshanaw bessee." 
Hebrews5:4 S'oossay Aaroona k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa gidana mala s'eeseeddawaadan, S'oossay s'eesanaappe attin, ooninne k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa gidiyaa bonchchuwaa barew akkanaw danddayenna." 
Hebrews5:5 Hewaadankka, Kiristtoosi k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa gidiyaa bonchchuwaa barew akkibeenna; shin S'oossay Aa, «Neeni ta Na'aa. Taani hachche new Aawuwaa gidaaddi» yaageedda." 
Hebrews5:6 Hewaadankka k'ay harasaan, «Malkki-S'edek'k'i k'eesa gideeddawaadan, neenikka med'inaw k'eesa gidana» yaageedda." 
Hebrews5:7 Yesuusi sa'aan de'iyaa wode, barena hayk'uwaappe ashshanaw danddayiyaa S'oossaa loytsi yeekkiiddenne afos's'iidde woosseeddanne oochcheedda; S'oossay Aa woosaa siseeddawe, I barena toochcheeddawaassanne aw yayyeeddawaassa." 
Hebrews5:8 Yesuusi S'oossaa Na'aa gidooppenne, bare waayetteedda waayiyaan azazettiyaawaa tamaareedda." 
Hebrews5:9 Yesuusi bare oosuwaa poleedda wode, barew azazettiyaa ubbaw med'inaa atotetsaa demmanaw gaaso gideedda." 
Hebrews5:10 K'ay S'oossay Malkki-S'edek'k'a suntsatetsaadan, k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa gidana mala, Aa suntseedda." 
Hebrews5:11 Nuuni ha yewuwaan haasayanabay darobay de'ee; shin hinttenttu akeekanaw azalla gidiyaa diraw, hinttenttoo odi gelissanaw waayissee." 
Hebrews5:12 Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu ha wodiyaan tamaarissiyaawantta gidanaw bessooppekka, S'oossaa k'aalaa koyro timirttiyaa hinttentta zaari tamaarissiyaa itti uraa koshshee; hinttentta ushiyaa maatsaa koshsheeppe attin, c'oommiyaa k'umaa koshshenna." 
Hebrews5:13 Maatsaa pakettiide de'iyaa ooninne gac'ino na'aa gidiyaa diraw, s'illotetsaa timirttiyaawaa erenna." 
Hebrews5:14 Shin mino k'umay iitanne keeka de'uwaa daruwaan shaakki ereedda wozanaama asaassa. 
Hebrews6:1 Hewaa diraw, Kiristtoosa timirttiyaa biro doommiyaawaa aggiide, wozanaama asaa timirttew sintsaw boytte; koyro nuuni tamaaranaw koshshiyaa timirttiyaa wod'd'i ek'k'iide tamaaranaw nuw bessena; he timirttii ayee gooppe, maaddenna oosuwaappe simmiyaawaa, S'oossaa ammaniyaawaa, s'ink'k'atatuwaabaa, kushiyaa wotsuwaabaa, hayk'uwaappe dendduwaabaanne med'inaa pirddaabaa." 
Hebrews6:2  
Hebrews6:3 S'oossay ootsite gooppe, hewaa nuuni ootsana." 
Hebrews6:4 Ayaw gooppe, ittoodekka poo'uu poo'eeddawanttanne saluwaa imuwaa baari be'eeddawantta, k'ay Geeshsha Ayaanaakka shaakki akkeeddawanttanne S'oossaa k'aalay lo""a gideeddawaa sisi ereeddawantta, sintsaappe yaana sa'aa wolk'k'aakka bochchi s'eelleeddawantta," 
Hebrews6:5  
Hebrews6:6 hewaappe guyye simmiide kaddeeddawantta nagaraappe laa'entsuwaa zaaranawe danddayettenna. Ayaw gooppe, hewanttu S'oossaa Na'aa mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishiide kak'k'iyaawanttanne asaa sintsan kawushshiyaawanttu mala." 
Hebrews6:7 Ubbaa wode bukkiyaa iraa ushina, gosheedda uraa go""iyaa katsaa mokkiyaa biittaa S'oossay anjjee." 
Hebrews6:8 Shin buluwaanne buuzzuwaa mokkooppe, ayinne go""enna; shek'aw shiik'i utteedda. K'ay wurssetsaan guudettana." 
Hebrews6:9 Shin nu siik'atoo, nuuni hawaadan haasayiyaawaa gidooppenne, hinttenttu atotetsaw gidiyaa lo""obay hinttenttoo de'iyaawaa ereetto." 
Hebrews6:10 Ayaw gooppe, hinttenttu ootseedda oosuwaanne k'ay ammaniyaawantta maaddeeddawaaninne ha""ikka maaddiyaawaan S'oossaa siik'eedda siik'uwaa S'oossay doganaw makkala gidenna." 
Hebrews6:11 Hinttenttu huup'iyaan huup'iyaan demmana giide, hidootaan naagi utteedda kumentsaa tumatetsaa wurssetsay gakkanaw, kasewaadan minisiide ootsana mala amotteetto." 
Hebrews6:12 S'oossay immana geeddawaa ammanuwaaninne genc'c'an laattiyaawaanttu mala hinttenttu gidanawaa nuuni koyyiyaawaappe attin, azalla gidanawaa koyyokko." 
Hebrews6:13 S'oossay Abraahaamoo immana giide c'aak'k'eedda wode, bareppe aad'd'iyaa wolk'k'aamay baynna diraw, bare huup'iyaan c'aak'k'eedda." 
Hebrews6:14 S'oossay Aa, «Taani neena anjjana; ne zeretsaakka c'orissana» yaagiide c'aak'k'eedda." 
Hebrews6:15 Hewaadankka, Abraahaamo genc'c'i naagiide, S'oossay immana geeddawaa akkeedda." 
Hebrews6:16 Ayaw gooppe, Asay bareppe d'ok'k'iyaa uraan c'aak'k'ee; k'ay he c'aak'uu palumiyaa ubbaakka te""ee." 
Hebrews6:17 Hewaa diraw, S'oossay bare immana geeddawaa laattanawanttoo bare k'ofaa ubbaakka laammennawaa geeshshi odanaw loytsi koyyiide, hewe tuma gideeddawoo c'aak'k'eedda." 
Hebrews6:18 S'oossay worddotanaw danddayenna ha laau laamettenna yewatuwaan, I immana geedda nu sintsan de'iyaawaa oyk'k'anaw aakko bak'ateedda nuw wolk'k'aama mentsetsuu de'ee." 
Hebrews6:19 Ha nuuni demmana giide nashechchaan naagi utteeddawe, nu shemppoo markkabiyaa oyk'k'iyaa k'aas's'enna birataa mala; he nuuni demmana giide, nashechchaan naagi utteeddawe eretteedda mino gidiide, Gaaridduwaa giddo geeshsha sa'aa gelee." 
Hebrews6:20 K'ay Yesuusi Malkki-S'edek'k'a suntsatetsaadan, med'inaw k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa gidiide, nu gishshataw nuuppe kasetiide, he sa'aa geleedda." 
Hebrews7:1 Ha Malkki-S'edek'k'i, Saleema kaatii, Ubbaappe Bolla S'oossaa k'eesay, Abraahaamo kaatetuwaa wod'iide olaappe simmishshin, aanana gakettiide, Aa anjjeedda." 
Hebrews7:2 Abraahaamo bare omoodeedda ubbaappe asiraataa kessiide, aw immeedda; Malkki-S'edek'k'a suntsaw koyro biletsay s'illotetsaa kaatiyaa giyaawaa; k'ay Saleema kaatiyaa I gidiyaa diraw, laa'entso biletsay sarotetsaa kaatiyaa giyaawaa." 
Hebrews7:3 Malkki-S'edek'k'aw daaya woy aawuu, woy aw zariyaa payduu baawa; k'ay Aa yeletaw doometsay woy Aa hayk'oo wurssetsay baawa; shin S'oossaa Na'aa malatiide, med'inaw k'eesa gideedda." 
Hebrews7:4 Nu aawotuwaa kaappuu Abraahaamo olaan omoodiide, aheeddawaappe asiraataa immeedda Malkki-S'edek'k'i ay keena d'ok'k'u giyaawentto be'ite." 
Hebrews7:5 K'eesaa gidiyaa Leewiyaa zaratuu Israa'eeliyaa asaappe, hewenne barenttu gade asaappe haray atto unttunttu Abraahaamo zare gidooppenne, asiraataa akkana mala, higgiyan azazetteeddino." 
Hebrews7:6 Malkki-S'edek'k'i Leewiyaa zare gidenna; shin Abraahaamoppe asiraataa akkiide, S'oossay immana geeddawaa naagiyaa Abraahaama anjjeedda." 
Hebrews7:7 K'ay anjjiyaawe anjjettiyaawaappe d'ok'k'u giyaawe paluntsenna. 
Hebrews7:8 Itti baggana, hayk'k'iyaa Asay asiraataa kessee; shin hara baggana k'ay, hayk'k'enna giide markkattiyaa uray asiraataa kessee." 
Hebrews7:9 Hawaadan haasayanaw haray atto, asiraataa kessiyaa Leewiikka Abraahaamo baggana asiraataa immeedda." 
Hebrews7:10 Ayaw gooppe, Malkki-S'edek'k'i Abraahaamona gakettiyaa wode, Leewii biro yelettibeenna; shin bare zariyaa Abraahaama gulbbatan de'ee." 
Hebrews7:11 Israa'eeliyaa asaw higgii Leewiyaa zeretsatuwaa k'eesetetsaa baggana imetteedda. He k'eesetetsaa kiitay balay baynnawaa gidooppe, Aaroonawaa mala gidennaan Malkki-S'edek'k'a mala hara k'eesay suntsettanaw ayaw koshshii?" 
Hebrews7:12 Ayaw gooppe, k'eesetetsay laamettiyaa wode, higgiikka k'ay laamettanaw koshshee." 
Hebrews7:13 Ha yewuu haasayetteedda uray hara zarii; Aa zariyaappe ooninne yarshshiyaasaan k'eesaadan ootsibeenna. 
Hebrews7:14 Nu Goday Yihudaa zariyaappe yeeddawe eretteeddawaa gidiyaa diraw, Muse k'eesatuwaabaa haasayiidde, he zariyaabaa ayinne haasayibeenna." 
Hebrews7:15 Malkki-S'edek'k'a mala hara k'eesay yeeddawaa gidintto, hawe aad'd'iide erettanawaa." 
Hebrews7:16 I asaa higgiyaaninne wogaan k'eesa gidibeenna; shin wurenna de'uwaa wolk'k'aan k'eesa gideedda. 
Hebrews7:17 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Malkki-S'edek'k'i k'eesa gideeddawaadan, neenikka med'inaw k'eesa gidanawaa» yaagiide markkattee." 
Hebrews7:18 Beni de'iyaa higgii laafanne maaddennawaa gidiyaa diraw atteedda. 
Hebrews7:19 Ayaw gooppe, Muse higgii ayaanne balay baynnawaa ootsanaw danddayenna; k'ay nuuni Aa baggana S'oossaakko shiik'ana giide nashechchaan naagi utteedda ubbaappe aad'd'iyaawe yeedda." 
Hebrews7:20 Hewaa bollan k'ay S'oossaa c'aak'uukka de'ee; haratuu k'eesa gideedda wode, hewaa mala c'aak'uu baawa." 
Hebrews7:21 Shin Yesuusi c'aak'uwaan k'eesa gideedda; S'oossay Aa, «Goday c'aak'k'eedda; I bare k'ofaa laammenna. ‹Neeni med'inaw k'eesa gidana› geedda» yaageedda." 
Hebrews7:22 Hewaa diraw, Yesuusi ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa c'aak'k'oo waase gideedda." 
Hebrews7:23 Kase k'eesatuwaa payduu c'ora; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu ootsana oosuwaa hayk'uu diggeedda." 
Hebrews7:24 Shin Yesuusi med'inaw de'iyaa diraw, Aa k'eesetetsay laamettenna." 
Hebrews7:25 Hewaa diraw, I unttunttu gishshataw gaannatanaw med'inaw de'iyaa diraw, S'oossaakko bare baggana yiyaawantta ubbatuwaa ashshanaw danddayee." 
Hebrews7:26 Nuw giigiyaa hawaa mala, k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu de'anaw koshshee; I geeshsha; aan geniinne kad'etsiyaabay baawa; nagaranchchatuwaanna I gakettenna; k'ay d'ok'k'a saluwankka I bonchchetteedda." 
Hebrews7:27 Hara k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappatuwaadan, I koyro bare huup'e nagaraw yarshshiide, k'ay guyyeppe asaa nagaraw hachche hachche yarshshanaw koshshenna; I barena yarshsheedda wode, laa'entsennaan itti gede yarshsheedda." 
Hebrews7:28 Ayaw gooppe, Muse higgii daaburanchcha asaa k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa ootsiide suntsee; shin S'oossay immana giide c'aak'k'eedda higgiyaappe guyye yeedda k'aalay med'inaw balay baynnawaa, S'oossaa Na'aa suntsee." 
Hebrews8:1 Nuuni haasayiyaa wolk'k'aamabay hawaa; saluwaan Ubbaappe Bolla S'oossay uttiyaa kawutetsaa oydiyaappe ushechcha baggana utteedda k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu, hawaa malay nuw de'ee." 
Hebrews8:2 Geeshsha Sa'aaninne tumu Dunkkaaniyaan I ootsee; he Dunkkaanii Asay esseeddawaa gidennaan, S'oossay esseeddawaa." 
Hebrews8:3 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu ubbay imuwaanne yarshshuwaa S'oossaw immanaw suntsetteedda diraw, ha k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappookka yarshshanaw ittibay de'anaw koshshee." 
Hebrews8:4 Simmi sa'aan I de'iyaawaa gidooppe, ubbakka k'eesa gidenna; ayaw gooppe, higgii azaziyaawaadan, imuwaa immiyaa k'eesatuu de'iino." 
Hebrews8:5 Unttunttu k'eesatuwaadan ootsiyaa kiitay saluwaan de'iyaa oosoo tumu leemisuwaanne eeshuwaa; ayaw gooppe, Muse Dunkkaaniyaa essana hanishin, S'oossay Aa, «Akeeka; ubbabaakka taani neena deriyaa huup'iyaan besseedda leemisuwaa kaalaade ootsa» yaageedda." 
Hebrews8:6 Shin Yesuusi gaannatiyaa c'aak'uu kasewaappe aad'd'iyaawaadankka, aw imetteedda oosuukka unttunttuwaappe aad'd'ee; ayaw gooppe, he c'aak'uu S'oossay immana geedda ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa kiitaan oosetteedda." 
Hebrews8:7 Ayaw gooppe, koyro c'aak'uwaan balay baynnawaa gidintto, laa'entso c'aak'uwaa koshshenna." 
Hebrews8:8 Shin unttuntta boriidde, Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Taani Israa'eeliyaa asaananne Yihudaa asaana, ooratsa c'aak'uwaa c'aak'k'etiyaa gallassatuu yaanawaa." 
Hebrews8:9 He c'aak'uu taani Gibs'e gadiyaappe, unttunttu aawotuwaa kushiyaa oyk'k'aade, goochcha kesseedda wode, unttunttunna c'aak'k'eteedda c'aak'uwaa mala gidenna. Unttunttu ta c'aak'uwaan ammanettibeenna diraw, taanikka unttuntta aggaad. Taani, Goday, hawaa oday." 
Hebrews8:10 Ayaw gooppe, he gallassatuwaappe guyyiyaan, taani Israa'eeliyaa asaana c'aak'k'etana c'aak'uu hawaa: Taani ta higgiyaa unttunttu k'ofaan wotsana; k'ay unttunttu wozanaankka s'aafana. Taani unttunttu S'oossaa gidana; unttunttukka ta asaa gidana." 
Hebrews8:11 Unttunttuppe ooninne bare shooruwaa, woy bare ishaa, ‹Godaa era› yaagiide tamaarissenna. Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu na'aappe c'imaa gakkanaw ubbay taana eriino." 
Hebrews8:12 Taani unttunttu naak'uwaa maarana; unttunttu nagaraakka laa'entso hassaykke» yaagee. 
Hebrews8:13 S'oossay ooratsa c'aak'uwaa giide haasayiyaawan koyrowaa ec'iseedda; k'ay ec'iyaabaynne wuriyaabay ellekka d'ayana. 
Hebrews9:1 Koyro c'aak'k'oo S'oossaw goyinniyaa wogaynne Asay ootseedda Geeshsha Gollii de'ee. 
Hebrews9:2 Ayaw gooppe, koyro Dunkkaanii ek'k'eedda; Aa gidduwaan muk'aaddaa wotsiyaawe, s'arap'p'eezaynne Godaa sintsan wotsiyaa ukitsay de'ee; he sa'ay Geeshsha sa'aa giide s'eeseettee." 
Hebrews9:3 Laa'entso gaaridduwaa guyye baggana Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha Sa'aa geetettiyaa Dunkkaanii de'ee. 
Hebrews9:4 Aa gidduwaan is'aanaa c'uwayanaw work'k'aappe ootseedda saas'iniinne ubba saanna work'k'aan sheeshsheedda K'aalaa c'aak'uwaa Taabootay de'ee. He K'aalaa c'aak'uwaa Taabootan mannay de'iyaa work'k'aa s'aaruu, Aaroona s'am""ay aac'eeddawenne k'ay Muse higgii s'aafetteedda laa""u masetteedda shuchchatuu de'iino." 
Hebrews9:5 He k'aalaa c'aak'uwaa Taabootaappe bolla baggana atto giyaa sa'aa k'umiyaa barenttu k'efiyaan gentsiyaa bonchcho kiruubetuu de'iino; shin ha ubbabaa hai wurssi odanaw danddayokko. 
Hebrews9:6 Hewe hewaadan giigi de'ishshin, k'eesatuu ubbaa wode, barenttu oosuwaa ootsanaw koyro Dunkkaaniyaa geliino." 
Hebrews9:7 Shin k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa s'alalay laa'entso Dunkkaaniyaa laytsaappe itti gede geliidde bare dirawunne erennaan Asay ootseedda nagaraa diraw, S'oossaw yarshshiyaa suutsaa akkiide gelee." 
Hebrews9:8 Koyro Dunkkaanii ek'k'ide'ishshin, ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa geeshsha sa'aa afiyaa ogii biro dooyettibeennawaa Geeshsha Ayyaanay hewan erissee." 
Hebrews9:9 He Dunkkaanii ha wodew leemisuwaa; hewaa giyaawe S'oossaw immiyaa imuunne yarshshuu goyinniyaawaa suure wozanaa balay baynnawaa ootsanaw danddaykkino. 
Hebrews9:10 Hewanttu muussaabaa, ushshaabaanne dumma dumma meechchaabaa odiyaa kare bagga wogatuwaa; unttunttu ooras's'iyaa wodii gakkanaw oosettiyaa wogatuwaa." 
Hebrews9:11 Shin Kiristtoosi hawaan de'iyaa loobaw k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa gidiide yi diggeedda. I geliide ootsiyaa Dunkkaanii ubbaappe aad'd'iyaawaanne balay baynnawaa; k'ay he Dunkkaaniyaa Asay ootsibeenna; ha med'etteedda sa'aabaakka gidenna. 
Hebrews9:12 Kiristtoosi Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha sa'aa geliyaa wode, deeshshaa suutsaanne galo maraa suutsaa oyk'k'iide gelibeenna; shin bare suutsaa oyk'k'iide, nuw med'inaa atotetsaa immiide, laa'etsennaan itti gede geleedda." 
Hebrews9:13 Tuneedda asaa bolla korumaa suutsaanne deeshshaa suutsaa c'ac'c'afiide, guudetteedda ussatti bidintsaa k'olina, he uraa tunatetsaappe geeshshanaw danddayooppe," 
Hebrews9:14 Med'inaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa baggana balay baynna yarshshuwaadan, S'oossaw barena immeedda Kiristtoosa suutsay, nuuni de'uwaa S'oossaw ootsana mala, kase nu hayk'k'eedda oosuwaappe nu suure wozanaa wooti geeshshanddeeshsha!" 
Hebrews9:15 Hewaa diraw, S'oossay s'eeseeddawanttu I immana geedda med'inaa anjjuwaa laattana mala, Kiristtoosi ooratsa c'aak'k'oo gaannateedda; hewe hanana danddayiyaawe, Asay koyro c'aak'uwaappe garssan de'iidde ootseedda balaa ayiletetsaappe kessiyaa hayk'uu de'iyaa diraassa." 
Hebrews9:16 Ayaw gooppe, hayk'k'iyaa uray woyteeddawe de'ooppe, he uray hayk'k'owe erettanaw koshshee." 
Hebrews9:17 Ayaw gooppe, woyteedda uray hayk'k'eedda wode, I woyteeddawe poletteedda; he woyteeddawe pas'a de'ishshin, ayinne polettenna." 
Hebrews9:18 Haray atto, koyro c'aak'uukka suutsay baynnaan injjetibeennawe hawaassa." 
Hebrews9:19 Ayaw gooppe, higgiyan de'iyaa azazuwaa ubbaa Muse asaa ubbaw odeedda; hewaappe guyyiyaan, galo maraa suutsaanne deeshshaa suutsaa, haatsaanna, zo'o dorssaa isikiyaannanne hisoop'p'iyaa giyaa mitsaa bonc'c'iyaanna ittippe akkiide, «Hawe hinttentta S'oossay azazeedda c'aak'uwaa suutsaa» yaagiide, higgiyaa mas'aafaa bollanne asaa ubbaa bolla c'ac'c'afeedda." 
Hebrews9:20  
Hebrews9:21 Hewaadankka, Dunkkaaniyaa bollanne ootsiyaa miishshaa ubbaa bolla suutsaa Muse c'ac'c'afeedda." 
Hebrews9:22 Higgii giyaawaadan, tumukka amareedawaappe attin, ubbabaykka suutsan geeyyee; suutsay gukkana d'ayooppe, atotetsay baawa." 
Hebrews9:23 Hewaa diraw, saluwaan de'iyaawantta malatiyaawanttu he yarshshuwaan geeyyanaw koshshee; shin saluwaan de'iyaawanttukka barenttu huup'ew geeyyanaw aad'd'iyaa yarshshuwaa unttuntta koshshee." 
Hebrews9:24 Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosi tumu geeshsha san leemisettiyaa Asay ootseedda geeshsha sa'aa gelibeenna; shin I ha""i nu gishshataw S'oossaa sintsan beettanaw yaa saluwaa geleedda." 
Hebrews9:25 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu laytsaan laytsaan bare suutsaa gidennawaa oyk'k'iide, Geeshsha sa'aa geliyaawaadan, Kiristtoosi barena ubbaade yarshshanaw gelibeenna." 
Hebrews9:26 Hewaa gidintto, Kiristtoosi sa'ay med'ettoodeppe doommiide daro gede waayettanaw koshshee; shin ha""i wodiyaa wurssetsaan nagaraa d'ayissanaw barena yarshshiide, laa'etsennaan itti gede beetteedda." 
Hebrews9:27 Asay ubbay itti gede hayk'k'anaw bessee; hewaappe guyyiyaan S'oossay asaa pirddana. 
Hebrews9:28 Hewaadankka, k'ay Kiristtoosi daro asaa nagaraa d'ayissanaw itti gede yarshshetteedda; k'ay I barena loytsi naagiyaawantta ashshanaw beettanaappe attin, laa'entso nagaraa tookkanaw beettena." 
Hebrews10:1 Ayaw gooppe, higgew yaana lo""obaa eeshuwaa s'alalay de'ee; aw tumu leemisuu baawa. Ubbaa wode laytsan laytsan itti mala yarshshuu yarshshettee; hewaa diraw, higgii S'oossaakko shiik'iyaa asaa he yarshshuwaan balay baynna asaa ootsanaw ubbaakka danddayenna." 
Hebrews10:2 S'oossaw goyinniyaa Asay bare nagaraappe ubbaanna geeyyeeddabaa gidintto, suure wozanaan laa'entsuwaa nagaraa k'oppenna; k'ay yarshshiyaawaakka aggana." 
Hebrews10:3 Shin Asay laytsan laytsan he yarshshuwaan bare nagaraa hassayee. 
Hebrews10:4 Ayaw gooppe, korumaa suutsaynne deeshshaa suutsay nagaraa d'ayissanaw ubbaakka danddayenna." 
Hebrews10:5 Hewaa diraw, Kiristtoosi ha alamiyaa yaana haniidde, hawaadan yaageedda; «Neeni yarshshuwaanne imuwaa koyyabeykka; shin taw bollaa giigissaadda." 
Hebrews10:6 Neeni s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaaninne, nagaraa yarshshuwaan ubbaakka nashetakka." 
Hebrews10:7 Taani he wode, ‹S'aatsa mas'aafan tabay s'aafetteeddawaadankka, S'oossaw, taani neeni koyiyaawaa ootsanaw yaad› yaagaad» yaageedda." 
Hebrews10:8 Yarshshuu yarshshettana mala, higgii azaziyaawaa gidooppenne, Kiristtoosi koyro, «Neeni yarshshuwaa, imotaa, s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaanne nagaraa yarshshuwaa ubbaakka koyyabeykka; hewaanttun nashettakka» yaageedda." 
Hebrews10:9 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Kiristtoosi, «S'oossaw, taani neeni koyiyaawaa ootsanaw yaad» yaageedda. Hewaa diraw, Kiristtoosi laa'entsuwaa essanaw koyrowaa d'ayissee." 
Hebrews10:10 Yesuusi Kiristtoosi S'oossay koyyeeddawaa ootseedda diraw, bare ashuwaa laa'entsennaan itti gede yarshsheeddawaan nuuni nu nagaraappe geeyyi aggeeddo." 
Hebrews10:11 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuu hachche hachche ek'k'iide, bare oosuwaa ootsiino; k'ay nagaraa d'ayissanaw ubbaakka danddayenna itti mala yarshshuwaa zaari zaariide yarshshiino." 
Hebrews10:12 Shin Kiristtoosi nagaraa diraw, ubbaa wodew gideedda itti yarshshuwaa yarshshiide, S'oossaappe ushechcha baggana utti aggeedda." 
Hebrews10:13 S'oossay sintsappe Kiristtoosa morkkatuwaa Kiristtoosaw gediyaan yed'd'iyaawaa ootsana gakkanaw, yaan naagee." 
Hebrews10:14 Ayaw gooppe, I itti gede yarshsheeddawaan, nagaraappe geeyyeeddawantta med'inaw balay baynnawantta ootseedda." 
Hebrews10:15 K'ay Geeshsha Ayyaanay nuw markkattiidde, hawaadan yaagee;" 
Hebrews10:16 «Taani he gallassatuwaappe guyyiyaan, unttunttunna c'aak'k'etiyaa c'aak'uu hawaa: Taani ta higgiyaa unttunttu k'ofaan wotsana; k'ay unttunttu wozanaankka s'aafana» yaagee." 
Hebrews10:17 K'ay hewaappe guyyenna, «Taani unttunttu nagaraanne, unttunttu makkala oosuwaa laa'entso hassaykke» yaagee." 
Hebrews10:18 S'oossay he nagaraa atto geedda wode, nagaraa d'ayissanaw hawaappe sintsaw yarshshuwaa koshshenna." 
Hebrews10:19 Simmi taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, nuuni Yesuusa suutsaa baggana Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha sa'aa gelanaw nuw s'alatetsay de'ee." 
Hebrews10:20 Kiristtoosi nuw ooratsa ogiyaanne de'uwaa ogiyaa gaaridduwaa baggana, hewaa guussay bare bollaa baggana dooyyeedda." 
Hebrews10:21 Nuw S'oossaa gollen suntsetteedda wolk'k'aama k'eesay de'iyaa diraw," 
Hebrews10:22 Nuuni suure wozanaanna, tumu ammanuwaanna, iita wozanaappe geeyyeedda wozanaannanne k'ay s'illo haatsaan meec'etteedda bollaanna S'oossaakko shiik'oytte." 
Hebrews10:23 Nuw immana geedda S'oossay ammantsiyaa diraw, nuuni demmana giide nashechchaan naagi utteeddawaa loytsi oyk'k'oytte." 
Hebrews10:24 Ittuu ittuwaanna waan siik'ettanenttonne k'ay loo oosuwaa wooti ootsanentto, ittuu ittoo k'oppeetto." 
Hebrews10:25 Ittuu ittuu shiik'uwaa dooyaa ootsiide shiik'iyaawaadan, nuunikka ittippe shiik'iyaawaa aggokko; shin Godaa gallassay matattiyaawaa hinttenttu be'iyaa diraw, ittuu ittuwaa mentsetseetto." 
Hebrews10:26 Nuuni tumatetsaa era akki diggiide, eriidde nagaraa ootsiyaawaa gidooppe, hawaappe sintsaw nagaraa d'ayissiyaa yarshshuu ittibaynne baawa." 
Hebrews10:27 Shin yashshiyaa pirddaa naagiyaawenne S'oossaa is's'iyaa ubbaa maanaw wolk'k'aama tamay de'ee. 
Hebrews10:28 Muse higgew azazettena uray, laa""u uray woy heezzu uray Aa bolla markkattooppe, k'areti baynnaan hayk'k'ee." 
Hebrews10:29 S'oossaa Na'aa kad'eedda uray, barena nagaraappe geeshsheedda S'oossaa c'aak'uwaa suutsaa tunabaadan k'oppeedda uray, k'ay aad'd'o keekatetsaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa boriyaa uray, ay keena iita pirddaa akkanaw bessinttonne ane k'oppite." 
Hebrews10:30 Ayaw gooppe, «Taani haluwaa kesananne kushiyaa zaarana» geeddawaa nuuni ereetto; k'aykka, «Goday bare asaa pirddana» yaageedda." 
Hebrews10:31 De'uwaa S'oossaa kushiyan kunddanawe daro yashshiyaawaa. 
Hebrews10:32 Hinttenttoo S'oossaa poo'uu poo'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan, hinttenttu daroban waayettiide, wolk'k'aama wad'etaan genc'c'eedda beni wodiyaa hassayite." 
Hebrews10:33 Itti itti gede hinttentta asaa sintsan boreeddinonne pas'a kaa'eeddino; k'ay hara wode hewaadan ootseeddawanttunnanne ittippe de'eeddita. 
Hebrews10:34 Ayaw gooppe, k'ashuwaan de'iyaa asatoo hinttenttu k'aretteeddita; yaatiide hinttenttoo med'inaw wurenna ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa shaluu saluwaan de'iyaawaa hinttenttu huup'ew ereedda diraw, hinttebaa ubbaa akki diggooppe hidootaan genc'c'eeddita." 
Hebrews10:35 Hewaa diraw, wolk'k'aama woytana de'iyaa hinttenttu s'alatetsaa oloppite." 
Hebrews10:36 S'oossay koyyiyaawaa ootsiide, I hinttenttoo immana geeddawaa akkanaw genc'c'ana koshshee." 
Hebrews10:37 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Amareeda wodii atteedda. Yiyaawe yaanawaa; gam""enna." 
Hebrews10:38 Ta s'illuu ammanettiide de'anawaa. Shin ooninne guyye simmooppe, taana nashechchenna» yaagee." 
Hebrews10:39 Nuuni ammanettiide atteeddawanttu bagga gidiyaawaappe attin, guyye simmiide d'ayeeddawanttu bagga gidokko." 
Hebrews11:1 Ammanuwaa giyaawe, demmana giide nashechchaan naagi utteeddabay ammantsiyaawaanne be'anaw danddayennabaa erissiyaawaa." 
Hebrews11:2 S'oossay beni c'ima asaw markkattawe, unttunttu ammaneeddawaana." 
Hebrews11:3 Saluunne sa'aynne S'oossaa k'aalaan med'etteeddawaa ammanuwaan nuuni ereetto; hewaa diraw, beettiyaabay beettenabaappe med'etteedda." 
Hebrews11:4 Aabeeli K'aayeelawaappe aad'd'iyaa yarshshuwaa S'oossaw yarshsheeddawe ammanuwaana. S'oossay Aa imuwaabaa markkattiidde, I s'illuwaa gideeddawaakka markkatteedda; Aabeeli haray atto hayk'k'eeddashshinkka, bare ammanuwaan ha""i gakkanaw haasayee." 
Hebrews11:5 Heenooki hayk'k'ennan saluwaa beeddawe ammanuwaana; S'oossay afeedda diraw, ooninne Aa be'anaw danddayibeenna. S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Heenooki saluwaa baanaappe kase S'oossaa nashechcheedda» yaagee." 
Hebrews11:6 Ammanuu baynnaan ooninne S'oossaa nashechchanaw danddayenna; ayaw gooppe, S'oossaakko yiyaa ooninne S'oossay de'iyaawaanne barena koyyiyaawanttoo woytaa immiyaawaa ammananaw koshshee." 
Hebrews11:7 Nohe be'anaw danddayenna sintsaappe hananabaw S'oossay, «Neena naaga» giina, S'oossaw yayyiide, barenanne bare soy asaa ashshanaw markkabiyaa med'd'eeddawe ammanuwaana; yaatiide hewaan ha sa'aa bolla pirddiide, ammanuwaan beettiyaa s'illotetsaakka S'oossaappe akkeedda." 
Hebrews11:8 Abraahaamo laattanaadan, S'oossay barew immana geedda gadiyaa baana mala, S'oossay barena s'eeseedda wode, azazetteeddawe ammanuwaana; I bare gadiyaappe kesiide biyaa wode, hak'a binttonne erennaan kesseedda." 
Hebrews11:9 Abraahaamo S'oossay barew immana geedda gadiyaan hara biittaa asaadan de'eeddawe ammanuwaana; S'oossay he immana geeddawaa barenanna ittippe laattana Yisaak'ananne Yak'oobanna Dunkkaaniyaan de'eedda. 
Hebrews11:10 Ayaw gooppe, Abraahaamo S'oossay lo""o baasuwaan k'oppiide kees's'eedda katamaa naagee." 
Hebrews11:11 Saara bare huup'ew haray atto ec'aadekka, immana geedda S'oossay ammanetteedawaa gideeddawaa ereedda diraw, na'aa shahaaranaw wolk'k'aa demmeeddawe ammanuwaana." 
Hebrews11:12 Hewaa diraw, hayk'k'eedda asaa malatiyaa itti bitaniyaappe saluwaan de'iyaa s'oolinttiyaa keena, abbaa gas'aan de'iyaa payduu baynna shafiyaa keena zaratuu yeletteeddino." 
Hebrews11:13 He asatuu ubbatuu ammanuwaan hayk'k'eeddino; barenttoo S'oossay immana geeddawaakka akkibeykkino; shin haakuwaan hewaa be'iide, saroteeddino. K'ay unttunttu sa'aan imatsanne yederissettiide keseedda asatuwaa gideeddawaa ereeddino." 
Hebrews11:14 Ayaw gooppe, hewaadan giyaa asatuu barenttu huup'e gadiyaa koyiyaawaa erissiino." 
Hebrews11:15 Unttunttu he yeggiide kesseedda gadiyaa simmanaw k'oppeeddawaa gidintto, guyye simmiyaa kaac'aa demmennaan aggikkino; shin" 
Hebrews11:16 unttunttu hewaa aggiide, lo""iyaa gadiyaa laamotiino; hewe saluwaa gadiyaa. Hewaa diraw, S'oossay unttunttu S'oossaa geetettanaw yeellatenna. Ayaw gooppe, I unttunttoo katamaa giigissi wotseedda." 
Hebrews11:17 Abraahaamo Yisaak'a yarshshanentto woy yarshshenentto, S'oossay eranaw s'omooseedda wode, Abraahaamo ammanuwaan Aa yarshsheedda. S'oossay Abraahaama, «Ne zarii Yisaak'a baggana s'eesettanawaa» geeddashshinkka, Abraahaamo bare na'aa Yisaak'a yarshshanaw giigeedda." 
Hebrews11:18  
Hebrews11:19 Abraahaamo S'oossay Yisaak'a haray atto, hayk'uwaappekka patsanaw danddayiyaawaa ereedda; hewaa diraw, hayk'uwaappe guyye Aa zaariide akkeedda." 
Hebrews11:20 Yisaak'i sintsappe hananabaw Yaak'oobanne Eesaa anjjeeddawe ammanuwaana. 
Hebrews11:21 Yaak'oobi hayk'k'ana haniidde, Yooseefo naanaa huup'iyaan huup'iyaan anjjeeddawenne gatiman guufetiide, S'oossaw goyinneeddawe ammanuwaana." 
Hebrews11:22 Yooseefo hayk'k'anaw matiidde, Israa'eeliyaa Asay Gibs'eppe kesanawaa haasayeeddawenne bare mek'etsaa ootsanabaa unttuntta azazeeddawe ammanuwaana." 
Hebrews11:23 Muse yeletteeddawaappe guyyiyaan, aawuunne aata malaa lo""o na'aa gideeddawaa be'iide, heezzu agenaa k'oseeddawe ammanuwaana; unttunttu kaatiyaa awaayookka yayyibeykkino." 
Hebrews11:24 Muse dic'c'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Gibs'e kaatiyaa naatti na'aa geetettanawaa is's'eeddawe ammanuwaana." 
Hebrews11:25 Nagaraan Muse guutsa wodiyaa nashettanawaappe, S'oossaa asaana waayettanawaa dooreedda." 
Hebrews11:26 Wodeppe demmana woytaa I tishshi ootsiide s'eello diraw, Gibs'e gadiyaa shaluwaa ubbaappe Kiristtoosa diraw borettiyaawe daro aad'd'iyaa duretetsaa gideeddawaa k'oppeedda." 
Hebrews11:27 Kaatiyaa hank'k'oo Muse yayyenaan, Gibs'e gadiyaappe keseeddawe ammanuwaana; ayaw gooppe, beettena S'oossaa be'eeddawaadan, genc'c'iide sintsaw beedda." 
Hebrews11:28 Hayk'uwaa kiitanchchay Israa'eeliyaa asaw bayira naanaa bochchennaadan, Muse Paasigaa bonchcheeddawenne gubaniyan suutsaa c'ac'c'afisseeddawe ammanuwaana." 
Hebrews11:29 Israa'eeliyaa Asay mela biittan hamettiyaawaadan, Zo'o Abbaa pinneeddawe ammanuwaana; shin Gibs'e asatuu paac'ew gelishshin, haatsay unttuntta mitti aggeedda." 
Hebrews11:30 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Iyyarkko giyaa katamaa shuchchaa dirssaa laappu gallassaa yuuyyi yuuyyi aad'd'owaappe guyyiyaan, he shuchchaa dirssay kunddeeddawe ammanuwaana." 
Hebrews11:31 C'aaratta Ra'aaba yewuwaa k'oriyaawantta loytsa mokkeedda diraw, S'oossaw azazettenan is's'eedda asaana hayk'k'ennan atteeddawe ammanuwaana." 
Hebrews11:32 Simmi harabaa gujjaade ayaa odoo? Geedoonabaa, Baaraak'abaa, Samisoonabaa, Yofittaahebaa, Daawitebaanne Saameelabaa, k'ay nabatuwaabaa odanaw taw wodii gidenna." 
Hebrews11:33 Unttunttu kaatiyaa ubbaanna olettiide s'ooneeddawenne s'illobaa ootseeddawe ammanuwaana; yaatiide S'oossay immana geeddawaa akkeeddino; gaammotuwaa doonaakka gorddeeddino. 
Hebrews11:34 Wolk'k'aama tamaa toyisseeddino; kuussa mashshaappe atteeddino; unttunttu daaburanchcha; shin minneeddino; k'ay olaan minniide, hara gadiyaa olaa asaa yedersseeddino." 
Hebrews11:35 Mac'c'awanttu barenttu hayk'k'eeddawantta hayk'uwaappe denddina akkeeddino. K'ay haranttu k'ashuwaappe bilettanawaa is's'iide, keekkiyaa de'oo hayk'uwaappe denddanaw, ugatiide hayk'k'eeddino." 
Hebrews11:36 Haratuwaa bolla Asay k'iliic'i kaa'eedda; lissuwaan shoc'etteeddinonne santsalataan k'ashettiide, k'asho golliyaa geleeddino." 
Hebrews11:37 Shuchchaan c'adetteeddino; magaaziyan laau kesiide p'alk'k'etteeddino; paac'etteeddino; mashshaan hayk'k'eeddino; unttunttoo ubbabaykka d'ayina, waayettiide tuggattiide, dorssaa c'alaanne deeshshaa c'alaa mayyiide yuuyyeeddino." 
Hebrews11:38 Unttunttoo ha alamii giigennaan is's'ina, woraan, deriyaan, gonggoluwaa giddoninne ollaa gidduwaan yuuyyeeddino." 
Hebrews11:39 S'oossay unttunttu ammanuwaa markkattooppekka, hewanttu ubbatuu I, immana geeddawaa akkibeykkino." 
Hebrews11:40 S'oossay nuw itti loo k'ofaa k'oppi wotseedda diraw, unttunttu nuuni baynnaan balay baynnawantta gidikkino." 
Hebrews12:1 Simmi nuw hawaa keena daro asay, shaariyaadan nu matan yuuyyi aad'd'iide markkattiyaawe de'ishshin, nuuna d'ubbiyaa ubbabaanne bak'k'i oyk'k'iyaa nagaraa diggiide nu sintsan de'iyaa nuuni wos's'ana wotsaa genc'c'iide wos's'oytte." 
Hebrews12:2 Nuuni nu ammanoo ogiyaa dooyyeeddawaanne polissiyaawaa gideedda Yesuusa s'eelloyte. Yesuusi yeellaa kad'iide, sintsappe aw de'iyaa nashechchaa diraw, mask'k'aliyaa bolla misimaariyan d'ishettiide hayk'k'anawaa genc'c'iide, S'oossaa kawutetsaa oydiyaappe ushechcha baggana utteedda." 
Hebrews12:3 Hinttenttu hinttenttu wozanaa bayizziide daaburenna mala, nagaranchchatuu barena daro is's'inakka genc'c'eedda Yesuusa k'oppite." 
Hebrews12:4 Nagaraanna hinttenttu baas'etiidde, suutsaa gussana gakkanaw biro oletti diggibeykkita." 
Hebrews12:5 S'oossay bare naanaadan, hinttentta zoriyaawaa dogeedditee? S'oossay hinttentta, «Ta na'aw, S'oossay neena muriyaa wode, laafabaadan k'oppoppa. I neena seeriyaa wodekka yayyoppa." 
Hebrews12:6 Ayaw gooppe, I bare siik'iyaa uraa muree; k'ay bare na'aadan akkiyaa ubbaakka lissuwaan shoc'ee» yaageedda." 
Hebrews12:7 S'oossay hinttentta muriyaa wode genc'c'ite. Ayaw gooppe, I hinttentta naanaadan ootsee. Aawuu seerenna na'ay de'ii?" 
Hebrews12:8 Naanaa ubbaa seeriyaawaadan, hinttentta murenaan aggooppe, karen yeletteeddawantta gidiitappe attin, tumu naanaa gidikkita." 
Hebrews12:9 Hewaa bollan k'ay, nuuna yeleedda nu aawotuu nuuna mureedda wode, nuuni unttuntta bonchcheeddo. Yaatina, nuuni waaniide ayaanaa Aabboo loytsi darssi moodettiide de'okkoo?" 
Hebrews12:10 Ayaw gooppe, nuuna yeleedda nu aawotuu barentta lo""owaadan, amareeda wodiyaa nuuna mureeddino; shin S'oossay nuuni Aa geeshshatetsaa akkana mala, nuuna maaddanaw muree." 
Hebrews12:11 Nuuni murettiyaa wode, ha""iw yiloyee; nashechchenna. Shin mureeddawanttoo guyyeppe he muray s'illotetsaa de'uwaa sarotetsaa woytaa immana." 
Hebrews12:12 Hewaa diraw, hinttenttu arggaac'eedda kushiyaanne hinttenttu daabureedda gulbbataa mentsetsite." 
Hebrews12:13 Wobbiyaa gedii pas'anaappe attin, burk'k'enna mala, suure ogiyaan hamettite." 
Hebrews12:14 Asaa ubbaanna saro de'anaw minnite; k'ay geeshsha de'uwaa de'ite. Ayaw gooppe, geeshshatetsay baynnaan ooninne Godaa be'anaw danddayenna." 
Hebrews12:15 S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa ooninne akkenaan attena mala naagettite; k'ay dolaade, bare marzziyaan asaa waayissiyaa c'amo mitsaadan haniide, ooninne daro asaa tunissenna mala naagettite." 
Hebrews12:16 Woshummanaw kajjeeliyaa Asay ooninne de'enna mala, woy k'ay itti gede miyaabaw bare bayiratetsaa zal""eedda, ayaanaabaa kawushissiyaa Eesaa mala asaykka de'enna mala naagettite." 
Hebrews12:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Eesay bare aabbu anjjuwaa akkanaw koyyeeddawaa eriita; shin Aa aabbu Aa anjjenan is's'eedda; ayaw gooppe, nagaraappe simmiyaa ogiyaa I haray atto, afos's'i koyyiidekka demmanaw danddayibeenna." 
Hebrews12:18 Hinttenttu bochchanaw danddayiyaa deriyaakkonne ees's'iyaa tamaakko, d'umaakko, shaariyaakkonne gotuwaakko," 
Hebrews12:19 k'ay malakataa waasuwaakkonne k'aalaa kooshshaakko yibeykkita. Asay he kooshshaa siseedda wode, haraa gujji sisenna mala woosseedda." 
Hebrews12:20 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay unttuntta, «Haray atto, do'aykka he deriyaa bochchooppe, shuchchaan c'adettiide hayk'k'o» yaageedda azazuwaa unttunttu genc'c'anaw danddayibeykkino." 
Hebrews12:21 Ayfiyaan beettiyaawe daro dagantsiyaawaa gidiyaa diraw Muse, «Taani yashshaan kokkoray» yaageedda." 
Hebrews12:22 Shin hinttenttu S'iyoone Deriyaa, de'o S'oossay de'iyaa katamaa, ittippe shiik'iide nashettiyaa daro sha""a kiitanchchatuwaakko saluwaa Yerusaalame yeeddita." 
Hebrews12:23 S'oossaa bayira naanatuwaakko, ittippe shiik'eeddawanttukko, unttunttu suntsay saluwaan s'aafetteeddawanttukko yeeddita; k'ay asaa ubbaa pirddiyaa S'oossaakkonne, balay baynnawantta ootseedda s'illo asatuwaa ayyaanatuwaakko yeeddita." 
Hebrews12:24 Ooratsa c'aak'k'oo gaannatiyaa Yesuusanne Aabeela suutsaappe aad'd'iyaawaa odiyaa gukkeedda suutsaakko yeeddita. 
Hebrews12:25 Hinttenttoo odiyaa uraa yewuwaa sisiyaawaa hinttenttu is's'enna mala, hinttentta naagite. S'oossaa kiitaa sa'aan barenttoo odiyaawe odiyaawaa sisenna is's'eeddawanttu attana d'ayooppe, saluwaan, «Hinttena naagite» giyaa S'oossaappe nuuni waaniide attanee?" 
Hebrews12:26 He wode Aa kooshshay sa'aa k'aatseedda; shin I hai, «Taani sa'aa s'alalaa gidennaan, itti gede gujjaade saluwaakka k'aatsana» yaageedda." 
Hebrews12:27 «Itti gede gujjaade» giyaa k'aalay k'aas's'ennabay minniide de'ana mala, med'etteeddabay k'aas's'anawaanne kichchanawaa geeshshiide bessee." 
Hebrews12:28 Nuuni k'aas's'anaw danddayenna kawutetsaa akkiyaa diraw, ane S'oossaa galatoyttenne Aa nashechchoytte; aw bessiyaawaadan bonchchuwaaninne yashshatetsaan aw goyinnoytte." 
Hebrews12:29 Ayaw gooppe, nu S'oossay tumu bayizziyaa tamaa." 
Hebrews13:1 Hinttenttu ishatuwaa siik'iyaawaa aggoppite. 
Hebrews13:2 Imatsaa mokkiyaawaakka dogoppite. Ayaw gooppe, yaatiyaawaan itti itti Asay erennaan kiitanchchatuwaa mokkeedda." 
Hebrews13:3 K'asho gollen de'iyaawanttubaa hinttenttukka unttunttunna ittippe k'asho gollen de'iyaawaadan k'oppite; k'ay hinttenttu hinttenttu huup'ew waayettiyaawaadan, waayettiyaawanttubaa k'oppite." 
Hebrews13:4 Akkiyaawaanne geliyaawaa Asay ubbay bonchchanaw bessee; k'ay asinaynne machchata ittuu ittoo ammanettanaw bessee; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay woshummanaw kajjeeliyaawanttanne woshummiyaawantta pirddana." 
Hebrews13:5 Miishshaa siik'uwaappe hinttentta naagite; hinttenttoo de'iyaawe hinttenttoo gido. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay bare huup'ew, «Taani neena ubbaakka yeggikke woy aggikke» yaageedda." 
Hebrews13:6 Hewaa diraw, nuuni s'aliide, «Goday taana maaddiyaawaa; taani yayyikke. Asay taana ay ootsii?» yaageetto." 
Hebrews13:7 S'oossaa k'aalaa hinttenttoo odeedda hinttentta kaaletseeddaawantta hassayite; unttunttu waan de'eeddinonttonne hassayite; k'ay unttunttuwaadan ammanite. 
Hebrews13:8 Yesuusi Kiristtoosi zinokka hachchekka med'inawukka laamettenna. 
Hebrews13:9 Dumma dumma ooratsa timirttiyaan wora booppite. Nu wozanay S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsan minnooppe loo gidiyaawaappe attin, k'umaa wogatoo azazettiyaawaa gidenna; hewoo azazetteeddawanttukka maadettibeykkino." 
Hebrews13:10 Nuw yarshshiyaasay de'ee; Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsiyaawanttu he yarshshiyaa saappe maanaw unttunttoo maatay baawa. 
Hebrews13:11 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu nagaraa diraw, mehiyaa suutsaa yarshshanaw Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha sa'aa afee; shin he mehiyaa ashuwaa k'ay dirssaappe karenna guuddee." 
Hebrews13:12 Hewaa diraw, Yesuusikka k'ay nagaraappe asaa bare suutsan geeshshanaw, katamaa penggiyaappe karenna waayetteedda." 
Hebrews13:13 Simmi nuuni I boretteedda boriyaa akkiide, dirssaappe kare aakko kesoytte." 
Hebrews13:14 Ayaw gooppe, nuw hawaan med'inaw de'iyaa katamay baawa; shin nuuni yaana katamaa naageetto." 
Hebrews13:15 Simmi S'oossaw Yesuusa baggana ubbaa wode galataa yarshshuwaa immoytte; hewaa giyaawe mettershshay Aa suntsaw immiyaa galataa giyaawaa. 
Hebrews13:16 Loobaa ootsiyaawaanne ittuu ittuwaa maaddiyaawaa dogoppite. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa nashechchiyaawe hewaa mala yarshshuwaa." 
Hebrews13:17 Hinttena kaaletsiyaawanttoo azazettite; k'ay unttunttu azaziyaawaakka ootsite. Unttunttu barenttu ootseeddawaa S'oossaw odana diraw, hinttenttu shemppuwaa loytsi naagiino; hinttenttu unttunttoo azazettooppe, barenttu oosuwaa nashettiidde ootsana; hewe d'ayooppe, unttunttu yilotiidde ootsana; hewe hinttentta ayinne maaddenna." 
Hebrews13:18 Nuw S'oossaa woossite. Nuuni ubbaa wode loobaa ootsanaw koyyiyaa diraw, nuuna zoriyaa lo""o wozanay nuw de'ee." 
Hebrews13:19 S'oossay taana hinttenttukko ellekka zaarana mala, S'oossaa hinttenttu loytsi woossanaadan, taani hinttentta loytsa woossay." 
Hebrews13:20 Sarotetsaa S'oossay, nu Godaa Yesuusa, dorssatuwaa hentsanchchaa wolk'k'aama, med'inaa c'aak'uwaa suutsan hayk'uwaappe dentseedda." 
Hebrews13:21 S'oossay Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana bare sintsan barena nashechchiyaawaa hinttentta oosissiidde, hinttenttukka I koyyeeddawaa ootsana mala, lo""o oosuwaa ubbaan hinttentta I giigisso; S'oossay med'i med'inaw bonchchetto. Amen""i." 
Hebrews13:22 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo, taani ha dabddaabbiyaa hinttenttoo k'antsaan s'aafeedda diraw, hinttenttu ha zoriyaa salettenaan sisana mala, taani hinttentta woossay." 
Hebrews13:23 Nu ishay, S'imootoosi k'ashuwaappe biletteeddawaa erite. Elleelli I haa yooppe, taani aanana baade hinttentta be'ana." 
Hebrews13:24 Hinttena kaaletsiyaa ubbatuwaanne S'oossaa asatuwaa ubbaa saro saro giite. S'aaliyaappe yeedda ammaniyaawanttu hinttentta saro saro giino. 
Hebrews13:25 Aad'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna ittippe gido. Ameni. 
James1:1 Taani Yaak'oobi S'oossaa ayiliinne Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa ayilii, biittaa ubbaan laaletteedda tammanne laa""u zeretsatoo sarotaa kiittay." 
James1:2 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hintte ammanuu paac'ettiyaawe hinttenttoo danddayaa immanawaa eriide, dumma dumma paac'ii hinttena gakkiyaa wode, hewaa kumentsaa nashechchaadan paydite." 
James1:3  
James1:4 Hintte danddayay ayinne bali baynnaan hinttena minneeddawanttanne pac'i bayinnawantta ootsiide, bare oosuwaa polo." 
James1:5 Shin hintteppe ooninne barew aad'd'eedda eratetsay d'ayooppe, kad'ennaan ubbaw keekatetsan immiyaa S'oossaa woosso. I aw immana." 
James1:6 Shin I ayaaninne sid'ennaan ammanuwaan S'oossaa woosso. Ayaw gooppe, sid'iyaa uray c'arkkuu sugina k'aas's'iyaa abbaa beetaa mala." 
James1:7 Ayaw gooppe, laa""u k'ofay de'iyaa uray, bare ogiyaa ubbaan bare k'ofaa k'achchennawe, he uray Godaappe ayinne demmanaw k'oppoppo." 
James1:8  
James1:9 Shin hiyyeesaa ishay S'oossay Aa d'ok'k'u ootseedda wode nashetto. 
James1:10 K'ay dure ishaykka S'oossay Aa kawushisseedda wode nashetto. Ayaw gooppe, dure bitanii maataa giddon dic'c'iyaa c'iishshaadan d'ayana." 
James1:11 Ayaw gooppe, away bare seelaanna kesiide, maataa melissina, c'iishshay d'ayee; k'ay Aa malaa lo""otetsaykka d'ayee; hewaadankka k'ay dure bitanii barewaa ootsiidde d'ayana." 
James1:12 Waayiyaan genc'c'iyaa uray anjjetteeddawaa; ayaw gooppe, he waayiyaa s'ooneeddawaappe guyyiyaan, S'oossay barena siik'iyaawanttoo immana geedda de'uwaa kalachchaa I akkana." 
James1:13 Ooninne paac'etteedda wode, «Taana S'oossay paac'c'ee» gooppo. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay iitan paac'ettanaw danddayenna; k'ay I bare huup'ew oonanne paac'c'enna." 
James1:14 Shin Asay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan bare huup'e iita amuwaan gooshettiyaa wodenne c'imettiyaa wode paac'ettee. 
James1:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, amuu shahaariide, nagaraa yelee; k'ay nagaray dic'c'iide, hayk'uwaa yelee." 
James1:16 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, c'imettoppite." 
James1:17 Loo imuwaa ubbaynne kumentsaa woytaa ubbay saluwaappe yee. Saluwaa poo'uwaa med'd'eedda Aawuwaappe yee; S'oossay bare huup'ew dummatennanne woy bare kuwaa laammenna. 
James1:18 Nuuni I med'd'eedda med'etatuwaa giddon d'ok'k'asaa akkanaadan, nuuna bare sheniyaan tumu k'aalaan yeleedda." 
James1:19 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hawaa hassayite; Asay ubbay sisanaw elleello; shin haasayanawunne hank'k'ettanaw elleelloppo." 
James1:20 Ayaw gooppe, asaa hank'k'uu S'oossay koyyiyaa s'illotetsaa ahenna." 
James1:21 Hewaa diraw, tuna hanotaa ubbaanne iitatetsaa ubbaa hintteppe d'ayissiide, S'oossay hintte wozanaan tookkeedda hintte shemppuwaa ashshanaw danddayiyaa k'aalaa ashikketetsan akkite." 
James1:22 Shin S'oossaa k'aalaa oosuwaan peeshshiteppe attin, sisa s'alalaan hintte huup'iyaa c'immoppite." 
James1:23 Ayaw gooppe, k'aalaa sisiide ootsenna uray de'ooppe, I bare malaa masttootiyaa s'eelliyaa uraa mala." 
James1:24 I barena s'eelliide bee; ellekka I ay malenttonne dogi aggee. 
James1:25 Shin ooninne ayiletetsaappe kessiyaa bali bayinna higgiyaa s'eelliide, aan ak'iyaawe k'ay Aa naagiyaawe, siseeddawaakka dogennawe, he uray bare ootsiyaa oosuwaan anjjettana." 
James1:26 Bare ins's'arssaa naagennan barena c'immiidde, barew S'oossaa goyinniyaawaa malatiyaa uray de'ooppe, Aa goynay mela." 
James1:27 S'oossaa Aawuwaa sintsan pokkuu bayinna geeshsha goynay hawaa; hewe hak'awe gooppe, aata aawuu bayinna naanatuwaanne waayettiyaa am""etuwaa maaddanawaanne sa'aa nagaraa k'itaappe bare huup'iyaa naaganawaa." 
James2:1 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hintte nu bonchcho Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa ammani de'iidde, deemuwaa s'eelliide, asaa bonchchoppite." 
James2:2 Ayaw gooppe, work'k'aa migiduwaa wotsiide, lo""o mayuwaa mayyeedda itti Asay hintte shiik'uwaa yooppe, k'ay c'urk'k'a mayuwaa mayyeedda hiyyeesaa asikka yooppe," 
James2:3 loo mayuwaa mayyeedda bitaniyaa hintte aatsi bonchchiidde Aa, «Neeni hawaan ubbaappe lo""iyaa oydiyaan utta» giide k'ay hiyyeesaa bitaniyaa, «Neeni hininna ek'k'ashsha; woy hawaan ta gediyaa matan sa'aan utta» gooppe," 
James2:4 yaatina hintte hintte giddon shaakotetsaa med'd'iyaawanttanne iita k'ofaanna de'iyaa daannatuwaa gidikkiteeyee? 
James2:5 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, sisite; S'oossay ha sa'aan de'iyaa hiyyeesaa Asay ammanuwaan durettanawunne barena siik'iyaawanttoo immana geedda saluwaa kawutetsaa laattanaw dooribeenneyee?" 
James2:6 Shin hintte hiyyeesatuwaa toochcheeddita. Duretuu hinttena tuggayiyaawantta gidikkinooyee? Unttunttu hinttena daannan mootiyaawantta gidikkinooyee? 
James2:7 Hinttew imetteedda loo suntsaa boriyaawanttu unttuntta gidikkinooyee? 
James2:8 Shin S'oossaa Mas'aafan, «Ne shooruwaa ne huup'iyaadan siik'a» geetettiide s'aafetteedda kaatiyaa higgiyaa hintte polooppe, lo""obaa ootsiita." 
James2:9 Shin hintte asaa deemuwaa s'eelliide bonchchooppe, nagaraa ootsiita; k'ay higgii hintte bolla, higgiyaa mentseeddawanttudan pirddana." 
James2:10 Ayaw gooppe, ooninne higgiyaa ubbaa naagiide, ittinno mentsiyaawaa gidooppe, he uray higgiyaa ubbaa mentsee." 
James2:11 Ayaw gooppe, «Woshummoppa» geeddawe k'ay «Wod'oppa» geedda; shin neeni woshummana d'ayooppekka, wod'eeddawaa gidooppe, higgiyaa mentsaadda." 
James2:12 Asaa ayiletetsaappe kessiyaa higgiyan, pirddaa akkana asatuwaadan haasayitenne unttunttuwaadan ootsite." 
James2:13 Ayaw gooppe, asaa maaribeenna uraa S'oossay maarennan pirddana; maarotetsay pirddaa s'oonee." 
James2:14 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, itti uray barew ammanuu de'ee gooppe, k'ay Aa ammanuwaa Aa oosuu erissana d'ayooppe, Aa ay go""anee? Aa ammanuu Aa ashshanaw danddayii?" 
James2:15 Itti ishay, woy itti michchata kallottooppe, k'ay unttunttoo ubbaa gallassi miyaabay d'ayooppe," 
James2:16 hintteppe itti uray unttuntta, «Saro biite. Tamaa ho""ite. Kalliide miite» giide, unttunttoo koshshiyaawaa immana d'ayooppe, unttuntta ay go""anee?" 
James2:17 Hewaa diraw, ammanuu oosuu baynnaan barekka de'ooppe hayk'k'eeddawaa." 
James2:18 Shin itti uray, «New ammanuu de'ee; k'ay taw oosuu de'ee. Neeni ne ammanuwaa ne oosuwaappe shaakkaade taana bessa; taanikka ta ammanuwaa ta oosuwaan neena bessana» gaana." 
James2:19 Neeni itti S'oossay de'iyaawaa ammanaasa; hewe loa. S'alahetuukka k'ay ammaniino; yashshaan kokkoriino. 
James2:20 Neeni eeyay! Ammanuu oosuwaappe shaakettiide goennawaa eranaw koyyay? 
James2:21 Nu aabbu Abraahaamo bare na'aa Yisaak'a yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla wotseedda wode, bare oosuwaan s'illibeennee?" 
James2:22 Aa ammanuunne Aa oosuu ittippe ootseeddawaanne Aa ammanuu Aa oosuwaan poletteeddawaa be'ikkii? 
James2:23 S'oossaa Mas'aafay «Abraahaamo S'oossaa ammaneedda. S'oossaykka hewaa aw s'illotetsan paydeedda» geeddawe poletteedda; k'ay S'oossaa dabbo geetettiide I s'eesetteedda. 
James2:24 Asay ammano s'alalaana gidennaan, oosuwaan s'illiyaawaa hintte be'iita." 
James2:25 Hewaadankka k'ay c'aaratta Ra'aaba kiitettowantta mokkaade hara ogiyaanna unttuntta moyzzeedda wode, bare oosuwaan s'illabeykkee?" 
James2:26 Ayaw gooppe, shemppuu shaaketteedda bollay hayk'k'eeddawaa gidiyaawaadan, hewaadankka k'ay oosuu shaaketteedda ammanuu hayk'k'eeddawaa." 
James3:1 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, nuuni haratuwaappe aad'd'iyaa pirddaa akkanawaa hintte eriyaa diraw, hintteppe c'oratuu tamaarissiyaawantta gidoppite." 
James3:2 Nuuni ubbaykka daroban baleetto; itti uray bare haasayan mulekka balana d'ayooppe, I barena naaganaw danddayiyaa bali bayinna asaa." 
James3:3 Paratuu nuw azazettana mala, bis'aalaa barssiide, nuuni koyyiyaasaa ubbaa unttuntta afeetto." 
James3:4 Be'ite, markkabatuukka k'ay hewaa keenaa wolk'k'aama gidiidde, gotuwaa c'arkkuwaan laagettoopekka, unttuntta laaggiyaawe barewaa koyyiyaasaa zaariide laaggiyaa k'eeri guutsaa mitsaan laagettiide biino." 
James3:5 Hewaadan ins's'arssay bollaa giddon guutsa asatetsaa gidooppekka, daro wolk'k'aamaban c'eek'ettee. Guutsa tamay waaniide wolk'k'aama wora guuddii! Akeekite." 
James3:6 Ins's'arssaykka tamaa mala. I nu asatetsaa giddon iitabaa ubbaa ootsana danddayee; asatetsaa ubbaa tunissee. K'ay nu de'uwaa wotsaakka tamaan guuddee; Gaannamiyaa tamaan I guudettanawaa. 
James3:7 Ayaw gooppe, do'atuwaa, kafatuwaa zariyaa, tiraan gooshettiyaa shooshshatuu zariyaanne abbaan de'iyaa med'etatuwaa zariyaa ubbaa Asay aadisseedda; k'ay unttunttukka aadeeddino." 
James3:8 Shin ooninne ins's'arssaa aadissanaw danddayibeenna; ins's'arssay wod'iyaa marzzii kumeedda c'ou geena iita med'etaa. 
James3:9 Nuuni ins's'arssan nu Godaanne Aawuwaa galateetto; k'ay aanikka S'oossaa malatiide med'etteedda asaa shek'k'eetto. 
James3:10 Itti doonaappe galataynne shek'ay kesee. Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hewe hewaadan hananaw bessena." 
James3:11 Pulttuu itti ollaappe maliyaa haatsaanne c'ammiyaa haatsaa pulttanaw danddayii? 
James3:12 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, balasiyaa giyaa mitsay wogaraa ayifanaw danddayii? Woy woyniyaa turay balasiyaa giyaa mitsaa ayifanaw danddayii? Mas'ine mas'ine giyaa haatsaappekka mal""o haatsay kesana danddayenna." 
James3:13 Hintte giddon aad'd'eedda eranchchaynne akeekanchchay oonee? Bare loo de'uwaan oosetteedda bare oosuwaa aad'd'eedda eratetsaappe yiyaa ashikketetsaan besso. 
James3:14 Shin hintte wozanaan c'ammiyaa k'anaatiinne yirggii de'oppo. K'ay tumatetsaa bollaakka worddotoppitenne otorettoppite. 
James3:15 Hewaa mala aad'd'eedda eratetsay saluwaappe wod'd'iyaawaa gidenna; shin hewe sa'aabaa, asaawaa, s'alahatuwaa." 
James3:16 Ayaw gooppe, k'anaatiinne yirggii de'iyaa saan walassaynne iita ooso ubbay de'ee." 
James3:17 Shin bollappe yiyaa aad'd'eedda eratetsay ubbaappe kase geeshsha. K'ay sarotetsaa dosiyaawaa, ashikkenne eeno giyaawaa; k'ay maarotetsaynne lo""o ayfii kumeeddawaa. Sid'iinne lo""o malatiyaa iitatetsay bayinnawaa." 
James3:18 S'illotetsaa ayfii sarotetsaa ootsiyaawanttu sarotetsaan zereedda zeretsaappe beetteedda. 
James4:1 Olaynne walassay hintte gidduwaa hak'appe yii? Unttunttu yeeddasay hintte bollaa giddon olettiyaa hintte nashettanaw wolk'k'aama amuwaa amottiyaawaappe gidennee? 
James4:2 Hintte amottiita; shin demmikkita; wod'iita. Loytsi koyyiita; shin demmanaw danddaykkita; walak'ettiitanne olettiita. Shin S'oossaa woossenna diraw, hintte koyiyaawaa demmikkita." 
James4:3 S'oossaa woossiita, shin demmikkita; gaasuukka balaa ogiyaan woossiita. Hewaa hinttena nashechchiyaawaan peeshshanaw koyyiyaa diraassa." 
James4:4 Simmi woshummiyaawanttoo, ha alamiyaanna dabbotiyaawe S'oossaw morkke gidiyaawaa erikkitee? Ayaw gooppe, ha alamiyaanna dabbotanaw koyyiyaawe ooninne S'oossaanna morkkettee." 
James4:5 Woy S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «S'oossay nuunan wotseedda Ayyaanay wolk'k'aama amuwaa nuw amottee» giyaawaa hinttenttoo c'oo giyaawaa malatii?" 
James4:6 Shin S'oossay aad'd'o keekatetsaa aatsiide immee. Hewaa diraw, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «S'oossay otorettiyaawantta is's'ee; shin barena kawushshiyaawanttoo aad'd'o keekatetsaa immee» yaagee." 
James4:7 Simmi, hintte S'oossaw moodettite. Yaatiide s'alahiyaanna ek'ettite; I hintteppe bak'atana." 
James4:8 S'oossaakko shiik'ite; ikka hinttekko shiik'ana. Hinttenoo nagaranchchatoo, hintte kushiyaa meec'ettite. Laa""u k'ofay de'iyaawanttoo, hintte wozanaa geeshshite." 
James4:9 Tuggattite; kayyottitenne yeekkite. Hintte miichchaa yeekoo laammite; hintte nashechchaakka kayyoo laammite. 
James4:10 Godaa sintsan hintte huup'iyaa toochchite; k'ay I hinttena d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u ootsana. 
James4:11 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, ittuu ittuwaa zigiroppite. Bare ishaa zigiriyaawenne Aa bolla pirddiyaawe higgiyaa zigireenne higgiyaa bolla pirddee. Neeni higgiyaa bolla pirddooppe, higgiyaa bolla pirddiyaawaa gidaasappe attin, higgew azazettiyaawaa gidakka." 
James4:12 Higgiyaa immiyaawenne pirddiyaawe S'oossaa s'alalaa; I ashshanawunne d'ayissanaw danddayee; shin ne shooruwaa bolla pirddiyaawe neeni oonee? 
James4:13 Hinttenoo, «Nuuni hachche woy wontti he katamaa baana; hewan laytsaa uttana; zal""ananne k'ay miishshaa wod'isana» giyaawanttoo, be'ite." 
James4:14 Wontti hintte de'uu ayaa hananenttonne erikkita; guutsa wodew hintte beettiide, guyyeppe d'ayiyaa peenuwaa mala." 
James4:15 Hewaa aggiide, «Goday gooppe, nuuni de'ana; hawaa woy hewaa ootsana» gaanaw bessee." 
James4:16 Shin hintte hai hinttenttu d'ok'k'atetsaan c'eek'ettiita; hewaa mala c'eek'uu ubbay iita. 
James4:17 Hewaa diraw, lo""obaa ootsanaw eriidde ootsenna uraw hewe nagaraa." 
James5:1 Haikka hinttenoo dure asatoo, hintte bolla yiyaa tuggaw «Aayye! Aayye!» yaagiide yeekkitenne zilaalite." 
James5:2 Hintte duretetsay bay diggeedda; k'ay hintte afilaakka bilay mi diggeedda. 
James5:3 Hintte work'k'aynne hintte biray shi'i diggeedda. K'ay he shi'ay hintte bolla markkattana; hintte bollaakka tamaadan maana. Hintte hintte miishshaa sintsaw dagayi de'iita. 
James5:4 Akeekite; hintte gaden katsaa k'oyc'eedda asatoo c'iggibeenna kiraa miishshay waassee; unttunttu waasuu wolk'k'aama Godaa haytsaan sisetteedda. 
James5:5 Hinttew injjetina, sa'aan ishaliide de'eeddita; shukaa gallassaw d'iikkiyaawaadan, hintte bollaa d'iikkeeddita." 
James5:6 S'illo asaa bolla pirddeeddita; k'ay Aa wod'eeddita; I hinttenanna ek'ettenna. 
James5:7 Hewaa diraw, taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, Goday yaana gakkanaw genc'c'ite; biittaa goshiyaawe adilliyaa iraynne assuuraa iray yaana gakkanaw genc'c'iide, al""o katsaa I wooti naagiide gatsi akkintto be'ite." 
James5:8 Hinttekka k'ay genc'c'ite; hintte wozanaa minisite. Ayaw gooppe, Godaa yuussay matatteedda." 
James5:9 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, S'oossay hintte bolla pirddenna mala, ittuu ittuwaa bolla zuuzummoppite. Be'ite, pirddiyaawe penggiyaan ek'k'eedda." 
James5:10 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, waayiyaassinne genc'c'aw leemisuwaa gideeddawantta, Godaa suntsan haasayeedda nabatuwaa hassayite." 
James5:11 Be'ite, danddayiide genc'c'eeddawantta nuuni anjjetteeddawantta geetto. Iyyooba genc'c'aa hintte siseeddita; k'ay Goday aw wurssetsaan immeeddawaakka beeddita. Ayaw gooppe, Goday maarotaynne k'aretay kumeeddawaa." 
James5:12 Shin ubbaappe kase, taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, saluwaan gidina, woy sa'aan gidina, woy hara c'aak'uwaan gidina, ayankka c'aak'k'oppite. Shin S'oossaa pirddan hintte gelennaadan, hintte yewuu Ee giyaawaa gidooppe, «Ee» giite; gidenna giyaawaa gidooppe, «Gidenna» giite." 
James5:13 Hintte giddon waayettiyaa uray ooninne de'ooppe, S'oossaa woosso; nashettiyaa uray ooninne de'ooppe, yes's'iide galato." 
James5:14 Hintteppe sakettiyaa uray ooninne de'ooppe, ammaniyaa asaa kaaletsiyaa c'imatuwaa barekko s'eeso; unttunttu Godaa suntsan zayitiyaa Aa okkiide, aw S'oossaa woossino." 
James5:15 Ammanuwaan S'oossaa woosseedda woosay hargganchchaa patsana; Godaykka Aa harggiyaappe dentsana; k'ay nagaraa I ootseeddawaa gidooppekka Goday aw atto gaana. 
James5:16 Hewaa diraw, hintte pas'ana mala, hintte nagaraa ittuu ittoo paas'itenne ittuu ittoo S'oossaa woossite; s'illo asaa woosay wolk'k'aama oosuwaa ootsee." 
James5:17 Eelaas nu mala asaa. Iray sa'aan bukkennaadan, I minisiide, S'oossaa woossina heezzu laytsanne usuppun agenaa sa'aan iray bukkibeenna." 
James5:18 Laa'entsuwaa S'oossaa I woossina, saluwaappe iray bukkeedda; sa'aykka bare katsaa mokkeedda." 
James5:19 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hintteppe ooninne tumuwaappe wora booppe, k'ay ittuu Aa guyye he tumuwaakko zaarooppe," 
James5:20 nagaranchchaa Aa balaa ogiyaappe zaariyaa ooninne Aa shemppuwaa hayk'uwaappe ashshanawaanne daro nagaraa kammanawaa ero. 
1Peter1:1 Taani, Yesuusi Kiristtoosi kiitteedda P'es'iroosi, S'oossay dooreedda asatoo P'ans's'oosa gadiyaan, Galaatiyaa gadiyaan, K'ap'p'adook'iyaa gadiyaan, Iisiyaa biittaaninne Biitaaniyaa gadiyaan betiyaan de'iyaawanttoo dabddaabbiyaa s'aafay." 
1Peter1:2 Yesuusi Kiristtoosaw hintte azazettana malanne Aa suutsan geeyyana mala, S'oossay Aawuu dooreedda hinttenttoo bare Ayyaanan geeshsheeddawanttoo, aad'd'o keekatetsaynne sarotetsay gido." 
1Peter1:3 Nuuni S'oossaa, nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa Aawuwaa, bare maarotetsaa daruwaadankka nuuna laa'entsuwaa yeleeddawaa, Yesuusi Kiristtoosa hayk'uwaappe dentseeddawaan nuw de'uwaa hidootaa immeeddawaa galateetto." 
1Peter1:4 K'ay S'oossay hinttenttoo immana daro laatay wook'k'ennawe, bayennawenne d'ayennawe saluwaan naagee." 
1Peter1:5 Hewekka hinttenttoo, S'oossaa wolk'k'aan ammanuwaan naagetti uttiide, atotetsaw giigeeddawanttoo wurssetsaa wodiyaan k'onc'c'anawaa." 
1Peter1:6 Hai guutsaa wodew haray atto dumma dumma paac'iyaan hintte paac'ettanaw koshshooppekka, hawaan daro nashettite." 
1Peter1:7 Hewe haray atto, tamaan yeggina d'ayiyaa work'k'aappekka hintte ammanuu daro al""onne bali bayinnawaa gidiyaawaa bessanaassa; yaatiide Yesuusi Kiristtoosi beettiyaa wode, galataa, bonchchuwaanne sabaa hintte akkana." 
1Peter1:8 Hintte Aa erana d'ayooppekka, siik'iita; hintte ha""i Aa be'ana d'ayooppekka, ammaniita. K'ay hintte hintte ammanoo polo gidiyaa hintte shemppuwaa atotetsaa akkiyaa diraw, odanaw danddayettenna bonchchuu kumeedda nashechchaa nashettiita." 
1Peter1:9  
1Peter1:10 S'oossay hinttenttoo immana aad'd'o keekatetsaabaw timbbitiyaa odeedda nabatuu loytsi biddiide, ha atotetsaabaa koyyeeddino." 
1Peter1:11 Unttunttun de'iyaa Kiristtoosa Ayyaanay Kiristtoosa tuggaabaanne hewaappe guyyiyaan yaana bonchchuwaabaa kasetiide markkattiidde, awude woy waaneedda wodiyaan yaanenttonne akeekisseeddawaadan, unttunttu koyyeeddino." 
1Peter1:12 He timbbitiyaa odiyaawanttu ootseedda oosuu hinttessappe attin, unttunttu huup'iyaassa gidennawaa S'oossay unttunttoo k'onc'c'isseedda; ha""i hintte siseedda mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa hinttenttoo odeedda asatuu, barew saluwaappe kiitetteedda Geeshsha Ayaanaa wolk'k'an odeeddino. Hewaa kiitanchchatuukka be'anaw amottiino." 
1Peter1:13 Hewaa diraw, oosuwaa ootsanaw hintte wozanaan k'ofaa giigissiidde hintte huup'iyaa naagite. Yesuusi Kiristtoosi k'onc'c'iyaa wode aad'd'o keekatetsaa hintte akkiyaa diraw, kumentsaa hidootaan naagite." 
1Peter1:14 S'oossaw azazettiyaa naanaadan; hintte kase erennaan amotteedda amuwaa kaalloppite. 
1Peter1:15 Shin hinttena s'eeseedda S'oossay geeshsha gideeddawaadan, hinttekka hintte oosuwaa ubbaan geeshsha gidite. S'oossaa Mas'aafan, «Taani geeshsha gidiyaa diraw, hinttekka geeshsha gidite» geetettiide s'aafetteedda." 
1Peter1:16  
1Peter1:17 Asaa huup'iyaan huup'iyaan deemuwaa s'eellennan Aa oosuwaadan pirddiyaa S'oossaa woossiidde hintte, «Nu Aabboo» giide Aa s'eesiyaawaa gidooppe, ha alamiyaan bete gidiide hintte de'iyaa wodiyaan yashshatetsaan de'ite." 
1Peter1:18 Hintte hintte aawotuwaappe laatteedda patsenna de'uwaappe wozetteeddawe, d'ayiyaa biraa woy work'k'aa malaana gidennawaa eriita; borisiyaabay woy k'itay bayinna dorssaa suutsaadan, al""o Kiristtoosa suutsan hintte wozetteeddita." 
1Peter1:19  
1Peter1:20 S'oossay sa'ay med'ettanaappe kase Kiristtoosa doori wotseedda; shin hintte diraw, ha wodiyaa wurssetsaan I beetteedda." 
1Peter1:21 Hintte ammanuunne hintte akkana giide nashechchan naagi utteeddabay S'oossaan de'ana mala, S'oossay hayk'uwaappe Aa dentsiide, aw bonchchuwaa immeeddawaa aan ammaniita." 
1Peter1:22 Tumatetsaw hintte azazettiyaawan, lo""a malatiyaa iitatetsay bayinnaan hintte ishatuwaa siik'anaw hintte huup'iyaa geeshshiide, ittuu ittuwaanna minisiide wozanaappe siik'ettite." 
1Peter1:23 Hintte hayk'k'iyaa zeretsaappe laa'entsuwaa yelettibeykkita; shin med'inaw de'iyaawaanne sintsawukka de'ana S'oossaa k'aalaan hayk'k'enna zeretsaappe yeletteeddita. 
1Peter1:24 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Asay ubbay maataa mala; Aa bonchchuu ubbaykka maataa c'iishshaa mala. Maatay melee; c'iishshaykka k'ok'k'ofettee." 
1Peter1:25 Shin Godaa k'aalay med'inaw de'ee» yaagee. Hawe hinttenttoo Goday odeedda mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa. 
1Peter2:1 Hewaa diraw, hintteppe iitatetsaa ubbaa, c'immiyaawaa ubbaa, lo""a malatiyaa iitatetsaa, k'anaatiyaanne zigirssaa ubbaa diggite." 
1Peter2:2 Goday keeka gideeddawaa hintte de'uwaan be'eeddawaa gidooppe, ha""i yeletteedda gac'ino naanatuwaadan, ushiidde dic'c'anawunne attanaw s'illo gideedda ayaanaa maatsaa laamotite." 
1Peter2:3  
1Peter2:4 Godaakko de'o shuchchaakko shiik'ite. Asay Aa is's'eedda; shin S'oossaa matan I dooretteedda alo. 
1Peter2:5 Hinttekka k'ay de'o shuchchaadan, geeshsha k'eesaa gidiide, Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana S'oossaa nashechchiyaa ayaanaa yarshshuwaa S'oossaw yarshshanaw, hintte hintte huup'ew ayaana keetsaadan kees'ettite." 
1Peter2:6 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay, «Be'ite, taani S'iyoone giyaa katamaan golliyaa godaa s'ap'uwaa minisiyaa, dooretteedda, al""o shuchchaa wotsay; aan ammaniyaa ooninne yeellatenna» yaagee." 
1Peter2:7 Hewaa diraw, ha shuchchay hinttenttoo ammaniyaawanttoo daro al""a; shin ammanennawanttoo, «Gimbbiyaawanttu kad'eedda shuchchay godaa s'ap'uwaa minisiyaa, ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa shuchchaa gideedda» yaagee." 
1Peter2:8 K'aykka, «Ha shuchchay asaa d'ubbiyaa shuchchaanne asaa kunddissiyaa zaallaa» yaagee; unttunttu S'oossaa k'aalaa ammanenna diraw, unttunttoo kasenna k'ofetteeddawaadan d'ubetteeddino." 
1Peter2:9 Shin S'oossay d'umaappe maalalissiyaa bare poo'oo hinttena s'eeseedda; hintte Aa ooratsa oosuwaa odanaw dooretteedda zare; hintte kaatiyaa k'eesatuwaa; geeshsha asanne S'oossaw buzo asaa. 
1Peter2:10 Hintte kase S'oossaa asaa gidikkita; shin hai hintte Aa asaa; hintte kase maarotetsaa akkibeykkita; shin hai maarotetsaa akkeeddita. 
1Peter2:11 Ta dabbatoo, hintte ha sa'aan imatsaanne bete gidiide de'iyaawantta gideeddawaadan, ubbaa wode hintte shemppuwaanna olettiyaa asatetsaa amuwaappe hintte haakkana mala, taani hinttena woossay." 
1Peter2:12 Amanenna Asay hinttena iitabaa ootsiyaawanttudan zigiriyaa wode, Kiristtoosi yiyaa gallassi hintte lo""o oosuwaa unttunttu akeekiide, S'oossaa galatana mala, hintte de'uwaa unttunttu giddon loytsi naagite." 
1Peter2:13 Godaa diraw, asaa higgiyaa ubbaw moodettite; kaatiikka ubbaappe bolla gidiyaa diraw, aw moodettite." 
1Peter2:14 K'ay gadiyaa mooddiyaawanttookka moodettite. Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu iitabaa ootsiyaawantta muranawunne lo""obaa ootsiyaawantta galatanaw kaatiyaappe kiitetteeddino." 
1Peter2:15 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay hintte hintte lo""o oosuwaan kad'iyaa eeyaa asatuwaa haasayaa c'o""u udanawaa koyyee." 
1Peter2:16 Ayiletetsaappe kesiide, S'oossaa ayiliyaadan de'iteppe attin, he ayiletetsaappe keseeddawaa iitatetsaa gentsiyaawaa ootsoppite." 
1Peter2:17 Asaa ubbaa bonchchite. Hintte ishatuwaa siik'ite. S'oossaw yayyite. Kaatiyaa bonchchite. 
1Peter2:18 Ayilatoo, hintte lo""o godatuwaa s'alalawunne ashikke godatuwaa s'alalaw gidennaan, iitatookka daro yayyiide moodettite." 
1Peter2:19 Ayaw gooppe, Asay naak'k'iyaa wode waayettiyaa uray S'oossaa k'oppiide, oge baynnaan naak'ettooppe S'oossay Aa anjjana." 
1Peter2:20 Ayaw gooppe, hintte nagaraa ootsina, hinttena dechchiyaa wode, hintte danddayooppe, hinttenttoo ay galatay de'ii? Shin lo""obaa ootsiide waayiyaa hintte danddayooppe, S'oossay hinttena hewoo anjjana." 
1Peter2:21 S'oossay hinttena s'eeseeddawe hewaa diraassa; ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosi hinttenttoo waayettee; hintte Aa k'atamaa kaallana mala, hinttenttoo leemisuwaa gideedda." 
1Peter2:22 Nagaraa I ootsibeenna; bare doonaappe wordduwaa haasayibeenna. 
1Peter2:23 Asay barena boriyaa wode, zaariide boribeenna; waayettiyaa wodekka manddibeenna. Shin s'illuwaa pirddiyaa S'oossaw barena aatsiide immeedda." 
1Peter2:24 Nuuni nagaraw hayk'k'iide, s'illotetsaw de'ana mala, Kiristtoosi bare huup'ew bare ashuwaan nu nagaraa mask'k'aliyan tookkeedda; hintte Aa maytsaan pas'eeddita." 
1Peter2:25 Ayaw gooppe, hintte ogii baleedda dorssaa mala; shin ha""i hintte shemppuwaa heemmiyaawaakkonne naagiyaawaakko simmeeddita." 
1Peter3:1 Hewaadankka machchetoo, hintte asinatuwaappe S'oossaa k'aalaw azazettena ittuu ittuu de'ooppekka, hintte palumettennan, unttunttu hintte yashshatetsaanne hintte geeshsha de'uwaa be'iide s'oonettana mala, unttunttoo moodettite." 
1Peter3:2  
1Peter3:3 Hintte hintte huup'iyaa alobaan giigissiyaawaaninne work'k'aa wotsiyaawaan woy alo mayuwaa mayiyaawaan hinttenttu bolla bagga loytsoppite. 
1Peter3:4 Shin hintte garssan k'osetteedda asatetsaa lootetsay S'oossaa sintsan hinttenttoo daro alo gidiide, d'ayenna ashikkenne woppu geedda ayaanaa gido." 
1Peter3:5 Ayaw gooppe, hewaadan S'oossaan hidooteedda geeshsha mac'c'a asatuu beni wode barenttu asinaw moodettiide, barentta daro loytseeddino." 
1Peter3:6 Hewaadan Saara Abraahaama, «Ta godaw» yaaga s'eesaadde, aw azazettaaddu; hinttekka ittibawunne yayyenaan lo""obaa ootsooppe, I naanatuwaa." 
1Peter3:7 Hewaadan asinatoo, hintte mac'c'a asatuwaana akeekan ittippe de'ite. Unttunttoo daaburanchcha asatetsay de'iyaa diraw, unttuntta bonchchite; hintte woosay d'ubettenna mala, S'oossay immeedda de'uwaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa unttunttu hinttenanna ittippe laattino." 
1Peter3:8 Wurssetsaan, ubbay itti k'ofaan de'ite. Ittuu ittoo k'arettite; ishatuwaadan siik'ettite; k'ay ittuu ittoo keekiyaawanttanne hintte huup'iyaa kawushshiyaawantta gidite." 
1Peter3:9 Iitaa diraw iitaa woy shek'aa diraw shek'aa zaaroppite; hewaa aggiide, S'oossay hinttenttu anjjuwaa laattanaadan hinttena s'eeseedda diraw, anjjite." 
1Peter3:10 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossaa Mas'aafay hawaadan yaagee; «De'uwaa dosiyaawenne lo""o gallassaa be'anaw koyyiyaawe oona gidooppenne bare ins's'arssan iitabaa haasayiyaawaanne wordduwaa odiyaawaa aggo." 
1Peter3:11 «Iitabaa ootsiyaawaa aggiide, lo""obaa ootso; sarotetsaakka loytsi koyyonne kaallanaw baas'eto." 
1Peter3:12 «Ayaw gooppe, Godaa ayfii s'illotuwaakko s'eellee; k'ay Aa haytsay ubbaa wode unttunttu woosaw dooyaa de'ee. Shin Goday iitabaa ootsiyaawantta bare hank'k'uwaa som""iyaan s'eellee» yaagee." 
1Peter3:13 Hintte loobaa ootsanaw amottooppe, hinttena k'ohanawe oonee?" 
1Peter3:14 Shin haray atto, s'illotetsaa diraw hintte waayettooppekka, anjjetteeddawantta. Asaw yayyoppitenne hirggoppite." 
1Peter3:15 Shin Kiristtoosa hintte wozanaan bonchchitenne Aa hintte Godaa ootsite. S'oossay hinttenttoo hidooteedda de'oo gaasuwaa oochchiyaa oossinne zaaruwaa immanaw ubbaa wode giigi uttite; 
1Peter3:16 shin hewaa ashikketetsaaninne yashshatetsaan ootsite. K'ay Kiristtoosan hintte de'iyaa loo de'uwaa iitabaa ootseeddawaadan, hintte bollan iitabaa haasayiyaa Asay bare zigiriyaawaan yeellatana mala, hintte wozanay geeshsha gido." 
1Peter3:17 Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay geeddawaa gidooppe, iitabaa ootseedda diraw waayettiyaawaappe, lo""obaa ootseedda diraw waayettiyaawe keeka." 
1Peter3:18 Ayaw gooppe, Kiristtoosi nuuna S'oossaakko afanaw, barew s'illo gidiidde, makkalanchchatuwaa diraw, itti gede ubbaa nagaraw hayk'k'eedda; I bare asatetsan hayk'k'eedda; shin ayyaanan pas'eedda." 
1Peter3:19 K'ay he Ayyaanan, k'ashuwaan de'iyaa ayyaanatuwaakko biide, unttunttoo k'aalaa odeedda." 
1Peter3:20 He ayyaanatuu amareeda, hosppun asatuu haatsaan atteedda markkabiyaa Nohe kees's'ishshin, S'oossay danddayiide gam""eedda wode, S'oossaw azazettibeena asaa ayyaanatuwaa." 
1Peter3:21 Hewe s'ink'k'ataw leemisuwaa gidiide, hinttena ha""i ashshee; suure wozanaappe S'oossaa woossiyaawaappe attin, bollaa k'itaa meec'c'iyaawaa gidenna; hewe hinttena Yesuusi Kiristtoosi hayk'uwaappe denddeeddawaan ashshee." 
1Peter3:22 Saluwaa biide S'oossaappe ushechcha baggan I uttiide, kiitanchchaa ubbaa, maataanna de'iyaawanttanne wolk'k'aamatuwaa mooddee." 
1Peter4:1 Hewaa diraw, Kiristtoosi bare ashuwaan nuw waayetteedda diraw, hinttekka he k'ofaan danc'c'ettite. Ayaw gooppe, bare ashuwaan waayetteedda uray nagaraa ootsiyaawaa aggeedda." 
1Peter4:2 Hawaappe sintsan, ha sa'aan shemppuwaanna de'anaw atteedda wodiyaan, S'oossay koyyiyaawaadan de'anaw bessiyaawaappe attin, asaa amuwaadan de'anaw bessena." 
1Peter4:3 Ayaw gooppe, ammanenna Asay ootsanaw dosiyaawaa hintte ootsiidde, woshummanaw kajjeeliyaawaan, amuwaan, matsuwaan, yetsaan, ushshaan, pokkiyaa eek'aw goyinniyaawan, de'eedda kase aad'd'eedda wodii hinttenttoo gidanawaa." 
1Peter4:4 Ammanenna asaana hintte shoray bayinna oosuwaa ittippe ootsenna diraw maalalettiide, hinttena boriino." 
1Peter4:5 Shin unttunttu pas'a de'iyaa asaa bollanne hayk'k'eedda asaa bolla pirddanaw giigi utteedda S'oossaw zaaruwaa immana. 
1Peter4:6 Hayk'k'eedda asay bare asatetsan Asay pirddettiyaawaadan pirddettanawunne k'ay ayyaanan S'oossay de'iyaawaadan de'anaw, wonggalaa mishiraachchuu unttunttoo hewoo odetteedda." 
1Peter4:7 Ubbabawukka wurssetsay matatteedda. Hewaa diraw, S'oossaa woossanaw k'ofaan geeyyiide, hinttena naagitenne minnite." 
1Peter4:8 Siik'uu daro nagaraa kammiyaa diraw, ubbabaappe aatsiide ittuu ittuwaanna wozanaappe siik'ettite." 
1Peter4:9 Zuuzummennan ittuu ittuwaa imatsatetsaan mokkite. 
1Peter4:10 Hintte huup'iyaan huup'iyaan S'oossaappe dumma dumma aad'd'o keekatetsaa akkeeddawaadankka, S'oossaa dumma imuwaa hadaraa loytsi kesiyaawanttudan, ittuu ittoo ootsite." 
1Peter4:11 Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana ubbabaan S'oossay galatettana mala, ooninne odiyaawaa gidooppe, k'aalaa S'oossaappe akkiide odiyaawaadan odo. K'ay ooninne maaddiyaawaa gidooppe, S'oossay aw immiyaa wolk'k'an maaddo. Bonchchuunne godatetsay S'oossaw med'inaappe med'inaw gido. Amen""i." 
1Peter4:12 Ta siik'atoo, hintte giddon tamaadan guuddiidde paac'c'iyaa waayyii yiyaawaa ooratsabay haniyaawaadan malalettoppite." 
1Peter4:13 Shin Kiristtoosa bonchchuu beettiyaa wode hintte nashettana mala, aanana waayettiyaawaan nashetite." 
1Peter4:14 Asay hinttena Kiristtoosa suntsaa diraw boriyaawaa gidooppe, hintte anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe, bonchcho Ayyaanay, S'oossaa Ayyaanay, hintte bolla shemppana." 
1Peter4:15 Hintteppe ooninne shemppuwaa wod'eeddawaadan, woy kayisuwaadan, woy iitabaa ootseedda asaadan, woy hara asaa yewuwaa geleeddawaadan waayettoppo." 
1Peter4:16 Shin ooninne Kiristtaaniyaa gidiyaa diraw waayettooppe, Kiristtoosa suntsaa diraw, S'oossaa galatanaappe attin, yeellatoppo." 
1Peter4:17 Ayaw gooppe, pirdday S'oossaa golliyaan doomettiyaa wodii gakkeedda. K'ay he pirdday koyiro nu bolla doomettiyaawaa gidooppe, Aa wonggalaw azazettenawanttu wurssetsay ayaa gidanee?" 
1Peter4:18 S'illo Asay tuggaan attiyaawaa gidooppe, makkalanchchaynne nagaranchchay yaatina waananee?" 
1Peter4:19 Hewaa diraw k'ay, S'oossay geeddawaadan waayettiyaawanttu lo""obaa ootsiidde, barenttu shemppuwaa hadaraa barena med'd'eedda ammanettiyaa S'oossaw immino." 
1Peter5:1 Simmi taani woosa golliyaa c'imatuwaanna c'ima gidiyaawenne, Kiristtoosa waayiyaa markkattiyaawe, k'ay k'onc'c'ana bonchchuwaa shaakkanawe hintte giddon de'iyaa c'imatuwaa zoray." 
1Peter5:2 Hintte giddon de'iyaa S'oossaa wudiyaa S'oossay koyyiyaawaadan heemmite. Dosuwaanappe attin, wolk'k'an gidenna. K'ay hintte go""a s'alalaa s'eellennan, lo""o k'ofaan heemmite." 
1Peter5:3 Wudew hintte leemisuwaa giditeppe attin, hintte heemmiyaawantta wolk'k'aan heemmoppite." 
1Peter5:4 K'ay heemmiyaawanttu kaappuu k'onc'c'iyaa wode, bayenna bonchcho kalachchaa hintte akkana." 
1Peter5:5 Hewaadankka yalaga asatoo, c'imatoo moodettite. Ubbaykka ittuu ittoo ootsanaw hintte huup'iyaa kawushshiyaawaa afilaadan mayyite. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay otorettiyaawantta is's'ee; shin barena kawushshiyaawanttoo aad'd'o keekatetsaa immee." 
1Peter5:6 S'oossay bare loo wodiyaan hinttena d'ok'k'u ootsana mala, wolk'k'aama S'oossaa kushiyaappe garssanna hinttena toochchite." 
1Peter5:7 I hinttenttoo k'oppiyaa diraw, hinttena hirggissiyaa ubbabaa Aa bolla olite." 
1Peter5:8 S'alahiyaa kaappuu, hintte morkkii, mittiyaa uraa koyyiide, gudiyaa gaammuwaadan hintte yuushshuwaan yuuyyiyaa diraw naagettitenne beegottite." 
1Peter5:9 Sa'aan de'iyaa hintte ishatuu hewaadan waayettiyaawaa eriide, ammanuwaan minniide, aanana ek'ettite." 
1Peter5:10 Aad'o keekatetsaa ubbaa S'oossay, bare med'inaa bonchchoo Kiristtoosi Yesuusa baggana hinttena s'eeseeddawe, amareeda wodiyaa hintte waayetteeddawaappe guyyiyaan, I bare huup'ew hinttena shiri ooratsananne minisana. K'ay I hinttena maaddananne baasi essana." 
1Peter5:11 Wolk'k'ay med'inaappe med'inaa gakkanaw aw gido. Ameni. 
1Peter5:12 Hawe S'oossaa tumu aad'd'o keekatetsaa gidiyaawaa taani hinttenttoo markkattaaddenne hinttena zoraadde, hinttenttoo k'antsaan s'aafeedda dabddaabbiyaa ammanettiyaa ishaa gaade taani k'oppiyaa Sillaase bolla kiittaad; he aad'd'o keekatetsan minneeddita." 
1Peter5:13 Hinttenana ittippe dooretteedda Baabloonen de'iyaa woosa golliyaa asaynne ta na'ay Mark'k'oossi hinttena «Saro saro» giino. 
1Peter5:13 Hinttenana ittippe dooretteedda Baabloonen de'iyaa woosa golliyaa asaynne ta na'ay Mark'k'oossi hinttena «Saro saro» giino. 
1Peter5:14 Siik'uwaa yeretaa yerettiidde, ittuu ittuwaa sarotite. Hinttew, Kiristtoosanna ittuwaa gideeddawanttoo ubbatoo sarotetsay gido. Amen""i." 
2Peter1:1 Taani Simooni P'es'iroosi, Yesuusi Kiristtoosa s'illotetsaa baggana nuwaa mala ammanuwaa akkeeddawanttoo, ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafay." 
2Peter1:2 S'oossaanne nu Godaa Yesuusa hintte eriyaawan aad'd'o keekatetsaynne sarotetsay hinttenttoo palahiide gido. 
2Peter1:3 Nuuni S'oossaa bonchchuwaanne lootetsaa laattana mala, nuuna s'eeseeddawaa nuuni eriyaawan, de'uwaassinne S'oossaa malatussaw nuuna koshshiyaawaa ubbaa S'oossaa wolk'k'ay nuw immeedda." 
2Peter1:4 Hintte Aa imuwaa baggana sa'aan de'iyaa bayizziyaa amuwaappe kessi akkanaaddaaninne S'oossaa S'oossatetsaa laattanaadan, I bare immana geedda daro wolk'k'aamanne al""o imuwaa nuw immeedda." 
2Peter1:5 Hewaa diraw, hinttena bessiyaawaa ubbaa min ootsiidde, hintte ammanuwaa bolla lo""otetsaa, lo""otetsaa bolla eratetsaa," 
2Peter1:6 eratetsaa bolla hinttena naagiyaawaa, hinttena naagiyaawaa bolla genc'c'aa, genc'c'aa bolla S'oossaa malatiyaawaa," 
2Peter1:7 S'oossaa malatiyaawaa bolla ishatetsaa siik'uwaa, ishatetsaa siik'uwaa bolla siik'uwaa gujjite." 
2Peter1:8 Ayaw gooppe, hawanttu hinttenttoo loytsi dariyaawaa gidooppe, hinttena Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa eratetsan tishshanne ayifiyaana de'iyaawantta ootsana." 
2Peter1:9 Shin hewanttu baynna uray bare matan de'iyaawaa s'alalaa demmee; k'ay I k'ook'aa; I kase ootseedda nagaray atto geetetteeddawaa dogeedda. 
2Peter1:10 Hewaa diraw, taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo, hinttena S'oossay s'eeseeddawaanne dooreeddawaa loytsi erissanaw, kasewaappe aad'd'i minnite; ayaw gooppe, hintte hewaa ootsiyaawaa gidooppe, d'ubettikkita." 
2Peter1:11 Hewaadan k'ay nu Godaanne nuuna ashshiyaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa med'inaa kawutetsaa geliyaa kumentsaa maatay hinttenttoo imettana. 
2Peter1:12 Hewaa diraw, hintte ha yewatuwaa eriyaawaa gidooppekka, k'ay hintte oyk'k'eedda tumuwaan minneeddawantta gidooppekka, taani hinttena ha yewatuwaa ubbaa wode hassayissiyaawaa aggikke." 
2Peter1:13 Taani pas'a de'eedda keenan, hinttena hassayissaade k'aasetsanaw koshshiyaawaa taw malatee."
